# [A new Speaker of the House portends more chaos in Washington](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=138289680&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM4Mjg5NjgwLCJpYXQiOjE2OTgyNzg2MjIsImV4cCI6MTcwMDg3MDYyMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Z3BMnc7rCPr4Mz2B67qEBaQIqYtvR3lIAYU4htqdqNM)
### Congress elected Mike Johnson to serve as the new Speaker of the House, despite his history of spreading dangerous disinformation--and the prospect of escalating conflict across Washington.
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/redirect/231b6fb9-2dc4-4895-9b57-5252fa901e46?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaGFoaWRidXR0YXIuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL3AvYS1uZXctc3BlYWtlci1vZi10aGUtaG91c2UtcG9ydGVuZHM_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1zdWJzdGFjayZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJmFjdGlvbj1yZXN0YWNrLWNvbW1lbnQmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWVtYWlsLXJlc3RhY2stY29tbWVudCZyPTFodnI2MCIsInAiOjEzODI4OTY4MCwicyI6MTAxODU5NywiZiI6dHJ1ZSwidSI6OTA1MDExOTIsImlhdCI6MTY5ODI3ODYyMiwiZXhwIjoxNzAwODcwNjIyLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMCIsInN1YiI6ImxpbmstcmVkaXJlY3QifQ.G5IIYfdMlttVWPvAPdIUuRflNJVDnUdL_icCtMnZwi4?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/shahidbuttar/p/a-new-speaker-of-the-house-portends?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)
---
Over the past three weeks, [Congress reduced itself--and democracy in America--to an international laughing stock](https://substack.com/redirect/006f2bc3-dd14-43d1-9370-dde58f4f7f98?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Some may perceive the election of a new Speaker of the House as a step forward after three weeks of rudderless vacancy.
But the election of Rep. Mike Johnson (R-LA) to serve as Speaker will ultimately only prime the pump for escalating crises that will continue to besiege Washington in the weeks and months ahead.
Johnson's agenda portends not unity, but increasing division.
### **Disinformation inviting election controversies**
Johnson was [among the lawyers defending Trump](https://substack.com/redirect/9b19815f-7245-4a09-9d38-778df90aec6e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from the first of his impeachment proceedings. While his demeanor was less brash than some of his GOP House colleagues, he was no less committed to the same revolutionary right wing goals.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0b2388ed-367a-4d51-8689-ce4dca6bd744?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Image from Wikimedia
Johnson [denied that Biden won the 2020 election](https://substack.com/redirect/e4191fe0-5209-4e69-a160-05bf6f37d803?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), yet is now second in line for the presidency behind Vice President Kamala Harris. He also played a key role among Republican election deniers in Congress, constructing an argument--described by _the New York Times_ as "narrow and lawyerly"--to reject the vote counts from several states based on how they had changed voting rules to accommodate public health during the COVID-19 pandemic.
Not only did Johnson propose that legal theory, but he [organized support for it](https://substack.com/redirect/7e293cd4-38be-4ba4-852c-010a93d1145c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) among his colleagues, 100 of whom co-signed an _amicus_ brief he wrote and filed in Texas seeking the invalidation of votes from four key swing states.
If you thought Washington was dysfunctional before, just wait.
What do those documented actions indicate about his potential posture vis-a-vis the 2024 presidential election? That contest has already [reduced itself to a farce](https://substack.com/redirect/576a6038-2306-493e-bc94-8ac18f387225?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), with the exception of [a visionary](https://substack.com/redirect/3e94770b-0dde-4b99-867f-6e44c35eaae6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) poised to expose the complicity of the corporate political parties against the American people.
But, setting aside the overt fraud in blocking debates and effectively coronating nominees more than a year before the election, allowing a figure like Johnson to lead the House--which plays [a formal role in certifying the eventual vote](https://substack.com/redirect/148b53fd-996c-4fc7-be65-fc00552afa16?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--is a recipe for disaster.
Over 22,000 subscribers read this newsletter. Fewer than 100 support it. To receive new posts, feel free to subscribe for free. Becoming a paid subscriber helps expand my work and increase the frequency and range of my posts & podcasts.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..lrY5nnRQxKco4prWU8vLo83X-E5yFrkt8cfGf3LwJSU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=138289680)
In the wake of Johnson's election as Speaker earlier today, President Biden responded to questions about his potential role in denying the results of the next election. Biden [responded](https://substack.com/redirect/eb3868cc-5476-47db-9b8d-aa1c14976767?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that he was unperturbed, "just like I was not worried that the last guy would be able to overturn the election. They had about 60 lawsuits, and it went all the way to the Supreme Court and every time they lost. I understand the Constitution."
If Biden understood the Constitution, he might realize that the Supreme Court has the power to arbitrarily decide what it requires, and has recently [used that authority](https://substack.com/redirect/462ac071-d254-456b-a8c8-79f1a3e39660?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) without any concern for institutional restraint or popular legitimacy.
If you thought the chaos after the 2020 election was disappointing, you might want to strap in for 2024.
### **An impending showdown over military "aid"**
I've [written](https://substack.com/redirect/d6c6c7e0-2545-4289-8945-3d4bb6e0ecbc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) time [and](https://substack.com/redirect/cd34a9db-9de5-4b4d-b999-47671746a8c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) time [again](https://substack.com/redirect/eba9d55a-d201-4590-b6b6-78e2549e0ac4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about the [military-industrial corruption](https://substack.com/redirect/ab61f545-382c-455e-af06-1c8e4575ee17?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that tends to unite Washington behind whatever Wall Street or the Pentagon want. I've also noted that, while some figures in the GOP have mouthed concerns for long overdue Pentagon accountability in the context of the ongoing war in Ukraine, [they remain hawks](https://substack.com/redirect/cd34a9db-9de5-4b4d-b999-47671746a8c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) too willing to subsidize weapons for Israel or to posture vis-a-vis China.
Johnson seems to typify that observation. He has been [outspoken](https://substack.com/redirect/73690318-ccee-46b2-9851-09254f8d49b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) against continued support from Washington for the proxy war against Russia in eastern Europe.
But Johnson's stance against military-industrial corruption is like a broken clock telling the right time for two fleeting moments each day.
He's right about one thing: Washington has already spent way too much money for weapons for Ukraine, and each penny more represents institutional disdain for the struggles of working Americans embattled by medical debt, student debt, rising gas prices, diminishing opportunity, and a continued race to the trough by billionaires heaping scorn (and debt, and desperation) upon their workers and customers.
Yet Johnson is no less committed to Israel--despite its [escalating human rights abuses](https://substack.com/redirect/2e49318f-76af-43a0-8855-f154405ece51?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--than Biden. The corporate parties in Washington might differ on some things, but when it comes to selling weapons or promoting international authoritarianism, [they tend to quickly find common ground](https://substack.com/redirect/789cf93b-02e5-4675-af87-46d9eb6da0cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Even if Johnson pushes back on Biden's latest request for weapons for Ukraine, expect the pattern of continuing subsidies for weapons to continue under his tenure as Speaker. [Biden sought $106 billion from Congress last week, only $25 billion of which is for Ukraine](https://substack.com/redirect/162714dc-b0ca-473e-ac3f-bae8576068c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Johnson might conceivably work to deny that portion of Biden's request, but the remaining $81 billion will likely sail through Congress like a kite blown by a bipartisan breeze.
Remember that [it would take about $20 billion to end homelessness](https://substack.com/redirect/d03357c9-88d1-405c-9822-c4bfd9895c51?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and finally get a roof over the head of each of America's half million inhabitants without shelter--many of whom, perversely, are veterans.
### **Get ready to rumble**
A casual observer might emerge from today's news with the impression that Johnson's election resolves the stalemate that has kept Congress unable to conduct its work over the past three weeks.
That, however, would be an inaccurate impression.
The reason a vacancy emerged in the first place was because the previous Speaker, Kevin McCarthy (R-CA), [joined forces with Democrats a month ago](https://substack.com/redirect/6df0ac68-87f8-4c4c-b049-d4fa6d30ae26?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to pass a stopgap bill to keep the federal government running beyond a previous debt ceiling deadline.
That bill only covered spending for about two months, meaning that yet another government shutdown is looming in only three weeks. And the rancor that led to McCarthy's removal continues to simmer.
On the one hand, Johnson has articulated a seemingly thoughtful [proposal to schedule appropriations bills for the various federal departments](https://substack.com/redirect/da401ae1-ea18-40f7-a401-ddcba169f3e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in sequence over the coming weeks. But his schedule is admittedly "ambitious," and presumes that the House will be able to find consensus on each of them without extended debate.
The House, meanwhile, hasn't even been able to agree on who its own leader would be for the past three weeks. Expecting policymakers to easily find agreement on a dozen different appropriation bills is not unlike expecting the war in Gaza to magically resolve itself without any further civilian casualties.
If you thought Washington was dysfunctional before, just wait.
I write to inform and educate readers who want analysis beyond the headlines and corporate perspective that largely defines "journalism" in the U.S. Share this post with your friends to help inform them, too!
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=138289680&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM4Mjg5NjgwLCJpYXQiOjE2OTgyNzg2MjIsImV4cCI6MTcwMDg3MDYyMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Z3BMnc7rCPr4Mz2B67qEBaQIqYtvR3lIAYU4htqdqNM)

In a world full of ironies, this bizarre confluence of factors is enough to make anyone's head spin...

**[If you’re fired up and ready to defeat Mike Lawler, put an end to the disastrous GOP circus, and retake our House majority, chip in $5 or any amount you can right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72183770/434564526/-1250271359?refcode=em23_231025_eom1_fndd_gq_act___mj_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231025_eom1_fndd_gq_act___mj_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=85443c51-9373-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTQ0M2M1MS05MzczLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qKPymRYqhQ7geiiBo10GPI2aFLNt849dAL9aXYF2ad0=)**

Now, here’s why your support at this moment is so critical.

After four nominees and over three weeks without a House Speaker, Rep. Mike Lawler joined extreme MAGA Republicans to elect the new House Speaker Mike Johnson.

To be clear, Mike Johnson is just Jim Jordan without the sex abuse coverup baggage. Their voting records are practically identical:
* Both led the charge to overturn the 2020 election results
* Both voted against codifying same-sex and interracial marriage
* Both support a national abortion ban
* Both want to slash funding for Social Security, Medicare, and other vital programs
* Both voted against capping the price of insulin at $35 per month

House Speaker Mike Johnson even authored a federal Don’t Say Gay Law last fall. Mike Lawler’s vote for House Speaker is just par for course. He pretends to be moderate when the camera is on, but at the end of day he just votes with the extreme MAGA Republicans.

[**Our critical end-of-month fundraising deadline is just days away. name: Jon Tester
subject: down to the wire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
| Hey Peter, this will be the last email you get from me tonight.

My team just let me know that we’re still short of our end-of-month fundraising goal, and it’s coming down to the wire. We only have a few days left until the deadline, so I’m reaching out to ask this grassroots team to kick things into high gear as a last-minute push.

**Falling behind would mean serious, long-term setbacks for our campaign.** On the flipside, hitting this goal puts us in the best position to be ready for incoming attacks from Mitch McConnell and his cronies—and I know they’re coming, because McConnell already said he’s got me set in his sights.

**Peter, I’m humbly asking you to donate a split donation between my campaign and Upset the Setup to help us hit our end-of-month fundraising goal before midnight TONIGHT. Your donation goes a long way in our grassroots campaign.**

Here’s a secure link for you to give: [**CLICK HERE »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72184253/434576635/-1774289419?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=UTS_20231025_EMSPL_E3_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAxNGJjYmNmLTk2NzMtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BZ3kNpjw2UueYlmh99mLYyd9YLzhUof-Fr5JpKDct5M=) We can’t take anything for granted in this race. The other side will do anything and everything to tear me down. The only way I’ll win this thing is if you’re with me—I really mean that.

Thank you. I appreciate your support.

Jon

We only have a few days left until the deadline, so I’m reaching out to ask this grassroots team to kick things into high gear as a last-minute push. Falling behind would mean serious, long-term setbacks for our campaign. On the flipside, hitting this goal puts us in the best position to be ready for incoming attacks from Mitch McConnell and his cronies—and I know they’re coming, because McConnell already said he’s got me set in his sights. Peter, I’m humbly asking you to donate a split donation between my campaign and Upset the Setup to help us hit our end-of-month fundraising goal before midnight TONIGHT. Your donation goes a long way in our grassroots campaign. Here’s a secure link for you to give: = We can’t take anything for granted in this race. The other side will do anything and everything to tear me down. The only way I’ll win this thing is if you’re with me—I really mean that. Thank you. I appreciate your support. name: Justin Kwasa, LCV
subject: Vote Early for a Healthy Democracy + Healthy Planet
body:
Help us reach 5,000 comments to overcome corporate polluters.? Tell the EPA:
PROTECT COMMUNITIES FROM CHEMICAL DISASTERS
The EPA is now seeking public input on a new rule to require industrial facilities to disclose the hazardous chemical risks posed by their operations, take stronger actions to prevent accidents, and move quickly should an accident occur.

Corporate polluters have already killed this rule once, when Trump decided to allow these dangerous facilities to operate in secrecy. We cannot allow them to succeed again.

GOAL: 5,000 actions
TAKE ACTION https://links.messages.lcv. ? ?
? Peter ? a critical new rule from Biden's EPA would finally require dangerous industrial facilities to disclose any hazardous chemicals they contain ? and take steps to prevent and mitigate harmful accidents.

This rule will especially protect people living closest to these facilities, which are overwhelmingly low-wealth communities and communities of color, as well as workers. Decades of environmental racism ensured these hazardous facilities were located in the neighborhoods with the least resources to fight back, meaning these frontline communities are disproportionately exposed to chemical accidents and harmful pollutants that have jeopardized their health.

Here's the problem: powerful interests, like the oil and gas industry and the chemical industry, are demanding the EPA once again abandon these important protections. Unless our movement speaks up right now, we may miss out on this opportunity to advance environmental justice and worker safety, and create healthier communities and workplaces.

Please TAKE ACTION right now to protect communities from chemical hazards. To beat the chemical industry, we need to urgently deliver 5,000 comments supporting the EPA's proposed rule. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_

We've already seen the dangers these facilities can pose. In 2013, an explosion of ammonium nitrate fertilizer killed 15 people and destroyed a school, nursing home, and many homes in the city of West, Texas. The Obama administration began a painstaking process to prevent similar disasters, culminating in enhanced protections for minimizing and managing chemical risks.

But after an aggressive campaign from the chemical industry and other corporate polluters, the Trump administration abandoned the rule, choosing to prioritize corporate profits over the health of vulnerable communities and workers.

Under President Biden, the EPA can now reverse this dangerous decision and finally help protect people, especially environmental justice communities, from hazardous pollution and chemical disasters.

Don't let corporate polluters undermine critical environment protections. TAKE ACTION now to help us deliver 5,000 comments supporting environmental justice and corporate accountability. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/G8bxcg-YekhD/azdlZEV4WnFZREEwSXBZSEJEakQ2TnVudXI0ZHYvdEtGVW1YM01PbXRSQk5ldWh5a2c3SHhBQjNUL0FWS0loalQyVnNrNEpnUU1Pc3crSXJXMGV4VmxQY1ZPWTIrQ2hRc1JINitwckhUUGs9S0/c3VEVEhWWnVkajRyQ0lub3B3WlBmbmxMaitPZ3ZUcVBSYzEwb1NCc2sxaEhzaTFmTU51Nm9iNElOOTZnUC9YOGJBbVNET0FLRklwamUydUVmSXRVSGN6YnBERzlaMlRnblFSdm9qc3dCOHc9S0

Thank you for taking action to protect people and workers from environmental disasters.

Sincerely,

Madeleine Foote
Deputy Legislative Director
League of Conservation Voters ? ? ? ? ? This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=10135915&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg0MDU1MTYyNwS2&spReportId=MTg0MDU1MTYyNwS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=10135915&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg0MDU1MTYyNwS2&spReportId=MTg0MDU1MTYyNwS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv. ? ? ? ? https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/4L4XB9abWwtd/azdlZEV4WnFZREEwSXBZSEJEakQ2TnVudXI0ZHYvdEtGVW1YM01PbXRSQk5ldWh5a2c3SHhBQjNUL0FWS0loalQyVnNrNEpnUU1Pc3crSXJXMGV4VmxQY1ZPWTIrQ2hRc1JINitwckhUUGs9S0/

**URGENTGRAM: NATIONAL EMERGENCY** _**BIDEN LEADING U.S. TO WORLD WAR III**_
**Bribed By Iran?!**
Dear Fellow Patriot: In the last days since Israel was brutally attacked by the Hamas terrorist barbarians, who even chopped off the heads of 40 innocent babies, killing thousands of other people as well, our braindead criminal president Joe Biden has been cowering and getting down on his knees to the ultimate villain and “Great Satan”, the Islamic Republic of Iran. **Sure enough, this week over 21 American servicemen have been attacked in the Middle East by Iranian agents and many of them have been seriously injured, some with serious traumatic brain injuries.**
****[**CLICK HERE TO DONATE**](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=1b2aafdcf3&e=8edd2b8f7d)
What has been the response of Joe Biden? Predictably no response at all. Biden and his scared sparrow of a leftist Secretary of State, Anthony Blinkin, rather than retaliating with American might, have been busy literally begging the Iranian mullahs not to attack again. **This weakness, coupled with Biden and Blinkin handcuffing the hands of Israel to hold off cleaning out the rats nest in Gaza, from which Hams hails, is treasonous!** Coupled with Biden’s proven bribery from Communist China, Ukraine and Russia, and the conviction and sentence of 20 years in prison we obtained, this fraudulent alleged president is about to totally destroy our great nation, jeopardizing the lives of you, your children, grandchildren and future generations. **Make no mistake about it; because of Biden we are on the verge of World War III!****Biden has likely been bribed by Iran!** Now that a new House speaker has been elected, Freedom Watch and I will be petitioning him to have the Capitol Police go to the White House to have Biden arrested and jailed. Clearly, this is legal under District of Columbia law, as even citizens arrests can occur there when there is probable cause that felony crimes have been committed. With Biden, we have much more; he has been convicted of felonies and sentenced to 20 years in prison. This stupid, weak, braindead criminal must be removed legally from office before it is too late for any of us to survive his reign of terror over the people. [**Please donate handsomely with tax-deductible contributions, before this criminal, weak bribed fool drags us all in World War III.**](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=75c9e4aa9f&e=8edd2b8f7d) We are your real Justice Department. The Biden Justice Department is more like a Hitleresque “Gestapo,” which only seeks to perpetuate Biden’s and the Left’s hold on power as the nation is otherwise destroyed, and you and your loved ones lives put at risk!

[**CLICK HERE TO DONATE**](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=f3af2b0d6a&e=8edd2b8f7d) Yours in Freedom and Liberty, Larry Klayman, Esq.Chairman and General Counsel Freedom Watch, Inc.[www.freedomwatchusa.org](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=69e483d407&e=8edd2b8f7d)[leklayman@gmail.com](mailto:leklayman@gmail.com)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: BREAKING: The GOP’s new House Speaker
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=4299%2E5257348%2ExHkyV7 ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, after 22
painstaking days, Republicans finally chose a House Speaker: MAGA Rep.
Mike Johnson, who led the House effort to overturn the 2020 election
results, also happens to have been a fierce opponent of my efforts to
investigate and impeach Donald Trump.

Tom Emmer voted to certify the 2020 election result. Johnson voted to
overturn it. That’s why Emmer failed and Johnson became Speaker — the Big
Lie was the litmus test, and every single MAGA Republican got behind him.

When a reporter asked Johnson about leading the effort to overturn the
2020 election, Republicans at his back drowned out the question with boos
and told the reporter to “shut up.” But our democracy cannot afford for us
to “shut up” or stay silent in the face of another Big Lie advocate taking
control of a chamber of Congress.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=oct2023_abs_em.JYMaWc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231025_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=4299%2E5257348%2ExHkyV7 ]Derek, this is another pivotal moment for the future of our
democracy. I’m personally asking you to rush in $10 to help me respond to
an election denier becoming House Speaker. Please chip in.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=oct2023_abs_em.JN6O-P&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231025_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=4299%2E5257348%2ExHkyV7 ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=oct2023_abs_em.WRlR3Y&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231025_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=4299%2E5257348%2ExHkyV7 ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=oct2023_abs_em.PgaZxK&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231025_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=4299%2E5257348%2ExHkyV7 ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=oct2023_abs_em.RMwRmo&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231025_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=4299%2E5257348%2ExHkyV7 ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=oct2023_abs_em.IFk4qX&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231025_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=4299%2E5257348%2ExHkyV7 ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=oct2023_abs_em.EYisyV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231025_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=4299%2E5257348%2ExHkyV7 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Mike Johnson is MAGA extremism all dressed up in a suit and tie.

As two senior members of the Judiciary Committee, Johnson and I have
fought over a host of key issues from guns to immigration to his penchant
for deep state conspiracy theories. He’s anti-reproductive freedom. Anti
same-sex marriage. And supports the gutting of Social Security, Medicare,
and Medicaid. That’s just for starters.

But honestly, that’s most Republicans these days. Johnson is different
because he was the lead architect behind House Republican efforts to
overturn the 2020 election and still pushes out the Big Lie to this very
day.

But our run-ins long predate our service together on the Judiciary
Committee, and go back to the first impeachment of Donald Trump.

Mike Johnson served on Trump’s defense team during the first Senate
impeachment trial. While I presented facts and evidence about Trump’s
wrongdoings, Mike Johnson proudly parroted MAGA talking points to defend
Trump.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=oct2023_abs_em.EYisyV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231025_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=4299%2E5257348%2ExHkyV7 ]Tweet from Rep. Mike Johnson: Our defense team has done its job. We've
shown Adam Schiff & Co. have no case, no evidence, and no justification
for impeaching a duly elected president. There's only one way this
#ShamImpeachment ends -- with the full (and likely bipartisan) acquittal
of @realDonaldTrump

And just like Kevin McCarthy, Marjorie Taylor Greene, Matt Gaetz, and so
many others, I’ve earned Mike Johnson’s vehement opposition and attacks.
And I’m honored by it.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=oct2023_abs_em.JYMaWc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231025_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=4299%2E5257348%2ExHkyV7 ]Speaker Mike Johnson is the most extreme House Speaker in the history
of our country, and as a solid ally of Donald Trump we can count on him to
join the corrupt former president in doing all he can to try to block me
from making it to the Senate. I need you with me today to help me stand up
to his MAGA extremism. Please chip in if you can.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=oct2023_abs_em.JN6O-P&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231025_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=4299%2E5257348%2ExHkyV7 ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=oct2023_abs_em.WRlR3Y&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231025_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=4299%2E5257348%2ExHkyV7 ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=oct2023_abs_em.PgaZxK&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231025_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1015&akid=4299%2E5257348%2ExHkyV7 ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=oct2023_abs_em.RMwRmo&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231025_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1016&akid=4299%2E5257348%2ExHkyV7 ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=oct2023_abs_em.IFk4qX&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231025_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1017&akid=4299%2E5257348%2ExHkyV7 ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=oct2023_abs_em.EYisyV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231025_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1018&akid=4299%2E5257348%2ExHkyV7 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

If this is the best Speaker that the Republican conference can offer, then
it’s our duty to ensure this is the last one they ever have a chance to
elect.

Thank you,

Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=oct2023_abs_em.EYisyV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231025_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1019&akid=4299%2E5257348%2ExHkyV7 ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=oct2023_abs_em.p2naon&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231025_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1020&akid=4299%2E5257348%2ExHkyV7 ]DONATE MONTHLY

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=4299%2E5257348%2ExHkyV7 ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=4299%2E5257348%2ExHkyV7 ]Privacy Policy

Democrats are finally seeing our border issue for the full-on invasion it is – everyone except Joe Biden. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=8013543bb772429e8d69521d1b0cd6e7&_t=QEWKnH8L728PAlYi_Db6UlHCJK60Uqi_ep45Eg-koJB61JhnO1S_CrMTZMCAfvOYBQ6hefUFXNuHENamk0yFndf_HE2BSRSXREC9wvddkbA%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=8013543bb772429e8d69521d1b0cd6e7&_t=QEWKnH8L728PAlYi_Db6UlHCJK60Uqi_ep45Eg-koJB61JhnO1S_CrMTZMCAfvOYBQ6hefUFXNuHENamk0yFndf_HE2BSRSXREC9wvddkbA%3D)

Fellow American, this is Winsome Sears, Lieutenant Governor of Virginia.

In 2021, we took back control of Virginia and sent the radical Democrats scrambling to recover.

Fellow Conservative,

It’s Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy writing to you from Montana.

Recently I came across an email from my opponent in my inbox in which he wrote to his supporters that he is “ _**one of the most vulnerable Democratic senators**_ ,” and that political experts are saying that his “ _**[Senate] seat is one of the most likely to flip red unless folks like you help**_ ...”

**He’s right** – he is vulnerable to defeat, and for good reason. Jon Tester represents a state in the United States Senate that Donald Trump won in 2020 by SIXTEEN POINTS.

Meanwhile, **Tester is in the United States Senate voting with Joe Biden 91% of the time.** I have a message for Jon: We’re running to represent Montana, NOT MASSACHUSETTS. _**

I know Jon Tester is vulnerable**_

_**Jon Tester knows he is vulnerable**_

****But unless you’re aware that this Senate race is one of Republicans' best chances to defeat a Democrat incumbent and flip the Senate, none of it is going to matter.****

Races are won by campaigns who can reach their target audience more efficiently and with greater regularity.

Right now, we’re losing the money game. ****[{link to donate}](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=733adf108a884621b3442ec287b593aa&_e=Icdqhedyrst6-xLmpzy6WjopwmbL9zUI4b5H-wPfZn75nEx8FvFV8e9qNO83V_cT4KcQdt-8Xxjr4yAioei5JWIGTkOUqNuo9dfCK5rT16QshOo-FvhObCjrWjrvkY6dGCtxpCOAZo10yo_CDNu9vrReIt6OVns7hPfwip_3L8dyPzvtRfGTLfVwjV9QhSmXU01u6JGbiYoinvz8A4e6Bzy4gAC6GsdoNP7avaFxnvn7jCTIpDuHFSqzQrdrm56iHHdOWkpY3OrnsQTOFnC-2wouWoR44fXW5POEKh4RfX9Z-kzJB34sKMEeNuSCnZx8dbHp9FlvVkVhnC5VZNk_3MjN4Ar8sF-vawBKTaj3LGFPWDemuRXJwm81yJIMFp-cTA0s79Woqq6BDIGZQ_PQC1e5dm1U2ut10Oz2dX767Pw%3D)**** Sen. Tester has raised more than $15 million this year from small-dollar donors like you. We’ve raised a fraction of that. We really need the help. Your donation really might make all the difference.

[**LINK TO DONATE** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=733adf108a884621b3442ec287b593aa&_e=Icdqhedyrst6-xLmpzy6WjopwmbL9zUI4b5H-wPfZn75nEx8FvFV8e9qNO83V_cT4KcQdt-8Xxjr4yAioei5JWIGTkOUqNuo9dfCK5rT16QshOo-FvhObCjrWjrvkY6dGCtxpCOAZo10yo_CDNu9vrReIt6OVns7hPfwip_3L8dyPzvtRfGTLfVwjV9QhSmXU01u6JGbiYoinvz8A4e6Bzy4gAC6GsdoNP7avaFxnvn7jCTIpDuHFSqzQrdrm56ikXn5DxNQsr7yYsGDa2nBsKhFZF8Fz5CLmHO-RX1DJ1BBuI1EAsnf8gxRiUfXHGHpet9tniFPOOGc8kSjNdVVUa92e44lRCTCMfGT9ion-DNlmC-x4tjuX1sbgqjLAHGAO5LhTXa-D0-jXE-KycD2tBnQT_Y-Q5hbm7y6ah5JxCc%3D)

**Please let me hear from you now or in the very near future.**

I cannot win this race without support from conservatives around the country.

**Not only will this be the toughest undertaking of my life, but it’ll also be ugly, too.**

You may or may not know who Jon Tester is but let me tell you this right now: _**you need to know his name**_. You’re going to be hearing it a lot over the coming 12 months.

[**I'D BE GRATEFUL IF YOU DONATED TODAY** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=733adf108a884621b3442ec287b593aa&_e=Icdqhedyrst6-xLmpzy6WjopwmbL9zUI4b5H-wPfZn75nEx8FvFV8e9qNO83V_cT4KcQdt-8Xxjr4yAioei5JWIGTkOUqNuo9dfCK5rT16QshOo-FvhObCjrWjrvkY6dGCtxpCOAZo10yo_CDNu9vrReIt6OVns7hPfwip_3L8dyPzvtRfGTLfVwjV9QhSmXU01u6JGbiYoinvz8A4e6Bzy4gAC6GsdoNP7avaFxnvn7jCTIpDuHFSqzQrdrm56i-V_IL-aYunxRRmytUy0lNlYWieG_PWPskDdoKQqcn3oIIotHNW70vLRD6bahLBBu4Topn1Ty62NKPFfdfrKz0_fpADcjK_PLif72Wh5DIHEQJtY9OdObTZo4A02yUeoARFyQxwjuIop6iCnCrzo-fJ4NqlKbLDsxI5iEIPyF22E%3D)

Thank you,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

|

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

body:

#
Peter: Josh Halwey wants you to pay $30 to read his weird “Manhood” book.
**We’re asking you for $3 to replace him in the U.S. Senate.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38716?refcode=em20231025-4058&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4058%2E614464%2EbUWLcX)

Josh Hawley is obsessed with telling all of us that the only way to be a man is to be exactly like him. But he’s already shown the world who he really is — just a fraud and a coward, willing to raise his fist when it makes himself look strong and then run away the moment things get real.
**As 13-year Marine veteran, Lucas Kunce knows what it means to serve our country** — and unlike Hawley, he’s ready to stand up and be the warrior for working people Missourians deserve in the U.S. Senate.
**[Will you chip in $3 today so we can elect Lucas Kunce, defeat Josh Hawley, and flip this U.S. Senate seat? name: Katie Porter
subject: This fact surprises me every single time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=32055%2E3422442%2EfhArHQ)
**Derek, there are more than three times as many men named “John” in the U.S. Senate as there are moms of kids under 18.**
You can help change that. I'm a single mom of three public school kids. I'm running for the U.S. Senate because the status quo isn't working for families all across the country. I'll be the first single mom of school age kids in the Senate, and I'm ready to fight for the things families need to thrive—like affordable college, childcare, and housing. [Can you join us?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231025-2?refcode=EMAM25_2_MOM_20231025_V1_F&refcode2=32055_3422442_fhArHQ&akid=32055%2E3422442%2EfhArHQ)
It’s no secret that too many people in this country are working hard and playing by the rules, but struggling to get ahead.**That’s because the rules are rigged against working people, and we have a Congress made up of rich and privileged people who either don’t get it, or are too beholden to their corporate donors to stand up to their BS.**
I’ve been proud to “do Congress” differently—from being the only Member to oppose “earmarks” when Congress brought them back in 2021 (earmarks are a way of funding politicians’ pet projects, and invite waste and fraud), to fighting against tax policy that unfairly punished single-parent families.
Now, I’m running to continue our fight for working people and families, not corporate special interests or a handful of wealthy donors. **I’d be so grateful if you joined our team and helped fuel our movement:**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231025-2?personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231025-2?refcode=EMAM25_2_MOM_20231025_V1_F&refcode2=32055_3422442_fhArHQ&akid=32055%2E3422442%2EfhArHQ)
Thanks for being here,
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAM25_2_MOM_20231025_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=32055_3422442_fhArHQ&akid=32055%2E3422442%2EfhArHQ)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=32055%2E3422442%2EfhArHQ)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=32055%2E3422442%2EfhArHQ)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

In 2021, we took back control of Virginia and sent the radical Democrats scrambling to recover.

Now, Senate Republicans have asked me to reach out to you for help and ask if you are ready for the challenges ahead in 2024.

[**YOU are the key to victory. Republicans cannot win without Patriots and grassroots supporters like you, Fellow American. Your input is requested by MIDNIGHT tonight!**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=38583becc36d442983f2cb303c5e1f2d&_e=xhS_npWQV3pvsInL_Tqp8HFaIQY8duZckSQaMC4q9vVjysokO2SczpojK2yQPFDz_N26u9Uu85uqgkUzA0R36W8c7Cnj2tmygj-AZh42YmtTti6tjukZ6Pz3Y9NPVApZPF48exTmgO7YUeg_FwN3zxH4x2I7oiHUM-tDRu1Ymbz3V7UjSznS4VRmaGgxItgmceVKuYDQf2n3dVksNSmTMQ3KXuZ-Eh6TI7nwPvkkpL-XTafe8it9umAS-q9Bjci28Ly0gzXGbxGuMqszNGBpYDd4v8NgpraPc2-GiNNopRS1UmLhM7twpGGnn8rR3EmI_SMBVCW6myzwzOS5NOqGqolYSm3int9KvZHDx8xw0cVUSGwy1lwdrlXJ-UDf6fQdfHjfElcr-WyIyd7zKSD31WZJN4BmEB_li7nm_E-EROHVu9yokgHcHbzm55LHOgZk)

name: Huffines Liberty Foundation
subject: Will Texas Voters “Bust” the Constitutional Limit on State Spending?
body:
Texas politicians had a choice to make this spring. With a record $80 billion of new revenue available, they could either spend the money or give it back to Texas taxpayers in the form of property tax relief.
No images? [Click here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-e-vjjutlk-yuddtktydi-n/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vjjutlk-yuddtktydi-r/) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Press Manager
Contact: [Press@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:Press@HuffinesLiberty.com)
## **Will Texas Voters "Bust" the Constitutional Limit on State Spending?**
[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vjjutlk-yuddtktydi-y/) DALLAS, TX, October 25, 2023 -- Texas politicians had a choice to make this spring. With a record $80 billion of new revenue available, they could either spend the money or give it back to Texas taxpayers in the form of property tax relief.Unfortunately for Texans, for the most part, they chose to spend our money.The spending decision was not the only choice members and legislative leaders had to make during their regular session. They were constitutionally constrained by spending all the money by something known as the Tax Spending Limit (TSL) in the Texas Constitution, which limits spending growth of "state tax revenues not dedicated by this constitution" to no more than the growth of the state economy.The limits of the TSL can be exceeded if "approved by a record vote of a majority of the members of each house." But this meant Texas politicians would face another constraint: angry Texas voters who might object to their increasing spending by $56.5 billion **while only putting $12.7 billion into property tax relief.** However, this dilemma did not baffle Texas politicians for long. They devised some "creative ways" to "bust the spending cap" imposed on them by the TSL.
1. First, they spent money "backward" into the current fiscal year to increase the base from which the TSL is measured. This allowed them to spend an additional $22.5 billion.
2. Second, they decided to make voters bust the spending cap through eight propositions on the November ballot to amend the Texas Constitution. This allowed the Legislature to potentially spend another $13.8 billion that otherwise would have been constrained by the TSL.

Texans have an unprecedented opportunity this November.Never in Texas history has the Texas Legislature given us the power of the purse at such a level. By spending less than five minutes casting their votes, Texans can either support or roll back the Legislature's plan to spend $13.8 billion.A YES vote will further increase what already is the largest spending increase in Texas history.A NO vote will roll back Texas government spending by $13.8 billion, make that money available for future property tax relief, and tell Texas politicians that voters are tired of runaway spending and crony capitalism. It is up to Texas voters to decide which direction Texas will take. [Read Paper](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vjjutlk-yuddtktydi-j/) The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) non-profit, non-partisan research institute. Our mission is to advance the cause of **liberty** , **prosperity** , and **virtue** in the State of Texas by educating and equipping citizens so they may hold their elected officials accountable and better informed to tackle the toughest challenges.###
### _Help us advance liberty and prosperity in Texas:_
[Donate](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vjjutlk-yuddtktydi-t/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vjjutlk-yuddtktydi-h/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vjjutlk-yuddtktydi-k/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vjjutlk-yuddtktydi-u/) | [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-vjjutlk-yuddtktydi-o/) | [ Share ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-fb-vjjutlk-yuddtktydi-p/) | [ Tweet ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-tw-vjjutlk-yuddtktydi-x/) | [ Forward ](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-yuddtktydi-17329976-vjjutlk-l-c)

subject: How Biden's Digital Dollar Destroys Freedom
body:
The 'Digital Dollar' is now a reality.

Financial Freedom in America will soon be gone!

The 'Digital Dollar' is now a reality.

On November 15th, 2022, the Federal Reserve announced they are now testing the 'digital dollar'. They'll be joined by major banks like Citigroup, HSBC, Mastercard, and Wells Fargo.

And you should be scared!

The 'digital dollar' puts all your money in the hands of the government.

They'll be able to....
Know what's in your accounts and what you buy
Limit what you purchase and the causes you support

subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_“Food shortages are coming.”_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35533%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kBkIs0n64YB1vQpqI4sd8g&sysid=1). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35534%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wNXY4QjEejGy58kT2yhkpg&sysid=1) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: It only took one appointment...
body:
Even by transgender activist standards, that’s malpractice.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, Luka Hein had one appointment at the University of Nebraska Medical Center gender clinic before her doctor diagnosed her with “gender identity disorder” and began planning for a radical double mastectomy.**You read that right,_one appointment_** _._ One 55-minute appointment was all it took for a psychologist to diagnose Luka with “gender identity disorder,” place Luka on a fast track for a double mastectomy to be followed by four years of harmful testosterone treatments.Luka was only 15 years old at the time.Even by transgender activist standards, that’s malpractice. **[Now, we’re helping her fight back, but we need your immediate support. Will you send an urgent gift of $25 or more to the Center for American Liberty right now as we sue the doctors who rushed this young girl into a radical, life-altering procedure?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrt0l0nq5k3jnro93fbgc1frc1u147iejepui97o_rp22sh2s8i66p70spi62ob5c3h2bs)** My name is Harmeet Dhillon and I’m the Founder and CEO of the Center for American Liberty – a nonprofit public interest law firm created to protect the freedoms of the American people.This isn’t our first foray against radical transgender activists – but it may be the most shocking. In most of these “transitioner” cases – like Chloe Cole and Layla Jane, two of our other clients – doctors put these young girls on puberty blockers and hormones for months before turning to surgery.And make no mistake, these medications are extremely harmful, and will affect these kids for the rest of their lives.But there’s no going back from a double mastectomy. **That’s why we’re teaming up with the Thomas More Society to take on Luka Hein’s lawsuit against the University of Nebraska Medical Center, the Board of Regents of the University of Nebraska, Dr. Jean Amoura, Dr. Perry Johnson, Dr. Stephan Barrientos, and therapist Megan Smith-Sallan.** **[And I hope I can count on your generous, tax-deductible donation today to give our team the resources needed to win this devastating case.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb6igj4ejb41g2mq2sd6uth0i5r1rk1i9qsa3v00_rp22sh2s8i66p70spi62ob5c3h2bs)** We took on another childhood transition case on top of the ones we already have, because for every case we take on, there are thousands of young, vulnerable children being targeted.For every case we take on, there are “educators” persuading kids with propaganda and lies, about transgenderism, behind parents’ backs. And for every case we take on, there are countless children following in Luka, Chloe and Layla’s footsteps – undergoing extreme, unnecessary medical intervention that will ruin their lives.With every case we take on, and every hospital, doctor, school and teacher we’re able to hold accountable, we come that much closer to saving thousands of children and families from a lifetime of pain and regret. And supporters like you make that possible.**You know we just scored a major victory for Jessica Konen and her daughter – and with your help, I’m confident that it was the first of many to come.** **[Please make a donation to the Center for American Liberty and help us protect young girls from coercive and predatory transgender activists willing to rob girls of their womanhood.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zokglcnajqmh97csfkkqs8rf6gbirvepjnsla3co_rp22sh2s8i66p70spi62ob5c3h2bs)** Luka suffers from heart issues, pain in her vocal cords, joints, pelvic area, lumbar spine, hands, wrists, and elbows as a result of transitioning.And the doctors that hid studies from Luka and her parents about the reality of transition and told her parents that their daughter would eventually kill herself if she didn’t go under the knife are responsible. It’s time to hold them accountable for what they’ve done.But we can’t do it without your support. **[Join the fight today with a donation of $35 or more to help us protect kids and stop these barbaric procedures from being performed on minors.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmsd3h1i71hig6l9ijj3o5bkn874in2da0jsafg0_rp22sh2s8i66p70spi62ob5c3h2bs)** None of these battles are easy, but all of them are necessary to safeguard our future.And with folks like you standing behind us, I know we can win.Thank you in advance for your continued support.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
Harmeet K. DhillonFounder & CEO
---
|
---
| | P.S. Luka Hein was just 16 years old when doctors performed a radical double mastectomy on her. There’s no way Luka was able to give informed consent or understood the ramifications of what was happening to her**.[Help us fight back now with a gift of $35 or more today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo1ikhjn36cm525d6l5g6iqpb0diprn1t9nsqctg_rp22sh2s8i66p70spi62ob5c3h2bs)**

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztufpt5b9om4a9r7qtjdnht0sjgge07kqjes642g_rp22sh2s8i66p70spi61o32c1h2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkh6ort6aufuvh3h0vbbu8l4spjgknqlsu4lhbk0_rp22sh2s8i66p70spi61o32c1h2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvdbhs7smd57dho1dsd5gpofqo9bnstqats04om0_rp22sh2s8i66p70spi61o32c1h2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.
---

name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: Cruise's self-driving taxis suspended from operating on public roads in California due to safety concerns
body:
| [](http://trk.libertyledger._c2VnbWVudD0zMzA2OTIifQ/pi2csfo-bIH0toKRksU4fA)
---
# **[Cruise's self-driving taxis suspended from operating on public roads in California due to safety concerns](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
The California Department of Motor Vehicles on Tuesday announced the immediate suspension of an autonomous car company's testing permits.A press release from the DMV confirmed that Cruise will no longer be allowed to operate its self-driving taxis on public roads due to safety concerns. The decision does not impact the company's ability to test with a safety driver behind the wheel, CNBC reported.
**Read More**
[](http://trk.libertyledger.)

body:
The 'Digital Dollar' is now a reality.

| |
# **Financial Freedom in America**
# **will soon be gone!**

**The 'Digital Dollar' is now a reality.** On November 15th, 2022, the Federal Reserve announced they are now testing the **'digital dollar'.** They'll be joined by major banks like Citigroup, HSBC, Mastercard, and Wells Fargo. **And you should be scared!** The 'digital dollar' puts all your money in the hands of the government. They'll be able to....
* **Know what's in your accounts and what you buy**
* **Limit what you purchase and the causes you support**
* **Take everything away with the click of a button**

[There is a way to preserve your freedom and protect your wealth.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl8oarbkvg8emp8q9h3tna5qs005i1a8duij9qq0_rp22sh2s8i66p70sph6aoj2c3h2bs) Thousands of Americans have already used this **Legal IRS-Proof loophole to move their retirement accounts (IRA,401k,TSP, etc.)** into certain real assets that protect against Biden's 'digital dollar'. name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6a6fa06514745cab3a9fed2eef4e565&_e=69907rbppHJ_cpuxYVE05U0ckkVvcCpk6A4Aj15whRSECNFub2Mvmk2aCZydU1IIpDifdb3nSOoXaJlQ-6KsVWrT0h-HUg4KG0bTEMLW36MD2mPIywDKShh6VGLvCm8Th323Txne3dLSncLTDto3_X8JSTp_5aN0qgJRHp9FUgHgDMG8DoGG3AZhF4qhWvYcZ4lnRBwEuFgzEheHd1ATq4tLdzDEuMClpY7KZqBb6LjiiHXs7B8I60szHNP3n7jQ2QbGFeQU-HMZvaIki8SBIPCJaoNaVvuVypWjaZ-lXkQ6GvCoQVQghqSP_0sNoAYJ). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6a6fa06514745cab3a9fed2eef4e565&_e=69907rbppHJ_cpuxYVE05U0ckkVvcCpk6A4Aj15whRSECNFub2Mvmk2aCZydU1IIpDifdb3nSOoXaJlQ-6KsVWrT0h-HUg4KG0bTEMLW36MD2mPIywDKShh6VGLvCm8Th323Txne3dLSncLTDto3_UthKlvyOOE9e1AAqmMZ2BPZBmIT8e-GKCeE2qTEteB5iAlnQzX4Jb1WFQ7Tu_0YN1g4F4zmXYsDvKhXUm2U_xln5EEnfr7ZE4C8u966QK18UYUoJ4tLypkgedAOkILuNeHJJQG8X6s6t1qAmz06-aMBR-PFfHC1lTN5UqL3Bfeh) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d6a6fa06514745cab3a9fed2eef4e565&_e=69907rbppHJ_cpuxYVE05U0ckkVvcCpk6A4Aj15whRSECNFub2Mvmk2aCZydU1IIpDifdb3nSOoXaJlQ-6KsVWrT0h-HUg4KG0bTEMLW36MD2mPIywDKShh6VGLvCm8Th323Txne3dLSncLTDto3_Zv31wEm4k-auhWKClxQYVQR9F045Kao8z8mtYwnXC2BkltTtBnGTUHDemtGUJwCfaWQ8anFj-V52-xi8iBKoCfZ0gtnN0eNPqxrr1XpOw3ann57JOflv5YErryCS9Pxd5DwIe5SUMeq7KhawBAbP2AK_ZJe4TI0xqNEgJcfcH0c) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: The Flyover
subject: Johnson Wins Speaker Race, Dem Squad Member Arrested, and Arming a Robot Goat
body:
After three weeks of turmoil and three failed nominees, House Republicans unanimously elected Rep. Mike Johnson as the new House Speaker. The final vote was 220-212.

| | | [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJydjrGOwjAQRL8m7ojWXjsJhYu7gg4aCkrLZ6-JwYlRYpD4eyykk664CmnKN2-GNO_6YeilBGBeByJByKIWIBCQK9hKxWUbgiOUCnvkCEPnGwnkY8lLe8lxLiOF9MwPWlqXJzbqoJzlFVaD66UCua12UATBehS8-2FJj6Xc1ga_GrGr-cdy2pu9jSnO54OdSJeQzW3JqwHccLURaI42FbMSeUNTBfNsXfSVITeSuxrOFn25XyklOzXi21Ow91Tq8V-i_VN7L5YPRl71WWnS)

# THURSDAY, OCTOBER 26, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** On this date in 1825, the Erie Canal was opened after eight years of construction. It [connected the Hudson River](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LEOnDAMANCvCVtQsEOAgeF0FVKHa8eOKBADrkJyIrm73tJvr46qWyc_W7Yl-8dtvFn2HNZvdqc-L3G0c-YnjZWSYCTgqAvXL0RAWFBfma5F0A1gsfW6qizOUE_OzVW7GNNqaCrVddRMqm1swT0owEqBUV2tEcsW0Rhdo3ZG06JQaEWOczzKn5FD3mjx7_iko5zjXvh-y_meBF4EDAKG9cGOUunjXK7xKWDIGye5x5A3yUFOj8SBUpIbpxyPt4AhzjlOdHx0p8BhlXQwydkG6wWgwMtvgZdMv7LAL1-zgBrUwsF6_z79mSJ38vu_VTUoMAKuL3b0ya5nyYa_bWjwjDt7Sqd8DGtZHL27v9h7TqYRWq27ZX8emf__8z8BAAD__3mHfYc) to Lake Erie and several of New York's largest cities--like Syracuse and Buffalo--and became a major route for commercial ships. Today, it's mostly used by recreational craft. ## Mike Johnson Becomes New House Speaker
After three weeks of turmoil and three failed nominees, House Republicans [unanimously elected Rep. Mike Johnson ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO8yAQhJ8Gd7ZgF4hTUPwNXf72SouYJd4cMZbhYt3bn3z1dSPNSPPp-7hNt8CZ18f_8CLXUpnC3PhNk5I92B5w0l10iQgIO3LKXkcEfQHsFqcVyhlSGjXY-zgipjsYc0e4pEiUVMcOJKCSYOXVaMRhRLRWG9TRakoShZYUuZV9eBZe20Ipf5c37cNcXl12S2tbFfhPgBfgj-MYtpK58VzOgQCf-U391xZDoyrAn28CvJJnNgL8XNbHTvXsnmVZa1n7Fj6p9tx6KRWgUdDtLm4H58zVXoSWj1fg_AvQ_vbxEwAA___Kll5T)as the new House Speaker. The final vote was 220-212. Johnson, elected to Congress in 2016, will become the first Speaker from Louisiana. He served as vice chairman of the House Republican Conference and is considered [more conservative than Kevin McCarthy](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO6yAQRb8GOiI8g3FcULzGXV67pUXiIUyCwTIk0f79al1vd6V7pCOdr8t88Zw43__7lVwLZfa3xm-aO63AKsDZyMUFIiCU5Do7nhHMACijMwHMGDqyyxXH3lN39Us3EAzWIgToJTvQgJ0Gq8feIJ7OiNaaHs1iDQWNwmhauJX99CicW6SQvsub9tOtrDK52NpWBf4TMAmYWqTIKf1-AqZYVsr0qcd8VRIwGRiM7UHttL2uiW8-V7X6J6mVn6QeJeZasjpoVTfyT9oFTHJ3y_bhlLjaQRh9Xz0fEtn-7vETAAD__53NYTA), whom he replaced. The first vote under Johnson on Wednesday was [a resolution to support Israel](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjzFztCAUAH8NdDjwHgdnQfE1dve1KR3Ex0mC4iDR5N9nLnXKnS129u0xPnzKaXv-9yu5FsvoQ0snjUoKMAJw1Hx2kQgIOTll-juCtoB8ccorq3qy_Wyt1daGKXrjVfB2QjnRnScHElBJMLK_acTujmiMvqGejaYokWlJc2qldu8lbW2hmL_LSbULZeXZLa3tB8N_DAYGw3VdXSxfG13HyzMYcjpJvJjBcOzkP6iKEkVbSCzl8yBRfSBRQisTVQE3Xt28XynndBjLtHyuPuXfVvt7_ScAAP__SDBaqQ) in its war with Hamas. But more difficult votes are coming on funding for the Ukraine War and appropriations bills to avoid a government shutdown.
## Mass Shooting in Maine
At least 16 people were [shot and killed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFyqzAQheGngW4ZWMkCFypuQ-fbpmQUtJhNhNaD1iZ--4yTNu05zTf_22W6BE6cr__DRl4XmcKs_KCpawEdoJlsHf1ChGRq8p07DwZtj6ZePfa4YMChezcDWeyd7Qw6DAP1cx9PsWaPLZquRdeeT9aYZjDGOXsyNjpLS2sq21Jklb35EM660pKe8qC9mWWrk19Vb6Uy_yocKxyP42gW-cp0lNdf4XgvFY6_XiiriNIOhfUelCUDZ9gCZ4KZ9Qk7FY6UtYBKiqACRcMTOL9mOFhXiCJ7gSTzJ8V69_F2cEpcXF_Z9roFTj8s_bvSdwAAAP__-7hrSw) last night in Lewiston, Maine. Dozens more were injured in the attack, which took place at a bowling alley and bar. As of midnight ET, the shooter had not been caught, and police were [searching the surrounding areas](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1vgzAQQH8NbET23WHD4KFLtnTtiPxxDlcZHIGVqP--SueOT2940vu6LTcvRfb7p9_YtVwXH5s8edFqADMALtQnl5mBsWenzTwhkAXsV8chMMeYFI6zsdqS5WnSOWoKVpPGXhwoQK3AqHkkxMuEaAyNSMkQZ4UdKU7S6nH5rrK3lXP5qU8-LrFufXFra4-zw48Orh1c_WPn1_lWbziaxMIdXAu_5Gx1HzYvOw_nWmuT_X4ONCdvkjJ-CqPXY8Jg9BxwBhsiYs794dLjJaXIaWxH6r55KX_l9v-I3wAAAP__00JdYg) for a person of interest. State and local authorities identified Robert R. Card as the suspect. Card, a 40 year-old firearms instructor, spent time in a mental hospital in 2023. He also claimed to hear voices and threatened a previous shooting, according to a police document. Authorities are asking all businesses in the area to stay closed until the shooter is caught.
## State Pulls Driverless Cars Off the Road
California ordered General Motors to [remove its driverless Cruise auto-taxis from state roads,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuhDAQBNCvMZ2RWRvDFRRp6C5tSuQzy7GRsZHXgPL3EalTjzSaeV_P6ekoUHx_ug2HsqTJ-UInTo2SYCXoyVTzsCAC6gqHxj56DaYDXa2DsaadleqcV51yqvcNQN86xMYa-_JLRQMo0I0Cqx6t0brutbbWtNrM1uCitDAKZyop19-JYllxCT_pxFz7tFVhWEvZWegPAaOA8bquOuNRMPOdCxhfB1NEZgGjO0piWbKLvKdcXKEUBYzeBVpSjuQkH7xjnFm-N-nzQYws50wn5oDM8i6IaUsHyxNX8gHljnmjwvI-IW8PI2Cs8jDvF4VAbDth1HtzFP72lv_5fgMAAP__a-lzqg) calling the vehicles a risk to the public and saying the company "misrepresented" the safety of the vehicles. Cruise cars have been cited in several accidents, most recently when one hit a woman pedestrian and [then dragged her](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAQgOGnwRsWvsPEGRi6eEvXjhaBw7kKGwtIrLx91c7d_-HX93Vbbo4T7-un28i2mBfnG79oGZQEIwEX3QUbiYCwIzuY64SgL4Ddw056vMdBOUI9kTGDM4Qw3a-j186MMXRsQQEOCoy6jhqxnxCN0SPqYDRFhUIrCtxy6b8z7-1BMb3zi0rv89Yl-2jtqAI_BMwC5vM8-6NQrYG27Itrv5WA2ZXGPpGAeaezCphB1uYaSbfS7pmqXEt-7kH68uRKMhR-UUlUq_SuVBlzkcfzntjL6iK1t4C5KzYcJ6fE1VyEVuvmOP1dtf-RfgIAAP__1pVqiA) before stopping. The vehicles have also had software issues that led to major traffic snarls in San Francisco. At the same time, rideshare drivers and others in Los Angeles are [protesting the rollout of Alphabet's driverless Waymo cars](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAQgOGnwRsRvsPEHhi6eEvXjtYFH_FV2ESAHOXtq3bu_A-_9H3dlhtJkuPxSTv7FvNCocnJS280OA242G71kRkYO_a9m0YEewXsNh-sC8T3fhwiAsc4GZgGwBhHGu4QsBMPBrA34Mw0WMTLiOicHdCuznI0qKzhVVoul-8sR9s4pnc-uVxC3rvkt9aeVeGHglnB_KQWtt-iYA6UJOZyCCmYTz4ksIK5yMp1o8J6LXJyqbrSW2-ckj6yftF7zzrlqul4cOLaFb8-X5KSVHdV1jx2kvS3bv9L_AQAAP__HEZg1Q) in that city. The drivers cited cases where driverless cars interfered with rescue vehicles.

clean_body: After three weeks of turmoil and three failed nominees, House Republicans unanimously elected Rep. Mike Johnson as the new House Speaker. The final vote was 220-212. | | | | | | THURSDAY, OCTOBER 26, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! On this date in 1825, the Erie Canal was opened after eight years of construction. It to Lake Erie and several of New York's largest cities--like Syracuse and Buffalo--and became a major route for commercial ships. Today, it's mostly used by recreational craft. If you haven't signed up for The Flyover yet, you can take care of that . Want to comment on a story? Head over to our . If you'd like to help the Flyover take off in the mornings, check out today's sponsor, . | Mike Johnson Becomes New House Speaker After three weeks of turmoil and three failed nominees, House Republicans the new House Speaker. The final vote was 220-212. Johnson, elected to Congress in 2016, will become the first Speaker from Louisiana. He served as vice chairman of the House Republican Conference and is considered , whom he replaced. The first vote under Johnson on Wednesday was in its war with Hamas. But more difficult votes are coming on funding for the Ukraine War and appropriations bills to avoid a government shutdown. Mass Shooting in Maine At least 16 people were last night in Lewiston, Maine. Dozens more were injured in the attack, which took place at a bowling alley and bar. As of midnight ET, the shooter had not been caught, and police were for a person of interest. State and local authorities identified Robert R. Card as the suspect. Card, a 40 year-old firearms instructor, spent time in a mental hospital in 2023. He also claimed to hear voices and threatened a previous shooting, according to a police document. Authorities are asking all businesses in the area to stay closed until the shooter is caught. State Pulls Driverless Cars Off the Road California ordered General Motors to calling the vehicles a risk to the public and saying the company "misrepresented" the safety of the vehicles. Cruise cars have been cited in several accidents, most recently when one hit a woman pedestrian and before stopping. The vehicles have also had software issues that led to major traffic snarls in San Francisco. At the same time, rideshare drivers and others in Los Angeles are in that city. The drivers cited cases where driverless cars interfered with rescue vehicles. Jamaal Bowman, a member of the Democrats' progressive "Squad," was criminally charged for pulling a fire alarm in the House when Democrats wanted to stall. Bowman will be arraigned this morning. () ➤ President Biden's name won't appear on the 2024 New Hampshire primary ballot, his campaign said. The Democrats have set South Carolina for the first primary and labeled New Hampshire's earlier date as unauthorized. () ➤ GOP presidential candidate Tim Scott is shifting nearly all his dwindling resources to focus on Iowa, where a primary win could revitalize his campaign. Scott is currently polling at about 2% nationally. Collagen is the most abundant protein in the body and is critical for maintaining youthful function and appearance of the skin, hair, nails, lean muscle, and so much more. | ➤ The NBA champion Denver Nuggets picked up where they left off, opening their NBA season by beating the L.A. Lakers 119-107. Nuggets superstar Nikola Jokic scored 29 points with 13 rebounds and 11 assists. () ➤ This year's World Series matchup is an amazing long shot. The odds that the Texas Rangers would face the Arizona Diamondbacks were 1,750 to 1 when the season began. Both teams finished in last place just two seasons ago. () ** | Flying together with our sponsor Breakthrough new research proves how you can grow back cartilage in your bone joints. It's odorless, flavorless, and so easy to add to your morning coffee, tea, oatmeal, smoothie, or even water. | ➤ **The Marines are testing a "robotic goat"** to fire rocket-propelled grenades used to disable tanks on the battlefield. The rocket launcher is strapped to the back of the commercially available robot. () ➤**The U.S. Space Force unveiled its first official painting,** an artist's rendering of a "futuristic intercept vehicle" flying toward an enemy satellite. () **➤Google Maps disabled live traffic data in Israel and Gaza at the request of the Israeli military, ahead of a potential ground invasion into Gaza. Google says it's done this before in conflict situations. () Flying together with our sponsor ➤ This dentist's breakthrough could stop you from snoring on the first night. () ** | ➤**Nearly 70% of Americans have little to no trust in the mass media. A Gallup poll shows 39% have no confidence in mainstream news reporting, the highest level on record. () ********➤Americans overwhelmingly support Israel in its war with Hamas, with more than 80% siding with Israel in a new Harvard CAPS-Harris Poll. Older respondents were more likely to favor Israel than those under 25, who split almost 50/50. () ** ➤ **Nearly two-thirds of New Yorkers** blame President Biden for the migrant crisis, and over half agree it will "destroy" NYC, according to a new Siena Poll. Biden's New York approval ratings are at their worst level ever. () | ➤ **A baby girl was born at the Indianapolis Colts football stadium Sunday when the mom went into labor just as she was entering the Colts-Cleveland Browns game. The new baby is the niece of Browns receiver David Bell. () ** **➤ "West Wing" creator Aaron Sorkin fired his agent at the powerful Creative Artists Agency after the agent shared a pro-Palestinian Instagram post. Sorkin has moved to the rival William Morris agency. () ➤ A man jumped into Disney World's EPCOT lagoon** after making a $6,000 bet with his friends. "You 're gonna get kicked out," a bystander warned as the man jumped into the lagoon. Disney security was there when he climbed out. Arizona Diamondbacks: 37% | | Daily Quote | "It was a lapse of judgment, if you will, (not) a conscious decision to do something wrong." -- , on being arrested for pulling a fire alarm during House debate. | Today's Trivia Which U.S. state has the most active volcanos? ** | The Flyover, LLC 1910 Thomes Ave. Cheyenne, WY 82001-3527 | ---|---

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2168567cefd74883a08d0bced6e95efb&_e=GsMN5hyCcm0l1ZgtMXlPea3Ks1VSeSWLsnrf15nhQxMtPxSjtOO3JTKLQkyghRcm4Zio0U-TejoBxExcy9DqpkTXj1pY1XGD2kahlEdNYFta99IMWXIRgFmumRDKk8cuHLPkkjrJGiUrS2FF1A3WNeqINHNzHJNFWQPZMdmDYWuGBxMLQtPP_72bu8fmiW82o1X50zyrHAZWCYwtKUvIJf6UMDl9-7olT7l3LFtqH2CWrzcxkP_xMs-YgeUteCPOIh2DFeyYzo9DvpsD7PQgmzV0Z47IZIvdTjxUxB_EREnFcmDI-ERok6xE7Dh82XQi). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2168567cefd74883a08d0bced6e95efb&_e=GsMN5hyCcm0l1ZgtMXlPea3Ks1VSeSWLsnrf15nhQxMtPxSjtOO3JTKLQkyghRcm4Zio0U-TejoBxExcy9DqpkTXj1pY1XGD2kahlEdNYFta99IMWXIRgFmumRDKk8cuHLPkkjrJGiUrS2FF1A3WNRRvfAJ7xe3HPVtIL0JJ3_7xIGlecYQRpTRjWf9rd89Q7V7bHCSuSLdrkjP-YzNmAY6iOGsWn6B5bTa8MzC3Gv0X_nVO3emcyGiEi8ZSm1er7OTTcgrpIbHVvGNcB9ZoRTSSox9Ms1RskByfs8DLvYds1BooVoui8QZqGC4ANGkG) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2168567cefd74883a08d0bced6e95efb&_e=GsMN5hyCcm0l1ZgtMXlPea3Ks1VSeSWLsnrf15nhQxMtPxSjtOO3JTKLQkyghRcm4Zio0U-TejoBxExcy9DqpkTXj1pY1XGD2kahlEdNYFta99IMWXIRgFmumRDKk8cuHLPkkjrJGiUrS2FF1A3WNS8eph6zxp6IVO1z3vSxvgtWytTxP_opCXN4PSTau2TstP9W5nAE_3XWFEvs3XXjwLRl9YtFUKeQzJuJ3PB6sFfH_dWlliJJ_nDRJNmFMHhLcEl1j0n9K4JpPHp1Ofg_n1NcmUakiSZpujpYt9oJE2dDcrwSdeDWJmLMbDh2aCrA) on these survival food kits while you can.
