name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: It only took one appointment...
body:
You read that right, one appointment.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, Luka Hein had one appointment at the University of Nebraska Medical Center gender clinic before her doctor diagnosed her with "gender identity disorder" and began planning for a radical double mastectomy. **You read that right,_one appointment_** _._ One 55-minute appointment was all it took for a psychologist to diagnose Luka with "gender identity disorder," place Luka on a fast track for a double mastectomy to be followed by four years of harmful testosterone treatments. Luka was only 15 years old at the time. Even by transgender activist standards, that's malpractice. **[Now, we're helping her fight back, but we need your immediate support. Will you send an urgent gift of $25 or more to the Center for American Liberty right now as we sue the doctors who rushed this young girl into a radical, life-altering procedure?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b2ad245bf23345f6a7b1ab5978325dbc&_e=UIAwQXfmGIrxUjyPPUyO4Hr4UzmEBD8y_kDsQb5Svatv4hLImVshPOPj8eaVV0Q1Gstd95V4QjCJ-BbvjRyRdFCc_x0Xjyn35dE36epeBYCHeS5bZTO9ZHDow6XU27CMHNH7y1cApVX1fd5yfSQA59LqtFdyA6BiUOFZjfAgE9qSfs1jjewh4X-6IGvM47nFdz4RDC31wcwcl0jCn3LrT77zYd_-ayYhv6oSZBbdv80mIwh0xjPZ2UKV0i8Rl6sh1l_tg8ZH_Re7XuUdpqNAJNcfI_iaKYxpmM2UsKIJovgtQ4F4mGxOZFSoiY-QFXj5ZxANgf1W70a43vQ75NLCk3O8ThVL_aqwI2n4J4uJrePyPp6AHVbwC2xy4rVE72K6I9DLhOWnQCMzdvm_ZYBOzQ%3D%3D)** My name is Harmeet Dhillon and I'm the Founder and CEO of the Center for American Liberty - a nonprofit public interest law firm created to protect the freedoms of the American people. This isn't our first foray against radical transgender activists - but it may be the most shocking. In most of these "transitioner" cases - like Chloe Cole and Layla Jane, two of our other clients - doctors put these young girls on puberty blockers and hormones for months before turning to surgery. And make no mistake, these medications are extremely harmful, and will affect these kids for the rest of their lives. But there's no going back from a double mastectomy. **That 's why we're teaming up with the Thomas More Society to take on Luka Hein's lawsuit against the University of Nebraska Medical Center, the Board of Regents of the University of Nebraska, Dr. Jean Amoura, Dr. Perry Johnson, Dr. Stephan Barrientos, and therapist Megan Smith-Sallan.** **[And I hope I can count on your generous, tax-deductible donation today to give our team the resources needed to win this devastating case.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b2ad245bf23345f6a7b1ab5978325dbc&_e=UIAwQXfmGIrxUjyPPUyO4Hr4UzmEBD8y_kDsQb5Svatv4hLImVshPOPj8eaVV0Q1Gstd95V4QjCJ-BbvjRyRdFCc_x0Xjyn35dE36epeBYCHeS5bZTO9ZHDow6XU27CMHNH7y1cApVX1fd5yfSQA59LqtFdyA6BiUOFZjfAgE9qSfs1jjewh4X-6IGvM47nFdz4RDC31wcwcl0jCn3LrT77zYd_-ayYhv6oSZBbdv80mIwh0xjPZ2UKV0i8Rl6shpAToEnsNeWBLChm_NXUHerh18GZOUyADO1ZOCep7ZqQbN0u-HtVkeCb4F682ByvN3IsjIoGxItA2gMimJdBmFFPnfSzFJmGqg9_RyndDXPRz3kQXjR6YC_WFTTSWJMxhkqH1V95d2vPG4GQ89cTCHA%3D%3D)** We took on another childhood transition case on top of the ones we already have, because for every case we take on, there are thousands of young, vulnerable children being targeted. For every case we take on, there are "educators" persuading kids with propaganda and lies, about transgenderism, behind parents' backs. And for every case we take on, there are countless children following in Luka, Chloe and Layla's footsteps - undergoing extreme, unnecessary medical intervention that will ruin their lives. With every case we take on, and every hospital, doctor, school and teacher we're able to hold accountable, we come that much closer to saving thousands of children and families from a lifetime of pain and regret. And supporters like you make that possible. **You know we just scored a major victory for Jessica Konen and her daughter - and with your help, I'm confident that it was the first of many to come.** **[Please make a donation to the Center for American Liberty and help us protect young girls from coercive and predatory transgender activists willing to rob girls of their womanhood.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b2ad245bf23345f6a7b1ab5978325dbc&_e=UIAwQXfmGIrxUjyPPUyO4Hr4UzmEBD8y_kDsQb5Svatv4hLImVshPOPj8eaVV0Q1Gstd95V4QjCJ-BbvjRyRdFCc_x0Xjyn35dE36epeBYCHeS5bZTO9ZHDow6XU27CMHNH7y1cApVX1fd5yfSQA59LqtFdyA6BiUOFZjfAgE9qSfs1jjewh4X-6IGvM47nFdz4RDC31wcwcl0jCn3LrT77zYd_-ayYhv6oSZBbdv80mIwh0xjPZ2UKV0i8Rl6shCRYD_BMFbG92v-cb5d1st4srYEb_y4JwO7Cn1Z0S9x6IWGd0Es_gEMDjeMfbbCj9WLzypMgB5hS3eM-qqUqK2exKTydgrSU7fv3WpLULtwu6cqBHhhluLhModfhuzolgJ_k_lLWXjCrhH9FHYgiQ-A%3D%3D)** Luka suffers from heart issues, pain in her vocal cords, joints, pelvic area, lumbar spine, hands, wrists, and elbows as a result of transitioning. And the doctors that hid studies from Luka and her parents about the reality of transition and told her parents that their daughter would eventually kill herself if she didn't go under the knife are responsible. It's time to hold them accountable for what they've done. But we can't do it without your support. **[Join the fight today with a donation of $35 or more to help us protect kids and stop these barbaric procedures from being performed on minors.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b2ad245bf23345f6a7b1ab5978325dbc&_e=UIAwQXfmGIrxUjyPPUyO4Hr4UzmEBD8y_kDsQb5Svatv4hLImVshPOPj8eaVV0Q1Gstd95V4QjCJ-BbvjRyRdFCc_x0Xjyn35dE36epeBYCHeS5bZTO9ZHDow6XU27CMHNH7y1cApVX1fd5yfSQA59LqtFdyA6BiUOFZjfAgE9qSfs1jjewh4X-6IGvM47nFdz4RDC31wcwcl0jCn3LrT77zYd_-ayYhv6oSZBbdv80mIwh0xjPZ2UKV0i8Rl6sh8JzcgoA0nSwWxCwGOy2zy9ONIAigLjl8eCcMy4j4M_B3hgajBSAuulgHAwFNHqs8h7ijgjiQD-Z2dy0CXcoXJ2VrMUnhM01QGTulqFSrhTgQrCl6cfo9DhhIJOhl_jiqHJc5LaOWhYSMgBz7lR1bFA%3D%3D)** None of these battles are easy, but all of them are necessary to safeguard our future. And with folks like you standing behind us, I know we can win. Thank you in advance for your continued support.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon Founder & CEO
---
|
---

There's no way Luka was able to give informed consent or understood the ramifications of what was happening to her**.[Help us fight back now with a gift of $35 or more today.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b2ad245bf23345f6a7b1ab5978325dbc&_e=UIAwQXfmGIrxUjyPPUyO4Hr4UzmEBD8y_kDsQb5Svatv4hLImVshPOPj8eaVV0Q1Gstd95V4QjCJ-BbvjRyRdFCc_x0Xjyn35dE36epeBYCHeS5bZTO9ZHDow6XU27CMHNH7y1cApVX1fd5yfSQA59LqtFdyA6BiUOFZjfAgE9qSfs1jjewh4X-6IGvM47nFdz4RDC31wcwcl0jCn3LrT77zYd_-ayYhv6oSZBbdv80mIwh0xjPZ2UKV0i8Rl6shsHAz7XvhhXMhGZubwcqnDEACJV8a5j1SCL9qCixcp3HY2IIlMuqqJihx55yg9aP9rlAUUfJsC0nIASoNwCUTKaefrPONCa80Vz8mNbcsABUhzCNU66TNSZMrlvesrJJPAYugPAonU7mKZkXwFkD6KA%3D%3D)**

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=27874d5f0ad54084b3ae7123ae7f0ef5&_e=cTOGEesmQ-OYtX77jluu5_fGnmFr68XLypRXE26NssRjQyRkxkhdo_bJ-VA3LCImMWUfduqq2WM2SUYsyXvs1xbLcsz9wqzqAzoUaqwsIQScYruGKbmVJjJiU3DHKoqPzHRbuqGyXC4PJ9OTrinVRrFenySrKzfzWEWYWr2ZfVOGA-jS1aRmqRx_oVeoh9q0WVNDhYkSY8yxyUsNTfbWVjrsmj_W6eX9loFfDNXL1RL6N1kkAsoY5NsdczNTcJtlKCMMtoFLA3N_wgRlJd_pp7rxPjdX4IAeMl6P_IIBIIU0IqFmPn_LPt9YGnT02hs8). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=27874d5f0ad54084b3ae7123ae7f0ef5&_e=cTOGEesmQ-OYtX77jluu5_fGnmFr68XLypRXE26NssRjQyRkxkhdo_bJ-VA3LCImMWUfduqq2WM2SUYsyXvs1xbLcsz9wqzqAzoUaqwsIQScYruGKbmVJjJiU3DHKoqPzHRbuqGyXC4PJ9OTrinVRgAwCCOI6GHlFPi_dkS_QcQlatMkklI-IgdquJAgv9iaedEWbefK2ZMHSeAOLMsvxzIsh4KCnbRGmKF9aENMO1HIhT2nbI2eHZKqV1pvDgjrtyae_lVrkhh4NK4KSAQrPzE4bKMUQtBVz6d5Au_rqSq88IdUxOVakeE09QMdQjzU) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. clean_body: This might be your only warning. The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis This might be your only warning. According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: " Food shortages are coming." Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired... Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick... Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished... Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling . When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. on these survival food kits while you can. Friend,

Ron DeSantis left a message you need to hear before the end of the month.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=94a09d2a5ae8f4a71ec0ce151ddba19831a8c0e30a42295202f14afdb9743e0bf49dce090e7ef10e71b53d475e643fedc74895cd25c752066f14e15ce17f17d9

We're days away. We have goals to hit. We cannot fall behind now.

Everything we're doing is going directly toward defeating Joe Biden and spreading our message across the country. We have to stay on track to restore the future of this country, and if we don't, we lose the momentum this team has worked so hard for.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=94a09d2a5ae8f4a7cabb76c805329e4ac9a9cec26eb50c89df99b011ad9ad9d013232d69705af2186ba936cbb1d0fa31533c2a66fbc8bb42d5b76682f7853fe2
RUSH IN $25 NOW

The polls coming out of Iowa and other early states show us that we’re at the top of this race, and we will defeat the Democrats next November. What we're seeing points to one thing: America is craving new leadership that will restore hard work, leadership, accountability, transparency, a proven record, fulfilled promises, no shady deals, and no excuses to the White House.

We are counting on YOUR help before the end of the month, friend.
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=94a09d2a5ae8f4a71ec0ce151ddba19831a8c0e30a42295202f14afdb9743e0bf49dce090e7ef10e71b53d475e643fedc74895cd25c752066f14e15ce17f17d9
Chip in TODAY to help Ron DeSantis and our team hit our goal.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=94a09d2a5ae8f4a71ec0ce151ddba19831a8c0e30a42295202f14afdb9743e0bf49dce090e7ef10e71b53d475e643fedc74895cd25c752066f14e15ce17f17d9
SUPPORT RON DESANTIS FOR PRESIDENT TODAY

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=94a09d2a5ae8f4a72a8efbfdd8b6ec87a5905799007e13c930826cadfd5e051c655ed21bcced4a53386a6bf80335c7ca0babed05413917c469abb29241063514

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=94a09d2a5ae8f4a7b5543fcf14168b7947de2777ae032f58e000dd8e462662acbd949ec26a28988bedcd78b4eafe3a09b1fae1a5a929642536887c484785575e
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=94a09d2a5ae8f4a7bb2af70b5a23491c87f232e6c6775ec0723318a39fbc9feab7d163a71dfd1a282c284aefb17500ac493ac9c14fb78af1bfbaeb4e470ae4cb
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=94a09d2a5ae8f4a71ec0ce151ddba19831a8c0e30a42295202f14afdb9743e0bf49dce090e7ef10e71b53d475e643fedc74895cd25c752066f14e15ce17f17d9

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=94a09d2a5ae8f4a71ec0ce151ddba19831a8c0e30a42295202f14afdb9743e0bf49dce090e7ef10e71b53d475e643fedc74895cd25c752066f14e15ce17f17d9

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Stop greedy fossil fuel companies from profiting off our public lands
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2075835?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Conserve public lands by protecting them from fracking! Act now!** The Department of Interior is preparing a lease sale of public lands in Mississippi. If approved, here’s what could follow: **soot-spitting trucks, wildlife running in fear, metal machines tearing through the Earth, and a new fracking rig polluting nearby communities.** A nightmare waiting to happen -- but you can help prevent it! Before the lease sale moves forward, the DOI is asking for public comments. But **you have just a FEW DAYS LEFT to help cancel the lease sale** before it happens. Don’t let fossil fuel companies get their greedy hands on our precious public lands, Friend! **[Prevent new fracking in Mississippi -- send your message to the Department of Interior now!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2075836?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** ***Your Signature is Missing!*** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2075837?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Nearly a QUARTER of all U.S. emissions come from fossil fuel extraction on public lands.** Companies mining for coal, sucking oil out of the ground, and drilling for natural gas -- it all accelerates the climate crisis and destroys our public lands at the same time.
Floods. Storms. Wildfires. Droughts. You’ve seen the headlines, Friend. We’ve reached a critical juncture, and whether the Department of Interior continues to allow fossil fuel extraction on our public lands will determine the path forward. **[Will you help ensure the Department of Interior CANCELS the lease sale in Mississippi and protects public lands from fracking?](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2075838?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2075837?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Nicole Ghio
Fossil fuels program manager,
Friends of the Earth**
|
##### Contact Us:
Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](foe.org/about-us/contact/)
---
##### Email Preferences:
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/subscribe?campaignpageurl=https%3A%2F%2Faction.foe.org%2Fpage%2F2555%2Fsubscriptions%2F1%3Fea.broadcast.id%3D267408&ea.campaigner.email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC)

name: Tim Sheehy, Navy SEAL
subject: How did this man get elected?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
Vulnerable | adjective: susceptible to physical or emotional attack or harm: | [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=3e5f6bb785934404b9604940366e185e&_t=XnLKcg6QS-hJEttAgVaBCbp2e09Hbc1S4wWLi4rcb7S9hjk-qk3E_y1En9qp65T7EzHTm9Vsg5NF_jn8FEU6m3_Sp01IddlqjTVBEARZfXQ%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=3e5f6bb785934404b9604940366e185e&_t=XnLKcg6QS-hJEttAgVaBCbp2e09Hbc1S4wWLi4rcb7S9hjk-qk3E_y1En9qp65T7EzHTm9Vsg5NF_jn8FEU6m3_Sp01IddlqjTVBEARZfXQ%3D)

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3e5f6bb785934404b9604940366e185e&_e=-hvOHmKqFc_I9jy3p9Nwj9uve1l_514dTHl5AgxA0RHbhglcpSkpnrkEP55pYVQUGUb54OF-eFuRva6Zek-1PhqIa4D1Rm4LBbI5n_VT6UxKYlb54Frg2OLXmusrX2-TsnPHXYH6zjqkXeeFWHx3alDRZMT4kHAXYtqEVuLhEiYMSF9WPv3zniVj0tRL6D9mZk4N6x232ZF_UXmxQgCV9NOrTLBq0ijJqrtpjTN1GHUk0GM2HkurAoim0sIkIIbnfraGaabAZQ20yp7hPTAYdyV9lGciYLlU9WG_IQ0DoMs4dq9zRvmm1RRgDuIZNF8ziOFhXynKomq231Bn88D7Euhr2kfI_5vWFOn1HxV06VkVeqMNicBFeR32xRuhJcR7DJg7d5kYlPv63RKaaw7WAspA4jWV565FMmX9v0d5_7s%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

It’s Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy writing to you from Montana.

Recently I came across an email from my opponent in my inbox in which he wrote to his supporters that he is “ _**one of the most vulnerable Democratic senators**_ ,” and that political experts are saying that his “ _**[Senate] seat is one of the most likely to flip red unless folks like you help**_ ...”

**He’s right** – he is vulnerable to defeat, and for good reason. Jon Tester represents a state in the United States Senate that Donald Trump won in 2020 by SIXTEEN POINTS.

Meanwhile, **Tester is in the United States Senate voting with Joe Biden 91% of the time.** I have a message for Jon: We’re running to represent Montana, NOT MASSACHUSETTS. _**

I know Jon Tester is vulnerable**_

_**Jon Tester knows he is vulnerable**_

****But unless you’re aware that this Senate race is one of Republicans' best chances to defeat a Democrat incumbent and flip the Senate, none of it is going to matter.****

Races are won by campaigns who can reach their target audience more efficiently and with greater regularity.

Right now, we’re losing the money game. ****[{link to donate}](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3e5f6bb785934404b9604940366e185e&_e=-hvOHmKqFc_I9jy3p9Nwj9uve1l_514dTHl5AgxA0RHbhglcpSkpnrkEP55pYVQUGUb54OF-eFuRva6Zek-1PhqIa4D1Rm4LBbI5n_VT6UxKYlb54Frg2OLXmusrX2-TsnPHXYH6zjqkXeeFWHx3alDRZMT4kHAXYtqEVuLhEiYMSF9WPv3zniVj0tRL6D9mZk4N6x232ZF_UXmxQgCV9NOrTLBq0ijJqrtpjTN1GHUk0GM2HkurAoim0sIkIIbnlhki5Tvgc2Tg6GVe1IZtyGOc_B8CmU0JlfE3ZuCVJC5nsXkXFCIdmr6FMOtqYQkHJkOx-k5vGqlBDq585vGmHxR8P1i8qPHVgQ2mVOnvyfvc1wbOeVPw8G8Kq-P-0IXqkzS0dBwEilHTpLQwgpyNnCLxO73jIjxWIVuQwmd5Uyo%3D)**** Sen. Tester has raised more than $15 million this year from small-dollar donors like you. We’ve raised a fraction of that. We really need the help. Your donation really might make all the difference.

[**LINK TO DONATE** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3e5f6bb785934404b9604940366e185e&_e=-hvOHmKqFc_I9jy3p9Nwj9uve1l_514dTHl5AgxA0RHbhglcpSkpnrkEP55pYVQUGUb54OF-eFuRva6Zek-1PhqIa4D1Rm4LBbI5n_VT6UxKYlb54Frg2OLXmusrX2-TsnPHXYH6zjqkXeeFWHx3alDRZMT4kHAXYtqEVuLhEiYMSF9WPv3zniVj0tRL6D9mZk4N6x232ZF_UXmxQgCV9NOrTLBq0ijJqrtpjTN1GHUk0GM2HkurAoim0sIkIIbnLPjswBh7WHw5v3Z0jbCvl_v_-pum2AWTkeHD16M5Mw1OzvUVINct_FTWvdjPOmuv-vg2h6k0XPuG41fuXs4SB0EmswuOddPrtn1DZhR-_wr2oYgkj6EctaG0cl9SZvVSFeID8bGrG7QT8ukOLWEx4mrmWurf3ha5Ff8XoVT8uSg%3D)

**Please let me hear from you now or in the very near future.**

I cannot win this race without support from conservatives around the country.

**Not only will this be the toughest undertaking of my life, but it’ll also be ugly, too.**

You may or may not know who Jon Tester is but let me tell you this right now: _**you need to know his name**_. You’re going to be hearing it a lot over the coming 12 months.

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zse7k3r6ip4g3p2jh6fkfg5mjlfcqeq079tkpqjg_rp22sh2s8i66p70spj64ob2cjh2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrgq35o5kboo4l1j4cgfsksqgf8kd1gnlkerqpt8_rp22sh2s8i66p70spj64ob2cjh2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z61mrjvek6uvl8h1ha8aepv4a2kciqlcfpsv0o68_rp22sh2s8i66p70spj64ob2cjh2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.

On November 15th, 2022, the Federal Reserve announced they are now testing the 'digital dollar'. They'll be joined by major banks like Citigroup, HSBC, Mastercard, and Wells Fargo. And you should be scared! The 'digital dollar' puts all your money in the hands of the government. They'll be able to.... Know what's in your accounts and what you buy Limit what you purchase and the causes you support Take everything away with the click of a button Thousands of Americans have already used this Legal IRS-Proof loophole to move their retirement accounts (IRA,401k,TSP, etc.) into certain real assets that protect against Biden's 'digital dollar'. which details how you can use this IRS-loophole to protect your wealth and retirement savings. Accept your FREE copy of this Digital Dollar guide ... at no-cost and no-obligation to you. Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

clean_body: | | | | | Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" ---|--- | | ⬇DONATE BY CHECK⬇ ROGER WILLIAMS FOR U.S. CONGRESS 10 N. name: =?utf-8?Q?Carlina=20Rivera?=
subject: Assisting with your quality of life concerns
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carlina 2023
body:
If you see a mess, call it in! | | | | [ ](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=722dd408dc&e=2de202398d)
---
| Peter --

Many people ask, "what can I do about cleanliness in my neighborhood?" You can call it in!

Constituents often complain about overflowing litter baskets, missed garbage pickups, or graffiti on their block. My team and I have worked to directly address these quality of life concerns as you send them to us. 311 complaints, in conjunction with our follow-up, can work! Here are some recent examples of issues addressed by the programs I am funding:
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| As I am re-elected this November 7 with your support, I will continue to fund programs and services that help mitigate sanitation and cleanliness issues in neighborhoods from Kips Bay to the Village to the Lower East Side. The issues you identify are invaluable to making us proud of our communities.

Carlina
---
| | |
---
| **In the News**
---
| [**Daily News: Hospital Beds for Ailing Detainees Delayed**](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=d5a25c17bf&e=2de202398d)
Carlina held an oversight hearing in her capacity as Chair of the Criminal Justic Committee regarding delays in new beds that would house incarcerated people with illnesses and that would alleviate crowding at Riker's Island.

**[CoStar: N](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=03a10f0500&e=2de202398d)[ew Short-Term Rental Rules Begin Getting Enforced](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=00caf8f68e&e=2de202398d)**
As we face a historic housing crisis, Carlina passed legislation that would ensure our housing stock is not depleted by short-term rentals.

[Chelsea News: How One Man's Love of Ice Cream Turned into a Thriving Business](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=eaf08e5ceb&e=2de202398d)
Carlina honored local small business owner David Yoo on the ten-year anniversary of Davey's Ice Cream.

name: Zak Malamed
subject: Tomorrow
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
#
Hey there-

Tomorrow George Santos will not be fighting for New Yorkers.

He will not be working to get Israel the aid it needs to defend itself or rescue innocent civilians being held hostage by terrorists.

**Instead, he will be in court answering for his 23 criminal charges including fraud, conspiracy, and identity theft.**

In a moment, [_I am going to ask you for a donation to our campaign so we get rid of him once and for all_](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zak-for-congress-1?amount=10?source=em231026-90do&refcode2=527_8507_uA3wk2&akid=527%2E8507%2EuA3wk2), but I want to explain to everyone why this goes beyond Santos.

George Santos is a despicable liar – _but he is far from an outlier._

Congress is full of people who only care about themselves, sewing chaos and division amongst their colleagues just for sound-bites and political points.

This is nothing new.

**But in order to move past this culture of corruption, we must put our faith in a new leadership.**

I have spent my life investing in the potential of others, mobilizing young people to fight for what is right, and bringing people together.

All the while, I’ve never lost sight of our core Democratic values - economic opportunity for all, safe communities, and full equality under the law.

That is precisely what we need in Congress right now. And the only way we are going to get it is by building a team big enough to reach all New Yorkers.

_**And that starts with you.**_

[_If you could pitch in $5, $10 – whatever you can – to help us out, I promise you we will make our campaign big enough to flip our district blue again._](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zak-for-congress-1?amount=10?source=em231026-90do&refcode2=527_8507_uA3wk2&akid=527%2E8507%2EuA3wk2)

We have the energy and momentum behind us – now we just need your support.

With gratitude,
Zak Malamed

[Support us here.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zak-for-congress-1?amount=10?amount=25&refcode=em20231026-el&refcode2=527_8507_uA3wk2&akid=527%2E8507%2EuA3wk2)
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=527%2E8507%2EuA3wk2)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.zakforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=527%2E8507%2EuA3wk2)

To give by check:
Zak for Congress
PO Box 220421
Great Neck, NY 11022
Email us: [info@e.zakforcongress.com](mailto:info@e.zakforcongress.com)
PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS

Mike Johnson was just elected Speaker of the House!

body:
We have exactly 12 days until Election Day. If we want any chance of securing victory, we need to heed President Biden’s call and get the job done. So, can you chip in? | | |

| |
---|---

clean_body: We have exactly 12 days until Election Day. If we want any chance of securing victory, we need to heed President Biden’s call and get the job done. So, can you chip in? | | | | | ---|--- 🚨 There are 12 days until Election Day 🚨 12 days – that’s all we have left to make an impact on Election Day. And President Joe Biden knows this, so he’s calling on each member of this grassroots team to support our movement to elect state Democrats: Republicans just funneled a staggering $4.4 million into Virginia, making this an even tougher battle to win. We’re heeding President Biden’s call, and we need you to stand with him, too – there’s a hell of a lot more to do. Here’s our to-do list to secure Democratic victory this November: Strategize with our candidates in these final weeks Mobilize resources to push our state Democrats across the finish line Invest in pivotal races like Virginia to ensure every vote counts Engage voters through door-knocking and phone banking To check off all our boxes, we’re going to need grassroots supporters like you, to be the driving force that pushes Democrats to victory. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thank you for being a crucial part of this team, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Paid for by DLCC PAC. Peter,

It’s Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy writing to you from Montana.

Recently I came across an email from my opponent in my inbox in which he wrote to his supporters that he is “ _**one of the most vulnerable Democratic senators**_ ,” and that political experts are saying that his “ _**[Senate] seat is one of the most likely to flip red unless folks like you help**_ ...”

**He’s right** – he is vulnerable to defeat, and for good reason. Jon Tester represents a state in the United States Senate that Donald Trump won in 2020 by SIXTEEN POINTS.

Meanwhile, **Tester is in the United States Senate voting with Joe Biden 91% of the time.** I have a message for Jon: We’re running to represent Montana, NOT MASSACHUSETTS. _**

I know Jon Tester is vulnerable**_

_**Jon Tester knows he is vulnerable**_

****But unless you’re aware that this Senate race is one of Republicans' best chances to defeat a Democrat incumbent and flip the Senate, none of it is going to matter.****

Races are won by campaigns who can reach their target audience more efficiently and with greater regularity.

Right now, we’re losing the money game. ****[{link to donate}](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c98b69f4ee124533aab68ff3f6fe596d&_e=JVMYsbDeTCH6OFlia8me3uVeRHpNxfcUoLxTR0kFLuhnmeIZK-AbWUWxwcBQslQXmGX0teK6xkOKCruJBTXc0SebxIOJcalFnIJXXp8AiQPq2NpFSwMGLrRR-Iw0AAxurqi3z1j8ZQluvI7F183Ynhr5qFEKx8069K_-h7qa2MfTeIqSCRm9aq70upeBqOkdmay7qZNPnxP7ZdzFjzMwQXydaBRXo7AyYYa_tbP5DoTbJ48K8rKcvyzsYzwvka9l2v37f5uXqvWg1cWs4olgPIys7YJi6-ZISkH4IJd1Ci_lXwP1--Ahq4WioUEngT86HwFZv214pFvb--05xtuU6xNDWPFwRTQQYt_NIqBODfhRzWq2aVLD5LfTuOSFI9HJ7GUPa4SdpEgWoIYCDpWUJkoRk1jaIeq_teZTeyKcjN0%3D)**** Sen. Tester has raised more than $15 million this year from small-dollar donors like you. We’ve raised a fraction of that. We really need the help. Your donation really might make all the difference.

[**LINK TO DONATE** ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c98b69f4ee124533aab68ff3f6fe596d&_e=JVMYsbDeTCH6OFlia8me3uVeRHpNxfcUoLxTR0kFLuhnmeIZK-AbWUWxwcBQslQXmGX0teK6xkOKCruJBTXc0SebxIOJcalFnIJXXp8AiQPq2NpFSwMGLrRR-Iw0AAxurqi3z1j8ZQluvI7F183Ynhr5qFEKx8069K_-h7qa2MfTeIqSCRm9aq70upeBqOkdmay7qZNPnxP7ZdzFjzMwQXydaBRXo7AyYYa_tbP5DoTbJ48K8rKcvyzsYzwvka9l2_6h4Ci9h3LGDlR3uUed5TcYacmGmBWTl5i5J7ipPHGtIW2TYe328B3kth-TNYiBcVWtSAYoTF-4wJDdixJU0ZXWsVBZeMC5CXEyfI_--Es0TPMcFcZGUW7cCKKdUIcJT16G-teXnwUd16TfPPPqVJjqhLtLmxFKbHrpegbqDqU%3D)

**Please let me hear from you now or in the very near future.**

I cannot win this race without support from conservatives around the country.

**Not only will this be the toughest undertaking of my life, but it’ll also be ugly, too.**

You may or may not know who Jon Tester is but let me tell you this right now: _**you need to know his name**_. You’re going to be hearing it a lot over the coming 12 months.

[**I'D BE GRATEFUL IF YOU DONATED TODAY** ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c98b69f4ee124533aab68ff3f6fe596d&_e=JVMYsbDeTCH6OFlia8me3uVeRHpNxfcUoLxTR0kFLuhnmeIZK-AbWUWxwcBQslQXmGX0teK6xkOKCruJBTXc0SebxIOJcalFnIJXXp8AiQPq2NpFSwMGLrRR-Iw0AAxurqi3z1j8ZQluvI7F183Ynhr5qFEKx8069K_-h7qa2MfTeIqSCRm9aq70upeBqOkdmay7qZNPnxP7ZdzFjzMwQXydaBRXo7AyYYa_tbP5DoTbJ48K8rKcvyzsYzwvka9lbkuXLw4Ylx1PVxYHRaW0UkrwWzWPt-3Gh7DdZqKfkGUhSAOCjtzvIEynob9AQUzVBlx2gfjsurRHiu_8r2MoRBO27rYIrFClLYJ8np-8BxcOylAf91iCggOpru8ZugJssOV46DdR-gQU_PK4mybi9IKm-R18NGZ4uG4DecmjXYE%3D)

Thank you,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

name: Trump News HQ
subject: The decline of American Citizenship
body:
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
My name is Kyle Murnen and I am the Director of Online Learning at Hillsdale College

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze83207s9j3u046mi3c112iqvscu6a71v9j05vpg_rp22sh2s8i66p70spj69or4cdh2bs) Dear Friend,

My name is Kyle Murnen and I am the Director of Online Learning at Hillsdale College, where we offer free online courses to anyone who wishes to learn.

**One of our top-rated courses, "American Citizenship and Its Decline," is taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson and is based on his book _The Dying Citizen_.**

This course argues that at the heart of America's current crises are symptoms of a far larger problem that afflicts the West: the loss of freedom and political power of the citizen.

Dr. Hanson frames this problem by first explaining the history of citizenship in the West and by reminding us how rare it is in human history to have governments that are created and controlled by the people.

To maintain this type of government requires a robust and self-reliant middle class, clearly defined and enforced borders, national autonomy, and confidence in our way of life.

Yet today, the middle class is disappearing under enormous economic strains, the distinction between citizen and resident is being blurred by open borders, and pre-civilizational tribalism is dividing Americans into a variety of identity groups.

These problems are being aggravated by top-down pressures from an unelected bureaucratic class that uses judicial, executive, and legislative powers to overwhelm the citizen.

Finally, globalism poses a historic challenge to national sovereignty, as many of today's elites seek to replace American laws and independence with international bodies, often without the consent of our elected representatives or the people they serve.

The course, however, concludes on a hopeful note: Citizens still hold the key to revitalizing our traditions of empowered citizenship and regaining control over our government.

So, enroll today in this free course, "American Citizenship and Its Decline," with Victor Davis Hanson. You can embark on this journey with us to learn about these threats to our rights as citizens and how to combat them.

Click the secure link below to start today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/register/american-citizenship-and-its-decline](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5mc137bslav5plo4kgbva24jclg60b5hpofh7l8_rp22sh2s8i66p70spj69or4cdh2bs)
**

Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College |

| Trump Train News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7clodnhdr9bhh16vbaj8fdt0hgpd9bdpsetvajo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8p30slhm2pb246h22sh2s8i66p70spj69or4cdh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z70b9sm26bpcbcbkcf733b03b2o2j1280cln9kt0_rp22sh2s8i66p70spj69or4cdh2bs)_

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za7lupep1j5diemv3j29uoq5fr1n8rnmc94ecp28_rp22sh2s8i66p70spj69or4cdh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

Don’t abandon House Democrats >>
| **_⚠️ FINAL NOTICE ⚠️_
DEADLINE: EXPIRED
SIGNATURE STATUS: MISSING**
* * *
You were hand-selected as one of 500 top supporters to sign our card standing with House Democrats — **_yet your signature is nowhere to be found._** [**We’re giving you ONE last chance to sign or you’ll be moved to our NON-SUPPORTER list: Please add your name now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55920?t=6&akid=11473%2E878179%2E3q7-_X) | [Donate $3 to sign the card now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55920?t=7&akid=11473%2E878179%2E3q7-_X)
---
TO: House Democratic Caucus
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear House Democrats,

_Thank you for your incredible work for the American people!_**

The far-right Republican majority is a total DISASTER, even ousting their own Speaker and electing a new extremist.

Meanwhile, your caucus under Rep. Hakeem Jeffries’s leadership is unified and dedicated to saving abortion rights, voting rights, our democracy, and more.

Your strength makes me proud to be a Democrat — **and gives me hope that we can take down the GOP’s razor-thin majority next November!**

[**Fighting against the MAGA dark money machine won’t be easy, so I’m chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my appreciation and to help flip the 5 seats we need to turn the House BIDEN-BLUE! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55920?t=8&akid=11473%2E878179%2E3q7-_X) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55920?t=9&akid=11473%2E878179%2E3q7-_X)
---
**_X A THANKFUL AMERICAN_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=11473%2E878179%2E3q7-_X). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=11473%2E878179%2E3q7-_X).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=11473%2E878179%2E3q7-_X) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=11473%2E878179%2E3q7-_X). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=11473%2E878179%2E3q7-_X)

I'm Debra Gardner. I worked 10 years as a social worker, nearly 30 years in the fight against addiction in Virginia, and I ran Richmond's criminal justice and corrections department.

**_Now, I'm running in a MUST-WIN seat for Democrats to take back the Virginia House of Delegates, and I'm so proud to have the Collective PAC behind me._**

[Peter, my win would mean more than just a victory for Democrats; It would be a victory for our underrepresented communities. I won't forget—when we win, our leaders need to look out for ALL of us, not just the privileged few.

That's why my people-first platform is focused on

✅ Ensuring economic Stability
✅ Guaranteeing quality Education for All
✅ Enhancing community safety
✅ Protecting our environment
✅ Expanding healthcare access

name: VA Signatures Needed (via Stop Gun Violence PAC)
subject: re: an assault weapons ban
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STOP GUN VIOLENCE PAC
body:
Almost all of the last dozen mass shootings have been carried out using high-capacity assault weapons.

---
| **BREAKING NEWS FROM _NBC:__ _ At least 16 killed, up to 50 injured in mass shooting in Lewiston, Maine**
---
| | [_**Sign by 11:59 PM to join President Biden and demand Congress pass an assault weapons ban →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72213384/434625242/-2067475176?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTcyZjVkYzctMDI3NC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=b1550CaSfyXPGRBNiBBAl_8P9r_I_3Fj2ey2JYg4OJc=&emci=7565440a-ff73-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=572f5dc7-0274-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=7937656)
---
| [SIGN THE PETITION ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72213385/434625243/-2067475176?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTcyZjVkYzctMDI3NC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=b1550CaSfyXPGRBNiBBAl_8P9r_I_3Fj2ey2JYg4OJc=&emci=7565440a-ff73-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=572f5dc7-0274-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=7937656)
---
Peter, our country is facing a gun violence epidemic. Time and time again, Americans turn on the news to a mass shooting destroying another community in this country.

_**We can’t keep living like this. Enough is enough.**_

Almost all of the last dozen mass shootings have been carried out using high-capacity assault weapons. **That’s why we’re joining President Biden in his call to BAN assault weapons:**

name: Tennessee Voter Project
subject: Help Women Make History in Memphis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TN Voter Project; Isaac Kimes, Esq
body:
https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject [https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject]
October 26, 2023
Dear Friend,
We have an opportunity to help women make history in Memphis. The Memphis runoff election begins TOMORROW! Early voting is kicking off and will go through November 11th.
Two of our endorsed candidates are both women who have led incredible change in our community: Jerri Green is running for City Council District 2 and Michalyn Easter-Thomas is running for re-election for City Council District 7.
Jerri Green has the opportunity to not only flip this seat, but be the first woman to hold office in District 2.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1]
SUPPORT TENNESSEE VOTER PROJECT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1]
Jerri Green is "one tough mother" who served as the Executive Director for Community Legal Center in Memphis and is currently an attorney and Senior Policy Advisor in the Shelby County Mayor's Office, where she has led countless programs, including starting Shelby County’s Free Gun Lock by Mail program--which is likely the first of its kind in the country. She gets things done. She doesn’t take “no” for an answer.
Michalyn Easter-Thomas has translated her years of grassroots experience into real wins for her community. In her first term, she secured funding to build a grocery store in her district, criminal justice reform, and transparency in the redistricting process. We have full confidence in her ability to continue fighting for the support and investment that District 7 deserves.
Let's flip District 2 and make sure we elect these two progressive candidates to the Council. Let's make history for women in Memphis.
We've got an exciting year ahead with the upcoming 2024 elections and we'd love your support. Every contribution to Tennessee Voter Project puts us on track to turn Tennessee blue and elect more progressives across the state. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1]
Thanks for your support,
Tennessee Voter Project Staff

It is dedicated to growing the number of registered voters and supporting Democratic candidates. The time is now to register more voters and prepare for the next election. If you would like to support TVP, checks, made payable to TN Voter Project, can be mailed to us at POB 40551, Memphis, TN 38174 or please go on-line today at www.tennesseevoterproject.com. name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Choose this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWpNEhkikN

Are you accepting the decline of this country? I feel a
responsibility to stand up and fight back

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWpNEhkikN

Friend,

The
radical Left is trying to take control of our lives, restrict our
ability to make purchases based on a "social credit score,"
uproot our livelihoods, indoctrinate children... and force
Americans to foot the bill for reckless spending and costly
decline.

REFUSE THE DECLINE. HELP ME FIGHT BACK

I
think about why I'm motivated to run, and I've got kids. You may
have kids, grandkids, or young children you care deeply about. If
you're anything like me, we want to leave America better off for
the next generation than we found it. That's a birthright we have
in this country. At the rate of the Left's decline, we are not
going be able to achieve this.

I'm
often reminded of President Reagan, who said that freedom is only
one generation away from extinction. It's not passed in the
bloodstream. I used to think that was an exaggeration, but having
lived through the last four or five years, it's clear to me that
freedom is fragile in this country, and we cannot take it for
granted.

DONATE $15 TO FIGHT FOR FREEDOM

When freedom comes under attack, it's our responsibility to stand
up and fight for it. That's what I'm doing, and that's what I'll
continue to do until we've restored the future of this country
that the next generation deserves to see.

DONATE $47

In
2024, it is up to the American people to choose success over
decline, and for the sake of these kids, I need you to choose
success with me. This fight cannot be won if we sit on the
sidelines, Friend. The time to get this country back on track
cannot wait another 4 years. It cannot wait another day. We need
to get this done.

In
Freedom,

Ron
DeSantis

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

Ron DeSantis comes from
blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to
him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the
Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate
degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was
so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered
to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a
life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and
now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting
to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in
this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every
turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and
consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his
life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and
3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that
this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents
face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political
agenda down the throats of children.

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has
promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected
bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to
children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by
immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our
southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the
mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring
our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on
track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record
speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment,
politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the
legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his
leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has
stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next
President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill
for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for
President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the
decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for
another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act
is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as
charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without
"green cards"), federal government contractors, and national
banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best
efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address,
occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose
aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The
maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600
($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple
using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary &
$6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute
$10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident
(i.e., green card holder).

This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not
being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose
of making this contribution.

I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card
and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued
to another person.

I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this
contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization,
national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal
contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron
DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his
military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not
imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department
of Defense.

Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

PO Box 3696

Tallahassee, FL 32315

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress
body:
Extremist Kevin Kiley represents the fringe alt-right — not Californians.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72214499/434629004/1172010437?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDgzNTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDFlNjRjZTAtMDM3NC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=puUnAHhczEdn3uTgoYZTS-rp2U9FTlTx-2-7tPaJ53U=&emci=d666f555-5d6d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=d1e64ce0-0374-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=13535713)

| | Peter, If you need to know the stakes of this campaign, look no further than the voting record of our opponent, Kevin Kiley: ❌ He’s a 2020 election denier.
❌ He voted to ban abortion.
❌ He earned twice impeached, four-times indicted former President Donald Trump’s endorsement in 2022.
❌ He voted against wildfire prevention funding.

name: Your America
subject: Citizenship requires vigilance
body:
Are you proud to be an American citizen?

| | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35654%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=n1QylZ1EMK9HNUpF3RDhTw&sysid=1)
---
| |
Are you proud to be an American citizen? If you’re like me, you give thanks to God every day that you live in a country that is free, peaceful, and where citizens have inalienable rights. Most people in history can’t say the same thing--in fact, most people in the world can’t say the same thing even today. You don’t have to be a historian to see that the long practice of citizenship in America is unprecedented. It’s one of our nation’s great achievements. But there’s a catch--citizenship requires vigilance and knowledge to maintain.
---
| | Especially now, when it faces threats from the far-Left and progressive economic policies, illegal immigration, and more. Everyone who wishes to defend freedom in America requires an understanding of the nature and scope of these challenges. And as a college, we know that a proper education is the best defense of liberty. That’s why today I hope you’ll support our _**[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35665%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AmjbIl%2fCk0yjoU1AQTnc5g&sysid=1)**_
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35666%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6Yh5ALHXMcHm0csmhVilvQ&sysid=1)
---
| | This ambitious and extensive project has three main goals.
* **The first important goal **of this campaign is to inform debates about the critical issues of our time through _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, to increasing numbers of homes and businesses--free of charge. We already reach millions--we must reach hundreds of thousands more.
* **The second vital goal **is to teach millions of citizens about the Constitution, American history, and free-market economics through free online courses.
* **The third critical goal **is restoring excellence to K-12 education in America through our expanded Hillsdale K-12 Education Office and Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum.

And unlike the vast majority of colleges and universities, we must **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about liberty. And we have to do it without taking ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY--to remain proudly independent. This means that _ your_ support is critical to our success. With your help, we’ll engage the far-Left on the battlefield of education. With your help, we will defend liberty against dangerous ideologies. And with your help, we will preserve freedom for future generations of American citizens. We urgently need your support, because, to implement the **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** fully, we need to raise $1.5 million in the next few months. **You can give safely and securely at this link:** _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-citizenship-and-defend-liberty**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35667%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=z0uu0zJ%2bj2CcuB%2bwnjGFJQ&sysid=1)_ And for a gift of $100 or more, you’ll receive a special hardcover edition of Victor Davis Hanson’s book, _The Dying Citizen: How Progressive Elites, Tribalism, and Globalization Are Destroying the Idea of America. _Victor Davis Hanson is a frequent commentator on Fox News and online. He’s also a historian and distinguished fellow here at Hillsdale. Regarding the book, my boss and teacher, Hillsdale President Larry P. Arnn, has written, “In this book, Hanson demonstrates yet again his command across time and for our time. **This book and he are a treasure.” ** Thank you so much for your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism--especially among younger Americans--that is essential to preserving citizenship and free government. Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach **[Hillsdale College](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35668%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VTBPi5aha6%2fbTgHL19qn8g&sysid=1)**
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_
[Unsubscribe](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c8424%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=S4S1ZINO0lHS7QlEI22S4g&sysid=1)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35669%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=b4Pbfbq10GdcM38aJz9mkw&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35660%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ii8aWp%2bWSi%2bBiS183TQs2Q&sysid=1)_
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c8424%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=S4S1ZINO0lHS7QlEI22S4g&sysid=1)

Are you proud to be an American citizen? If you’re like me, you give thanks to God every day that you live in a country that is free, peaceful, and where citizens have inalienable rights. Most people in history can’t say the same thing—in fact, most people in the world can’t say the same thing even today. You don’t have to be a historian to see that the long practice of citizenship in America is unprecedented. It’s one of our nation’s great achievements. But there’s a catch—citizenship requires vigilance and knowledge to maintain.
---
| | Especially now, when it faces threats from the far-Left and progressive economic policies, illegal immigration, and more. Everyone who wishes to defend freedom in America requires an understanding of the nature and scope of these challenges. And as a college, we know that a proper education is the best defense of liberty. That’s why today I hope you’ll support our _**[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zng4li3omg98imhufvdkki0c3442cfm5rath7ko8_rp22sh2s8i66p70spgm8ob2cdh2bs)**_
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ze1agdkl0h78ckpjp4kclvglgfrintdiq8n5l56g_rp22sh2s8i66p70spgm8ob2cdh2bs)
---
| | This ambitious and extensive project has three main goals.
* **The first important goal** of this campaign is to inform debates about the critical issues of our time through _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, to increasing numbers of homes and businesses—free of charge. We already reach millions—we must reach hundreds of thousands more.
* **The second vital goal** is to teach millions of citizens about the Constitution, American history, and free-market economics through free online courses.
* **The third critical goal** is restoring excellence to K-12 education in America through our expanded Hillsdale K–12 Education Office and Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum.

And unlike the vast majority of colleges and universities, we must **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about liberty. And we have to do it without taking ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY—to remain proudly independent. This means that _your_ support is critical to our success. With your help, we’ll engage the far-Left on the battlefield of education. With your help, we will defend liberty against dangerous ideologies. And with your help, we will preserve freedom for future generations of American citizens. We urgently need your support, because, to implement the **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** fully, we need to raise $1.5 million in the next few months. **You can give safely and securely at this link:** _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-citizenship-and-defend-liberty**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z80n590k8ur5kvnbjvlpmonb2sf5tvjmsbin5om8_rp22sh2s8i66p70spgm8ob2cdh2bs)_ And for a gift of $100 or more, you’ll receive a special hardcover edition of Victor Davis Hanson’s book, _The Dying Citizen: How Progressive Elites, Tribalism, and Globalization Are Destroying the Idea of America._ Victor Davis Hanson is a frequent commentator on Fox News and online. He’s also a historian and distinguished fellow here at Hillsdale. Regarding the book, my boss and teacher, Hillsdale President Larry P. Arnn, has written, “In this book, Hanson demonstrates yet again his command across time and for our time. **This book and he are a treasure.”** Thank you so much for your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans—that is essential to preserving citizenship and free government. Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach **[Hillsdale College](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1ic1sd8ergtjfqmc6mn9nvd0ela6mqtni53namo_rp22sh2s8i66p70spgm8ob2cdh2bs)**
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---

American Briefing
---

name: Conservative Intel
subject: The history of capitalism and socialism
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWT68DkiNZ

Over the last century, free-market capitalism and socialism have
provided the dominant interpretations, and conflicting visions,
of political and...

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWT68DkiNZ

Dear
Friend,
Over the
last century, free-market capitalism and socialism have provided
the dominant interpretations, and conflicting visions, of
political and economic freedom. In the past few years, we've seen
a growing trend among young Americans in favor of socialism and
against capitalism.

But do
they truly understand the history and outcomes of socialism and
capitalism?

This is
precisely why we put together this brand new eBook, The History
Of Socialism And Capitalism, from Hoover Institution senior
fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson.

This
eBook consists of two papers-one from each scholar-written in
conjunction with The Human Prosperity Project on Socialism and
Free-Market Capitalism. This project provides objective and
scholarly analyses of free-market capitalism, socialism, and
hybrid systems and provides evidence on the effectiveness of the
various systems on outcomes that affect prosperity and
well-being.

I think
you will find this new eBook particularly important and timely,
given the recent interest in policies that are radical from a US
historical perspective, some of which are advocated by political
leaders.

Simply
click here to request your free copy of The History Of Socialism
And Capitalism.

Thanks,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: It’s not looking good…
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We’re still not where we need to be ahead of our deadline next Tuesday.
#

Peter, a quick moment of honesty from me before we go head first into our end-of-month rush.
Here’s where we’re at:
Kyrsten Sinema has close to $11 million in the bank. Kari Lake is raising who knows how much now that she is officially in the race, with Trump’s full endorsement.
We’ve explained why it’s so critical for us to kick this into high gear now that we’re deep in a real, competitive race with an opponent who is a threat to our democratic way of life.
We’ve laid out the stakes — Kari Lake lost by less than a percent last time around, and Kyrsten Sinema has enough wealthy backers that she can sustain a campaign indefinitely.
And if either one of them wins, it’s game over for our agenda in the Senate.
But we’re still not where we need to be ahead of our deadline next Tuesday. And we’ve got Halloween to contend with here, when a lot of people are going to check out and spend time with their kids (including me!).
It’s not looking good right now. And missing our goal would be bad. Very bad. So:
[**Can I count on you to make your first online contribution to our campaign before our deadline on Halloween? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself. When lots of people join you, these add up fast.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-oct23.kRA6ky&refcode=em231026-1&t=1&akid=1377%2E734936%2EZbXLwb)
[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-oct23.kRA6ky&refcode=em231026-1&amount=3&t=2&akid=1377%2E734936%2EZbXLwb)
Every donation matters, Peter. Especially yours.
Thank you so much for sticking with me.
Semper Fi,
Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=3&akid=1377%2E734936%2EZbXLwb). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1377%2E734936%2EZbXLwb). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=1377_734936_ZbXLwb&akid=1377%2E734936%2EZbXLwb)

subject: Re: TRUMP'S GAG ORDER

name: The Courier Newsroom Team
subject: A known election denier is the new Speaker of the House
body:
Rep. Mike Johnson played an instrumental role in pushing Trump's 'Big Lie.'

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72216794/434638615/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTM1NjA4ZjYtMDc3NC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=js1JuBX989MM11gOoVS-qs4xalIx1obOXh9QQKHqpKc=&emci=918c88c6-f973-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=e35608f6-0774-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
It’s been three weeks since MAGA Republicans ousted Kevin McCarthy as House Speaker, but yesterday, with the help of Donald Trump, they found their guy: Louisiana Rep. Mike Johnson.
**We’ll tell you how Speaker Johnson used the right-wing media to help Donald Trump spread false claims about election fraud after the 2020 election,[but if you're ready to support Courier Newsroom and our mission to stop right-wing disinformation, please donate $15 or more today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72216818/434638655/641188573?refcode=em20231026&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTM1NjA4ZjYtMDc3NC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=js1JuBX989MM11gOoVS-qs4xalIx1obOXh9QQKHqpKc=)**

Johnson was central to the so-called fake elector scheme and, in the days after the 2020 election, he appeared on conservative talk radio pushing Donald Trump’s lies about Dominion voting machines.
In his talk radio interview, he denounced the (nonexistent) efforts to steal the election from Donald Trump as ‘evil’ and seemed to warn of violence from Trump supporters:
_" When people lose their faith in those foundations and our institutions of government, **then they just want to resolve their disputes in the streets.** "_
_— Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson, The Moon Griffon Show, 11/09/2020_
**Without Donald Trump, Mike Johnson, Fox News, and the entire right-wing media ecosystem, January 6th never would have happened.**

Peter,

It’s Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy writing to you from Montana.

Recently I came across an email from my opponent in my inbox in which he wrote to his supporters that he is “ _**one of the most vulnerable Democratic senators**_ ,” and that political experts are saying that his “ _**[Senate] seat is one of the most likely to flip red unless folks like you help**_ ...”

**He’s right** – he is vulnerable to defeat, and for good reason. Jon Tester represents a state in the United States Senate that Donald Trump won in 2020 by SIXTEEN POINTS.

Meanwhile, **Tester is in the United States Senate voting with Joe Biden 91% of the time.** I have a message for Jon: We’re running to represent Montana, NOT MASSACHUSETTS. _**

I know Jon Tester is vulnerable**_

_**Jon Tester knows he is vulnerable**_

****But unless you’re aware that this Senate race is one of Republicans' best chances to defeat a Democrat incumbent and flip the Senate, none of it is going to matter.****

Races are won by campaigns who can reach their target audience more efficiently and with greater regularity.

Right now, we’re losing the money game. ****[{link to donate}](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d80bcc1f26b24bbe9005b8b6aab4c689&_e=Kx5zYAAxnvqFYmI_itZgF2NIZvZuwX45jPfDTFoprx5yhrLr7bHNyaFu_3NYdltyOqHJQu8TBuSnPqsleNEWngH7PnYR3UoLOy1hKXpCGtodmHIqh-7LYJDUjEhabsnx2gEC4eNqj8gDcB6ZuyouZZkhjG8f_xx3Qk2DVxZmJYL6BLs1sNCIulSOTQjoaNXMxp614mM6mUwMdw3L4dX8TVg-BcCPIjS3sj6HOtxdh204QJzs3_g6909rReElzAoRHJdjdVlx_FdLZNY_BIcEU0YPDhWC-N_mOsj7XGWY8hpx-AExhIQfeBSujDvwCvH-5C_VEtMJOkcF1pyFFSKqN19hrtzLooDtv1AvkC1m74phbmyHV5nXLqfA3T7mfk4pwA6NCSgxvicybO0Khjzk4Se0KTKFUjSIa9aef3jndxE%3D)**** Sen. Tester has raised more than $15 million this year from small-dollar donors like you. We’ve raised a fraction of that. We really need the help. Your donation really might make all the difference.

[**LINK TO DONATE** ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d80bcc1f26b24bbe9005b8b6aab4c689&_e=Kx5zYAAxnvqFYmI_itZgF2NIZvZuwX45jPfDTFoprx5yhrLr7bHNyaFu_3NYdltyOqHJQu8TBuSnPqsleNEWngH7PnYR3UoLOy1hKXpCGtodmHIqh-7LYJDUjEhabsnx2gEC4eNqj8gDcB6ZuyouZZkhjG8f_xx3Qk2DVxZmJYL6BLs1sNCIulSOTQjoaNXMxp614mM6mUwMdw3L4dX8TVg-BcCPIjS3sj6HOtxdh204QJzs3_g6909rReElzAoRHJdjdVlx_FdLZNY_BIcEUyfIbGKQSSLWwiqJtcyblZZ0XJ7ZOdmhRyB4RT-pxEpPbMJdAqjyKdtj3eKNmTPmeZq8WJBYACZs887HrudcvPkLE01Z8fatcAetOgfqDZ7GGKb-bNFy0fE2NmKiW9av6H4HyxhqHbANHnrVDiebv-o%3D)

**Please let me hear from you now or in the very near future.**

I cannot win this race without support from conservatives around the country.

**Not only will this be the toughest undertaking of my life, but it’ll also be ugly, too.**

You may or may not know who Jon Tester is but let me tell you this right now: _**you need to know his name**_. You’re going to be hearing it a lot over the coming 12 months.

body:
