Hey friend,

We've been telling Ron and Casey DeSantis all about how incredible our grassroots digital supporters are, but they're dying to meet you in person!

The next Debate is coming up in Miami on November 8th and we're ready to book your (and a friend's) free flight, free 3-night stay, tickets to the presidential debate, and meeting with Ron and Casey DeSantis!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=689a3679c07e4421009f4e3ce7250e712a852f218d274a563c4e926b1c2b7c069c9139be079fac13f24df4430f243c6a5c4e9ff2db53c8215f096de222f32bf0
Enter NOW!

Anyone can enter once... but we're seeing our top supporters enter over and over again just by donating $5 or more every day until the end of the month...

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=689a3679c07e4421009f4e3ce7250e712a852f218d274a563c4e926b1c2b7c069c9139be079fac13f24df4430f243c6a5c4e9ff2db53c8215f096de222f32bf0

DON'T MISS THIS CHANCE! ENTER NOW!

Ron DeSantis has saved you a spot, friend. We hope you'll do everything it takes to win so we can meet you!

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=689a3679c07e4421eb0c976632490ba70746bd39ce1697a389c5169cbf39dcfe3b8b5e338b49347ed5fe2a60ef0351d5d4706fd585f72e5d0a745fffc5640ab4

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=689a3679c07e4421acf2c48670ec21cb7c41759601e82d837e0772130e42305516b73a839870b064f6a4d329d05e70572fc2a3b97717838db4eb4e33bc5206cf
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=689a3679c07e4421e721d9693232e7cea4880310da85b144ae89ed057a934e47345632cf445ec0f4a9ba934677245596ba74790ba89710a4fd7a4dc91f195231
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=689a3679c07e4421009f4e3ce7250e712a852f218d274a563c4e926b1c2b7c069c9139be079fac13f24df4430f243c6a5c4e9ff2db53c8215f096de222f32bf0

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=689a3679c07e4421009f4e3ce7250e712a852f218d274a563c4e926b1c2b7c069c9139be079fac13f24df4430f243c6a5c4e9ff2db53c8215f096de222f32bf0

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=689a3679c07e4421326e00ba00fce5b494f1231f86a4c8cee09500abfaac9e21d4f15f1c1e208cdb1c07a0e2bbc086b3dbedfe1ebc39366dd939979e8f09c8e5

body:
We wanted to make sure you saw this

We wanted to make sure you saw Ilhan's email from Tuesday about our upcoming October fundraising deadline, and why your support is so important to this movement.
**[Can you take a moment to read it below, and then chip in $3 or anything you can to stand with Ilhan? Every donation — no matter how big or small — goes a long way.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-oct23.jei10D&refcode=em231026-1-subs&t=1&akid=654%2E791427%2E7DMEV6)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/13?c0=io-em-oct23.n7FFAa&amount=3&refcode=em231026-1-subs&t=2&akid=654%2E791427%2E7DMEV6)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/13?c0=io-em-oct23.n7FFAa&refcode=em231026-1-subs&t=3&akid=654%2E791427%2E7DMEV6)**
---

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Ilhan Omar**
Date: Tue, Oct 24, 2023 at 10:03 AM
Subject: One week
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-oct23.jei10D&refcode=em231026-1-subs&t=4&akid=654%2E791427%2E7DMEV6)
Hey team, it's Ilhan. Please allow me to be very direct:
I'm reaching out this morning because one week from today, we're closing the books on our October fundraising numbers, and I need to ask if you can **[make a $3 contribution to our campaign before then.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-oct23.jei10D&refcode=em231026-1-subs&t=5&akid=654%2E791427%2E7DMEV6)
October 31 marks our final monthly deadline before we're less than a year from Election Day 2024 — when this race will truly begin to heat up.
The right-wing GOP, the corporate Democratic establishment, and the billionaires who fund them both have already made it crystal clear that I'm one of their top targets in Congress this cycle.
They'd all love nothing more than to defeat the movement we've spent years building together, and are going to pour millions of dollars of dark money into Minnesota to try.
We already know what's coming. Which is why we _need_ to be ready.
It's going to take a lot of resources. And as you know, we're funding this campaign the right way — _together_. That's why it'd mean so much to have your support, especially today.
So please:
**[Can you make a $3 contribution to stand with me and our re-election campaign today? Every donation — no matter how big or small — goes a long way.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-oct23.jei10D&refcode=em231026-1-subs&t=6&akid=654%2E791427%2E7DMEV6)
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/14?c0=io-em-oct23.JMhw-G&refcode=em231026-1-subs&t=25&akid=654%2E791427%2E7DMEV6)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/15?c0=io-em-oct23.65wiVW&refcode=em231026-1-subs&t=26&akid=654%2E791427%2E7DMEV6)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/8?c0=io-em-oct23.ghJtQt&refcode=em231026-1-subs&t=27&akid=654%2E791427%2E7DMEV6)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/9?c0=io-em-oct23.Uyt3zL&refcode=em231026-1-subs&t=28&akid=654%2E791427%2E7DMEV6)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/10?c0=io-em-oct23.d_ZDDm&refcode=em231026-1-subs&t=29&akid=654%2E791427%2E7DMEV6)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/13?c0=io-em-oct23.n7FFAa&refcode=em231026-1-subs&t=30&akid=654%2E791427%2E7DMEV6)**
---
****
As always, thank you. For chipping in if you can, and for everything that you do for this movement.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

name: Mike Johnson
subject: Let me introduce myself
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life.

|
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi6j56umpket60h6jh3hegmri4r801qgng70pnhg_)
---
Fellow American,

The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them.

**Faith.** Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

**Family.** Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way.

**Freedom.** It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I’ve devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress.

[**This is a simple truth:**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq8e4522jtg5h3l1u4g37aadgf2nlagchnqflbr8_rp22sh2s8i66p70spgmcoj2chh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnqib19lckicin2tdnq5r3bp4m2jap95d2c1h6cp30c9hm69bhemrtcttle9r3adf2ekpn69bhemrtbd9h6iqnbdf56mq39cdj4lonbdum6gqr0t1kmsprbohkmuot7ch5u) America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are!

[** SUPPORT MIKE JOHNSON > **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf2611pi5tbpupkj3clhd70j7pcnerjih1agpbg8_rp22sh2s8i66p70spgmcoj2chh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnqib19lckicin2tdnq5r3bp4m2jap95d2c1h6cp30c9hm69bhemrtcttle9r3adf2ekpn69bhemrtbd9h6iqnbdf56mq39cdj4lonbdum6gqr0t1kmsprbohkmuot7ch5u)

Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness.**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It’s the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support – to restore our country and defend our values. Can you make a donation immediately?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl9o8hbmabj2m4ogodsd85qkmlbfmffg5m3ellv8_rp22sh2s8i66p70spgmcoj2chh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnqib19lckicin2tdnq5r3bp4m2jap95d2c1h6cp30c9hm69bhemrtcttle9r3adf2ekpn69bhemrtbd9h6iqnbdf56mq39cdj4lonbdum6gqr0t1kmsprbohkmuot7ch5u)

[** DONATE TO SAVE AMERICA > **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9fjdagbkm1cl0qb4rs0rfsi9no3o6ejusk3f6b8_rp22sh2s8i66p70spgmcoj2chh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnqib19lckicin2tdnq5r3bp4m2jap95d2c1h6cp30c9hm69bhemrtcttle9r3adf2ekpn69bhemrtbd9h6iqnbdf56mq39cdj4lonbdum6gqr0t1kmsprbohkmuot7ch5u)

Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must make a change before it’s too late.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpf1r7g1ea7ggka9lqkitna8o9uoe2mud1j8dioo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrqbd5mmkpbfc5jmprr7dt26irrb83k6mh7fpjm6nh60oj6chg64or7qm99f44jipbp75ul2kbt0l0nq8a9f5uiak9lfl4m2jap94p5e5qrfkbm6ni9c56liiaq4o32cpi60oj3ccin2tdnqprrasjm6kqu4t9jecin2tdnqmqj2d5lemquaddk6ior69bhemrtcd1lm1q39dpjmnh39dthqep238h1e8he4933cjgecob6c9h68oh5u)

I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It’s why I have been a trusted ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It’s also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference – one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House – and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee.

We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, [**but we cannot do it alone.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zam9v4ooekadp5e36qsn4vlv59rrnm8ob0k4qpd0_rp22sh2s8i66p70spgmcoj2chh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnqib19lckicin2tdnq5r3bp4m2jap95d2c1h6cp30c9hm69bhemrtcttle9r3adf2ekpn69bhemrtbd9h6iqnbdf56mq39cdj4lonbdum6gqr0t1kmsprbohkmuot7ch5u)

[**If you are committed to keeping the House from the radical Democrats who are self-serving and want to turn America into a socialist country, then I need your support today.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbt8cfdgi97hr08731khilgt3bcula6f00ojjfdo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrqbd5mmkpbfc5jmprr7dt26irrb83k6mh7fpjm6nh60oj6chg64or7qm99f44jipbp75ul2kbt0l0nq8a9f5uiak9lfl4m2jap94p5e5qrfkbm6ni9c56liiaq4o32cpi60oj3ccin2tdnqprrasjm6kqu4t9jecin2tdnqmqj2d5lemquaddk6ior69bhemrtcd1lm1q39dpjmnh39dthqep238h1e8he4933cjgecob6c9h68oh5u)

[** CHIP IN > **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbfvnko5spa39b06r90bb3r582qfd7s6hvr02oh8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrqbd5mmkpbfc5jmprr7dt26irrb83k6mh7fpjm6nh60oj6chg64or7qm99f44jipbp75ul2kbt0l0nq8a9f5uiak9lfl4m2jap94p5e5qrfkbm6ni9c56liiaq4o32cpi60oj3ccin2tdnqprrasjm6kqu4t9jecin2tdnqmqj2d5lemquaddk6ior69bhemrtcd1lm1q39dpjmnh39dthqep238h1e8he4933cjgecob6c9h68oh5u)

The path we’re on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around-- IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW.

We MUST act, and we must do so today.

[**Can you pitch in right now to help save our country, Fellow American?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1p235cs6elr06ak47d229l1u0a682vocbdgp6ig_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrqbd5mmkpbfc5jmprr7dt26irrb83k6mh7fpjm6nh60oj6chg64or7qm99f44jipbp75ul2kbt0l0nq8a9f5uiak9lfl4m2jap94p5e5qrfkbm6ni9c56liiaq4o32cpi60oj3ccin2tdnqprrasjm6kqu4t9jecin2tdnqmqj2d5lemquaddk6ior69bhemrtcd1lm1q39dpjmnh39dthqep238h1e8he4933cjgecob6c9h68oh5u)

Thank you for all you do, and God bless.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv0d76csmnoiu20b157tq51qt77ov37gaoi3krlg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrqbd5mmkpbfc5jmprr7dt26irrb83k6mh7fpjm6nh60oj6chg64or7qm99f44jipbp75ul2kbt0l0nq8a9f5uiak9lfl4m2jap94p5e5qrfkbm6ni9c56liiaq4o32cpi60oj3ccin2tdnqprrasjm6kqu4t9jecin2tdnqmqj2d5lemquaddk6ior69bhemrtcd1lm1q39dpjmnh39dthqep238h1e8he4933cjgecob6c9h68oh5u)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| **_MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH MIKE?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkn1agk2av486pn9uo3b1h1e5vqbc7jah9meh6og_)

# Resume Speaks for Itself
There is not a single candidate in this Republican Primary for Maryland’s 6th Congressional District that is more qualified to be your next Congresswoman.
Not a single candidate. There is only one candidate that understands the Federal Government like I do. See for yourself.
[**Once you’ve finished reading my qualifications, please consider making a contribution to help boost my campaign’s momentum and WIN BACK Maryland’s 6th Congressional District!**](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=c99541629e&e=0a12281e0e)
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=9b01638187&e=0a12281e0e)
I served my country and left for the United States Air Force in 2005 and served as a Medical Logistics professional. During my time in the Air Force, I deployed overseas during the Global War on Terror campaign, serving within the [**Task Force Medical**](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=6882ff61b5&e=0a12281e0e) and the [**Bagram Theater Internment Facility (BTIF)**](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=0cb3c09065&e=0a12281e0e)**(yes, the BTIF was the primary detention facility for terrorists in Afghanistan)** in Bagram, Afghanistan, during the Operation Enduring Freedom campaign in 2007. After my tour of duty, I was honorably discharged in 2010, having earned numerous accolades for her service, including the National Defense Service Medal, Afghanistan Campaign Medal with 1 Service Star, Global War on Terrorism Expeditionary Medal, Global War on Terrorism Service Medal, Air Force Expeditionary Service Ribbon with Gold Border and 1 Oak Leaf Cluster, and NATO Medal.
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=dcb52afed1&e=0a12281e0e)
Following my military service in 2010 I transitioned here the the 6th District to the Frederick area, where I continued my career in Medical Logistics as a Federal Employee. While I am no longer a current Federal Employee (I resigned in 2021 before my first campaign for Congress in 2022), I held various federal positions working for the United States Army at Fort Detrick, supporting the Department of Defense’s Medical Supply Chain Process.
I mainly served as a Program Manager tasked with managing the Army’s Medical Logistics Program in the wholesale procurement, production, introduction, sustainment and recovery of Medical Sets, Kits and Outfits (SKOs) and individual medical equipment requirements for the entire Army’s deploying medical force. I rose to the federal position of GS-14 **(equivalent to a Major or Lieutenant Colonel in the military)** before I decided to resign my Federal Position and embark on my next journey to serve my country in the United States House of Representatives.

[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=b24ab2a8eb&e=0a12281e0e)
Today I work in the private sector **(yes, I still have a full-time job to provide for my family)** for a government contracting company that specializes in Health Science, Health IT, Health Service Support, Supply Chain Modernization, and Facilities Management, as well as automation best practices and governance within the Veteran’s Administration and Defense Health Agency. My company’s broader experience extends to supporting the Department of Defense as well as providing IT services to enable our customers’ IT missions. My main focus within my current position is to work on Business Development and Proposal within the Supply Chain Modernization efforts throughout the Department of Defense, Department of Veterans Affairs, and various other Federal Agencies.
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=1a9154cc1f&e=0a12281e0e)
I don't say all of this to toot my own horn. I say this because we are at a crossroads in this country, and we need to pick up winnable seats for Republicans, like Maryland's 6th Congressional District.
The success of our party depends on our ability to identify and support individuals who can lead with wisdom, integrity, and dedication to always uphold our American values & traditions.
We need to elect Republican candidates that can actually win seats like Maryland’s 6th district.
**But, in order to do this, I need your support today so I can spread this message to everyone across our district and country.**
[**Will you chip in with a donation today to help me win this fight for our nation’s future?**](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=31d96a4a36&e=0a12281e0e) ⬇️
Together we WILL flip Maryland’s 6th Congressional District for Republicans and make America strong again.
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=eb89141580&e=0a12281e0e)
|

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_“Food shortages are coming.”_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671210%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4OPRQE8LlcAe138CtO6v3g&sysid=1). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671211%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YBv5tPG0Kb85i95q2YhUwQ&sysid=1) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671212%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Dks6CzRNQVHhzCWIkUwmmg&sysid=1) on these survival food kits while you can.
---

American Update

* **Capping insulin at $35 per month for seniors**
* **Creating 1.5 million jobs**
* Making the wealthy big corporations pay their fair share of taxes

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Woke professor ASSAULTS journalist
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
Fellow American, Here at Turning Point USA, we're **WINNING** the American culture war by helping our nation's kids love America again. So it should come as no surprise when left-wing radicals attack us, smear us, and even besmirch our grassroots partners like YOU. **But when they PHYSICALLY ASSAULT our campus reporters and then LIE to rationalize their violence, there's no denying that left-wing hostility has gotten out of control. ** **[Today, I'm asking for YOUR HELP to support and protect our campus activists in the face of smears, lies, and even physical violence by radical activists. Will you help TPUSA stand up against left-wing intimidation with a generous gift of $25, $35, $50, $100, or whatever you can afford right now? Your gift today will be MATCHED by a generous donor who cares deeply about fighting the woke madness on college campuses across America.](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)**
---
[](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._DNZFUmVw)
---
[ Stand with TPUSA >>](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-Pun1JQdetba-Q)
---
Here's what happened. ASU professor David Boyles, who includes "Gender Studies" among his focuses, recently PHYSICALLY ATTACKED a Turning Point USA cameraman during an interview... ... but ASU president Michael Crow now claims that the attacking professor is the victim! Professor Boyles is the Phoenix sponsor of controversial Drag Queen Story Hours. He has published books on inappropriate sexual relationships between minors and adults -- and marketed them in the "coming of age" section on Amazon. That's why our TPUSA reporter Kalen D'Almeida exercised his constitutionally-protected speech to ask Professor Boyles some straightforward questions: _Why is Professor Boyles the Phoenix sponsor of Drag Queen Story Hour?_ _ _ _Why is he exposing minor children to fetishists who dress up as women around little kids?_ _ _ _Why is he publishing books about minors having sex with adults?_ _ _ _Why does he market his books in the "coming of age" section of Amazon?_ _ _ _Why did he describe himself as "obsessed" with sex ed?_ Instead of responding, Professor Boyles VIOLENTLY ATTACKED the cameraman ... and that's when TPUSA reporter Kalen D'Almeida protected his colleague. _Above: Security footage shows Professor David Boyles (in white) PHYSICALLY ATTACKING TPUSA's cameraman (in black, on left) before our reporter stepped forward to protect his colleague._ This is just the latest in a string of attacks against our campus activists, and sadly, it certainly won't be the last. **But you can help us stand up for these courageous young patriots as they continue exposing the TRUTH about the radical Left and rallying students to love America. **** ****[Please partner with TPUSA today.](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)**
---
[](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-dvUqsHdKYQA)
---
[ Stand with TPUSA >>](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
_**This ENTIRE incident is on video ... and ASU is STILL lying about it! **_ Professor Boyles has even described our TPUSA reporters as "terrorists," writing: "Stop coddling these ... terrorists. Call them what they are. ... These people should be shunned from society." Meanwhile, the president of ASU is standing by this radical professor and claiming that HE was the victim here! Now media organizations across the country -- and the world -- are picking up this false story to SMEAR Turning Point USA, our TPUSA cameraman and reporter, and even grassroots supporters just like YOU. This is the kind of twisted narrative we're up against on campuses nationwide. But we won't back down, no matter how much their lies distort the truth. **With YOUR support, Turning Point USA will remain on the front lines of the American Culture War, fighting every day to DEFEAT the "Woke" ideologies infiltrating our education system. ** We've provided our video footage to local law enforcement, and we'll support our cameraman if he decides to press charges. **[Fellow American if you'd like to help STAND STRONG in support of our TPUSA team members against these latest lies from the radical Left, your gift today will be MATCHED by a generous donor.](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)**
---
[ Stand with TPUSA >>](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
Thank you for your continued support. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEOTurning Point USA
---
---
[Stand with TPUSA >>](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-4x78nHNEwO2rkc2fw)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044 [Unsubscribe](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjk5LTJmYThjOGNhYmZlNjQwY2I5ZDg1YWM2YzI1ZTE4MjZlIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/l9u6FNUxmmXekSk4XTZayA)

subject: This seat will determine control of the Virginia Senate. We can save it — together.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
Every donation on this email will be split between our campaign and EMILYs List >> | [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72219229/434646944/-1905489798?sourceid=1052183&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDYwNjA4ZC0wOTc0LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WuwTJrhCNQXKvNJo6bnJCxaY9sRamu_e4NjDyKeuzNs=&emci=6a86b186-e371-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=5460608d-0974-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)

| | Peter,

I wanted to personally introduce myself. I'm Russet Perry, running for state Senate in Virginia's 31st District. My family and I are longtime members of this community, and as a former Loudoun County prosecutor and a CIA officer, I've dedicated my life to public service and protecting our families.

**But here's the challenge:** This seat will determine which party controls the Senate. I'm a fierce advocate for our community and am ready to get to work on policies that serve you and our neighbors, improve our community, and protect our rights.

**But my self-funded opponent — backed by his billionaire father and Glenn Youngkin's allies — wants to further the extremist Republican agenda to ban abortion access, weaken gun laws, and siphon away funding from public schools.** **[This race is shaping up to be the most competitive and most expensive in the Commonwealth, but it is winnable for Democrats if we have the resources to compete. Woodland Fire Information

---
| |
---
| **ALERT- Residents of Madison County, VA** A woodland fire has been reported off of Quaker Run Road. Local fire departments are on the scene, as well as a crew from the Virginia Department of Forestry. As of early this morning, the fire has grown to 20 acres in size, and is not currently contained. A 20-man hand crew from the United States Forestry Service is expected to arrive on-scene this afternoon. The fire is reported to have been caused by a lightning strike. The Virginia Department of Forestry will brief the Virginia Department of Emergency Management at 11:30AM for further containment efforts. Our office will provide more updates as soon as further information becomes available.

name: =?utf-8?Q?JAMES=20JUDGE?=
subject: Why I am running for Congress against a fellow Republican
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Judge for Congress
body:
(NOTE: This email was written this morning personally by me, to you.) | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f4a2a7fcb6fe/running-for-congress-in-my-hometown-13693125?e=00028e5542)
---
Good morning fellow conservative,
First and foremost, the following was not written by someone on my team, **this was written by me.**
I wanted to make sure you heard directly from me on why I believe I need to run for the U.S. House of Representatives against a longtime establishment Republican, who has been known throughout our area as a nice guy.
[**If you don’t know me, my name is James Judge. I am a Christian, conservative, decorated military veteran, businessman, Tampa Bay area native and I’m running against Gus Bilirakis.**](https://judgeforcongress.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1f416ce0ac5ddfd320ec0ff6b&id=bbc7c36d4d&e=00028e5542)
And, before I get started, Gus has been a nice guy. But, being a nice guy isn’t what our country needs!
Deciding to run against him has been a tough, because, **as Gus put it, by doing this, I “have lost a friend.”**
But, at the end of the day, I had to ask myself if the United States was headed in the right direction under his watch, and we all know it is absolutely not.
[**I love this country**](https://judgeforcongress.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1f416ce0ac5ddfd320ec0ff6b&id=e85e480d57&e=00028e5542) and after looking at my former friend’s voting record, and who is funding him, I knew I had to run. Our country is way more important than being friends with career politicians.
By the end of this term, Gus will have been in Congress for 18 years. In that time frame our nation has become hardly recognizable. Under his watch, Congress has bankrupted America. He is quick do to a press conference on the money he has spent, but it’s not only our money he is spending, it is money he and the rest of Congress have borrowed from China, which our nation’s children and grandchildren will have to pay back.
We also need to talk about who funds Gus.
A quick search on the Federal Election Commission’s website will reveal that **Gus has had more than 3,600 special interest contributions from organizations like BlackRock, Facebook, Target, Pfizer, Disney and more.**
Do you really believe he is representing our interests?
The cost of living has skyrocketed. The average family is spending $8,500 more a year to live than just two years ago. Interest rates continue to climb and inflation is out of control.
Our debt is currently more than $33 trillion and we have more than $210 trillion in unfunded liabilities.
With that money, and under his watch, Congress has funded pro-Marxist, anti-American curriculums for our public schools and training for our military service members that promotes socialist, anti-family, diversity, equity and inclusion training, as well as LGBTQ propaganda.
This is unacceptable!
You may remember that I ran for Congress last cycle against Democrat Kathy Castor, and I won the primary in a landslide, becoming the Republican nominee for Florida’s 14th Congressional District, despite being heavily outspent.
I only had one contribution from an organization, that was from the Tampa Police Benevolent Association, which I was honored to receive their support. The rest of my campaign’s donations were all from individuals.
I have been studying our Constitution, the Declaration and our Bill of Rights, and Washington is far from what our founders envisioned.
We need leaders in Washington who will fight to balance the budget, require the executive branch to enforce the law and we must secure our borders. We need legislators who love the Lord and will steer America back to her foundational Christian values.
I believe I’m the right man for the job.
**Here are a few of things I believe:**
* Our liberties and rights come from God and are non-negotiable
* Government should be there to ensure those rights are protected and not infringed
* To solve our problems, Washington must return to America’s Christian values
* The Bible should be in every public school
* **Our government must stop spending money it doesn’t have**
* Our borders should be closed immediately

**Most importantly, I believe that America’s best days are ahead of us, not behind us.** [**As I launch my campaign to help restore America’s faith and our God-given liberty, I’m asking for your financial support.**](https://judgeforcongress.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1f416ce0ac5ddfd320ec0ff6b&id=a7a1c84583&e=00028e5542)
It’s easy to lose faith in these troubling times, and I understand if you’re struggling. But I believe in a big God who works miracles, and I wouldn’t be running this campaign unless I truly believed that America’s problems can be solved.
[**In that spirit of hope for the future, I’m asking you to join me today with your generous support.**](https://judgeforcongress.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1f416ce0ac5ddfd320ec0ff6b&id=b28305ecd8&e=00028e5542)
Even the smallest contribution goes a long way in helping me defeat a career politician who is part of the problem.
Thank you in advance for your help.
For God and Country,
James P. Judge
| [DONATE NOW](https://judgeforcongress.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1f416ce0ac5ddfd320ec0ff6b&id=bb2a8808b1&e=00028e5542)

I wanted to make sure you heard directly from me on why I believe I need to run for the U.S. House of Representatives against a longtime establishment Republican, who has been known throughout our area as a nice guy. And, before I get started, Gus has been a nice guy. But, being a nice guy isn’t what our country needs! Deciding to run against him has been a tough, because, as Gus put it, by doing this, I “have lost a friend.” But, at the end of the day, I had to ask myself if the United States was headed in the right direction under his watch, and we all know it is absolutely not. and after looking at my former friend’s voting record, and who is funding him, I knew I had to run. Our country is way more important than being friends with career politicians. By the end of this term, Gus will have been in Congress for 18 years. In that time frame our nation has become hardly recognizable. Under his watch, Congress has bankrupted America. He is quick do to a press conference on the money he has spent, but it’s not only our money he is spending, it is money he and the rest of Congress have borrowed from China, which our nation’s children and grandchildren will have to pay back. We also need to talk about who funds Gus. A quick search on the Federal Election Commission’s website will reveal that Gus has had more than 3,600 special interest contributions from organizations like BlackRock, Facebook, Target, Pfizer, Disney and more. Do you really believe he is representing our interests? The cost of living has skyrocketed. The average family is spending $8,500 more a year to live than just two years ago. Interest rates continue to climb and inflation is out of control. Our debt is currently more than $33 trillion and we have more than $210 trillion in unfunded liabilities. With that money, and under his watch, Congress has funded pro-Marxist, anti-American curriculums for our public schools and training for our military service members that promotes socialist, anti-family, diversity, equity and inclusion training, as well as LGBTQ propaganda. This is unacceptable! You may remember that I ran for Congress last cycle against Democrat Kathy Castor, and I won the primary in a landslide, becoming the Republican nominee for Florida’s 14th Congressional District, despite being heavily outspent. I only had one contribution from an organization, that was from the Tampa Police Benevolent Association, which I was honored to receive their support. The rest of my campaign’s donations were all from individuals. I have been studying our Constitution, the Declaration and our Bill of Rights, and Washington is far from what our founders envisioned. We need leaders in Washington who will fight to balance the budget, require the executive branch to enforce the law and we must secure our borders. We need legislators who love the Lord and will steer America back to her foundational Christian values. I believe I’m the right man for the job. Here are a few of things I believe: Our liberties and rights come from God and are non-negotiable Government should be there to ensure those rights are protected and not infringed To solve our problems, Washington must return to America’s Christian values The Bible should be in every public school Our government must stop spending money it doesn’t have Our borders should be closed immediately Most importantly, I believe that America’s best days are ahead of us, not behind us. It’s easy to lose faith in these troubling times, and I understand if you’re struggling. But I believe in a big God who works miracles, and I wouldn’t be running this campaign unless I truly believed that America’s problems can be solved. Even the smallest contribution goes a long way in helping me defeat a career politician who is part of the problem. Thank you in advance for your help. For God and Country, James P. Judge | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | Copyright (C) 2023 Paid for by Judge for Congress. All rights reserved.

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Never More Important….
body:
Who can you trust in Washington?

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

**I simply cannot overstate this ...**
The support we receive from committed conservatives and other concerned Americans has _never been more important than it is today!_
**Because right now we are carrying the largest and most important caseload in our 29-year history ...and making a major impact for the rule of law!**
**[And that's why I ask you to give us your active support today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65553&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)**
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65553&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

Here's why we need your help now.

**_We are suing the Biden administration over its efforts to censor free speech and suppress opposition to its unconstitutional actions_ ... **<

Last week, we sued the U.S. Office of the Director of National Intelligence (ODNI) for records concerning censorship of social media.

We have been in the forefront of uncovering the Biden administration's corrupt and power-hungry drive to "**_moderate content_** " on social media...that's liberal doublespeak for _censoring_ _and suppressing_ the free speech rights of American citizens who oppose their radical agenda.

[And we need your help now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65553&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580) to keep fighting in the courts to force the release of documents we can share with the American people to educate them about this fundamental threat to our First Amendment rights!

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65553&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

**_We are fighting to keep our elections honest ..._**

Just this year, we have settled our clean voter roll lawsuits against **Colorado** and **Pennsylvania** , after they began cleaning their voter rolls and agreed to provide us with voter roll data for the next six years (**Colorado**) and annual reports on their voter roll cleaning efforts for the next five years (**Pennsylvania**)!

We are also challenging a state law in **Illinois** that permits mail-in ballots to be counted up to two weeks after Election Day...which opens wide the door to voter fraud.

The challenges to honest elections are enormous... _and ongoing,_ [which is why your decision to join with Judicial Watch today is so critically needed!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65553&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65553&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

**_We are investigating and prosecuting serious allegations and evidence of
_ _Biden family corruption_.**

We have sued the National Archives for **_thousands of documents_** that could shed further light on massive Biden family corruption, _including criminal connections with businesses controlled by the Chinese Communist Party_. The Dominant Media tries to bury this story... _but Judicial Watch is using the legal system and the courts to make sure they don 't succeed_.

And you can count on Judicial Watch to keep fighting to get to all the facts...and to accountability... _whatever happens in Congress_!

** _We keep fighting to expose all the facts about Covid and our government 's response to the pandemic_**.

_We will not let the Washington Establishment escape accountability for its actions_ ...that's why we filed multiple lawsuits against federal agencies for public records to shed light on the China origins of the pandemic, and on U.S. Government funding (by Anthony Fauci's agency) of "gain of function" research at China's controversial Wuhan Institute of Virology, which may have led directly to the spread of Covid.

Covid killed over 1 million Americans and cost us billions...and "we the people" deserve to know the facts about how and where the Covid-19 pandemic arose, and how much U.S. funding went to the pandemic's source.

[Your contribution today will help us keep fighting for our "right to know" on all these critically important fronts.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65553&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65553&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

_Thanks to contributions from our supporters_ , Judicial Watch does the work that the Dominant Media, Congress and the Department of Justice should be doing... _but won 't_!

**And as I said before, we are carrying** the largest and most important caseload in our history... _and your decision to give us your support is vital to our continued success_.

I hope I can count on you for a contribution today...and thank you in advance for your help!

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65553&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

name: Mike Johnson
subject: Let me introduce myself
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life.

| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
|

|
[](http://trk.secureandprosper._fPsV3UWQ)
---
Fellow American,

The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them.

**Faith.** Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

**Family.** Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way.

**Freedom.** It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I've devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress.

[**This is a simple truth:**](http://trk.secureandprosper.) America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world – but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are!

[** SUPPORT MIKE JOHNSON > **](http://trk.secureandprosper._H6pTQnqgcqN9nQ)

Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness.**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It's the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support - to restore our country and defend our values. Can you make a donation immediately?**](http://trk.secureandprosper.)

[** DONATE TO SAVE AMERICA > **](http://trk.secureandprosper.)

Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we're running out of time. I'm not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must make a change before it's too late.**](http://trk.secureandprosper.)

I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It's why I have been a trusted ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It's also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference - one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House - and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee.

We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, [**but we cannot do it alone.**](http://trk.secureandprosper.)

[**If you are committed to keeping the House from the radical Democrats who are self-serving and want to turn America into a socialist country, then I need your support today.**](http://trk.secureandprosper.)

[** CHIP IN > **](http://trk.secureandprosper.)

The path we're on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around-- IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW.

We MUST act, and we must do so today.

[**Can you pitch in right now to help save our country, Fellow American?**](http://trk.secureandprosper.)

Thank you for all you do, and God bless.

[](http://trk.secureandprosper.)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| ** _MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH MIKE?**](http://trk.secureandprosper.)

---

| PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
---

Secure & Prosper PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjk5LTA5OGYzOWJiZjFmNzQ0Y2I4Zjg2NWQwZjM1NmMzOGU3IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/2tsd9nyRwIvAhIe-l0gYyA) to unsubscribe.
---

subject: NEW RACE RANKING 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
Huge update from CNN
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72221527/434655290/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk242-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2Y0NzNkOGItMGQ3NC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4hLgGVbtpFNPw6C6q_7FyRAKYoDPozUH1SKiotuBQW0=)

name: Team Hill Harper
subject: First, Then, Now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/130?refcode=em20231026&t=1&akid=490%2E62735%2EgFyKcS)
We'll keep this short, Peter.
Let’s do a quick recap of where we’ve been, and where we’re going. So:
**FIRST:** We launched our people-powered, grassroots movement for Hill Harper for Senate and declared our intention to bring transformative change to Michigan.
**THEN:** The establishment sought to count us out. Since our launch we’ve been told time and time again that we’re fighting an uphill battle that we can’t win. They’re trying everything they can to discredit us because they see the potential our movement has.
**NOW:****We have a real opportunity to prove them wrong.** As unfortunate as it is, money and politics go hand in hand, and we’re only going to make a strong impression on undecided voters and even those who’ve already counted us out if we show some real strength in our fundraising numbers.
[**Let’s do this together****, Peter. We’re counting on you to help us reach our $11,000 fundraising goal by October 31 at midnight. Can we count on your donation right now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231026?amount=5&refcode=em20231026-490&refcode2=490_62735_gFyKcS&akid=490%2E62735%2EgFyKcS)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231026?amount=5&refcode=em20231026-490&refcode2=490_62735_gFyKcS&akid=490%2E62735%2EgFyKcS)**
Together,
Team Hill Harper
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-footer?refcode=em20231026&t=2&refcode2=490_62735_gFyKcS&akid=490%2E62735%2EgFyKcS)**

In Freedom,
Team DeSantis

_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7d8e8e0f8e5241fc9fd73187fda37c8e&_e=Kp1HnTD9mAvT3mOd6rXCoMjtZZmHc322I1Nbbnipooe3f6R3B7SMcyolWTZmzDbDU5HHkuETD7D2lnos2wsND0cMVCk0MJCrWbWcHmnmLCPA3P8n3qEd4qM_ZH4I80SsHsoMuD4ef-bYTTXHuWJhQxAViK91DHuNZgMcelcAxg5oVos-eoKAKqrxMPExX6GJ4aOIShlql7gYuTNquk_BWnozNllZ2hzMjiw35rdlSLO9NZLIkQdBPOmx4TUP4cxRkKwyD_rRy49Xq6LF-fhrwqYA_vfGCtjud2Yz9H7BnnPk253yZp3f-WnQeB2eDxrV_1eWiC2ynjiA9aVrXfWsl9ZX00h3pI8P0Yb5UtPYQ1HSCwMPc-3z2nS3vQFW9ug-tonzbBgeTEMcHTnhQxfLCof6ncugEcytZjTuTq3VBHs%3D)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7d8e8e0f8e5241fc9fd73187fda37c8e&_e=Kp1HnTD9mAvT3mOd6rXCoMjtZZmHc322I1Nbbnipooe3f6R3B7SMcyolWTZmzDbDU5HHkuETD7D2lnos2wsND0cMVCk0MJCrWbWcHmnmLCPA3P8n3qEd4qM_ZH4I80SsHsoMuD4ef-bYTTXHuWJhQxAViK91DHuNZgMcelcAxg5oVos-eoKAKqrxMPExX6GJ4aOIShlql7gYuTNquk_BWnozNllZ2hzMjiw35rdlSLO9NZLIkQdBPOmx4TUP4cxRMUUhY0lB8paTbwz6LWwfW0jpvoXwJU6Lp99BjHubESjuTg0bF6NVvngip3XnjeVes9hNtIfIlAL1rRXl7yrMTc3H5IbD_Szln_rEayz-xY5igcXA_TuAIZH9YAHkU3S1xqpAjgJlWsngAs1acbIYITofn5E4zJc47UUE0D6w6FI%3D)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|

body:
It’s nice to meet you! | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72222627/434659141/-1047396217?amounts=10,24,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=24&refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20231026_fr_newmanager_cm_nc_act_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzZmMzljYi0wZTc0LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N7wP4dIVH8NLW1Go0SEBWdYxGeJbNyhibl2mMT3k7GM=)

**I was so honored and humbled to join Sarah’s historic campaign for Congress earlier this week.** Four months ago today, Sarah and some very dedicated volunteers, friends, and family launched her campaign. And what they’ve done since then is beyond impressive. ✅ They’ve organized volunteer events across the state and more than 350 volunteers have already signed up to join Sarah’s campaign. ✅ More than 30 Delaware elected officials, UFCW 27 the largest public sector union in the state, and major national organizations like EMILYs List and Human Rights Campaign all endorsed Sarah early. ✅ Sarah’s end-of-quarter fundraising total on September 30th was the 2nd highest fundraising quarter for any non-incumbent Congressional candidate in Delaware’s history (only bested by her fundraising haul on June 30th). **A campaign manager often wears many hats. I’m no stranger to that. But in the first few weeks, my job is to focus on a few key things to strengthen the great work Sarah and her team have already done:** 🔊 Build out our organizing plan. We need to make sure that we’re talking to neighbors, having important conversations about our future, and getting everyone out to vote on Election Day. 🗞️ Lay out a plan to reach local media outlets and newspapers across the state, so we can share Sarah’s story — and her commitment to the First State — far and wide. 📈 And, last but not least, ensure we have the resources to run a strong campaign. Organizers. Advertising to voters. Setting up campaign offices in all three counties. clean_body: It’s nice to meet you! | = I was so honored and humbled to join Sarah’s historic campaign for Congress earlier this week. Four months ago today, Sarah and some very dedicated volunteers, friends, and family launched her campaign. And what they’ve done since then is beyond impressive. ✅ They’ve organized volunteer events across the state and more than 350 volunteers have already signed up to join Sarah’s campaign. ✅ More than 30 Delaware elected officials, UFCW 27 the largest public sector union in the state, and major national organizations like EMILYs List and Human Rights Campaign all endorsed Sarah early. ✅ Sarah’s end-of-quarter fundraising total on September 30th was the 2nd highest fundraising quarter for any non-incumbent Congressional candidate in Delaware’s history (only bested by her fundraising haul on June 30th). A campaign manager often wears many hats. I’m no stranger to that. But in the first few weeks, my job is to focus on a few key things to strengthen the great work Sarah and her team have already done: 🔊 Build out our organizing plan. We need to make sure that we’re talking to neighbors, having important conversations about our future, and getting everyone out to vote on Election Day. 🗞️ Lay out a plan to reach local media outlets and newspapers across the state, so we can share Sarah’s story — and her commitment to the First State — far and wide. 📈 And, last but not least, ensure we have the resources to run a strong campaign. Organizers. Advertising to voters. Setting up campaign offices in all three counties. Each and every thing a campaign does adds up. That last part is where I have to ask you a question:= ** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = This is the first (though it won’t be the last) time I’m going to ask you to help fuel Sarah’s grassroots campaign over the next 320 days (yes, we’re already counting down). So, if you’re not able to chip in today, I understand and hope you stick with us! Nice to meet you, Michaela Kurinsky-Malos Campaign Manager Sarah McBride for Congress | Sarah McBride serves her home state in the Delaware State Senate, where she has passed historic paid leave, gun safety, and nondiscrimination laws. If elected, Sarah will be the first openly trans member of Congress, which means extremists are lining up to attack her. She needs our help to stand up to their hatred. = | = = = = | Paid for by McBride for Delaware P.O. clean_body: Due on the last day of the month at 11:59 PM Patriot, This is your courtesy reminder to before the upcoming fundraising deadline. | This reminder is a part of our campaign to support American veteran and Congressman Brian Mast. Brian Mast has dedicated his life to serving America. He first served for over a decade in the Army, then after he lost his legs in a Taliban explosion, he rededicated himself to serving his country in Congress. Please help Brian gear up for a BIG Republican win in the 2024 election. It all begins today, so please rush in your support before the deadline! This is time-sensitive, so we appreciate you taking action on this today. Thank you, Team Mast Paid for by Mast for Congress Mast for Congress P.O. Box 3016 Stuart, FL 34995 USA Hon. name: Mike Johnson
subject: The cornerstone of leadership
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life.

|
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z414v9isdo3fht6pc31mvrigdc6kg7h6cr2pl378_rp22sh2s8i66p70spgm6o71clh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnqga174p5e5qrfkbm6ni184slk9g64pj4c1h66op5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls9qj6sp5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr8d5hmcin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df26irr3kthqeot7ch5u)
---
Fellow American,

The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them.

**Faith.** Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

**Family.** Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way.

**Freedom.** It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I’ve devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress.

[**This is a simple truth:**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmo0kd8h29kn6b76pt1c4k06mja1k60hpin64068_rp22sh2s8i66p70spgm6o71clh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnqga174p5e5qrfkbm6ni184slk9g64pj4c1h66op5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls9qj6sp5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr8d5hmcin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df26irr3kti4no) America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are!

[** SUPPORT MIKE JOHNSON > **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5h2h48tjrdd6d71gtri3v7lv30gv5ms3rnc8kng_rp22sh2s8i66p70spgm6o71clh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnqga174p5e5qrfkbm6ni184slk9g64pj4c1h66op5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls9qj6sp5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr8d5hmcin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df26irr3kti4no)

Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness.**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It’s the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support – to restore our country and defend our values. Can you make a donation immediately?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbd68m8s22ce77trakh8t4dcps066nk4o21f69i8_rp22sh2s8i66p70spgm6o71clh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnqga174p5e5qrfkbm6ni184slk9g64pj4c1h66op5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls9qj6sp5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr8d5hmcin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df26irr3kti4no)

[** DONATE TO SAVE AMERICA > **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za35ldq2dpndf55b8dnhqam2hqua4tgdeot796m8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrqbd5mmkpbfc5jmprr7dt26irrb83k6mh7fpjm6nh60oj6chg64or7qm99f44jipbp75ul2kbt0l0nq8a9f5uiak9lfl0k2e9iasblmv8ncdf42g9pb8j0c9j68o32cdhiasblmvb7fdbieoqjbojl6dpiasblmvarac9kmlqrbp9lmgqb3cp5e5qrflhk6mo78d5n6equ4d5nm79r48d245p25oh4cdie1pj1cdge2pb24no)

Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must make a change before it’s too late.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0sd7cu8mc4u7418qqh0doq7vas26jld7mh54eig_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrqbd5mmkpbfc5jmprr7dt26irrb83k6mh7fpjm6nh60oj6chg64or7qm99f44jipbp75ul2kbt0l0nq8a9f5uiak9lfl0k2e9iasblmv8ncdf42g9pb8j0c9j68o32cdhiasblmvb7fdbieoqjbojl6dpiasblmvarac9kmlqrbp9lmgqb3cp5e5qrflhk6mo78d5n6equ4d5nm79r48d245p25oh4cdie1pj1cdge2pb24no)

I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It’s why I have been a trusted ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It’s also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference – one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House – and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee.

We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, [**but we cannot do it alone.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdlbrllegnnm8d16acafrq20v9pudk4nb0ibkk3o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrqbd5mmkpbfc5jmprr7dt26irrb83k6mh7fpjm6nh60oj6chg64or7qm99f44jipbp75ul2kbt0l0nq8a9f5uiak9lfl0k2e9iasblmv8ncdf42g9pb8j0c9j68o32cdhiasblmvb7fdbieoqjbojl6dpiasblmvarac9kmlqrbp9lmgqb3cp5e5qrflhk6mo78d5n6equ4d5nm79r48d245p25oh4cdie1pj1cdge2pb24no)

[**If you are committed to keeping the House from the radical Democrats who are self-serving and want to turn America into a socialist country, then I need your support today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7juo0nhaun31c271l58j6qrorrgp3tre8bu3hkg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrqbd5mmkpbfc5jmprr7dt26irrb83k6mh7fpjm6nh60oj6chg64or7qm99f44jipbp75ul2kbt0l0nq8a9f5uiak9lfl0k2e9iasblmv8ncdf42g9pb8j0c9j68o32cdhiasblmvb7fdbieoqjbojl6dpiasblmvarac9kmlqrbp9lmgqb3cp5e5qrflhk6mo78d5n6equ4d5nm79r48d245p25oh4cdie1pj1cdge2pb24no)

[** CHIP IN > **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqmg6eutgqqj2cm36nmfatpe0jsmbrajgrvrno30_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrqbd5mmkpbfc5jmprr7dt26irrb83k6mh7fpjm6nh60oj6chg64or7qm99f44jipbp75ul2kbt0l0nq8a9f5uiak9lfl0k2e9iasblmv8ncdf42g9pb8j0c9j68o32cdhiasblmvb7fdbieoqjbojl6dpiasblmvarac9kmlqrbp9lmgqb3cp5e5qrflhk6mo78d5n6equ4d5nm79r48d245p25oh4cdie1pj1cdge2pb24no)

The path we’re on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around-- IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW.

We MUST act, and we must do so today.

[**Can you pitch in right now to help save our country, Fellow American?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zanbc2vu5ripkiflk4cp2grk580jq88frskthp38_rp22sh2s8i66p70spgm6o71clh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnqga174p5e5qrfkbm6ni184slk9g64pj4c1h66op5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls9qj6sp5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr8d5hmcin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df26irr3kti4no)

Thank you for all you do, and God bless.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6oc575fm2u7srfmhn7sgtq24mki574g2eec9uog_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrqbd5mmkpbfc5jmprr7dt26irrb83k6mh7fpjm6nh60oj6chg64or7qm99f44jipbp75ul2kbt0l0nq8a9f5uiak9lfl0k2e9iasblmv8ncdf42g9pb8j0c9j68o32cdhiasblmvb7fdbieoqjbojl6dpiasblmvarac9kmlqrbp9lmgqb3cp5e5qrflhk6mo78d5n6equ4d5nm79r48d245p25oh4cdie1pj1cdge2pb24no)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| **_MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH MIKE?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zblkhup647bvf68brim2l74b9iosj8jabd6nb8rg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrqbd5mmkpbfc5jmprr7dt26irrb83k6mh7fpjm6nh60oj6chg64or7qm99f44jipbp75ul2kbt0l0nq8a9f5uiak9lfl0k2e9iasblmv8ncdf42g9pb8j0c9j68o32cdhiasblmvb7fdbieoqjbojl6dpiasblmvarac9kmlqrbp9lmgqb3cp5e5qrflhk6mo78d5n6equ4d5nm79r3kthqep238h1e8he4933cjgecob3c3gmaoh5u)

---

| PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
---

American Action News

---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=77117d6fa7&e=567664f14c)

We're excited to share the latest episode of the [No Doubt About It Podcast](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=3f948ba514&e=567664f14c) with Mark and Krysty Ronchetti, and we invite you to tune in for an entertaining and fiery discussion.

In this episode, we kick things off with a hilarious tale from Mark's childhood. **Ever wondered what happens when parents decide to skip preschool and kindergarten, throwing their child directly into the first grade?** The results are comical, to say the least!

➡ [**STREAM EPISODE NOW**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=f7528d9e80&e=567664f14c)
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=b2cbfeb9d2&e=567664f14c)

We also explore the pressing issue of government-mandated electric vehicles in New Mexico, as Toyota weighs in on why this is a terrible idea. Our candid discussion delves into the potential implications of this misguided policy.

Antisemitism is an alarming concern and what was once hidden is now out in the open and the results are terrifying. We tackle the topic head-on. We discuss the disturbing trend of its open acceptance and support in the United States, highlighting the importance of countering this dangerous sentiment.
| [STREAM EPISODE 47 NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=60bc05fb14&e=567664f14c)
---
Lastly, we delve into the impact of excessive social media use on our children's mental health. It's a timely and critical conversation, and we invite you to be part of it.
Please take a moment to listen, enjoy, and share your thoughts on our podcast. Don't forget to like and subscribe to stay updated with our content. For even more No Doubt About It Podcast, subscribe to our YouTube channel, and explore exclusive merchandise on our website at [nodoubtaboutitpodcast.com](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=124cf6afa8&e=567664f14c).
| [STREAM EPISODE 47 NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=6b73664554&e=567664f14c)
---
|
---
* [Listen, Like, and Subscribe](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=d6e75aa66a&e=567664f14c) on your favorite podcast app.

* [Subscribe to our YouTube channel](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=c6ec252bd9&e=567664f14c) so you don’t miss an episode.

* [Get Merchandise](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=b630817cf6&e=567664f14c) and rep the podcast!

Your support and engagement mean the world to us. Thank you for being a part of the No Doubt About It Podcast community.

Warm regards,Mark and Krysty Ronchetti

Listen, here are three quick things you need to know about Rep. Raskin:

**ONE:** Served as an impeachment manager for BOTH of Trump’s impeachments.

**TWO:** Served as a member of the January 6th Committee._

**THREE:** **_Introduced a constitutional amendment to reverse the_ Citizens United _campaign finance ruling!_**

But with Republicans fighting tooth and nail to save Trump, and destroy so much of Raskin’s record, we need to know how local Democrats feel about him.

**Please, click[ _HERE_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/raskin-record/?source=FFR_20231026_EMSURV_E1_T0_AC&t=10&akid=20335%2E4449941%2E8dxQSg) or use the button below to complete your survey now »**
