name: Commissioner John King
subject: Two-thirds of the way there
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GEORGIANS FOR JOHN KING
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/51a797e4f41bbbc57c94c760ea83e7c0/41703/d97528232d1344c33947229f28c3afba/fcf912d5184b1f26c3d6b838967d376c/41703)
---
Friend, at the start of 2023, we set a fundraising goal for the year. Thanks to the support of many of you, we’re a little more than two thirds of the way to this goal. But 2023 is far beyond two thirds of the way over. So **we need to pick up our fundraising pace** in order to end the year where we need to be. While I’m not on the ballot next year, campaign season never ends. **And that’s especially true for downballot candidates, because during election years voters are more focused on races at the top of the ticket. ** So we have to raise as much as we can, as soon as we can. **We travel the state** constantly to share our message — here we are at the Ellijay Independence Day Parade.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/51a797e4f41bbbc57c94c760ea83e7c0/41703/d97528232d1344c33947229f28c3afba/92245ed9a02d8c84c3d6b838967d376c/41703)
---
**We run digital ads** on a shoestring budget compared to campaigns at the top of the ticket. (Here's one we ran earlier this year.)
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/51a797e4f41bbbc57c94c760ea83e7c0/41703/d97528232d1344c33947229f28c3afba/b40727c05799e05bc3d6b838967d376c/41703)
---
And on top of that, **we’re planning to do everything we can to support Georgia Republicans** up and down the ballot in 2024. This is hard work that’s worth doing, but all of it takes money. **I’m no politician with a national network.** I’m a lawman and soldier who was asked to serve. I’ve made it my new mission to put Georgia consumers and families first. **And I’m humbly asking you, if you’re able, to send reinforcements to this mission. ** **[If you haven’t donated this year, will you do so now? Every donation counts.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/51a797e4f41bbbc57c94c760ea83e7c0/41703/d97528232d1344c33947229f28c3afba/8dc8b93aabc36643c3d6b838967d376c/41703)**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/51a797e4f41bbbc57c94c760ea83e7c0/41703/d97528232d1344c33947229f28c3afba/f98101369affbcb2c3d6b838967d376c/41703)
---
John KingGeorgia Insurance Commissioner
---
[**DONATE NOW**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/51a797e4f41bbbc57c94c760ea83e7c0/41703/d97528232d1344c33947229f28c3afba/ccad212f5d1e34dbc3d6b838967d376c/41703)
---

---
| | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/51a797e4f41bbbc57c94c760ea83e7c0/41703/d97528232d1344c33947229f28c3afba/9feecb1db4d336cfc3d6b838967d376c/41703)
---
Commissioner John King got his start as a beat cop with the Atlanta Police Department. He worked various assignments, including Red Dog and Organized Crime, before joining the Doraville Police Department. Before becoming Chief of Police, he served as a Detective and Deputy Chief.

During his 17 years as Police Chief, Commissioner King tackled corruption, implemented community policing in at-risk neighborhoods, and cracked down on gang violence through early intervention programs at local schools.

In addition to his career in law enforcement, Commissioner King spent four decades serving in the U.S. Army National Guard — enlisting as a private and retiring as a major general.

He deployed to Bosnia, Iraq, and Afghanistan — earning the Bronze Star Medal, Combat Infantry Badge, El Salvador gold medal for achievement, meritorious service medals, and a NATO award along the way. Commissioner King retired from active duty in 2023.

As Georgia’s Insurance and Safety Fire Commissioner, Commissioner King has disrupted the status quo, put Georgia families first, and held the powerful accountable. He was appointed by Governor Brian Kemp in 2019 and elected to a full term in 2022, making him Georgia’s first Hispanic statewide elected official.
---

clean_body: | | | Friend, at the start of 2023, we set a fundraising goal for the year. Thanks to the support of many of you, we’re a little more than two thirds of the way to this goal. But 2023 is far beyond two thirds of the way over. So we need to pick up our fundraising pace in order to end the year where we need to be. While I’m not on the ballot next year, campaign season never ends. And that’s especially true for downballot candidates, because during election years voters are more focused on races at the top of the ticket. So we have to raise as much as we can, as soon as we can. We travel the state constantly to share our message — here we are at the Ellijay Independence Day Parade. We run digital ads on a shoestring budget compared to campaigns at the top of the ticket. (Here's one we ran earlier this year.) And on top of that, we’re planning to do everything we can to support Georgia Republicans up and down the ballot in 2024. This is hard work that’s worth doing, but all of it takes money. I’m no politician with a national network. I’m a lawman and soldier who was asked to serve. I’ve made it my new mission to put Georgia consumers and families first. And I’m humbly asking you, if you’re able, to send reinforcements to this mission. John KingGeorgia Insurance Commissioner | | Commissioner John King got his start as a beat cop with the Atlanta Police Department. He worked various assignments, including Red Dog and Organized Crime, before joining the Doraville Police Department. Before becoming Chief of Police, he served as a Detective and Deputy Chief. During his 17 years as Police Chief, Commissioner King tackled corruption, implemented community policing in at-risk neighborhoods, and cracked down on gang violence through early intervention programs at local schools. In addition to his career in law enforcement, Commissioner King spent four decades serving in the U.S. Army National Guard — enlisting as a private and retiring as a major general. He deployed to Bosnia, Iraq, and Afghanistan — earning the Bronze Star Medal, Combat Infantry Badge, El Salvador gold medal for achievement, meritorious service medals, and a NATO award along the way. Commissioner King retired from active duty in 2023. As Georgia’s Insurance and Safety Fire Commissioner, Commissioner King has disrupted the status quo, put Georgia families first, and held the powerful accountable. He was appointed by Governor Brian Kemp in 2019 and elected to a full term in 2022, making him Georgia’s first Hispanic statewide elected official. | | These emails are our most important way to keep supporters in the loop, but if you'd like to receive fewer updates or unsubscribe, . | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Oct. 26, 2023
---
| Press Contact: Debbie Gwynn, debbie@chaseforva.com
---
| Sen. Chase Awarded Defender of Limited Government by Institute for Legislative Analysis
Senator Chase is the only State Senator to Receive Award

CHESTERFIELD, VA- Today Senator Amanda Chase was awarded the Thomas Jefferson Defender of Limited Government Award from the Institute of Legislative Analysis (ILA) for her stellar legislative voting record.
"Unfortunately, the rhetoric of politicians at election time often doesn't match up with their real actions at voting time," said ILA CEO Ryan McGowan. "We are excited to provide this new resource to help voters - regardless of their political belief - cut through the rhetoric and make informed decisions at the ballot box." "As the only member of the Senate to earn ILA's Thomas Jefferson Award for defending the principles of Limited Government, Virginians lost a major voice fighting back against big government policies in the legislature," added McGowan. "We thank Senator Amanda Chase for her years of incredible service and look forward to watching her continue to lead the fight for freedom in the months and years to come."
"Keeping state government limited in scope has always been a top priority for me," said Sen. Chase. "My constituents always know where I stand. I appreciate organizations like the Institute for Legislative Analysis for helping increase transparency by releasing legislative voting scorecards and holding legislators accountable for their votes. I greatly appreciate their recognition of my conservative voting record."

clean_body: | | | | == | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Oct. 26, 2023 | Press Contact: Debbie Gwynn, debbie@chaseforva.com | Sen. Chase Awarded Defender of Limited Government by Institute for Legislative Analysis Senator Chase is the only State Senator to Receive Award CHESTERFIELD, VA- Today Senator Amanda Chase was awarded the Thomas Jefferson Defender of Limited Government Award from the Institute of Legislative Analysis (ILA) for her stellar legislative voting record. "Unfortunately, the rhetoric of politicians at election time often doesn't match up with their real actions at voting time," said ILA CEO Ryan McGowan. "We are excited to provide this new resource to help voters - regardless of their political belief - cut through the rhetoric and make informed decisions at the ballot box." "As the only member of the Senate to earn ILA's Thomas Jefferson Award for defending the principles of Limited Government, Virginians lost a major voice fighting back against big government policies in the legislature," added McGowan. "We thank Senator Amanda Chase for her years of incredible service and look forward to watching her continue to lead the fight for freedom in the months and years to come." "Keeping state government limited in scope has always been a top priority for me," said Sen. Chase. "My constituents always know where I stand. I appreciate organizations like the Institute for Legislative Analysis for helping increase transparency by releasing legislative voting scorecards and holding legislators accountable for their votes. I greatly appreciate their recognition of my conservative voting record." | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | | | | | == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | | | | Senator Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 5811, Midlothian, VA 23112 | | == Sent by mailto:amanda@chaseforva.com powered by == ==

name: Greater Georgia
subject: GREATER GEORGIA ISSUES STATEMENT ON REDISTRICTING RULING
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
| | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE THURSDAY, OCTOBER 26
GREATER GEORGIA ISSUES STATEMENT ON REDISTRICTING RULING
ATLANTA - Today, Greater Georgia Chairwoman and former U.S. Senator Kelly Loeffler issued the following statement after a U.S. District Court [rejected](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jY9w0psfFeymTQk077Pb0G5-ZDFZ2dZefVN4S1VBuvd3neXGeR2P5IBjrGWTxkNXs4ySvbb113RZl4GrWk4U91aig8bnagVmaeBNjvndDRei-pQOYJhggHyEybLR2-30XNeQXZ5Qbpi8-RBPliYV5ioUWwpyiI_eNm2H6-fDXoXWOQTdIB0D3yzEk3u5XWBiMerDbWPRuD9N2tlq168dkHsW30mng5Tnm6h9xErXjZVGOCLceMso7g==&c=lbMhFb4uaZQKju6hBHRVYcEuIHs43NcWZingTOA-oN93gSKw6fu1BA==&ch=x46upeiEYSWafyBzfVLuYpbFBfLJdTMpKf89j8UHgWbV2MQrHemUZQ==) Georgia's congressional and legislative maps and ordered them to be redrawn. The Obama-appointed judge sided with liberal operatives like [Marc Elias](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jY9w0psfFeymTQk077Pb0G5-ZDFZ2dZefVN4S1VBuvd3neXGeR2P5IBjrGWTxkNXGgXOK6C2u_QN6vOIqo-EJPsxsjSFmR9V1SiZF339qgH06KgnMLuRl1oIcrgNbTudCNheWdBbXAEDfFrs2RtJrAP-48zWM0ghgMhnrUI37tqsivcdkzapP5sF8UqxZy_6&c=lbMhFb4uaZQKju6hBHRVYcEuIHs43NcWZingTOA-oN93gSKw6fu1BA==&ch=x46upeiEYSWafyBzfVLuYpbFBfLJdTMpKf89j8UHgWbV2MQrHemUZQ==), who have launched a nationwide legal campaign to create more favorable electoral maps for Democrats ahead of 2024.
"Whether the Left's machine is working to put conservatives in jail or toss out legitimate electoral maps, lawfare is their new campaign strategy," said Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler. "Today's ruling by the Obama-appointed U.S. District Court judge is a disappointing but unsurprising victory for liberal activists attempting to interfere in next year's elections. Greater Georgia expects a successful appeal and that partisan efforts to undermine our state's legislative and congressional races ahead of 2024 will be dismissed."
---
| Greater Georgia, launched by former U.S. Senator Kelly Loeffler in 2021, is a 501(c4) nonpartisan nonprofit dedicated to growing participation in the democratic process by mobilizing and empowering voters. The group works year-round to educate and register voters, engage with diverse and underrepresented communities, and protect election integrity. ###
Media Contact: [press@greatergeorgia.com](mailto:press@greatergeorgia.com)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Max=20Ukropina?=
subject: Time to go back
body:
We need to go back ASAP.

Peter,

First, border patrol announced 2023 is officially the worst year on record at southern border border.

Then, they said that 169 people on the terrorist watch list have been caught this year ... another record high.

Now,
they're warning that Hamas terrorists may try infiltrate our country through the open border.

There's only one obvious solution...

I'm calling for an immediate return to President Trump's approach to securing the border.
President Trump's policies worked. The numbers don't lie. All of the border policies that Biden arrogantly repealed when he took office need to be reinstated ASAP.

If you agree it's time to go back to President Trump's border policies, will you add your name to our petition so I know you're standing with me? (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/add_name_border_security?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=Trump_BorderSecurity_Sign4&utm_source=Max+for+OC+Supporters&utm_campaign=74676421b3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_24_03_09_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f436e3f042-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
SIGN THE PETITION (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/add_name_border_security?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=Trump_BorderSecurity_Sign4&utm_source=Max+for+OC+Supporters&utm_campaign=74676421b3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_24_03_09_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f436e3f042-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Getting President Biden out of office won't end this crisis. We need to go back to smart, proven, effective border security policies that worked just a few short years ago.

If we're in this together, we can win this election and secure our border now!

I hope you're standing with me,

Max Ukropina

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: time to sue the bastards
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2310-q4-wn?refcode=231026-email-z [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2310-q4-wn?refcode=231026-email-z]Peter,
I want to update you on redistricting in North Carolina and where things stand.
Last year, the court drew fair maps for North Carolina that ensured an equal representation of 7 Republicans and 7 Democrats from our state in Congress. Today, Republicans in the NCGA have forced grossly gerrymandered maps through the legislature.
Here’s the truth: These new maps are intended to guarantee the outcome of Congressional elections in our state - sending at least 10 or 11 Republicans to Congress and only 3 Democrats.
Peter, I won a 50/50 district in 2022 because North Carolina voters had a real chance to make their voices heard and pick the candidate with the best ideas. But for now, I don’t want to give these maps credibility by announcing a run in any of these gerrymandered districts. I’ll make a decision about running for office once the courts have spoken.
These maps are an extreme partisan gerrymander by Republican legislators that totally screw the voters. It’s time to sue the bastards.
Thank you for your unending support. I'll keep you posted.
Wiley
Support #TeamWiley's pro-democracy fight for North Carolina families by making a donation today!

subject: Closing the curtains
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc
body:
| [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=ffb0d879922845f8aefdab4e4b12dbd6&_e=nDwMFGwpIh1nh7-1WrXJdFNl8RkMMx78fJb8T5LU_Elhp6WM7BSAk5slMhClAi2_7kmdyDFlFoq433smR_PsGMQMqjb-5MkTEPP6Erdh8RlUb-C0nuAu4Prl1Nvj2XsdQ_g09ywlLydhqVysVIg_uKZWjUAp5ihHiy2jho-CpdL_ycLcA3TwbCNIlpZHn_04Hrk-TBzZ5y8dgYKImv_ErX-AjTeu-M4gNmW-MLyYCTBUt7E6jvqnHc3kY6EkTKyzNYyCpqN458C0rO6omEMzhu87iPSiSaKKsavAwm72eV0o3_j_uzKaqM3ZzELGUhTQ)
---
Guys.

Democrats in Washington and their Socialist Super PACS have too many connections and too much money in their fundraising war chest. **AKA, WAY TOO MUCH POWER!** The people don't tell you how hard it is to start a campaign from Ground Zero. No war chest. No connections. Just you. [**Chip in to help me keep going.**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=ffb0d879922845f8aefdab4e4b12dbd6&_e=nDwMFGwpIh1nh7-1WrXJdFNl8RkMMx78fJb8T5LU_Elhp6WM7BSAk5slMhClAi2_7kmdyDFlFoq433smR_PsGMQMqjb-5MkTEPP6Erdh8RlUb-C0nuAu4Prl1Nvj2XsdQ_g09ywlLydhqVysVIg_uPYPwObn3GGQqi2zc7OPe4uLvkb5eleZ-D8D5DjoBrlGVu6FYjNix2UR30qqqrFzg_3J2pwOoJtxd8KppLn1H-sikYK8ZTOfHyMp0x0ZQrHLQIJJoupzlRBaqcstTj_vjOK-RbT_FC21Yy15NagJXOIEngPB7FsY3IANVoKxgEfY) **At this point, if I don 't do a complete 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I have to possibly SHUT DOWN my fundraising efforts, but Republicans may never win a race in 2024. **[**Help SAVE AMERICA now!**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=ffb0d879922845f8aefdab4e4b12dbd6&_e=nDwMFGwpIh1nh7-1WrXJdFNl8RkMMx78fJb8T5LU_Elhp6WM7BSAk5slMhClAi2_7kmdyDFlFoq433smR_PsGMQMqjb-5MkTEPP6Erdh8RlUb-C0nuAu4Prl1Nvj2XsdQ_g09ywlLydhqVysVIg_uPYPwObn3GGQqi2zc7OPe4sUGCn3aNpgevbPPaBpeFoev47xNpXKrXRPGjs0pmwjIcX616jq8bIJZ65bWbkyNHpNcx1pC52vtAGMNTFotmgyKOpdjY-sIrVDn0xthyl87XuLe5RDgcI1n7UokGWV_BwWQmqaY4hhUEJVcYC60nqO)****
If the Democrats can beat us in 2024, I can guarantee you Republicans won't have a chance to beat them for a long time.

**Why? Because as a hillbilly and a Marine, I know a fight.**

I'm one of the toughest Republicans in the Senate. Democrats know that--that's why they're dumping money into the upcoming elections to beat conservatives everywhere. If we can't stop them - **no one can.**

clean_body: | Guys. Democrats in Washington and their Socialist Super PACS have too many connections and too much money in their fundraising war chest. AKA, WAY TOO MUCH POWER! The people don't tell you how hard it is to start a campaign from Ground Zero. No war chest. No connections. Just you. At this point, if I don 't do a complete 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I have to possibly SHUT DOWN my fundraising efforts, but Republicans may never win a race in 2024. ** If the Democrats can beat us in 2024, I can guarantee you Republicans won't have a chance to beat them for a long time. Why? Because as a hillbilly and a Marine, I know a fight. I'm one of the toughest Republicans in the Senate. Democrats know that--that's why they're dumping money into the upcoming elections to beat conservatives everywhere. If we can't stop them - no one can. Thank you so much, JD Vance | Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc. Now is the time to STAND UP against the extremist Democrats and make sure they NEVER destroy our great country. Thank you, Voter Verification HQ | | Contributions to the National Republican Senatorial Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.. | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Del. Sam Rasoul
subject: Tax Holiday, Trunk or Treats, You Write the Bill Pt 2 and more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized By Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Email%20Logo.png] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Sam%20Headshot.png]
ACROSS THE COMMONWEALTH
VOTE TODAY! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Make%20A%20Plan%20To%20Vote.png]
You can vote for November's elections NOW! Vote at your Registrar's office during business hours. Saturday early voting is available October 28th and November 4th. Learn More [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
Find your local Registrar's office here: https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/VWCC.jpeg] 15 years of the Community College Access Program at VWCC
Learn More [https://www.wdbj7.com/2023/09/26/virginia-western-celebrates-15th-anniversary-ccap-program/] CCAP is a successful public/private partnership that pays the cost of tuition for three years at Virginia Western Community College if a qualified student does not have sufficient financial aid to pay tuition costs.
This program has helped over 4,200 students achieve higher education!
CANDIDATE SPOTLIGHT
https://karenforvirginia.com/ [https://karenforvirginia.com/] Karen Jenkins for HB-89
Donate Here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/karenforvirginia] Karen Jenkins is a life-long resident of the City of Suffolk. Throughout her lifetime she has passionately advocated for others and currently serves on the Suffolk School Board with a proven track record and history of accomplishments. She is running for the House of Delegates for the 89th District to continue delivering results for the people of Virginia.
She is a champion for education, public safety and mental health. As your next Delegate for the 89th District, she will continue to fight and vote for meaningful policies and legislation to support the needs of the district. At the state level, she will be positioned to write and sponsor bills and laws to benefit the schools and communities in the 89th District and throughout the commonwealth.
LOCAL CANDIDATE EVENTS
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/lily%20canvass.png]
Canvass for Lily Franklin!
On Sundays, join Team Lily at the South County Library Parking Lot from 12 - 12:30 pm for a Roanoke canvassing event!
Bring your walking shoes, a charged cell phone, and water. When you arrive to their launch location you will receive a brief training and literature before being sent out to turf. Questions? Email Beth at egunter3@gmail.com [egunter3@gmail.com] or call 540-353-3645.
South County Library Parking Lot, 6303 Merriman Rd, Roanoke, VA 24018
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/sam%20and%20trish.jpg]
Canvass for Sam and Trish!
*this is a place holder until the new facebook event is created*
Join us Sunday to canvass for Sam and Trish! Meet our Field Coordinator, Dom, on September 3rd at the Williamson Road Library, 12:00pm.
Located at 3837 Williamson Rd, Roanoke, VA 24012.
IN THE COMMUNITY
https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story [https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story] https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424 [https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424]
Roanoke River Contamination Settlement Reached Roanoke Young Democrats Canvass Tailgate
Without current regulations, the water contamination caused by these companies could have been so much worse. Come out to support Roanoke Valley Democratic candidates!
Read More [https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story] The Roanoke Young Democrats will be enjoying pizza, coffee, donuts and more before canvassing to knock for Trish White-Boyd, Sam Rasoul, Lily Franklin, Samantha Newell, Jade Harris, & Nancy Horn. Door knocking will begin about 12:30 pm!
Read More [https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424]
Roanoke EnVision Center Kids Movie Night - Sept. 28 Fall Harvest Festival
The movie is free and there will be snacks and much more! Fall into wellness at the Harvest Festival!
Read More Celebrate the end of farm season with fun experiences for the whole family. Try new activities to support your well-being. Connect with others in a beautiful outdoor space. Free meals available with registration. This event is free and open to everyone!
Read More [https://web.cvent.com/event/19422342-be4f-417d-9fc3-6a6bf883e794/summary]
https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992 [https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992] https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/ [https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/]
Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game - Oct. 1 Henrietta Lacks Statue Unveiling - Oct. 4
Join us for the 6th Annual Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game, being held at the Home of the Salem Red Sox - Carilion Clinic Field. A dignified sculpture will commemorate the ongoing and long unrecognized contributions of Roanoke native Henrietta Lacks, who unknowingly provided the world with the HeLa cell, fueling decades of life-saving and life changing research.
Physicians, nurses and administrators will suit up for each hospital during the nine-inning contest. Proceeds will benefit the American Heart Association. Unveiling is October 4th at 11 am at Henrietta Lacks Plaza.
Admission is $5 at the gate, kids under 10 free. Gates open at 1pm and the game starts at 2pm. 410 3rd St SW, Roanoke, VA 24011
Read More [https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992] Read More [https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/RCDC.jpeg] Join the Roanoke City Democrats!
Roanoke City Democratic Committee meetings are now in-person and open to non-members. We meet the 3rd Thursday of each month. This month we are meeting at 6 pm at the Main Library (706 S Jefferson St, Roanoke, VA 24016). Sign up for meeting reminders and other information here [https://www.roanokedemocrats.com/subscribe] .
Join us for a social hour every first Thursday of the month at Leonore Restaurant, 128 Campbell St. SW, 5-7 pm.
Join Roanoke Young Dems! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/RYD.png]
Meetings occur on the first Monday and third Sunday of every month in person and virtually. The goal of RYD is to help improve our community and to promote the names of Democratic candidates and policies.
Contact: YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com [YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com] to get involved!
Donate Today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/samrasoul]
Thank you for your support! If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to reach out to me anytime.
My very best,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Screen%20Shot%202022-07-29%20at%203.44.06%20PM%20%281%29.png]
Del. Sam Rasoul
https://www.facebook.com/SamRasoulVA [https://www.facebook.com/SamRasoulVA] https://twitter.com/Sam_Rasoul [https://twitter.com/Sam_Rasoul] https://www.instagram.com/sam_rasoul/?hl=en [https://www.instagram.com/sam_rasoul/?hl=en]
Paid for and Authorized By Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate
Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate
P.O. Box 13842
Roanoke, VA 24037
United States

subject: OTC Morphine, APPROVED
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

How Banks Can Seize Your Accounts

Banks don't need your permission
to legally seize your deposits. This is how you can protect your
savings. Learn More

This Tax Loophole Is Kept Secret
by the IRS

The IRS is trying to close the
tax loophole that can safeguard your IRA or 401k from market
crashes and recessions. Learn More

This Asset Will Save You from
Recession...

With recession looming and
inflation at a 40-year high, this asset hedges against economic
uncertainty. Learn More

Beware the Digital Dollar:
Unveiling Its Terrifying
Realities!
The purchasing power of the US
dollar is rapidly dwindling. You have been deceived, as the
government's promises of financial stability crumble before your
own eyes.

Now, more than ever, it is
crucial for you to move out of the high-risk zone and take
immediate action to protect your wealth. The solution lies in the
timeless power of an asset that the government, banks, and Wall
Street don't want you to have.

For years, the government has
insisted that the dollar remains a reliable store of value, but
the truth is far from what they would have us believe.
The silent erosion of the
dollar's purchasing power has left hardworking Americans like you
vulnerable, as your savings and investments are silently
devaluing.

It's time to expose the deception
and take decisive steps toward securing your financial future.

The signs of the dollar's decline
are impossible to ignore. Inflation is soaring and the cost of
everyday goods and services are spiraling out of control.

The government's assurances that
this is merely a temporary phenomenon is an utter lie as the
hardworking middle class struggles to make ends meet. The erosion
of your purchasing power is no accident; it is a consequence of
policies that prioritize short-term gains over your long-term
financial security.
It doesn't stop there. Amidst all
the lies and chaos, President Biden snuck in Executive Order
14067. The Digital Dollar, poised to roll out soon, is the Fed's
sinister attempt to end privacy as you know it by tracking and
controlling your every financial move.

Imagine a world where every
aspect of your financial transactions is meticulously recorded,
scrutinized, and controlled by the government. The Digital
Dollar, as outlined in the Executive Order, is portrayed under a
sinister guise of convenience with instantaneous access to funds
via our phones that are ironically under constant full
surveillance.

This shift grants unprecedented
powers to the central authorities, jeopardizing the very essence
of your privacy. It is a grave threat that you cannot afford to
ignore.

Your personal choices will no
longer be yours to make. The consequences are profound. The
government can dictate how you spend your money, monitor your
purchases, and potentially freeze your assets at will. The very
essence of your personal freedom is at stake.
Act now with urgency to embark on
a journey toward financial liberation where you not only
Preserve, Protect, and maintain your Privacy but reclaim the
peace of mind that has been mercilessly stolen from you.

Allegiance Gold, LLC is not a
broker-dealer and does not provide investment, tax, or legal
advisory services. No statement in this communication should be
construed as a recommendation to purchase or sell any security,
or as investment, tax, or legal advice. Precious metals, like
all investments, carry risk, are not suitable for all investors,
and past performance does not guarantee future results. We do
not guarantee any investment performance. Please consult your own
investment, tax, or legal advisor prior to making any investment
decision. Third-party information quoted or presented by us in
this communication represents only the opinions of the third
party and we do not endorse any third-party source of
information. We are not affiliated with the U.S. Mint or any
government agency. ©Allegiance Gold, LLC 2023

525-K East Market Street # 114

City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176

| | Peter, I'm Congressman Colin Allred, and**I want to tell you why I'm endorsing Nick Melvoin for Congress today.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72230900/434686938/702728082?refcode=2023-10-24-allred&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=576538f3-1a74-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTc2NTM4ZjMtMWE3NC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=l_BOAr_1zBpR4oGgtFEvAqo2ZD2OCPSvNuQYe--d1QE=) I was born and raised in North Texas by a single mom who was a public school teacher. With the help of my family, community, and coaches, I was able to graduate from Baylor University, play in the NFL, become a civil rights lawyer, and serve my hometown in Congress. I'm endorsing Nick Melvoin for Congress – and also running for Senate in Texas against Ted Cruz – because we need a new generation of leadership in Congress, one that understands the everyday struggles of Americans and will work tirelessly to fix it. [**Will you join us today by splitting a donation between my campaign and Nick Melvoin's campaign? I believe when people come together they can achieve things bigger than themselves. Yet today, so many are trying to divide us.
We need more true public servants in Congress who share that belief in the people. That's why I'm supporting Nick Melvoin for Congress.
Together, Nick and I protected people's civil rights in the Obama Administration. I know he will work hard to solve the struggles people face every day. I look forward to fighting with him in Congress to create consensus and deliver for the people.
[**Today, I'm asking you to join us as we fight to win our tough elections. Peter, can I count on you to split a donation between our campaigns?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72230907/434686945/702728082?refcode=2023-10-24-allred&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=576538f3-1a74-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTc2NTM4ZjMtMWE3NC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=l_BOAr_1zBpR4oGgtFEvAqo2ZD2OCPSvNuQYe--d1QE=)

clean_body: I believe when people come together they can achieve things bigger than themselves. | | | | Peter, I'm Congressman Colin Allred, andI want to tell you why I'm endorsing Nick Melvoin for Congress today. = I was born and raised in North Texas by a single mom who was a public school teacher. With the help of my family, community, and coaches, I was able to graduate from Baylor University, play in the NFL, become a civil rights lawyer, and serve my hometown in Congress. I'm endorsing Nick Melvoin for Congress – and also running for Senate in Texas against Ted Cruz – because we need a new generation of leadership in Congress, one that understands the everyday struggles of Americans and will work tirelessly to fix it. = ** Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = I believe when people come together they can achieve things bigger than themselves. Yet today, so many are trying to divide us. We need more true public servants in Congress who share that belief in the people. That's why I'm supporting Nick Melvoin for Congress. Together, Nick and I protected people's civil rights in the Obama Administration. I know he will work hard to solve the struggles people face every day. I look forward to fighting with him in Congress to create consensus and deliver for the people. = Thank you, Colin Allred Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289 |

body:
| Hovde, Mayer, and Clarke.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1399%2E35263%2EstOQQn)
Peter, political insiders anticipate that there will be one or more deep-pocketed self-funders who get into the Republican race soon, so here’s who to look out for: There’s **Eric Hovde** — the wealthy California businessman who’s willing to spend $20 million of his own personal fortune to defeat Tammy. Then there’s **Scott Mayer** — yet another megamillionaire with the ability to self-fund his own campaign with access to a virtually unlimited warchest. And we can’t forget **David Clarke** — the former Milwaukee County Sheriff and right-wing extremist has also floated a Senate bid as Republicans make preparations to mount bids against Tammy. No matter who jumps into this race, we’ll have our work cut out for us if we want to keep Wisconsin blue, reelect Tammy, and defend our Democratic Senate majority. **[So we’re asking: Can you rush $5 before our end-of-month deadline expires to help us prepare to fight back against our potential self-funding opponents and keep Wisconsin and our Senate majority blue?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-oct23.ejjIam&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20231026_AM1_T3_S1&t=22&akid=1399%2E35263%2EstOQQn)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [EXPRESS DONATE $5](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-oct23.p1cCjd&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20231026_AM1_T3_S1&t=23&akid=1399%2E35263%2EstOQQn)

name: Bob Casey (Official Campaign)
subject: Fighting back
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Let us explain how we got here.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=980%2E552475%2EuKLD8V)
Hey Peter!
Our October fundraising deadline is coming up, and our Finance Team has set an ambitious goal: **We're aiming to raise $50,000 to keep up the pace of our campaign to re-elect Bob Casey and defend Pennsylvania's Senate seat.**
So **[before we ask for your support again,](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231026-1?refcode=em20231026-1&refcode2=980_552475_uKLD8V&akid=980%2E552475%2EuKLD8V)** let's run through how we got here...
**FIRST:** A mega-millionaire Connecticut resident named David McCormick flew on a private jet to Pennsylvania and announced he's running to defeat Bob Casey.
**THEN:** We called on our grassroots supporters to step up to hit our September goal so we could fight back -- _and hundreds of you did._
**BUT NOW: We need to make sure we hit our October $50,000 fundraising goal.** So we're humbly asking you to make your first contribution so we can turn things around and keep building our campaign.
**[Will you donate right now to help re-elect Bob Casey and defend our Senate majority? Any amount you can chip in will make a difference.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231026-1?refcode=em20231026-1&refcode2=980_552475_uKLD8V&akid=980%2E552475%2EuKLD8V)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231026-1?refcode=em20231026-1&refcode2=980_552475_uKLD8V&akid=980%2E552475%2EuKLD8V)**
Thanks for reading our updates and supporting our campaign.
Together,
Team Casey

* * *
To receive texts from Team Casey text TEAM to 51041. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=980%2E552475%2EuKLD8V)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=980%2E552475%2EuKLD8V)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: What Are The "SIGNS OF THE TIMES"?
body:
What Are The "Signs Of The Times"? There is so much talk about End Times Biblical Prophecy with all that is happening in our world, and rightfully so
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=2915247.969.1.aae3972197bc0d4b75e9cc1095958036) |
---
## What Are The "Signs Of The Times"?
---
There is so much talk about **End Times Biblical Prophecy** with all that is happening in our world, _and rightfully so_. However, many "**YouTube Preachers** " have sown seeds of confusion into the Body of Christ concerning this area of Scripture. **I am convinced that the BEST commentary on the Bible is the Bible itself.** Therefore, on Wednesday, November 1 at 7pm, I will do a biblical teaching on the "**SIGNS OF THE TIMES** " followed by a **Q &A session** at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=2915247.970.1.a1ec8cc44990298a495d868858bcb17f) Tulsa. Join me for what will be a thorough study of what Scripture says about the signs to look for at the end of the age. You are also invited to join me this **WKND** at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=2915247.971.1.ae554bc6f1fdf94787d721e67e8b2651) Tulsa & OKC for **The Book of Acts Pt. 24 - Growing Pains** Saturday @5pm - OKC
Sunday @10am - Tulsa
---
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=2915247.972.1.58f48b54094e3299f4f010cb81ed0e4a)
---
This last WKND at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=2915247.973.1.7a8d2de294dda14e3134f884f8c90655) Tulsa & OKC, I committed the entire sermon to explaining **End Times Biblical Prophecy** and where we are on the timeline.
I addressed **Ezekiel 38** from an in-depth perspective along with the **Israel/Hamas War** that we are witnessing.
This message I know will benefit you and help you understand what the Bible says _MUST_ take place in the **Last Days**..
Watch it here: [The End Times EXPLANIED](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=2915247.974.1.50602e079c8d7c105b9c9be6746d93a8)
| | [ Watch: Ezekiel 38 ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=2915247.975.1.a82a5c69c0b45cce9b353dbd5f48779f)
---
|
---
---
## Upcoming Schedule At Sheridan.Church
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=2915247.976.1.2b491175a6414a50be13b561e0445d05)
---
-**Sunday, October 29 @6pm** (Tulsa): **Family Fall Event** Watch Service LIVE Online: [https://www.youtube.com/@sheridanchurch](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=2915247.977.1.cfef11a4fec90e46944eb5a9dfe9ab96) Get connected: [https://www.sheridan.church/connect](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=2915247.978.1.ce7e756fcf91677bd63d4e926bf8572d)
---
---
## New Building Updates
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=2915247.979.1.177103f7ed373469de5aa4cfd85518b7)
---
It has been a little over a month since we moved to our new facility and the progress has been GREAT!
**Here are the upcoming projects to look for:**
**Auditorium**
-TV's to be added throughout the auditorium for the purpose of lyrics & Bible verses
-More lighting in auditorium
**Lobby**
-New ceiling & flooring
**Restrooms**
-The men of Sheridan know what needs to be removed and replaced...
**Kids & Youth**
-Both nursery's will be complete and youth room will be updated with new carpet and layout
These are the updates that we plan to complete here in the near future.
We are doing this entire renovation on a cash basis.
Thank you for your generosity that has accomplished so much and please consider continuing to partner with us so we can get the job done!
You can give at [www.sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=2915247.980.1.1c730fe50b916be154055ea9667e2aa0)
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=2915247.981.1.7e9f3274371a102fa267542fb7356d5b), GAB, [Facebook](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=2915247.982.1.3a23681660dacf88deb8f6222c639d04), [Instagram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=2915247.983.1.eb931956c250e188765ed1b99296bc54), [Twitter](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=2915247.984.1.613a3c5c6f4f43381e2f7bb817cded99), [Telegram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=2915247.985.1.65e6297230fedbf38d6d5a27a484f235), GETTR & [YouTube](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=2915247.986.1.eb9c9a8d55c20636a1b84c445c60b839)).
[www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=2915247.987.1.d1f29b10c58eb40ea17ade732ceb5e59)

subject: we don't want to give up yet.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Friend, we'll be honest: **If we had a dollar for every voter Colin Allred has met on his Texas tour, we wouldn't be writing this email.**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/13292?amount=5&t=17&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20231026-AllredRoadTeamviaDSCC-AllredTandem4V2-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20231026-AllredRoadTeamviaDSCC-AllredTandem4V2-ETG-sl1&akid=12396%2E9716520%2EFiFZSA)
We don't have to tell you that Colin's race to defeat Ted Cruz was already _super_ competitive.

**But right now, 14% of Texas voters are still undecided. That means whoever can reach the most undecided voters will win this election.**

That's why Colin has been on the road nonstop these past few weeks, giving every speech, having every important conversation and meeting voters where they are whenever he's able to.

**But, as Colin hits every corner of Texas to shake hands and win over voters, the costs are adding up FAST – and if we don't raise $50,000 by our midnight fundraising deadline, our voter outreach efforts could be impacted.**

**We can't let this happen – not when Ted Cruz has MILLIONS to fund his voter outreach.[So, please: Will you split a donation of $5 right now between Colin and the DSCC to keep Colin on the road and expand our Senate majority? We’re still short of what we need to raise today, and we're counting on you to help make up the gap FAST →](https://go.dscc.org/go/13292?amount=5&t=18&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20231026-AllredRoadTeamviaDSCC-AllredTandem4V2-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20231026-AllredRoadTeamviaDSCC-AllredTandem4V2-ETG-sl1&akid=12396%2E9716520%2EFiFZSA)**

name: Rick Scott
subject: Mitch McConnell booted me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter, In February, Mitch McConnell removed me from a Senate Committee because I challenged him for Republican Leader. _**This is what happens when you challenge leadership in Washington.**_ It’s the kind of vintage Washington insider move you find in the swamp. But that won’t stop me from pushing Senate Republican leaders to act like Republicans. I stand by my decision to challenge Mitch McConnell, and I’ll continue to fight Washington insiders who make Washington work for**** them instead of you. I need your help to stay in Washington and hold Joe Biden and any DC insiders accountable. **[Can I count on your support?](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=df44aec17e0f4387bd141bec26280096&_e=tz943vikn3VmIL_llZ7-MX0LOsRQuDqQiVIea1x-07IJtpaWU2iln7OgiwhpavsrMDdwLUmFujpYdCQVv_M8lFpPq0m3atmRgBFqtX7A_COTGSpVixeF56lG0DtUkcr032EScAWgbklHqqlrHxsv-nv-k6sz3Kkc26Xi2vl7AtMJK27Qdk9mbX0KlnObVJgugxiwi5LPJqk_jLH7RUnTNCQm3C8j7rAEM3n2L65_NA7pcFRXX5apVvRmzNWazfimGxkj7mUXXr9MVrKAf5u8NrJHg-f159xkATK5nI-7qG03AkM2hYYW2A3lu_3kIBw74c0QE_PGNliOVqMmMp4g84n11G-z8Rno4AjAJm0fxkVp_xJv1FUGKGia_9RJhZ8K)**

body:
Podcast, radio show, conversations...
| | | | DR. MANSHARAMANI HAS DECIDED TO SHARE ALL OF HIS CONTENT VIA [MANSHARAMANI.SUBSTACK.COM](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Zr9_n4nrDlOoiyj4jI-UB1r883I1It2UDtfmF43SX98UEdOk0eQnrBOqeZxah62fzMU4k7jXdBqLGVXBowvDtSL3__jcqJmwlslStR1WQ3bHz9tCGjq8GK1W3lqky_W9vkSST7ATX-m4eO8vuQP6fipj1p3Lp58S&c=r8MyidLxzEEMdOJnuJp-MwIm60rNb3XvW_C7rGsuVACpRXiucq-Yxg==&ch=MJhVGOPqAJ4J4d0gBM9YFeoPg8Aa4vS6r3VZe0vMIrtOhETDzQWwsg==). PLEASE SUBSCRIBE (FOR FREE) AND FORWARD THIS EMAIL TO OTHERS WHO MAY APPRECIATE IT.
---
# CHARLES MILLER
# Co-Founder and CEO of Lynk Global
---
---
|
---
In this episode of Navigating Uncertainty, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Charles Miller, co-Founder and Chief Executive Officer of Lynk Global. Charles shares his personal story of growing up in a small town in California with two younger brothers, how his fascination with science fiction drove an ambition to become an astronaut, and how he left CalTech without graduating. He also talks about his work opening up space to commercial competition and his current ambition to use space to connect everyone everywhere (and eliminate the annoyance of dropped calls!). Charles concludes with some fabulous advice for navigating uncertainty: Learn from the mistakes others made, make new mistakes, and embrace your passion as a driving force.
Please tune in via any of the links below, or if you'd prefer to watch the conversation, please visit mansharamani.substack.com for link to the video.
---
PRIOR EPISODES ALL AVAILABLE ON DEMAND!
For those who missed the prior episodes of NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY, have no fear! They're all available on demand via the links below. As you sit in traffic during your weekend trips, tune in and use the opportunity to learn about some fascinating people as well as some of the most important topics of our times!
You'll find my conversations with Matthew Bartlett, Co-Founder of Darby Field Advisors, Mary Steady, Director of Pupil Services at LinWood Public Schools, Mike Dennehy, Public and Political Affairs Consultant, Lori Van Dusen, Founder of LVW Advisors, Fahim Fazli, Actor and Hollywood Insider, Robert Reynolds, CEO of Putnam Investments, Dr. Benjamin Kilham, founder of the Kilham Bear Center, Ashlee Vance, Author of When the Heavens Went on Sale, Darrell Hartman, Author of The Battle of Ink & Ice, Jim Cantrell, Co-Founder of SpaceX and Founder of Phantom Space, Dean Carucci, CEO of the Portsmouth Regional Hospital, GOP Presidential Candidate Doug Burgum, Jack Heath, Host of Good Morning New Hampshire, John Formella, Attorney General of New Hampshire, Dean Kamen, Founder of DEKA Research, Donald Kreis, Consumer Advocate for the State of NH, Jeremy Hitchcock, Founder of Dyn and Executive Chairman of Minim, Phil Taub, Partner at NixonPeabody and Co-Founder of SWIM WITH A MISSION, Morgan Ortagus, Former Spokesperson for the State Department, David Jordan, Founder of Seven Hills Foundation, John Avlon, Senior Political Analyst at CNN, Derek Leathers, Chairman & CEO of Werner Enterprises, Rudy Glocker, Founder of Burgeon Outdoor, former US Senator Kelly Ayotte, NCUA Vice Chair Kyle Hauptman, Miami Mayor Francis Suarez, NH Governor Chris Sununu, NH Education Czar Frank Edelblut, Commissioner of Business and Economic Affairs Taylor Caswell, GOP Presidential Candidate Vivek Ramaswamy, former Commander of NORAD and Retired Four Star General Lori Robinson, and former Chair of House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence Mike Rogers.

---
| |
---
---
|
---
|
Navigating Uncertainty is a show in which acclaimed global trend-watcher and futurist [Vikram Mansharamani](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Zr9_n4nrDlOoiyj4jI-UB1r883I1It2UDtfmF43SX98UEdOk0eQnrKAxNNiHNZvH3UNwssm6A0-9j9k-nTcJ-zGDdQcK1iZj0e4RaS3CBA4W6zeWahhbrN7WaSuTp9Z5-OnHNkrCeEpDi0wPnStSnw==&c=r8MyidLxzEEMdOJnuJp-MwIm60rNb3XvW_C7rGsuVACpRXiucq-Yxg==&ch=MJhVGOPqAJ4J4d0gBM9YFeoPg8Aa4vS6r3VZe0vMIrtOhETDzQWwsg==) dives into how leaders make decisions. Through long-form conversations that move beyond sound-bites, Dr. Mansharamani explores how some of the most successful people think about tough choices. Serious, irreverent, entertaining, heart-warming, and occasionally tear-jerking, Navigating Uncertainty offers listeners bite-sized authentic biographies of high-impact leaders from all walks of life.Weekly episodes are released every Thursday via Apple Podcast, Spotify and everywhere podcasts are generally available!

To stay in touch with Dr. Mansharaman and to subscribe (for free) to his weekly newsletter, please visit [mansharamani.substack.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Zr9_n4nrDlOoiyj4jI-UB1r883I1It2UDtfmF43SX98UEdOk0eQnrEkLjHZHcYQGrDPiTMFpaid4SPT8JBQZWqyz69tuNWiFemrJTRIndZLUznog31P33lzexFgtFocJ6X2cM4OT2QvcAXwNpetoNPdHlgRKD12l&c=r8MyidLxzEEMdOJnuJp-MwIm60rNb3XvW_C7rGsuVACpRXiucq-Yxg==&ch=MJhVGOPqAJ4J4d0gBM9YFeoPg8Aa4vS6r3VZe0vMIrtOhETDzQWwsg==)

Please tune in via any of the links below, or if you'd prefer to watch the conversation, please visit mansharamani.substack.com for link to the video. PRIOR EPISODES ALL AVAILABLE ON DEMAND! For those who missed the prior episodes of NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY, have no fear! They're all available on demand via the links below. As you sit in traffic during your weekend trips, tune in and use the opportunity to learn about some fascinating people as well as some of the most important topics of our times! You'll find my conversations with Matthew Bartlett, Co-Founder of Darby Field Advisors, Mary Steady, Director of Pupil Services at LinWood Public Schools, Mike Dennehy, Public and Political Affairs Consultant, Lori Van Dusen, Founder of LVW Advisors, Fahim Fazli, Actor and Hollywood Insider, Robert Reynolds, CEO of Putnam Investments, Dr. Benjamin Kilham, founder of the Kilham Bear Center, Ashlee Vance, Author of When the Heavens Went on Sale, Darrell Hartman, Author of The Battle of Ink & Ice, Jim Cantrell, Co-Founder of SpaceX and Founder of Phantom Space, Dean Carucci, CEO of the Portsmouth Regional Hospital, GOP Presidential Candidate Doug Burgum, Jack Heath, Host of Good Morning New Hampshire, John Formella, Attorney General of New Hampshire, Dean Kamen, Founder of DEKA Research, Donald Kreis, Consumer Advocate for the State of NH, Jeremy Hitchcock, Founder of Dyn and Executive Chairman of Minim, Phil Taub, Partner at NixonPeabody and Co-Founder of SWIM WITH A MISSION, Morgan Ortagus, Former Spokesperson for the State Department, David Jordan, Founder of Seven Hills Foundation, John Avlon, Senior Political Analyst at CNN, Derek Leathers, Chairman & CEO of Werner Enterprises, Rudy Glocker, Founder of Burgeon Outdoor, former US Senator Kelly Ayotte, NCUA Vice Chair Kyle Hauptman, Miami Mayor Francis Suarez, NH Governor Chris Sununu, NH Education Czar Frank Edelblut, Commissioner of Business and Economic Affairs Taylor Caswell, GOP Presidential Candidate Vivek Ramaswamy, former Commander of NORAD and Retired Four Star General Lori Robinson, and former Chair of House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence Mike Rogers. | | | | Navigating Uncertainty is a show in which acclaimed global trend-watcher and futurist == dives into how leaders make decisions. Through long-form conversations that move beyond sound-bites, Dr. Mansharamani explores how some of the most successful people think about tough choices. Serious, irreverent, entertaining, heart-warming, and occasionally tear-jerking, Navigating Uncertainty offers listeners bite-sized authentic biographies of high-impact leaders from all walks of life.Weekly episodes are released every Thursday via Apple Podcast, Spotify and everywhere podcasts are generally available! To stay in touch with Dr. Mansharaman and to subscribe (for free) to his weekly newsletter, please visit == LINKS TO THE SHOW | | == | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | | | | | | Vikram Mansharamani | P.O. Box 1376, Concord, NH 03302 | | Sent by mailto:vikram@mansharamani.com powered by

name: Kari Lake
subject: Three Words.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate
body:
| [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=21913bce4d054a07b7b45690afd06ad1&_e=dq9G3sFQ7-_gAwQTb0yEmvvy5pzsqWdqd6k727OxQsv3IkGR4SFi9m33_GzzFFRzMbdF8BVwFzf7CXWYYiy-oUK2pIQR_b1mg0E8joV23GRoJkEWxuRv3lQHMgNuUYy48qrE93X0rcihKr6aM6sYkj-3vBsXmYcsVNraFPDdPFYbvQ5gDACjkBCHTOxEb11tCHfxktn1TyYK9khhWEIrA3jQTb4N3HBhZGpsspGoWtMQSTkrXjtgsZHpwTVvCntw3f2YhvIg3d-VHjSmp0I3L9p25MdEcKvV7vk0Z1nyp-XM-qdTFQ1x2EL_9pLLZCmuZzq8ZnkAwdsfl3ye7oIOUQ%3D%3D)
---
Friend,

I have three words for you.

**_WE WILL WIN._**
| [**RUSH $25 TO WIN IN 2024** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=21913bce4d054a07b7b45690afd06ad1&_e=dq9G3sFQ7-_gAwQTb0yEmvvy5pzsqWdqd6k727OxQsv3IkGR4SFi9m33_GzzFFRzMbdF8BVwFzf7CXWYYiy-oUK2pIQR_b1mg0E8joV23GRoJkEWxuRv3lQHMgNuUYy48qrE93X0rcihKr6aM6sYkj-3vBsXmYcsVNraFPDdPFYbvQ5gDACjkBCHTOxEb11tD85JgY3yIpEYSvGG6c0VZQ2PnbpfVKpnuH28Fr26Z75wtOVa92JTnOMPOIyUpOiY7-130wmgNh5ZB_mnSE87mrN-Vx9KMaQIBgVKNmKMaYQ4x3hvXQ6AWX1MLbjDTOO5UqC9nqDXIEKZfMPjPv5wfQ%3D%3D)
---

**We 've got a point to prove next year -- we will NEVER submit and NEVER surrender. Even though Washington may have forgotten about the everyday American, I HAVE NOT. I'm fighting for all of us here in Arizona, the firefighters, police officers, tradesmen, farmers, and EVERYONE Washington has left behind.**

Americans came to the frontier because they wanted to stay far away from the heavy-handed government of Washington and forge their own path in life. Arizona has suffered but endured. [**Enough is enough -- it's time for CHANGE.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=21913bce4d054a07b7b45690afd06ad1&_e=dq9G3sFQ7-_gAwQTb0yEmvvy5pzsqWdqd6k727OxQsv3IkGR4SFi9m33_GzzFFRzMbdF8BVwFzf7CXWYYiy-oUK2pIQR_b1mg0E8joV23GRoJkEWxuRv3lQHMgNuUYy48qrE93X0rcihKr6aM6sYkj-3vBsXmYcsVNraFPDdPFYbvQ5gDACjkBCHTOxEb11tp1W8FPahes35obh9KtdwKG7BzGD9AFVniIEQbRBsWGzVXOAuW8svbCQ6wiggk_TiFtOVhQznnGB1AvsT-W7aWqstd_wHmCb8LPi_IjvhlFC3YCzf8TbYcwoDmLK0XnW6LNOlinHBOqWBjQBut5l2ZQ%3D%3D)

**Day by day, the left 's hopeless agenda continues barreling its way through the halls of Congress, and the result? Our rights disappear.

While the Fake News MSM might want you to forget -- the Republican party has ALWAYS been the party of the working class. It's time to remind this nation that Conservatives are fighting FOR the people. We're fighting for US.**

[**I 'm ready to win this election -- are you?**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=21913bce4d054a07b7b45690afd06ad1&_e=dq9G3sFQ7-_gAwQTb0yEmvvy5pzsqWdqd6k727OxQsv3IkGR4SFi9m33_GzzFFRzMbdF8BVwFzf7CXWYYiy-oUK2pIQR_b1mg0E8joV23GRoJkEWxuRv3lQHMgNuUYy48qrE93X0rcihKr6aM6sYkj-3vBsXmYcsVNraFPDdPFYbvQ5gDACjkBCHTOxEb11tDwV6ob_BBvI_uTecDIhMrhW1JYdyQbYRP2OQ9VUOnuPELgBg5VshITOq2r2yV_kcmEzNz7Twu5w0Qqc-nar8PLnuqYNqrLCDcQ7KOiQjVbo3rUu7o3H1oZF1DMBbNf2HuO4cEvAo-ihx5hVZT3Y5_A%3D%3D)

It's time the left realizes that the American people aren't pawns on a chessboard. We're more than a sacrificial lamb to be used and thrown away in the name of the "greater good" and their dangerous agendas.

As things stand right now, we're off to a great start.

Every day, more Arizonans join our campaign to fight and win in State 48. Unfortunately, like clockwork, the MSM are already targeting me with their smear campaigns, and the Left's disinformation network is in full gear.

name: Mike Johnson
subject: Let me introduce myself
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life.

|
[ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35675%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0XijLIrnc39A9sOzDmDkOg&sysid=1)
---
Fellow American,

The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them.

**Faith.** Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

**Family.** Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way.

**Freedom.** It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I’ve devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress.

[**This is a simple truth:**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35676%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XitiW%2bKwnUM8wzvnOE40Ag&sysid=1) America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are!

[** SUPPORT MIKE JOHNSON > **](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35677%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XZtR3g6Vszq9svPWuXIM3g&sysid=1)

Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness.**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It’s the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support - to restore our country and defend our values. Can you make a donation immediately?**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35678%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QVSnDK%2b%2fvJfPnE3a%2bubo6w&sysid=1)

[** DONATE TO SAVE AMERICA > **](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35679%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YRS8BdOIQfOAArBHIWLmiQ&sysid=1)

Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must make a change before it’s too late.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35670%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3uh722FAc7wbfTOwzeJ7Aw&sysid=1)

I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It’s why I have been a trusted ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It’s also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference - one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House - and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee.

We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, [**but we cannot do it alone.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35671%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PIKHlIahc2pO1oj1v2arUg&sysid=1)

[**If you are committed to keeping the House from the radical Democrats who are self-serving and want to turn America into a socialist country, then I need your support today.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35672%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CU126ScFPGLXyiKCUL6luA&sysid=1)

[** CHIP IN > **](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35673%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=12y7tPYRQVg7FCWyGUmnig&sysid=1)

The path we’re on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around-- IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW.

We MUST act, and we must do so today.

[**Can you pitch in right now to help save our country, Fellow American?**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35674%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UeL%2bs7pZW8VwEc0M5rHY9g&sysid=1)

Thank you for all you do, and God bless.

[ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35675%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0XijLIrnc39A9sOzDmDkOg&sysid=1)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| **_MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH MIKE?**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35685%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vphyWxH9uCRXyVPlkBUYwA&sysid=1)

---

| PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
---

Your America News
---

_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35686%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YXCTqPJ9zFU77kCvtH7eaA&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35687%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YaDIpR7e3i3zthi2bshocQ&sysid=1)_

The path we’re on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around-- IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW.

We MUST act, and we must do so today.

Thank you for all you do, and God bless.

clean_body: I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life. | Fellow American, The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them. Faith. Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people. Family. Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way. Freedom. It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I’ve devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress. America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are! Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives. This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness. We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It’s the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here. Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It’s why I have been a trusted ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It’s also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference – one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House – and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee. We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, The path we’re on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around-- IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW. name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Lewiston, Maine.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It should have been a fun night for families at the bowling alley and friends at a bar...
#

Friends -
It should have been a fun night for families at the bowling alley and friends at a bar. Instead, it ended with scenes of people running away while law enforcement rushed in toward the danger.
Including last night’s mass shooting in Maine, there have now been 565 mass shootings in the United States this year. 565 mass shootings in 299 days.
I wish that I could send this message to you and say that scenes and stories we've read last night and today are unthinkable or unimaginable.
I wish I could say it's hard to believe we're waking up to read stories of parents corralling their young children into corners to protect them, and others racing down a bowling alley and diving behind pins to escape gunfire. but it is neither unthinkable nor unimaginable.
We are all too familiar with these horrific scenes.
We will see parents in parking lots crying, desperate for information about their kids. We will see loved ones talk about how their lives are forever changed because of senseless violence enabled by weapons of war. We will keep reading about how gun violence is the number one cause of death for America's kids.
But we do not have to.
We can decide we have seen enough.
We do not have to accept these horrific acts of violence as routine, and we must never stop demanding that our leaders not only acknowledge this devastating problem, but take long overdue action to keep our children safe.
My heart breaks for the Lewiston community, the victims, and the survivors. Earlier this week, I visited Uvalde and met with the families and survivors of that mass shooting.
I’m angry that yet another community has to experience this pain.
Our leaders must act.
Thank you for reading,
Gabby Giffords
* * *

👋🏻 Please don't click away yet... 🙏

Gabby Giffords has led the fight against the gun lobby for more than a decade. But she can't do it alone.

If everyone reading this donated just $20, we'd have the resources to take on the gun lobby in Congress and states across the country. But not everyone gives -- that makes it even more important for people who care and understand the stakes of our struggle to chip-in what they can.

If $20 seems worth it to you to change our gun laws in order to make our communities safer from gun violence, we're asking you to contribute to GIFFORDS today.

_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $20](https://go.giffords.org/go/45845?c0=giffords-em-oct23.foxCL5&refcode=em231026-1&t=1&akid=6788%2E3935704%2EJmpwHD)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE MORE](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-oct23.j_Pk1L&refcode=em231026-1&t=2&akid=6788%2E3935704%2EJmpwHD)**
---
****

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=6788%2E3935704%2EJmpwHD) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Yesli Vega
subject: Final stretch
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF YESLI VEGA
body:
Less than two weeks to go to decide Prince William's fate
| | |
---
|
---
| Dear Neighbor,

With less than two weeks to go until November 7th, we are officially in the final days of this campaign.

If the news out of Prince William over the last month has reminded us of anything, it's that we have to change course.

* The Board on Tuesday adopted a plan which could cost you $960 million in just the next seven years

* Simultaneously, the PWEA Union is demanding you fork over $635 million more next year and continuing every year thereafter for across the board pay increases regardless of merit or performance

* Aside from that, Ann Wheeler just proposed another residential tax increase on you to pay for government subsidized housing throughout the County

* Not to be outdone, the candidate who defeated Wheeler in the primary, Deshundra Jefferson, has said she won't repeal the Meals Tax, but instead wants to use it to go towards 'Section 8 Housing' throughout the County. There's another $35-$40 million a year

* The 20th person in the County was just murdered, keeping us on pace for the deadliest year AND deadliest two-year period in Prince William County history -- 20 last year and 20 more so far this year.

* And the largest data center campus in the world, to be placed atop our treasured Manassas Battlefield, where 4,455 men lost their lives in the battle to end slavery, was sneakily scheduled for the lame duck session in December to avoid any accountability for the controversial vote

Folks, the price tag for the items mentioned above are astronomical and difficult to wrap your head around. But they're likely to be entirely funded, and mostly on your back unless we elect a citizen-first majority next month that doesn't treat your finances like their own personal piggybank to be raided over and over.

[Please help us elect a majority committed to protecting your wallet - committed to protecting your safety - and committed to protecting the way of life we chose in Prince William County, today](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KqsJ53bY0IfEcf4_cB5k0UcYBEyHuU1Jb9wg206cleB3nue9AwUcjdensXbxM8iU27E9wYRUCJE6t-nKpJf1UULVAGAISsQNhEBci-j1BjIeU5kTzDbj4BqBTZtab9mz2VOQHtp50-BUg4NKK8_yLFcydTJYaV3GVeEnngBeDwZb-mvPpfHpt59wT7RMfCYB&c=AbZTZ4RimqWEJn_T6jNX2d6cHWkLzz5TFQFlVIwj6AOco-ZwvIFsvQ==&ch=urU9r2UpafwpQD21wG2nUhiyihUHjbNIWuVRokhHCvSQLU6xtULOMg==).

Significantly higher taxes, significantly higher crime, lower test-scores and college preparedness. This is what the last four years has wrought to Prince William County as a result of our governing majority's decisions.

And unless we stop it November 7th - all of it will accelerate.

I'll never ask you for anywhere near the amount the current majority has increased your taxes the last four years. [But if you could chip in $10, $25, or even $50](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KqsJ53bY0IfEcf4_cB5k0UcYBEyHuU1Jb9wg206cleB3nue9AwUcjdensXbxM8iU27E9wYRUCJE6t-nKpJf1UULVAGAISsQNhEBci-j1BjIeU5kTzDbj4BqBTZtab9mz2VOQHtp50-BUg4NKK8_yLFcydTJYaV3GVeEnngBeDwZb-mvPpfHpt59wT7RMfCYB&c=AbZTZ4RimqWEJn_T6jNX2d6cHWkLzz5TFQFlVIwj6AOco-ZwvIFsvQ==&ch=urU9r2UpafwpQD21wG2nUhiyihUHjbNIWuVRokhHCvSQLU6xtULOMg==) to help us get the truth of what's happened over the last four years, and our common-sense solutions to fixing this mess, it will go a long way towards accomplishing that goal.

Thank you for the support you've been already.

If you haven't yet voted early, you can do so at:

* Manassas Office of Elections: 9250 Lee Avenue

* Brentsville Courthouse: 12229 Bristow Road

* Woodbridge DMV: 2731 Caton Hill Road

* Gainesville-Haymarket Library: 14870 Lightner Road

* Dumfries Community Center: 17757 Main Street

Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm through November 4th or 8:30am-5:00pm on Saturday.

Or, [click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KqsJ53bY0IfEcf4_cB5k0UcYBEyHuU1Jb9wg206cleB3nue9AwUcjehoDvwex4q17dhiZPF4YF2C6KjvmTyKOLv2jy0OURhMuuNGkbX-JgepmlJ756yLv0dOA0HqPrNZp4975KjO7OSorRfd0yXay7OdWAXhjOwzIUA8qhjyztPRtqbu7mz9vUBLUM1JOe0P_7lWOKAmtqvm_CWvZJMoHA==&c=AbZTZ4RimqWEJn_T6jNX2d6cHWkLzz5TFQFlVIwj6AOco-ZwvIFsvQ==&ch=urU9r2UpafwpQD21wG2nUhiyihUHjbNIWuVRokhHCvSQLU6xtULOMg==) to request an absentee ballot by 5pm tomorrow.

If you can contribute one more time it would be so greatly appreciated and[ push us over the finish line in victory](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KqsJ53bY0IfEcf4_cB5k0UcYBEyHuU1Jb9wg206cleB3nue9AwUcjdensXbxM8iU27E9wYRUCJE6t-nKpJf1UULVAGAISsQNhEBci-j1BjIeU5kTzDbj4BqBTZtab9mz2VOQHtp50-BUg4NKK8_yLFcydTJYaV3GVeEnngBeDwZb-mvPpfHpt59wT7RMfCYB&c=AbZTZ4RimqWEJn_T6jNX2d6cHWkLzz5TFQFlVIwj6AOco-ZwvIFsvQ==&ch=urU9r2UpafwpQD21wG2nUhiyihUHjbNIWuVRokhHCvSQLU6xtULOMg==).

Thank you and God Bless.

For Our Prince William,

Yesli Vega
Prince William County Supervisor
Coles District Servant
---
| |
---

name: Josh Hawley
subject: this won’t take long
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:

**FIRST,** my leftist opponent launched a lie-filled campaign about me.
