Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=a461ea8c313ef185955b25cfeb64aee79e9192d0bfc4b7f18ac7c185dd7e6ee9a7509ddabb081136ea2355f3c05b118498857894054f47b2b956f76e293c2419

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72232942/434693880/1328194270?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20231025_FR_NewSpeaker_0_3MO_Bonnie_NA_NA_MikeJohnson&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTgzNDE1NS0xZjc0LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ft_pJdu3lSRyGFpWJkrywWKZGJQPf105pk4x4GsEp1Y=&emci=e25b4d81-6773-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=05834155-1f74-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=30096098) | Team, I won’t mince words:

The GOP’s choice for Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson, is a bigot and an extremist. He may be quiet, but don’t be fooled... his track record is one of enacting hate.
* He was a leader in the effort to steal the 2020 election.
* He expressed solidarity with the insurrectionists on January 6th.
* He’s a hardcore opponent of equality for LGBTQ+ Americans.
* He has championed a total abortion ban with no expectations of rape or incest.

name: Gottheimer HQ
subject: having Josh's back
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---

body:
Did you miss this? | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72233838/434697902/1420976906?refcode=ea.67b82d1d-2174-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.67b82d1d-2174-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2I4MmQxZC0yMTc0LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UFf7-F3yKKUs-cI2CY29vV42tqdOttMkUeN-jDDJUao=&emci=2e8a30ec-4673-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=67b82d1d-2174-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=37077096)

Hey! I'm forwarding this email from my team over the weekend because it addresses an important issue we can't ignore. The moment Donald Trump's handpicked justices overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , all hell broke loose. The GOP seized this opportunity to push extreme anti-choice laws at both the state and federal levels. **One of these anti-choice hardliners is my opponent, Anthony D'Esposito.** If we want to save reproductive rights, we must fight to flip the House blue with a pro-choice majority. That begins by defeating our anti-freedom Republican here in NY-04. **I want to know if you’re with me. So I have to ask this one simple question: Do you want to defeat anti-choice House Republicans in 2024?** | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72233839/434697905/2029510721?noskip=true&refcode=ea.67b82d1d-2174-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.67b82d1d-2174-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2I4MmQxZC0yMTc0LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UFf7-F3yKKUs-cI2CY29vV42tqdOttMkUeN-jDDJUao=) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72233840/434697906/2029510721?noskip=true&refcode=ea.67b82d1d-2174-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.67b82d1d-2174-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2I4MmQxZC0yMTc0LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UFf7-F3yKKUs-cI2CY29vV42tqdOttMkUeN-jDDJUao=)

clean_body: | | | | Your response is pending Peter, We’ve been fighting to get Congress back to work for weeks now. Today I have great news. Rep. Mike Johnson is the 56th Speaker of the House of Representatives! Now we can get back to work! But I need to know - what do you want us to focus on first? | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | National Polling** 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 == \-

Speaker Johnson is ready to lead House Republicans as we fight to hold the Extreme House Democrats accountable and expand our Majority in 2024!

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The decline of American Citizenship
body:
This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
My name is Kyle Murnen and I am the Director of Online Learning at Hillsdale College

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fdede60d10bd4a6795b87352291a683c&_e=0UfZgk9FIuWmBT3yl9K07qo7Ip0lYGD2ttLqAjuXukBEVJD9T5tzh_RsqCtINEIQmmeJp_R4-HDBiqRlWwwGtMm8xkQ0m6qihhL3tYsHgPLDiUieC0U6F61Df6AjczereKB4UW_A-c8VqQF01NhptbmLHuMMdqUGk9A7q89BMgUX51PoLv8N99fkNcnjKZxYVGzGpT_9h73ymXZYAslOyT9Fr6t0YVBBxE-01ORftLPjJjXL1FBk688hzpvbZJGMvpuJGwuXyHiu292gv5HkTvdXwUmRGQ160g9p-W2mlv4rlH64fpuSZB5Jy8WQW5hESPhlZGT80_gUTrjc-SlMX4RdSzpAqHfcmS49LRjIy_JG5jeg2rnHp13CAebJSgikKqTNiFwE8rTQcT6ap24rkXnmtQGDg6dcNLtrgUWhnH5u_9fF5hYHWSaEyxtYDuRu) Dear Friend,

My name is Kyle Murnen and I am the Director of Online Learning at Hillsdale College, where we offer free online courses to anyone who wishes to learn.

**One of our top-rated courses, "American Citizenship and Its Decline," is taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson and is based on his book _The Dying Citizen_.**

This course argues that at the heart of America's current crises are symptoms of a far larger problem that afflicts the West: the loss of freedom and political power of the citizen.

Dr. Hanson frames this problem by first explaining the history of citizenship in the West and by reminding us how rare it is in human history to have governments that are created and controlled by the people.

To maintain this type of government requires a robust and self-reliant middle class, clearly defined and enforced borders, national autonomy, and confidence in our way of life.

Yet today, the middle class is disappearing under enormous economic strains, the distinction between citizen and resident is being blurred by open borders, and pre-civilizational tribalism is dividing Americans into a variety of identity groups.

These problems are being aggravated by top-down pressures from an unelected bureaucratic class that uses judicial, executive, and legislative powers to overwhelm the citizen.

Finally, globalism poses a historic challenge to national sovereignty, as many of today's elites seek to replace American laws and independence with international bodies, often without the consent of our elected representatives or the people they serve.

The course, however, concludes on a hopeful note: Citizens still hold the key to revitalizing our traditions of empowered citizenship and regaining control over our government.

So, enroll today in this free course, "American Citizenship and Its Decline," with Victor Davis Hanson. You can embark on this journey with us to learn about these threats to our rights as citizens and how to combat them.

Click the secure link below to start today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/register/american-citizenship-and-its-decline](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fdede60d10bd4a6795b87352291a683c&_e=0UfZgk9FIuWmBT3yl9K07qo7Ip0lYGD2ttLqAjuXukBEVJD9T5tzh_RsqCtINEIQmmeJp_R4-HDBiqRlWwwGtMm8xkQ0m6qihhL3tYsHgPLDiUieC0U6F61Df6AjczereKB4UW_A-c8VqQF01NhptbmLHuMMdqUGk9A7q89BMgUX51PoLv8N99fkNcnjKZxYVGzGpT_9h73ymXZYAslOyT9Fr6t0YVBBxE-01ORftLPjJjXL1FBk688hzpvbZJGMvpuJGwuXyHiu292gv5HkTvdXwUmRGQ160g9p-W2mlv7a78RJ_KnpJhG_1g3_OhKUQvYRrko25H7Oj7EU3nUauB2NjgJAQ9-o1h0e7F4rDK-udV7u28QEK01SA1aZRP0ngFpTfTsqwTYO6oX0bVQpcaoilE451imGfECTveLaBUs4lEIbXaY5FbFXDVD6Wr4O)
**

Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College |

| Freedom Nation Today

clean_body: This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College My name is Kyle Murnen and I am the Director of Online Learning at Hillsdale College Dear Friend, My name is Kyle Murnen and I am the Director of Online Learning at Hillsdale College, where we offer free online courses to anyone who wishes to learn. One of our top-rated courses, "American Citizenship and Its Decline," is taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson and is based on his book The Dying Citizen. This course argues that at the heart of America's current crises are symptoms of a far larger problem that afflicts the West: the loss of freedom and political power of the citizen. Dr. Hanson frames this problem by first explaining the history of citizenship in the West and by reminding us how rare it is in human history to have governments that are created and controlled by the people. To maintain this type of government requires a robust and self-reliant middle class, clearly defined and enforced borders, national autonomy, and confidence in our way of life. Yet today, the middle class is disappearing under enormous economic strains, the distinction between citizen and resident is being blurred by open borders, and pre-civilizational tribalism is dividing Americans into a variety of identity groups. These problems are being aggravated by top-down pressures from an unelected bureaucratic class that uses judicial, executive, and legislative powers to overwhelm the citizen. Finally, globalism poses a historic challenge to national sovereignty, as many of today's elites seek to replace American laws and independence with international bodies, often without the consent of our elected representatives or the people they serve. The course, however, concludes on a hopeful note: Citizens still hold the key to revitalizing our traditions of empowered citizenship and regaining control over our government. So, enroll today in this free course, "American Citizenship and Its Decline," with Victor Davis Hanson. You can embark on this journey with us to learn about these threats to our rights as citizens and how to combat them. Click the secure link below to start today. Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

subject: Clarence Thomas must be held accountable for ethics violations (Sign the petition)
body:
| | | | |

# [Add your name: Clarence Thomas must be held accountable for ethics violations](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4e6e1df5-e733-4017-80b5-b4ca85515d09/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T442338f6-db95-4532-a86d-ae2a3e2efbe4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | There’s a new addition to the long list of Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas’ ethics violations: The Senate Finance Committee has discovered that Clarence Thomas had some or all of a $267,000 loan forgiven to purchase a luxury RV. A wealthy friend loaned Thomas the $267,000, which he did not include on his ethics disclosure forms, and “it is not known whether he [disclosed](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tac7fd188-c3d3-4430-96c4-405ebbf274fe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) the loan forgiveness to the IRS, as required by law because loan forgiveness is taxable income.” [The question is, what did the friend get in return?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb33d29db-1bb6-462f-9d8b-4a0452392755/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Clarence Thomas has been living a lavish lifestyle, bankrolled by billionaires and Republican megadonors for long enough. It’s time he’s finally held accountable for his actions, which raise profound ethical questions that make it clear he should no longer serve on the Supreme Court. We must raise our voices to send a message loud and clear that this is NOT okay. [Sign your name: Clarence Thomas must be held accountable for ethics violations! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0bfd4ef6-20ae-4330-b3d1-8f1485b174e0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

It is a tremendous honor to serve every day as the first openly gay, elected federal representative in Illinois state history. But it wasn’t that long ago, after my first job as a meteorologist in East Texas, that I experienced discrimination and was ultimately pushed out of my job for being gay. It’s critical for any community, especially those underrepresented in our decision-making, to have people they can point to, to feel seen and know anything is possible with hard work and determination. That’s just one of the many reasons why I hope you’ll support my friend Will Rollins for Congress.
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yHTN9NyGxuczWEFXrvaMPD717lkD4IX6mUrIjUGvsehgPHZgqn1vwcA4YD1ofiWmulVQcWP9ol_OZhNSMaZWIlnATk6w9wIgH6JzBDvbvP2nlHEil_G7ftqzUiIYjn1xQSKOnFmkJj52ebTbuMX6_cO1-6_uI1uJOQRUT4bTKBRM6Xy-tFaAKjcqaIC8cDFsWkh9iTb7VSGDcerz_5stcgRyFF0yMY0fFUP8zyZJO7ij893P41HZmGXsy4qBo8NNhMMoGevty24bn6g1QOZqr5Eelu0zSaGAcnAgrqaDHYdVbw8pb2tA9j8OConSTwBhMw-WwhSoSPTm-AfXGmKDhctAA8t4hMgM0ng_SJhBxIeg/40r/MjLtkVASRQOth6EkyUl1bQ/h3/orgrVdigEJn9G8MV2ABKX1c0nN0QOwiAK2A2rFcsq4M)
---
_Will (right) and his partner Paolo._
---
Few are so determined as my friend Will Rollins. Will narrowly lost his first race despite being heavily outspent, but since then the district has registered 3,000 more Democrats than Republicans, and Will has the path to victory down. Now, **that race is listed as a _toss up_** and a critical swing seat to determine control of the House next November. A win for Will is a win for getting stuff done in Congress, too. Will was the only Democratic challenger in California to win the majority of Independents in 2022. He will be committed to getting things passed with whoever is willing to keep our House in order. And it’s personal for the well-being of the entire district - which, despite being home to one of the largest LGBTQ+ communities in the country, has watched as their representative has voted to strike down over $3 million for projects providing services to LGBTQ+ community members. With two highly competitive races that could swing the House balance, I would really appreciate your support towards Will’s election and my re-election campaign. Will you please split a donation of $(ask) between me and Will Rollins today? Every dollar counts. [**With two highly competitive races that could swing the House balance, I would really appreciate your support towards Will’s election and my re-election campaign. Will you please split a donation of $5 between me and Will Rollins today? Every dollar counts.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yHTN9NyGxuczWEFXrvaMPD717lkD4IX6mUrIjUGvsehgPHZgqn1vwcA4YD1ofiWmulVQcWP9ol_OZhNSMaZWIlnATk6w9wIgH6JzBDvbvP2m8h0uw3DVP-poRH8EzZWBaplhF63fiFRmjM5c2qscygg1fZcSAcoqKHsNuJR7Cyosezf1LQV2zk4IC5XQCnZpw7Gqbpk7LB5IUvYTKfKLTQOOek_ckdH9ie-oQNg5qYafynh8pZM-5fS5sHioqAFDyZwSqf_xfKhv3HWdpgbfIjflqu4z4CYv30mjJ1f6YnbK_jG_LW35S0hTYVqmGpBSNwljix3Rl-LEKe93akZtYi8qz2wkdVQvEth2sYrpcDEg/40r/MjLtkVASRQOth6EkyUl1bQ/h4/j3cRUhPzdFVLPQnf9LroohwUL1Hr30IiTdWwzO6m7oo) Thank you for your support, Eric

Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. name: The Fairness Project Team
subject: Democracy needs you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
Help us get ready for some big fights in 2024 >> | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72235479/434702366/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2FiZjkzYS0yMjc0LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uFo4WLc1KTL6SXY_rfPXgbwAYKaRPHGBjtHrmedx-Ao=&emci=ad162aba-5873-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=53abf93a-2274-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) | Team, Two years ago, we embarked on our **Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign,** a $5 million initiative dedicated to safeguarding direct democracy and preserving the integrity of ballot initiatives. Sadly, extremist politicians and vested interests are steadily eroding voting rights across our nation. Their tactics have evolved from voter suppression and redistricting to now targeting the significant strides we've made with ballot measures. As we approach the pivotal year of 2024, we anticipate even more intensified attacks on the ballot measure process. | It’s official: Republicans elected a Speaker, Republican Mike Johnson. Despite weeks of chaos in the House, where Republicans failed to deliver any advances for the American people, wasting time and taxpayer money, they could not govern and agree on a speaker until their cult leader, Donald Trump, backed Mike Johnson. Republicans came close to putting democracy first when they elected Tom Emmer–who did vote to uphold the votes of the American people–as their speaker designate (for 4 hours). But then Trump called his foot soldiers off and told them to back Mike Johnson. And the rest is history. Not a single Republican voted against him. _**It’s clear the Republican Caucus is Donald Trump’s Caucus. They only listen to him and only elevate individuals who back his extreme agenda. **_ Mike Johnson’s Extreme MAGA credentials include:
* Leading the effort to overturn the 2020 election in the House
* Championing an abortion ban with _**no exceptions**_ for rape, incest, or life of the woman–criminalizing doctors and nurses for saving a young girl’s life
* Dehumanizing members of the LGBTQ community, and [even going so far as writing that homosexual conduct should be criminalized. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72235849/434703381/1966503779?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTYwMGFlMS0yMjc0LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f6cHCV4JeTxpnTYaiWu2oLIhRr8YJmCkrQdAZnlutoo=&emci=52600ae1-2274-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=5a600ae1-2274-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=750857)
* Abandoning our veterans by voting against the PACT Act, providing assistance for those exposed to burn pits
* Supporting massive cuts to Social Security and Medicare

Folks, I know it seems a ways off, but the 2024 election is right around the corner. We have to send a clear message that Donald Trump’s Republican Party has no home in West Michigan or the US House. clean_body: It’s clear the Republican Caucus is Donald Trump’s Caucus. They only listen to him and only elevate individuals who back his extreme agenda. | = | It’s official: Republicans elected a Speaker, Republican Mike Johnson. Despite weeks of chaos in the House, where Republicans failed to deliver any advances for the American people, wasting time and taxpayer money, they could not govern and agree on a speaker until their cult leader, Donald Trump, backed Mike Johnson. Republicans came close to putting democracy first when they elected Tom Emmer–who did vote to uphold the votes of the American people–as their speaker designate (for 4 hours). But then Trump called his foot soldiers off and told them to back Mike Johnson. And the rest is history. Not a single Republican voted against him. It’s clear the Republican Caucus is Donald Trump’s Caucus. They only listen to him and only elevate individuals who back his extreme agenda. Mike Johnson’s Extreme MAGA credentials include: Leading the effort to overturn the 2020 election in the House Championing an abortion ban with no exceptions for rape, incest, or life of the woman–criminalizing doctors and nurses for saving a young girl’s life Dehumanizing members of the LGBTQ community, and Abandoning our veterans by voting against the PACT Act, providing assistance for those exposed to burn pits Supporting massive cuts to Social Security and Medicare Folks, I know it seems a ways off, but the 2024 election is right around the corner. We have to send a clear message that Donald Trump’s Republican Party has no home in West Michigan or the US House. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for stepping up, Hillary | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49510 United States | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . Running for office, especially as a first-time candidate, can be daunting and expensive. Creating an efficient campaign infrastructure, developing a communications plan, and building out a fundraising network requires a _ton_ of resources and training. But if we don’t support more candidates with backgrounds that mirror everyday Tennesseans, we’ll continue to have a body of legislators who don’t look like us or know the struggles that working Tennesseans face each and every day.
The extreme, anti-democratic sentiment running through every level of the Republican Party shows us that it’s time to support candidates that energize voters who will take action and participate in our democracy.
**Peter — Running winning, grassroots, campaigns in every race is how we’ll bring power back to everyday Tennesseans. Can you pitch in $28.70 (our average online contribution!) right now to help us raise $20,000 before the month ends?**

clean_body: | = Ensuring that voters have strong Democratic candidates to vote for in every race is a pretty tall task, Peter. And it’s the job of the state party to make sure we’re equipping Democrats in every community with the tools they need to be effective legislators. Peter, I’m excited to finally share this with you: Today we’re launching our Run Tennessee Fund, which will support our six week candidate recruitment training this fall and next spring to ensure that every candidate, from the bottom to the top of the ticket, has what they need to run andWIN. If we can raise $20,000 before the end of the month, we can support 11 more candidates across the state. Can I personally count on you to make a founding contribution to our Run Tennessee Fund today? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Running for office, especially as a first-time candidate, can be daunting and expensive. Creating an efficient campaign infrastructure, developing a communications plan, and building out a fundraising network requires a ton of resources and training. But if we don’t support more candidates with backgrounds that mirror everyday Tennesseans, we’ll continue to have a body of legislators who don’t look like us or know the struggles that working Tennesseans face each and every day. The extreme, anti-democratic sentiment running through every level of the Republican Party shows us that it’s time to support candidates that energize voters who will take action and participate in our democracy. Peter — Running winning, grassroots, campaigns in every race is how we’ll bring power back to everyday Tennesseans. Can you pitch in $28.70 (our average online contribution!) right now to help us raise $20,000 before the month ends? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = I truly appreciate your support, Peter. Hendrell Remus Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party Tennessee Democratic Party 319 Plus Park Blvd Nashville, TN 37217 United States | mailto:info@tndp.org | CAROL V. ABNEY, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.

| Fellow activist, it’s almost Election Day. Do you know what that means?

**We are officially KICKING OFF the New Pennsylvania Project’s Get Out to Vote (GOTV) program!**

[**There are only 12 days until Election Day. Will you help us Get Out The Vote by rushing $5 or more today? →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72236112/434704159/-708856094?refcode=EM_F_231026GOTV_N_NP_90DO_8_G_TestA_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI3MDIwZDMxLTIzNzQtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=szMXc8UYrp1wEqvMeQv9DOmo8SsxK3M0g1KOqwSYNvA=)

Our team will be out in all of our seven focused regions across PA over the next 12 days, ensuring folks have what they need to make their voices heard.

📍Allegheny
📍Capital Region
📍Lancaster/Berks
📍Delaware/Chester
📍Montgomery/Bucks
📍Poconos/Lehigh Valley
📍Philly

Yesterday, our team went through extensive training to reach voters and help ensure they VOTE in the critical election on November 7! Why? Because this GOTV program is more than just telling voters when, where, and how to cast their ballot; it’s also explaining what is at stake in this election: **_protecting our democracy. After the training, we officially launched our GOTV program by knocking on more than 1,200 doors in one day!_** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72236117/434704164/-708856094?refcode=EM_F_231026GOTV_N_NP_90DO_8_G_TestA_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI3MDIwZDMxLTIzNzQtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=szMXc8UYrp1wEqvMeQv9DOmo8SsxK3M0g1KOqwSYNvA=) From now until Election Day, we will be hitting the streets to Get Out The Vote, but we cannot do this alone.

clean_body: It’s almost Election Day. Do you know what that means? = | Fellow activist, it’s almost Election Day. Do you know what that means? We are officially KICKING OFF the New Pennsylvania Project’s Get Out to Vote (GOTV) program! = Our team will be out in all of our seven focused regions across PA over the next 12 days, ensuring folks have what they need to make their voices heard. 📍Allegheny 📍Capital Region 📍Lancaster/Berks 📍Delaware/Chester 📍Montgomery/Bucks 📍Poconos/Lehigh Valley 📍Philly Yesterday, our team went through extensive training to reach voters and help ensure they VOTE in the critical election on November 7! Why? Because this GOTV program is more than just telling voters when, where, and how to cast their ballot; it’s also explaining what is at stake in this election: protecting our democracy. After the training, we officially launched our GOTV program by knocking on more than 1,200 doors in one day! = From now until Election Day, we will be hitting the streets to Get Out The Vote, but we cannot do this alone. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = Let’s go, Team NPP | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to : October 23, 2023 Last day to : October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Min=20For=20Congress?=
subject: Plumbers & Steamfitters Endorse Dave Min
body:
Sen. Min Wins The Support of UA Local 582 | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/97799ec03364/plumbers-steamfitters-endorse-dave-min-15664336?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:** October 26, 2023
**Contact:**[press@davemin.com](mailto:press@davemin.com) **Plumbers & Steamfitters Endorse Dave Min**
_Sen. Min Wins The Support of UA Local 582_ **IRVINE, CA —** Today, the United Association Local 582 announced their endorsement of Dave Min for US Congress in California’s 47th Congressional District. The announcement follows the Orange County Labor Federation’s recommendation of Dave Min for endorsement by the state federation. UA Plumbers & Steamfitters lu 582 joins CWA lu 9510 in endorsing Sen. Min for Congress this week. Min has also built a political coalition including statewide labor organizations–the Service Employees International Union and the California Federation of Teachers–as well as an impressive cohort of locals and councils, including Teamsters Joint Council 42, IBEW locals 47 and 441, LAPPL, and IUPAT District Council 36, in endorsing California State Senator Dave Min. With unanimous support from Orange County organized labor, Sen. Min has emerged as working families’ choice for CA-47.

**“Sen. Min is a great candidate,” said Robert James, Business Manager at UA Local 582. “He has the qualities and demeanor to represent the district in Congress. We fully endorse his candidacy in this upcoming election.”**

UA Plumbers & Steamfitters lu 582 represents over 1000 plumbers, steamfitters and welders including journeymen, apprentices and retirees. Founded in 1937, Local 582 has been an integral pathway to the middle class for generations of Orange County residents, and is notably **the only UA local in Orange County**. Their membership is composed of workers at Disneyland, UC Irvine, the Children’s Hospital of Orange County, the Robert B. Diemer Water Treatment Plant, John Wayne Airport, Angel’s Stadium, and countless other Orange County landmarks.

After impressive fundraising hauls in the first three quarters of this year, Dave Min continues to set the pace for Katie Porter’s open Congressional seat by adding to his political coalition. Min has consolidated support from local, state, and national endorsers, and entered the race with support from current CA-47 Representative, Katie Porter. In recent months, Min has announced the endorsements of California Lieutenant Governor Eleni Kounalakis, Attorney General Rob Bonta, State Treasurer Fiona Ma, Insurance Commissioner Ricard Lara, Superintendent of Public Schools Tony Thurmond, the Congressional Asian Pacific American Caucus’s political leadership ASPIRE PAC, more than 60 local Orange County government officials, and more than 60 state legislators. A full endorsement list is available[ here](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=4223d6d91b&e=7017cc100e).
_###

California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15%. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country._
---

PO Box 5959, Irvine, CA 92616
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Russ=20Vought?=
subject: Speaker Mike Johnson? It was worth it.
body:
If you recall, a few short weeks ago 8 brave Republican members of Congress said enough is enough and voted to oust Kevin McCarthy as Speaker.. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/citizensrenewingamerica.com/were-on-the-offensive-10396743?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | |
#
Friends,

I’ll be brief. I’m excited for Mike Johnson as Speaker of the House.

As I said on [Twitter](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=fa7df04c20&e=17913c7d6d), when I was the director of the Office of Management and Budget for President Trump, we sent budget cuts to Congress and Mike was one of the main leaders who wanted to pass them.
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=6f6e4fba90&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| If you recall, a few short weeks ago 8 brave Republican members of Congress said enough is enough and voted to oust Kevin McCarthy as Speaker for one too many broken promises.

**What followed was right from the playbook of the D.C. cartel. **

Obnoxious, angry, and entitled voices of the establishment complaining about “chaos” in Congress and Rep. Matt Gaetz and others having “no plans” to replace McCarthy. Media pundits with doomsday predictions about an indefinite vacant Speakership.

You hear these same voices **every time conservatives take a stand and fight** for change. But at the end of the day, _it was all just noise_.

The process worked. Today we have a Speaker of the House who comes from the conservative movement and can help bring real change to the House!

**In short, it was worth it. **
---
| Thanks for your [continued support](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=dbe96fc19e&e=17913c7d6d),

Russ Vought
President, Citizens for Renewing America

| | |
---

Folks, Earlier this week, a reporter tried to ask Speaker Mike Johnson a simple question about his role trying to overturn the 2020 election: _**“You help lead the effort to overturn the 2020 election results, do you—”**_ But before the reporter could even finish her question, the House Republican conference stopped the reporter in her tracks: They booed her. They laughed at her. They told her to shut up. And they moved onto the next question. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72237246/434707757/-248329306?refcode=em-10.26.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDM0Mzc2Yy0yNTc0LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AP3dsQ-3qYDcD-td4jKmWtaoyI_GNBfNzI1eAO6vshE=) Folks, there’s nothing funny about trying to overturn a free and fair election. And we can’t just move on from these unprecedented attacks on our democracy. But 219 Republicans just handed Rep. Mike Johnson the Speaker’s gavel and gave him FULL control of the GOP conference. _**The House GOP has officially been hijacked by the worst of the election-denying MAGA caucus.**_ Come election day, Rep. Johnson could be holding the Speaker’s gavel when the House is certifying the election results - and use it to challenge election results that don’t look good for Donald Trump. name: Brandon Presley
subject: This is how we stick it to Tate Reeves.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign
body:
It’s worth the read. I promise. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72237377/434708097/17860314?refcode=ea.db2f4d4e-2574-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.db2f4d4e-2574-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGIyZjRkNGUtMjU3NC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Vp2stb4yMywR0X65hCUCWoqM7UZOwileFaGsGZtpR8Q=)

Look, Peter.

As you know, I’m a Public Service Commissioner, former Mayor, and a proud Mississippian running to replace Tate Reeves as Mississippi’s next governor. He's tied for most unpopular governor in the nation, plus he's neck-deep in the biggest corruption scandal in state history.

Simply put, Tate Reeves has got to go — but first, I need your help.

We’re three days from our make-or-break fundraising deadline. **It's also our last major public filing deadline before the election.** And with 12 days left until Election Day, we can’t afford to mess up.

[I know we can defeat Tate and his good-for-nothing band of cronies, but we don’t stand a fighting chance without our grassroots supporters. Can I count on you to chip in toward our $130,000 online GOTV goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72237378/434708098/-935144756?refcode=ea.db2f4d4e-2574-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.db2f4d4e-2574-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGIyZjRkNGUtMjU3NC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Vp2stb4yMywR0X65hCUCWoqM7UZOwileFaGsGZtpR8Q=)

I’ll say it again: We’re not just up against a politician who, for years, put his bottom line before our state and the good folks who call it home. We’re also up against his rich and powerful special interests buddies who fuel his campaign war chest.

I know we can beat them with the power of the people in our corner.

See, our campaign plan is already working. Recent polling shows us in a DEAD HEAT. Not to mention, the experts at Cook Political Report recently swung this race closer to our favor. But we can’t afford to slow down — not with less than two weeks until the election.

I just know we can crush our critical fundraising goal with you in my corner, Peter! If you could chip in right now, we'll stay on track to reach it. And if we reach it and close out October strong, we'll have enough firepower to bring real change to Mississippi.

[So that's why this deadline is important. Can I count on you to chip in (any amount) to replace Tate Reeves and move Mississippi forward?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72237379/434708099/-935144756?refcode=ea.db2f4d4e-2574-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.db2f4d4e-2574-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGIyZjRkNGUtMjU3NC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Vp2stb4yMywR0X65hCUCWoqM7UZOwileFaGsGZtpR8Q=) | **[Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72237380/434708100/-935144756?amount=5&refcode=ea.db2f4d4e-2574-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.db2f4d4e-2574-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGIyZjRkNGUtMjU3NC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Vp2stb4yMywR0X65hCUCWoqM7UZOwileFaGsGZtpR8Q=)** | **[Donate $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72237381/434708101/-935144756?amount=10&refcode=ea.db2f4d4e-2574-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.db2f4d4e-2574-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGIyZjRkNGUtMjU3NC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Vp2stb4yMywR0X65hCUCWoqM7UZOwileFaGsGZtpR8Q=)** | **[Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72237382/434708102/-935144756?amount=25&refcode=ea.db2f4d4e-2574-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.db2f4d4e-2574-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGIyZjRkNGUtMjU3NC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Vp2stb4yMywR0X65hCUCWoqM7UZOwileFaGsGZtpR8Q=)**

clean_body: It’s worth the read. I promise. | = Look, Peter. As you know, I’m a Public Service Commissioner, former Mayor, and a proud Mississippian running to replace Tate Reeves as Mississippi’s next governor. He's tied for most unpopular governor in the nation, plus he's neck-deep in the biggest corruption scandal in state history. Simply put, Tate Reeves has got to go — but first, I need your help. We’re three days from our make-or-break fundraising deadline. It's also our last major public filing deadline before the election. And with 12 days left until Election Day, we can’t afford to mess up. = I’ll say it again: We’re not just up against a politician who, for years, put his bottom line before our state and the good folks who call it home. We’re also up against his rich and powerful special interests buddies who fuel his campaign war chest. I know we can beat them with the power of the people in our corner. See, our campaign plan is already working. Recent polling shows us in a DEAD HEAT. Not to mention, the experts at Cook Political Report recently swung this race closer to our favor. But we can’t afford to slow down — not with less than two weeks until the election. I just know we can crush our critical fundraising goal with you in my corner, Peter! If you could chip in right now, we'll stay on track to reach it. And if we reach it and close out October strong, we'll have enough firepower to bring real change to Mississippi. = | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = I can’t thank you enough, Brandon Presley = | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. | Peter, The November 7th election is now less than two weeks away. This Virginia election will serve as a national indicator of the political environment going into 2024. Next year’s election will bring huge threats to our country — as anti-democracy and anti-choice extremists vie for the highest offices in our country. Every seat in the Virginia General Assembly is on the ballot. Virginians have the opportunity to send a clear message: we are focused on getting things done, keeping our communities safe, growing our economy, defending reproductive rights, and protecting our democracy. To support candidates running across our Commonwealth, I launched a leadership PAC. Your support for these candidates is crucial, and I hope you'll join us! clean_body: Next year’s election will bring huge threats to our country — as anti-democracy and anti-choice extremists vie for the highest offices in our country. | = | Peter, The November 7th election is now less than two weeks away. This Virginia election will serve as a national indicator of the political environment going into 2024. Next year’s election will bring huge threats to our country — as anti-democracy and anti-choice extremists vie for the highest offices in our country. Every seat in the Virginia General Assembly is on the ballot. Virginians have the opportunity to send a clear message: we are focused on getting things done, keeping our communities safe, growing our economy, defending reproductive rights, and protecting our democracy. To support candidates running across our Commonwealth, I launched a leadership PAC. Your support for these candidates is crucial, and I hope you'll join us! = | = | = | = | = | = We need to raise $25,000 before our end-of-month deadline to get candidates across the Commonwealth the resources they need to win. = | = Thank you for your support, Abigail * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. Box 3112 Fredericksburg , VA 22402 United States | | | ---|---|--- Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. subject: Uniting with IBEW: A Stronger Future for Maryland’s Workers.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Maryland
body:
|

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72237971/434709822/-112638016?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWE1ZTViMi0yNjc0LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8mnQkaYChje25LKoAiQCtS9zXyqP4Ol8xILNSoNGRFM=&emci=24f9d2e3-1f74-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=65a5e5b2-2674-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=25681160) Peter,

I'm thrilled to share **two new critical endorsements** for our U.S. Senate campaign – the **International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers (IBEW) Local 307 and Local 24 are all in for Team Trone.** The hardworking women and men of IBEW are the backbone of our nation's electrical and utilities sectors. Their dedication to their craft and persistent pursuit of excellence is an inspiration to us all and **mirrors our vision for a prosperous future for all.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72237972/434709823/-112638016?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWE1ZTViMi0yNjc0LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8mnQkaYChje25LKoAiQCtS9zXyqP4Ol8xILNSoNGRFM=&emci=24f9d2e3-1f74-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=65a5e5b2-2674-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=25681160) **I’ve always been Pro-Union and Pro-Labor.** In my three terms in Congress, I’ve had a 100% Pro-Labor rating and have worked closely with our unions across Maryland. From crafting progressive policy to joining them on the picket line, I’ve made the workers of Maryland one of my highest priorities.

With the backing of IBEW 307 and IBEW 24, we are energized to champion the interests of our skilled labor force in the Senate, investing in infrastructure and promoting fair workplaces.

**I'm deeply grateful for the trust these Local Units have placed in our mission.** Together, we're poised to make a significant impact for Maryland and our nation.

**[See the full list of over 110 endorsements on our website.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72237974/434709825/-112638016?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWE1ZTViMi0yNjc0LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8mnQkaYChje25LKoAiQCtS9zXyqP4Ol8xILNSoNGRFM=&emci=24f9d2e3-1f74-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=65a5e5b2-2674-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=25681160)**

Thank you for your continued support.

— David Trone
Candidate for U.S. Senate
Mitch McConnell's super PAC is preparing to spend hundreds of millions to flip the Senate in 2024, and we need to be ready to fight back with everything we've got.

**David Trone knows that the path to holding our Democratic Senate majority runs right through Maryland – that's why he needs our support.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72237975/434709826/1619840349?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWE1ZTViMi0yNjc0LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8mnQkaYChje25LKoAiQCtS9zXyqP4Ol8xILNSoNGRFM=&emci=24f9d2e3-1f74-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=65a5e5b2-2674-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=25681160) | [Sign up to volunteer >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72237976/434709827/-1171722684?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWE1ZTViMi0yNjc0LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8mnQkaYChje25LKoAiQCtS9zXyqP4Ol8xILNSoNGRFM=&emci=24f9d2e3-1f74-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=65a5e5b2-2674-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=25681160)

Peter,

This week the House chose a real America First conservative as its Speaker and the Left is outraged.

We’re already seeing an unprecedented wave of lies and vicious attack ads aimed at tearing down Speaker Johnson before he can even begin doing the work of the American people.

I’m asking you to join me in being one of the first people to extend our Congratulations to Republican Speaker Mike Johnson in a show of support and solidarity against the Left’s coordinated deception campaign.

[**CONGRATULATIONS SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON

-> -> SIGN MY NAME <- <-**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=3dddff0d222045ebbba5e49a072fc96c&_e=pcVLMMSNawzZ9YpjmmcjGlgQc_cZ5KWeNOY4T4LRLUG2jVVlo2t3o6xl-iSRSssQ7bij8jU3vPtTMMMKScG8hPbqvWI9R1G2rUtdwHCnrTxTYzTAaFhSlOlWE9W6bqxkb7liUbFjdukjNWKw9JDgr3Mtns7CeaDCADpspdZD-UkCWpgMu89tbRV9GR9jSWJxdJgaSlvB-b7RcklY958q7V9-FITaQweWEt9P-sLRcYqRXku_slLOiPvD3NBX_v4iZ88a6xwteoGnWRiE7HNyuDhEQxQ1DbagvyPHep7yO2bf-XEP4yooGmXIbVWAiJrWPqLO6_tdyRawONi34uUiG5yd6ZCKwwc-fVq0zD0k2oDqo3g_v3LmB_9zM7i9oTwk4zV38gIomRf3W-ysR-HhNSBUp-HcMMWg3KIIqf-n31AFES6ggsGcoikPXRI6tYVU6W4CBa7OTvw_GjDQg1HUa_mS7Ly2-qTLBt0VXAF_ABvYpgpLgemclx_oushW3SgTY9UQFiJMd5FaRUOy-JIlRE9G_r-LOJUb3g2KiYR0F8NaEGNyZPxw1laWrWTcSYpw)
We need to make it clear to the mainstream media and every Democrat that the American people are 100% behind our Republican Speaker as he holds the Democrats accountable for their failed agenda.

The number of Americans who rally behind Speaker Johnson in the next 48 hours will send a message that the Democrats’ unhinged smear campaign will only backfire.

[**Will you be one of the first Americans to extend your support Speaker Mike Johnson?**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=3dddff0d222045ebbba5e49a072fc96c&_e=pcVLMMSNawzZ9YpjmmcjGlgQc_cZ5KWeNOY4T4LRLUG2jVVlo2t3o6xl-iSRSssQ7bij8jU3vPtTMMMKScG8hPbqvWI9R1G2rUtdwHCnrTxTYzTAaFhSlOlWE9W6bqxkb7liUbFjdukjNWKw9JDgr3Mtns7CeaDCADpspdZD-UkCWpgMu89tbRV9GR9jSWJxdJgaSlvB-b7RcklY958q7V9-FITaQweWEt9P-sLRcYqRXku_slLOiPvD3NBX_v4iZ88a6xwteoGnWRiE7HNyuDhEQxQ1DbagvyPHep7yO2bf-XEP4yooGmXIbVWAiJrWPqLO6_tdyRawONi34uUiG5yd6ZCKwwc-fVq0zD0k2oDqo3g_v3LmB_9zM7i9oTwk4zV38gIomRf3W-ysR-HhNSBUp-HcMMWg3KIIqf-n31BsWI4Moft1brGQJiIo9NDXIS75zeP3LgYPqluPaBKoKG_YtCNbwyhzMxMyXICdhYzmRfpgjMltsSuvparrU3NFNeCLAN1fy9dBWbRSAs9ZEX8wSHmslweCyQveW0CJSyDUOeaRv9ulKxs4AnrTr0Ny)

MEET RYAN

* * *
_When it comes to fighting for American freedoms and helping others, Ryan Mackenzie has had some great teachers.

A 9th generation resident of the Lehigh Valley, Ryan's first ancestor to settle in our area fought in the Northampton County Militia during the Revolutionary War. In more recent generations, his family members helped build companies like Hercules Cement, served our country in both World Wars, and served our community here at home in professions like nursing and teaching.

It's that spirit of service that inspired Ryan to fight back against the Far Left here in Pennsylvania. Ryan faced an all-out assault by the abortion industry in his first race, and he beat them back. Rush Limbaugh said of Ryan: "Planned Parenthood took it on the chin ... Mackenzie won by an 18-point margin."

In Pennsylvania's state capitol, Ryan is known by conservatives and feared by the establishment as one of the most effective and proven reformers in government. Ryan didn't just talk – he got our values enacted into law._

We’re already seeing an unprecedented wave of lies and vicious attack ads aimed at tearing down Speaker Johnson before he can even begin doing the work of the American people. We need to make it clear to the mainstream media and every Democrat that the American people are 100% behind our Republican Speaker as he holds the Democrats accountable for their failed agenda. name: Conservatives Give
subject: The decline of American Citizenship
body:
This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
My name is Kyle Murnen and I am the Director of Online Learning at Hillsdale College

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2fd6750542e547b68ec572d544d5eb07&_e=ByNCNG0GV0fwb5iAtltwuHX8ZvWaUPHe1CeyqrqYIEU8DGB8RDiuRCgwUS9F0_imifscB_dB2sFtf1Dkc2ZAOF11uH0EG_uq-tjfQK-SQiIIQiDepgc35r9dc7lQDCQlLnv3F1tNcA5JrxQyGX-0U7f08Zw9AZTwdQCRnFaEBIi3LWLo1qvAuifS-LDxbe2XMtp5uItszDOgXI5kxTJ9GO0ccgywnSCBPrHIXILvzgedcyGAuHWjdYwpXR9X0KDRSHFr0JZvQ7YQUFkL5UudSv6vOWlnxzlAXSvbOxY2hwbiyWGV5AY6tjAtuw-qQRyvZ1Jl4vYpNGdaIBbQd084Qjyuh0emFTr0ykHqmcKxznoMYI-tsE33BoZ0yBfCywDUA_ST_VRqN6rDQ7gWJa4mz5a_W5HbzbTFr0CoRrc0y9Bw_s9OZTJvlBaWmV9OwDzG) Dear Friend,

My name is Kyle Murnen and I am the Director of Online Learning at Hillsdale College, where we offer free online courses to anyone who wishes to learn.

**One of our top-rated courses, "American Citizenship and Its Decline," is taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson and is based on his book _The Dying Citizen_.**

This course argues that at the heart of America's current crises are symptoms of a far larger problem that afflicts the West: the loss of freedom and political power of the citizen.

Dr. Hanson frames this problem by first explaining the history of citizenship in the West and by reminding us how rare it is in human history to have governments that are created and controlled by the people.

To maintain this type of government requires a robust and self-reliant middle class, clearly defined and enforced borders, national autonomy, and confidence in our way of life.

Yet today, the middle class is disappearing under enormous economic strains, the distinction between citizen and resident is being blurred by open borders, and pre-civilizational tribalism is dividing Americans into a variety of identity groups.

These problems are being aggravated by top-down pressures from an unelected bureaucratic class that uses judicial, executive, and legislative powers to overwhelm the citizen.

Finally, globalism poses a historic challenge to national sovereignty, as many of today's elites seek to replace American laws and independence with international bodies, often without the consent of our elected representatives or the people they serve.

The course, however, concludes on a hopeful note: Citizens still hold the key to revitalizing our traditions of empowered citizenship and regaining control over our government.

So, enroll today in this free course, "American Citizenship and Its Decline," with Victor Davis Hanson. You can embark on this journey with us to learn about these threats to our rights as citizens and how to combat them.

Click the secure link below to start today.

clean_body: This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College My name is Kyle Murnen and I am the Director of Online Learning at Hillsdale College Dear Friend, My name is Kyle Murnen and I am the Director of Online Learning at Hillsdale College, where we offer free online courses to anyone who wishes to learn. One of our top-rated courses, "American Citizenship and Its Decline," is taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson and is based on his book The Dying Citizen. This course argues that at the heart of America's current crises are symptoms of a far larger problem that afflicts the West: the loss of freedom and political power of the citizen. Dr. Hanson frames this problem by first explaining the history of citizenship in the West and by reminding us how rare it is in human history to have governments that are created and controlled by the people. To maintain this type of government requires a robust and self-reliant middle class, clearly defined and enforced borders, national autonomy, and confidence in our way of life. Yet today, the middle class is disappearing under enormous economic strains, the distinction between citizen and resident is being blurred by open borders, and pre-civilizational tribalism is dividing Americans into a variety of identity groups. These problems are being aggravated by top-down pressures from an unelected bureaucratic class that uses judicial, executive, and legislative powers to overwhelm the citizen. Finally, globalism poses a historic challenge to national sovereignty, as many of today's elites seek to replace American laws and independence with international bodies, often without the consent of our elected representatives or the people they serve. The course, however, concludes on a hopeful note: Citizens still hold the key to revitalizing our traditions of empowered citizenship and regaining control over our government. So, enroll today in this free course, "American Citizenship and Its Decline," with Victor Davis Hanson. You can embark on this journey with us to learn about these threats to our rights as citizens and how to combat them. Click the secure link below to start today. Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

After three weeks, four nominees, and five votes, Republicans have finally elected Rep. Mike Johnson as Speaker of the House.
There’s no point in sugarcoating it: Mike Johnson is a MAGA Republican whose views are bad for working families, our economy, and our fundamental rights.

body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Hey folks,
I hate to reach out again, but this couldn’t wait.
Republicans are already attacking me on TV—a full six months earlier than the last election. That means we need even more resources at this moment to respond.
We’re proudly funded by tens of thousands of grassroots supporters chipping in a few bucks when they can. We immediately put these dollars to work mobilizing supporters, registering Montanans to vote, and fighting back against Mitch McConnell’s misleading attacks. If we want to keep pace in this ultra-competitive race, we have to catch up now.
Asking for money is my least favorite part of the job, just ask my team. But I know it’s essential to winning this race and continuing to work on the issues that really matter. So I hope you’ll bear with me when I ask:
Can you chip in any amount that feels right to you today to help us hit our goal? Your donation will be split between my campaign and Seth Moulton. It truly does make a difference in a people-powered campaign like ours. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Thanks so much. I’ll let you get back to enjoying your day.
Jon

name: Amelia Johnson
subject: An Update from URD
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/105722/images/logo%20gradient.png]
Dear Peter,

It’s Amelia, the Executive Director of United Rural Democrats.

We’re only 12 days away from critical elections that will decide the fate of reproductive rights in huge portions of rural America – like Ohio and Virginia, where abortion rights are quite literally on the ballot.

Before Election Day on November 7, we have one final end-of-month fundraising goal. And, as of my writing this, we are still $7,289 short of that goal.

Without making up that $7,289 fundraising gap, we may not have the resources we need to carry this election over the finish line. In both Ohio and Virginia, key GOTV efforts will make the difference between a far-right ban on reproductive rights – and we can’t afford to not be able to contribute to these essential efforts.

So, that’s why I’m personally writing to you today. I need your help.

Will you chip in (whatever you can) to help us raise another $7,289 before our deadline on October 31? We need every dollar we can get, and your support is going to be essential. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/urdemail]

Thank you for everything,

Amelia Johnson
Executive Director
United Rural Democrats
United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?

| Dear Friend: **💥 ENDORSEMENT 💥** **I am honored to announce that our campaign has officially been endorsed by Feel the Bern Democratic Club, Los Angeles and Our Revolution, Los Angeles!**

Both Feel the Bern Democratic Club and Our Revolution are America’s leading grassroots-funded progressive organizing groups, seeking to inspire members of the Los Angeles community to fight for change from the bottom-up. These organizations empower leaders like me who champion the progressive values that I hold dear, such as racial and social equality, environmental justice, economic equality, prioritizing people over profits, keeping money out of politics, and healthcare and education as a human right. The support of both of these remarkable organizations serves as a testament to my unwavering commitment to fulfilling the promises I make during my campaign. As every public servant should be, I am dedicated to being accountable to the people I represent.

Our grassroots campaign is more than just an election—it's a movement for change, powered by the people, for the people. By signing up to volunteer today, you are not just giving your time—you're putting in the work to invest in the future of our community. Together, we can shape a brighter tomorrow for everyone!

name: VoteVets HQ
subject: Mike Johnson — MAGA Extremist, Speaker of the House
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
This is an all hands on deck moment. With MAGA Mike leading the House GOP, there is no telling what comes next.
#
Derek,
Yesterday, the House GOP confirmed Mike Johnson as Speaker of the House.
Make no mistake: He is a MAGA extremist. One of the worst of the worst.
**[We need you to chip in right away to support VoteVets as we work to flip the House and elect progressive Veterans and National Security professionals to Congress.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-oct23.zemByr&refcode=em231026-1-30&t=1&akid=17871%2E3013755%2EROt4dG)
| [CHIP IN $5](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-oct23.zemByr&refcode=em231026-1-30&t=2&akid=17871%2E3013755%2EROt4dG)
---
But if you need to hear more before you make a donation, read on.
Not only is Mike Johnson an election denier — he was the architect of the legal effort aimed at throwing out millions of votes for President Biden.
Not only is he opposed to marriage equality, stripping millions (including countless Veterans and Active Duty!) of rights as basic as being able to marry the person that they love — he supports a TOTAL ban on abortion.
And not only did he vote against the PACT Act, legislation that will provide treatment for millions of Veterans exposed to toxic burn pits — he voted for a 22% cut to the VA.
This man is two heart beats from the presidency. Think about that for a minute.
We don’t agree with Matt Gaetz on just about anything, but we do agree with him on this comment he made to Steve Bannon:
_"If you don't think that moving from Kevin McCarthy to MAGA Mike Johnson shows the ascendance of this movement and where the power in the Republican Party truly lies, then you're not paying attention."_
This is an all hands on deck moment. With “MAGA Mike” leading the House GOP, there is no telling what comes next. There has never been a more important time to support VoteVets and our mission to elect Veterans, flip swing seats, and take back the House.
**[Please, make a $5 donation to VoteVets today.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-oct23.zemByr&refcode=em231026-1-30&t=3&akid=17871%2E3013755%2EROt4dG)
| [CHIP IN $5](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-oct23.zemByr&refcode=em231026-1-30&t=4&akid=17871%2E3013755%2EROt4dG)
---
We’ve got to be ready, Derek. Thank you in advance for your donation.
The team at VoteVets

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: Position on war in Israel & Gaza
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
I have also issued a statement on the Maine tragedy that can be read here. [https://www.facebook.com/drboblorinser/posts/pfbid02pDuSgxvpFwY24rQSnXiAf6wGV6W8PewC66LGwj3VqEzqMutZd9PnG2JQpdU7sAWdl]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
drbob.me/aboutbob [drbob.me/aboutbob]
Bob Lorinser
IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Thurs. Oct. 26, 2023
Lorinser appeals for humanitarian pause in Israeli/Hamas war
Deeply concerned about the escalating violence in Israel and Gaza, I stand with many Americans urging for a humanitarian pause in the region.
The humanitarian pause should include the release of all Israeli civilian prisoners and hostages, continuing efforts to eradicate Hamas while protecting the innocent and protecting Israel's right to defend itself.
A pause offers an opportunity for diplomacy to take center stage, for dialogue to replace gunfire, and for peace talks to drown out the sounds of a devastating war.
This call for peace is a sincere plea to consider the innocent lives caught in the crossfire. However, it does not provide a comprehensive solution to the region's long-term problems, which has eluded the world for generations.
The conflict in Israel and Palestine is not a recent development. Its historical, political, and religious dynamics have spanned over a century. The tension stemming from disagreements over land rights and national identities has escalated into a volatile geopolitical standoff.
As we observe the escalating violence in Israel and Gaza from a distance, let us not forget our shared humanity. Let our empathy extend beyond borders as we collectively use our voices to advocate for peace rather than further escalation.
Innocent civilians caught in the crossfire deserve a chance at life, refuge, and peace.
# # #
Dr. Bob Lorinser is a former diplomat for the US State Department's Foreign Service, with experience in diplomatic roles in North Africa, Iraq, Afghanistan, and Pakistan.
LEARN MORE [drbob.me/aboutbob]
actblue.com/donate/about-bob [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: Emailing for $8
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Apologies for being so direct, but we need to maintain a steady pace of support.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=751%2E135344%2EGjA_ut)

Hey there -- we're writing to ask you to make an $8 donation today to support Elissa Slotkin’s campaign for Senate in Michigan.
Why $8? Because that’s the cost of a 6-pack of Michigan’s famous Vernors Ginger Ale -- one of the most quintessential Michigan staples known to all residents of our great state. We drink it at barbecues, at the game, and when our kids have a stomach ache.
The truth is that as strange as it sounds, these small dollar donations really do matter. It takes a village to elect a leader like Elissa to the Senate, and it’s so important that we maintain a steady pace of support.
Last month, we had our first serious Republican opponent, Mike Rogers, enter the race. His latest FEC report was filled with donations from a bunch of members of Betsy DeVos's family -- contributions totaling $46,200 all made on one single day. And there are plenty of other deep-pocketed Republican donors who are backing his campaign because they know that their path to control the Senate runs right through Michigan.
With public polling showing our race in a dead heat, we have to be prepared to match our Republican opponent dollar-for-dollar so we can defend this open seat and protect our slim Democratic Senate majority.
We know that $8 may not sound like a lot on its own. But trust us that we wouldn’t keep asking if it didn’t add up when there are hundreds of people chipping in and showing their support. It’s how we’ve won our past campaigns and it’s how we plan to keep up the momentum to win this race too.
[**If you are able, will you make an $8 contribution to our campaign for Senate today? It’s not as much about how much you give, but how many people are coming together to show their support for Elissa and this campaign.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-oct23.ttRNnI&refcode=em231026-1-30&t=2&akid=751%2E135344%2EGjA_ut)**
**[CONTRIBUTE $8](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1405?c0=ebs-em-oct23.6VSP2p&refcode=em231026-1-30&t=3&akid=751%2E135344%2EGjA_ut)**
Thank you,
Team Slotkin

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=751%2E135344%2EGjA_ut).

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.
clean_body: Apologies for being so direct, but we need to maintain a steady pace of support. Hey there -- we're writing to ask you to make an $8 donation today to support Elissa Slotkin’s campaign for Senate in Michigan. Why $8? Because that’s the cost of a 6-pack of Michigan’s famous Vernors Ginger Ale -- one of the most quintessential Michigan staples known to all residents of our great state. We drink it at barbecues, at the game, and when our kids have a stomach ache. The truth is that as strange as it sounds, these small dollar donations really do matter. It takes a village to elect a leader like Elissa to the Senate, and it’s so important that we maintain a steady pace of support. Last month, we had our first serious Republican opponent, Mike Rogers, enter the race. His latest FEC report was filled with donations from a bunch of members of Betsy DeVos's family -- contributions totaling $46,200 all made on one single day. And there are plenty of other deep-pocketed Republican donors who are backing his campaign because they know that their path to control the Senate runs right through Michigan. With public polling showing our race in a dead heat, we have to be prepared to match our Republican opponent dollar-for-dollar so we can defend this open seat and protect our slim Democratic Senate majority. body:
NEWS: Associated Builders and Contractors of San Diego Endorses Faulconer for Supervisor | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2210013cba3c/4wptopnlk1-12655919?e=784f78234b)

| |

| |
# FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
OCTOBER 26, 2023

CONTACT: press@kevinfaulconer.com

**Associated Builders and Contractors (ABC) of San Diego Endorses Former Mayor Kevin Faulconer for San Diego County Supervisor**
SAN DIEGO, CA -- Former San Diego Mayor Kevin Faulconer, candidate for San Diego County Supervisor, announced the backing of the Associated Builders and Contractors of San Diego.
The Associated Builders and Contractors (ABC) of San Diego is a national construction industry trade association representing more than 21,000 members, working for the betterment of the communities in which they work. The endorsement of this important organization comes a few months after former San Diego Mayor Faulconer entered the race for County Supervisor in the third district.
**“Kevin Faulconer is our choice to help bring common sense to San Diego,” said Shandon Harbour, President, and CEO of ABC San Diego. “Kevin brings a solid record as Mayor, working to make it faster and easier to build in San Diego. We can trust that he’ll work to streamline the over-regulated environment at the County that has been cumbersome for job creators. Kevin understands that successful small businesses are critical to a prosperous workforce and in turn a prosperous San Diego County.”**
**“I’m honored to be receiving the endorsement of Associated Builders and Contractors of San Diego,” said Former San Diego Mayor Kevin Faulconer. “When I was Mayor, our goal was increasing the housing production across the city, and that meant working closely with the City Council to focus on cutting red tape and removing the barriers that prevented us from reaching our goals. As County Supervisor, you can count on me being a champion for small businesses and supporting the building of more middle-class housing options in county communities that want additional inventory.”**
As Mayor of San Diego, Faulconer changed the city’s entire approach to housing regulation, treating housing as “essential” while making it faster and easier to build across the city and adopting reforms that cut unnecessary barriers that stood in the way of progress. Under his leadership, the City removed expensive parking minimums and increased citywide housing capacity by 100,000 units after completing 16 community plan updates – more than any administration in City history.
Former San Diego Mayor Kevin Faulconer is a strong leader with a proven record working to enact common sense solutions to solve some of the region’s most significant issues, including affordable housing, homelessness, and public safety.
###

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72245407/434723583/1436736915?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjcyYTA3OWEtMzA3NC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aFIm0Cl1ETYsrUtmZ9RPufwuwMLBetQ8DU7AzN95XFc=)
Peter,

Since we launched our campaign, I have been overwhelmed by the support we’ve received while speaking with voters on the campaign trail.

This is why I entered the race: to talk with Orange County families, listen to the issues they face, and to address their needs when I am elected to represent them in Congress.

**[I want to continue speaking to voters in our community, and that’s why I’m asking for your help right now. Will you chip in $3 to help fuel my on-the-ground campaign work and ensure we reach every voter we need to get across the finish line?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72245410/434723584/1436736915?refcode=em-10.26.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjcyYTA3OWEtMzA3NC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aFIm0Cl1ETYsrUtmZ9RPufwuwMLBetQ8DU7AzN95XFc=)**
| ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72245413/434723585/1436736915?refcode=em-10.26.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjcyYTA3OWEtMzA3NC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aFIm0Cl1ETYsrUtmZ9RPufwuwMLBetQ8DU7AzN95XFc=)****
---

Being out in the field is an incredibly important part of this campaign. Our ground game is not about knocking on the _most_ doors or only talking with people who already support me:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72245416/434723586/1436736915?refcode=em-10.26.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjcyYTA3OWEtMzA3NC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aFIm0Cl1ETYsrUtmZ9RPufwuwMLBetQ8DU7AzN95XFc=)
**Canvassing is about having hard conversations with people with whom we don’t see eye-to-eye. It’s about getting to know the person and finding our common values, not just seeing them as a potential vote and moving on.**

The conversations I've had while door-knocking have changed me more than I thought they could. I am honored to be able to do this, and I will bring the voices and stories I hear to Congress.

I knew when we launched our campaign it would always be about building a grassroots movement – a coalition of people in Orange County who are committed to making their lives and the lives of their neighbors better.

I want to keep having these conversations, because it’s this work that will help put us over the edge, keep CA-47 blue, and win back the House majority.

**[But if I want to continue forward with this campaign I need you, Team Joanna, to step up. Will you please chip in $3 to help me reach my end-of-month fundraising goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72245421/434723587/1436736915?refcode=em-10.26.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjcyYTA3OWEtMzA3NC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aFIm0Cl1ETYsrUtmZ9RPufwuwMLBetQ8DU7AzN95XFc=)**

Derek,

We just got a massive warning from the election experts at Cook Political
Report.

With over THIRTY declared candidates (and a new multimillionaire GOP
opponent), California is going to be a top-watched Senate race in 2024.

Donald Trump has his eyes on this seat. So does Mitch McConnell. And so
does newly-elected Speaker Mike Johnson — Trump's impeachment counsel
during the Senate trial that Adam led. Who led the insurrection effort to
overturn the 2020 election. And is desperately working to exonerate the
former president. Still.

Their attacks aren’t going to stop any time soon, so we’ll need even more
resources to share our message across California.

name: Team Tim Sanchez
subject: Who??
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Sanchez For Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timsanchez?refcode=X_logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timsanchez?refcode=X_logo]
Republicans just elected an election-denying, anti-abortion, anti-LGBTQ+ extremist to be Speaker of the House... some guy named... Mike Johnson?
Well, we looked into him, and it’s bad.
