Johnson, who has served Louisiana's 4th Congressional District since 2017, is a staunch climate change denier. He supports a nationwide abortion ban, voted against the Violence Against Women Act , and wants to cut health care access for millions of Americans. He is also a close ally of Donald Trump, a purveyor of dangerous conspiracy theories, and was a key leader in the fight to overturn the 2020 election.
Now that he is Speaker, he will have the power to set the agenda for the House of Representatives and block legislation that would protect our rights and freedoms. That’s why it’s so important that we do everything we can to resist Johnson's agenda and elect Democrats to the House in 2024 – so we can remove him from power.
Fortunately, we already have a champion of our values and freedoms in Tim Sanchez, who is steadfast in his commitment to protecting our rights. He is dedicated to bringing our priorities to the table and ensuring that our voices are heard and represented.
However, he cannot achieve this alone.
Friend, will you donate to Tim’s campaign today to send a message to Republicans: we have someone in our corner ready to reject the GOP’s regressive and harmful agenda and whatever else may come our way? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timsanchez?refcode=X_102623_who002]

| | Friend, Why is this White House in denial about antisemitism? Earlier this week, Karine Jean-Pierre was asked about the administration’s level of concern regarding attacks on our Jewish friends. Her response? A strategic dismissal mumbling something about “no credible threats,” followed by a [quick pivot](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=513409c1faf14ed1b063cf944252f1ef&_e=clFEsxpQNELkLk8Jvx0S8OTNXuivs6Dr-B48b-Mv1huNZB91YsEcHnaDgRoSUXzwl0Y9878nLau1xfdxrSPD8NFh1V6RT0zT-vGElaX43cAJgkLuN7JFyrblEQfn-yk1ev1hVpOSg1YHE98JAEOWqezTXL7Ykv5zj_uVavFFWgCZ5HNT-rFSbtk3v1hKUdETzimQO6ua6ygQP4AED0VA1KAAuAZHHiNhc8KYvS3lqcCijHdsLiuaT2apIxeU0jZAb1yLQoCDRKmq7yNLLamMi7aC39zrwlPB-7PoUDUd4wQ%3D) to talking about Muslims and “those perceived to be Muslim” who have endured a “disproportionate number of hate-fueled attacks.” Huh? That was not the question, KJP. Not to mention, there have been plenty of credible threats and reported hate crimes. The proof is in the pudding right here: antisemitic incidents in the U.S. have risen by about [400%](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=513409c1faf14ed1b063cf944252f1ef&_e=clFEsxpQNELkLk8Jvx0S8C2ynOOJ3I5UVQXE2gC0wfy0LoBj64rhXaKQCfglgB1sbrXml1WIsxNA35nQq-ngf24AaK3w4dipjLFj-xQmk4WnmY_g241pBxYYeqhuEs57VRerCg-VQCIW629N6dszXP7OHgausvV6qJo-E38eXcWB3nyJHY1x6wkm-QtpwYbKkeH0EcM1ADwNi8s1q7e46YG5aXyjS2smGH-K6hgGPlH-Hj2qJsR6dK1zmbt3PBYlNx57PPR-dI8IXhRqCJnCe7TJqWVCEmmtJZzKUtgqRbA_xX7BR9VOLTLm72B3Ae-meh2qXup_QGQgSns1Zf89sA%3D%3D) since the war broke out. After pushback, she attempted to backpedal by claiming she[ misheard](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=513409c1faf14ed1b063cf944252f1ef&_e=clFEsxpQNELkLk8Jvx0S8LZO7EzlnRUTp6uhRdWqg0jAlAEitoCgBSGu6Q6er52hTlZqWcyo2XzGl8HeHacfS568E4Jrpts7dAO92CaDoEV-tvE_J2DfHqKdBuRf8LpKQ7vTSKcXhNDTSuG8yOe5m_Uij2QcKAzAIAqzO1s6n66zwdzUrShvnXaw2ZxBO8ipXPFADWm-e2swh5zIzF32Ly_WGW3MZ2c3zbuUvMZw3JfAoEmaKRcA3X4eOi4i02ZdOYZbbWAfATe3ssy6KLcGkfJz-ylNLrW8erhfXc2UqXU%3D) the question, but we heard you loud and clear, KJP. Your attempt to erase the writing on the wall is disgraceful, and it puts this administration’s sick and twisted priorities on full display. In the wake of the [deadliest attack](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=513409c1faf14ed1b063cf944252f1ef&_e=clFEsxpQNELkLk8Jvx0S8KPFThUQYm3CfTAvmMT1T8DODsvnxmusGHEh6xwWSHfr75l0u27UdlvVYOtCmvDjkuttYJ3ZatsjQ_vj64ChlaJq5_qSe7Ed4Xpk6spWOKL8ljZ3ul3rabQnlNo8mvo_vP0R7DMvRS6z0TcOf7iLsSgdvsI2XPlpGdhjWHXhlhVeIInXYPNMfW-QYTJTI-3bqlCFooowQgf4dvbE0uy6i_TiiYGM5ExoC5ixyAhxTT81ROinHoR4euaPwhTwbRcok8FbGnutQg0I2cTXzuUMj1-C48EYqXn1S5b-USou2RfP) on Jews since the Holocaust, this sad excuse for a presidential administration is more concerned with leveling the playing field and pandering to the Left’s backward moral comparison game. A proud Arizonan and lifelong Democrat, Conor O'Callaghan is running to represent Arizona's 1st Congressional District and unseat MAGA Republican David Schweikert. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://action.conorforaz.com/p/pKfVwCqeNUy4NM7F4Jx-eQ2?unsubscribedata=%2FOoXGRpX3HO4OW1L4E8pE%2FlYvt6BBnW8xLkqhBUSib2vVzcocBLwyG%2BmS0MzkNdDLwqVFTRjsd5K%2BHUfgljEpWLl8hlRoW2gtFhOCfMzvO12y6%2FRPEeRUxD445CKk1zvZMb%2BMyllVRjcm9YCURbdXJ5odaiQNXy%2Fq5%2BYz1eimPrnvmrmv0hHpOZFobbmM%2BpRE%2BEkFfcWRyZYLPSH3k3KUCEungt%2BjP8pHGiX8M%2FAHIwGbPXzY3bb4uSzfSHpp%2Fv4mYad9%2F49mzkPaaXo%2FvwpqMT46sTZQ0rPFgacvsXyoxmVST4fLgu3ofdDkQdXdwv7CoEkOJ%2FgqxzmK7PUiKWyl4lwumsINna2UMPFm3BB4xPuGATE5wIJWRBGYzA3yiRFLOSfB4AC2IRLjmr2%2FCctENnAQwuGR1gxNxJMI3G%2FYdJWntnWU4T8QXpdf6zT8oOR)

Dear Peter,

We are excited to share some great news from the Conor O'Callaghan Congressional Campaign!

**We just received a significant endorsement from a highly respected community leader and dedicated public servant, Ylenia Aguilar.** Her support is a testament to Conor's commitment to making a positive impact in our district and her endorsement highlights our shared values of sustainability and equity in public schools.

Ylenia Aguilar is an accomplished professional with a strong track record of service to our community. She currently serves as an elected board member of the Central Arizona Water Conservation District (CAWCD), representing Maricopa County. Her expertise in water-related matters is invaluable, and her endorsement underscores Conor's dedication to addressing critical issues like water sustainability.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72246856/434725588/1075697501?source=SBD_CO_EM_FR_102623_1_1_Ylenia&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc0NDIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTY2MDdhZGQtMzE3NC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TSsA1iAiTQnl0_4HysabGiPrvTTMW5mEsCbFB9q2p6k=)
---
In addition to her role at CAWCD, Ylenia has previously served as the Education Organizer for English Learners at UnidosUS, the largest Latino Civil Rights organization in the nation. She has also worked as a Governing Board Member for the Osborn School District, where she served as the Board President. Ylenia's background as a working mother and a professional businesswoman who owns her own company means that she understands the needs of our community and actively engages with teachers and administrators to improve educational outcomes.

**Ylenia Aguilar's deep connection to our region makes her endorsement a pivotal moment for our campaign. Her extensive experience and passion for sustainability and public education perfectly align with our campaign's values.**

In endorsing Conor O'Callaghan, Ylenia Aguilar expressed her belief in Conor's ability to fight for our district. She emphasized his nuanced policy understanding, commitment to local priorities, and the determination to take real action in Congress. We are honored to have Ylenia's support and share her conviction that Conor is the best person to represent us in Washington.

We are eager to welcome Ylenia Aguilar to our growing coalition of supporters. Her endorsement reinforces our campaign's dedication to creating a brighter future for our community. But to help us continue this important work, we need your support.

**[Your contribution, no matter the size, will make a difference in our campaign. Your donation will help us reach more voters, spread our message, and bring real change to our district. Every dollar counts, and your support is greatly appreciated.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72246876/434725725/1075697501?amount=10&source=SBD_CO_EM_FR_102623_1_1_Ylenia&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc0NDIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTY2MDdhZGQtMzE3NC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TSsA1iAiTQnl0_4HysabGiPrvTTMW5mEsCbFB9q2p6k=)**

If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Dear Peter, We are excited to share some great news from the Conor O'Callaghan Congressional Campaign! We just received a significant endorsement from a highly respected community leader and dedicated public servant, Ylenia Aguilar. Her support is a testament to Conor's commitment to making a positive impact in our district and her endorsement highlights our shared values of sustainability and equity in public schools. Ylenia Aguilar is an accomplished professional with a strong track record of service to our community. She currently serves as an elected board member of the Central Arizona Water Conservation District (CAWCD), representing Maricopa County. Her expertise in water-related matters is invaluable, and her endorsement underscores Conor's dedication to addressing critical issues like water sustainability. | = In addition to her role at CAWCD, Ylenia has previously served as the Education Organizer for English Learners at UnidosUS, the largest Latino Civil Rights organization in the nation. She has also worked as a Governing Board Member for the Osborn School District, where she served as the Board President. Ylenia's background as a working mother and a professional businesswoman who owns her own company means that she understands the needs of our community and actively engages with teachers and administrators to improve educational outcomes. Ylenia Aguilar's deep connection to our region makes her endorsement a pivotal moment for our campaign. Her extensive experience and passion for sustainability and public education perfectly align with our campaign's values. In endorsing Conor O'Callaghan, Ylenia Aguilar expressed her belief in Conor's ability to fight for our district. She emphasized his nuanced policy understanding, commitment to local priorities, and the determination to take real action in Congress. We are honored to have Ylenia's support and share her conviction that Conor is the best person to represent us in Washington. We are eager to welcome Ylenia Aguilar to our growing coalition of supporters. Her endorsement reinforces our campaign's dedication to creating a brighter future for our community. But to help us continue this important work, we need your support. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for being a part of our campaign. Together, we can make a positive impact in our community and ensure a brighter future for all. Team O’Callaghan | | | ---|---|--- = As a proud Arizonan and lifelong Democrat, Conor O'Callaghan is wholeheartedly committed to enshrining Roe v. Wade into law, safeguarding our communities against gun violence, addressing the urgent challenges posed by climate change and our water crisis, and ensuring our tax code is fair and equitable and works for small businesses and the middle class. It's time for a new, forward-thinking direction.** | = = Paid for by Conor for AZ Conor for AZ P.O. Box 13304 Scottsdale, AZ 85267-3304 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =.

name: Robertson For Congress
subject: Reminder: There's Something to be Said for Experience...Lessons we have learned!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robertson for Congress](https://r20
body:
| | | |
---
# We Will Win This Time! Here's How...
---
As you know, last year was my first time running for public office. Although Republicans only make up 26% of registered voters in my district, I received almost 50% of the vote. Dina Titus won with just 51.5%. We did the best of the three Republicans running for Congress in Southern Nevada. We also received more votes in CD-1 than any Republican who ran for office. This includes Governor Lombardo, Adam Laxalt, and others.
My first election experience puts me in good company with Abraham Lincoln, Ronald Reagan, and Newt Gingrich--all of whom lost their first one, too. They didn't give up, and neither will I!
We learned a lot from our first run. I'm confident that we will win this time with the knowledge we acquired. The lessons include:

* Though we won the in-person voting by 20 points, Titus won the mail-in and ballot-harvested vote by 30 points. This cycle we will embrace early voting to include mail-in ballot

* Titus won by just 7,000 votes. There were 46,000 registered Republicans in my district who did not vote. We have each of their names, addresses, and phone numbers. We have volunteers who will contact them to offer assistance in voting.

* We won the vote in Henderson and Boulder City, but Titus won in Las Vegas and Clark County. We are recruiting precinct captains in these areas to continue to hold where we won and make gains in the areas we lost.

We have many things working in our favor, including:

* People now recognize my name. Over 107,000 people voted for me last time. Pundits and the media know who we are. Name recognition is a valuable asset in elections.

* We have an outstanding volunteer organization. We've kept volunteers from last year and have added to their ranks.

* I still have strong support from veterans, retirees, and the LDS community. These are three groups that have high voter turnout rates.

We are running a grassroots campaign. With your help and involvement, we will win the primary again and beat Titus in the general.
---
Your Questions--Mark's Answers
Mark Robertson answers your questions with direct and honest answers. Here are two questions Mark was asked recently:
Q: One of your opponents, (name redacted), in the Primary claims that he got more votes than you in the last election. Is this true? -T.M.. A. I'm certain he realizes his mistake! According to the [Nevada Secretary of State's website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fdJGRmkBTSMY5L0287vyMUgr6ZjqSNlYZjkCyA0qeqUB37BZu-T9iYeZWi50TZm4TsmzN67saNmDy0AFG8oD_oQGR9IN4sms41H2HUhTWz5ZyZzoDZCO8HTq9MUIIyyUEahYPmPDpDQ=&c=NNcQAKNBJEyj-fyiE1YyxL5YokxZ5Kl9C0ESt5ElnCxzUapcTlVEQQ==&ch=AoS_6-7PGnd7xSZtORIEUY05OEaV0S0-QcvSTttByIQi6gOUrfdGHA==), he received 10,066 votes, while I received 103,115. He ran in one assembly district, while I ran in 14 assembly districts. With the name recognition and goodwill I earned, I'm confident we will win this time.
Q. With the apparent unfair practices of the FBI and DOJ, what actions would you take as a member of Congress? -D.B. A. Congress has a constitutional duty to oversee the operation of the executive branch. I support the ongoing investigations of the FBI, DOJ, and other agencies. As a Representative of the people of Nevada's First Congressional District, I will do all I can to make government work for the people.
Please share this message with friends and neighbors. Have questions for me? Simply reply to this email to ask me a question.
---

Fellow American,

I write this having just been elected by my colleagues as the 56th Speaker of the United States House of Representatives.

The task of leading our House majority is a great one, and to say that I’m humbled by the faith my colleagues have bestowed on me is an understatement.

My message to you today is this: When Republicans come together, there is no measure of what we can achieve.

In the near term, my team and I will work to make sure that we’re passing responsible, fiscally conservative legislation to fund our government and support our military. **And with an election a little more than twelve months away, we’ll work around the clock to grow our House majority and help EVERY Republican incumbent in their reelection campaign.**

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b43e493fecb247168e4684ccb704c849&_e=Yb8wViugLGIgTOrDzTc4yPocVEqv3U4g7BQS1FpxCNGEcfwpxlt75ZLjuaQoNq2ZPyg8z8Rd8YAhDyC_m3UKFUWph0Hic70uG9dhyeCADY8j9lafZoWKlqVu53hgqToBwGlX4OGVs_VzwbzslaMZcANy60pss88lDPsDiqKXllR6B0G5bhSvs8KzIi9bQsRtkoSwAz83LM4RblmAutkj6R10khPCwl2bOuj7fOIzVWtWvm3seHM3TFf7zfn98wp6QZ-UFfMzQXEdYaz9JeZ4_mntFAh303PgdpoqmlowdIF3r-WWFDRHKD-AodaVgKkE0OS7D5mcMJB52aW0EUCxHBqWlEY1yPEbsOaiUMNmQLp0AUgPQtabwK5dKL-raLoLVUKPrIX26mEpH_p_ZOC2o0LmXDm5Gp_twaxJePAtHKmIbuNkfa80NkmhIxQiaUAA)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

Friend, **As the only Palestinian American member of Congress, Rashida’s voice and lived experience are more critical now than ever.** But in response to her leadership in calling for a ceasefire and an end to the genocide unfolding against millions of people trapped in Gaza, Rashida has been under relentless attack. In some of their first business since electing a new Speaker of the House, **Republicans introduced a resolution to censure Rashida, with even some Democrats joining these right-wing Islamophobic attacks:** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z6cB7bsPo1Hejz6R4JBnOajbAc_w1hp9CRa2Sh1vcM-Swx4MaC_sEc-pDSa5bWJrhzNxUqz6-DyoQItJJKCpUrc9TlC4kd8ztOED4cNfE4wHK2u-yHIYoeJPbw9Ia178DDlYM9cf49m5Pwnj-siUFm8Yb1ifMT-qw5Pu4DTR7bN4-hsq9O0lHJzJ1PMDIRcm88dOxFBjDOW4FT31oSzYbUlUiGdd9OquAmBmrLY3Fj_kHxDI0VaOi2d-o-uDYX01UKsHx2tYRvOx_xWysudKvthmx1LUwSYmiJhoMFhjzIXQMIHiiIZEz91Ou1o9nMYpCzGPYoaWNXPt5aDdtZu71A4Mqp2xqUi_shMeaQhsF5ROt9npu4sB-kTsW4PIEpnXS5_d7pjKODNYFPSG47PjZ1/40r/sZKblywnRaSsi0viSkNKyw/h1/adiTUkq0893yAfAr_tIFc63c48dHjB0ozTdmBztLeZQ) [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z6cB7bsPo1Hejz6R4JBnOajbAc_w1hp9CRa2Sh1vcM-Swx4MaC_sEc-pDSa5bWJrjN7aiLxNpGZl92cGymiCbaxodK5mI-0zLDszH5iFt1_mXvAB1Jo04M6W02HxwXNQe-jZdR2DDQ5IfGu1nhxd9LR8--BlENF6LxrPHaxhNkxCjJ_sx9zdJFSct4NpOvMDTJKEF-XD8OGQf-U8c__BGihk0XZcCFhedOdyt-hMYUVV7G0jlrTazHwtgDSQT7dG_rqd-fyfNLk9FBplb3P8tw-jd8M_k3XNrJNAKecQTp2VgCbAuI8hRXAnGYpARc2FZIWPc-RzxxSLopvJTiTXnfuZRh4EYDAEDLGucJA-FZPA0wHufLM82wduew0RSJBvaPv73LywZfSE1_tmvYSNw8/40r/sZKblywnRaSsi0viSkNKyw/h2/PYZbXncQ-yK34LH4snzXrRr4cbgf_UESI2DhzjzYHuM) Marjorie Taylor Green's unhinged resolution is full of dangerous lies and distortions. It isn't just Islamlophobic and bigoted, it also attacks non-violent Jewish anti-war activists. Last week, Rashida spoke at a rally in Washington DC organized by Jewish Voice for Peace and IfNotNow, and an interfaith prayer vigil and rally to hold the political establishment accountable for continuing the drumbeat of war that will lead to more lives lost, especially children in Palestine. **At the rally, Rashida reminded us that we must not lose our shared humanity.** The cries of the mother in Gaza who lost all of her children in the unrelenting bombing by the Israeli government are the same cries of a father who listened to his daughter being attacked by Hamas not knowing if she is alive. [**Rashida’s voice is needed. clean_body: Together we must keep pushing for a just future where Israelis and Palestinians can live in peace. | | | Friend, As the only Palestinian American member of Congress, Rashida’s voice and lived experience are more critical now than ever. But in response to her leadership in calling for a ceasefire and an end to the genocide unfolding against millions of people trapped in Gaza, Rashida has been under relentless attack. In some of their first business since electing a new Speaker of the House, Republicans introduced a resolution to censure Rashida, with even some Democrats joining these right-wing Islamophobic attacks: Marjorie Taylor Green's unhinged resolution is full of dangerous lies and distortions. It isn't just Islamlophobic and bigoted, it also attacks non-violent Jewish anti-war activists. Last week, Rashida spoke at a rally in Washington DC organized by Jewish Voice for Peace and IfNotNow, and an interfaith prayer vigil and rally to hold the political establishment accountable for continuing the drumbeat of war that will lead to more lives lost, especially children in Palestine. At the rally, Rashida reminded us that we must not lose our shared humanity. The cries of the mother in Gaza who lost all of her children in the unrelenting bombing by the Israeli government are the same cries of a father who listened to his daughter being attacked by Hamas not knowing if she is alive. | If the United States government and the world do not speak out now, more lives will be lost. The collective punishment of people in Gaza has been relentless, with whole neighborhoods destroyed, and generations of families wiped out. And the Israeli military is saying that they are just getting started. Our movement demanding the human rights of Palestinians―and of all people―is growing. Americans are rising up, saying we will not be complicit in the genocide of Palestinians. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Together we must keep pushing for a just future where Israelis and Palestinians can live in justice and peace, without fear and with true freedom, equal rights, and human dignity. -Team Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . | **“Right now, Republicans are drunk on gerrymandering. They have been insulated from consequence.”

_– Democratic Wisconsin State Assembly Member Kristina Shelton_**
---
[**_Help stop GOP map manipulation: Donate to the NDRC >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72250759/434730510/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20231025_FR_10W_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY3ZDJlYWY0LTMzNzQtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_ra_afifekZ1TcLtuKWLNFy3cm4z4vnQcdQ7DapT4qM=)
Team, Wisconsin Republicans have been _so extreme_ in their efforts to seize unearned power that experts have referred to the state as a “democracy desert.”

**Now, the Wisconsin GOP has proposed a so-called redistricting “reform” bill that’s really nothing more than another gerrymandering scheme designed to maximize an illegitimate partisan advantage.** If passed, the bill would:
❌ Keep map drawing in the hands of politicians with histories of gerrymandering

❌ Allow the enactment of extreme gerrymanders, including near-supermajorities for Republicans in the legislature

❌ Lack any fallback measures in case the legislature fails to approve a map
Simply put, this bill would do nothing to stop Republicans in Wisconsin’s legislature from enacting a partisan gerrymander that would continue to lock in unearned political power for their own party while silencing and sidelining everyone else.

**Or, as A.G. Holder so aptly put it, “Wisconsin Republicans just ain’t that into democracy.”

[_Team, the NDRC and our affiliates are fighting in states like Wisconsin and all across the country to demand fair maps and a transparent redistricting process ahead of 2024. clean_body: | | “Right now, Republicans are drunk on gerrymandering. They have been insulated from consequence.” – Democratic Wisconsin State Assembly Member Kristina Shelton = Team, Wisconsin Republicans have been so extreme in their efforts to seize unearned power that experts have referred to the state as a “democracy desert.” Now, the Wisconsin GOP has proposed a so-called redistricting “reform” bill that’s really nothing more than another gerrymandering scheme designed to maximize an illegitimate partisan advantage. If passed, the bill would: ❌ Keep map drawing in the hands of politicians with histories of gerrymandering ❌ Allow the enactment of extreme gerrymanders, including near-supermajorities for Republicans in the legislature ❌ Lack any fallback measures in case the legislature fails to approve a map Simply put, this bill would do nothing to stop Republicans in Wisconsin’s legislature from enacting a partisan gerrymander that would continue to lock in unearned political power for their own party while silencing and sidelining everyone else. Or, as A.G. Holder so aptly put it, “Wisconsin Republicans just ain’t that into democracy.” = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: BREAKING: Republicans choose "MAGA Mike" Johnson as House Speaker
body:
__The environment will be in jeopardy if we don 't act quickly. |
---

|
Peter -- after weeks of chaos and stalemate created by MAGA extremists, Republicans in Congress have finally elected a new Speaker of the House.

Dubbed "MAGA Mike" Johnson by one of the most extreme, Rep. Matt Gaetz, **Speaker Johnson is a climate change denier and one of the leading architects of Donald Trump 's efforts to overturn the 2020 election.**
His election sets up a _massive_ showdown in the House with another government shutdown looming in just weeks. Speaker Johnson has promised to expedite fellow Republicans' climate-harming dirty energy agenda as his first official act -- which will mean **more dirty drilling, sabotaging the clean energy transition, and rolling back clean water protections** ... _unless we act quickly._

Now is when LCV's work really matters -- **what we 're able to do over the next few weeks could make or break the future of climate and clean energy progress.** We need your help:

[The best thing you can do for the environment right now is to renew your LCV membership for just $5 today before this triple match offer expires. Your support will go 3x as far if you chip in right now >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/VXb6s8gXxkc~)

Here's what you need to know about Republicans' new leader:

**-- He's a climate change denier.** Johnson has denied that climate change is a result of burning fossil fuels and pollution. Instead, he attributed it to "natural cycles over the span of the Earth's history."

**-- He's in lockstep with Trump on election denial.** He was the primary architect of an amicus brief that was signed by more than 100 House Republicans in support of a Texas lawsuit seeking to overturn the 2020 election results in four swing states.

**-- He's one of Big Oil's favorite members of Congress.** Johnson has already taken hundreds of thousands of dollars from the oil and gas industry during his very short career in the House. According to opensecrets.org, _no one has given more money to Johnson than the oil and gas industry_.
|
---
**[**STOP SPEAKER JOHNSON 's
DIRTY ENERGY AGENDA:

RENEW NOW >>**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/VXb6s8gXxkc~)**

Peter, it's no wonder that **extreme Republicans are celebrating Johnson 's election as "the ascendance of [the MAGA] movement,"** in Matt Gaetz's words._****_

LCV teams are on Capitol Hill every day, pushing back against cuts to clean energy investments and funding for environmental protections. **With extremists like Speaker Johnson driving the agenda, we need to ramp up our efforts in a major way.**

[We really need you to renew your LCV membership for just $5 while there's still time to TRIPLE your impact. Nothing less than our planet and our democracy are at stake. Don't wait, renew today >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/VXb6s8gXxkc~)

Thanks for sticking with us through this fight, Peter. I'm grateful to have you by our side.

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters
__
__

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=10138427&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg0MDU2NzY3OQS2&spReportId=MTg0MDU2NzY3OQS2). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=10138427&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg0MDU2NzY3OQS2&spReportId=MTg0MDU2NzY3OQS2) from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

[740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/~NwYfD-) |

name: Tamie Wilson for US
subject: I’m running against Congressman Jim Jordan
body:
| |
---
We haven’t met yet, but my name is Tamie Wilson and I am the Democratic Candidate who is going to unseat right-wing extremist Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH) this 2024. | [View in browser](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjo5OTk1NzE4NzQ2NjQ5NTQ2NixcInJcIjoxMDMxMjU3MjcyMTIyMTAwMDh9IiwicyI6ImRkZjBiZThlNzVhZTQ0NmIifQ)
| |
---
| [ ](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjo5OTk1NzE4NzQ3Mjc4NjkyMyxcInJcIjoxMDMxMjU3MjcyMTIyMTAwMDh9IiwicyI6IjUxMjJmYzhhNjEwNzkxZDQifQ)
---
|
---
Friend,
We haven’t met yet but my name is Tamie Wilson and I am the Democratic Candidate who is going to unseat right-wing extremist Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH) this 2024.
In case you are blissfully unaware of who Jim Jordan is, here are just a few of his ‘lowlights’:
* In early 2023, Jim Jordan was nominated for Speaker of the House by far-right Republicans including Matt Gaetz, Lauren Boebert, and Marjorie Taylor Greene, in an attempt to hold up the nomination for Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy who they believed was not extreme enough.

* As an assistant wrestling coach at Ohio State University, Jordan ignored his athletes being sexually abused by a team physician and oversaw a massive coverup to intimidate and discredit the survivors.

* Is a founding member and deputy chair of the House Freedom Caucus (Tea Party) where he spent the mid 2010s trying to get rid of Obama-care and worked to strip health insurance away from more than 20 million Americans. Now he wants to cut social security.

* Is a key spreader of Trump’s lies about the election and continues to delegitimize President Biden’s 2020 Election Victory even now in 2023.

Turning a blind eye to sexual abuse is wrong. Using your power as a congressman to bully victims, delegitimize elections, and cut programs for your most vulnerable constituents is wrong. But abuses of power come second nature to people like Jim Jordan and Donald Trump.
I was born and raised here in Ohio and I know Jim Jordan’s values do not line up with what we as buckeyes stand for. Coming from humble beginnings to owning a small business I know the problems facing everyday Ohioans because I have lived them.
**So while Jim Jordan sells out the American people year after year to ram through his far-right agenda, I’m running to deliver real results for working Ohioans.** [

clean_body: | | We haven’t met yet, but my name is Tamie Wilson and I am the Democratic Candidate who is going to unseat right-wing extremist Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH) this 2024. | | | | | Friend, We haven’t met yet but my name is Tamie Wilson and I am the Democratic Candidate who is going to unseat right-wing extremist Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH) this 2024. In case you are blissfully unaware of who Jim Jordan is, here are just a few of his ‘lowlights’: In early 2023, Jim Jordan was nominated for Speaker of the House by far-right Republicans including Matt Gaetz, Lauren Boebert, and Marjorie Taylor Greene, in an attempt to hold up the nomination for Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy who they believed was not extreme enough. As an assistant wrestling coach at Ohio State University, Jordan ignored his athletes being sexually abused by a team physician and oversaw a massive coverup to intimidate and discredit the survivors. Is a founding member and deputy chair of the House Freedom Caucus (Tea Party) where he spent the mid 2010s trying to get rid of Obama-care and worked to strip health insurance away from more than 20 million Americans. Now he wants to cut social security. Is a key spreader of Trump’s lies about the election and continues to delegitimize President Biden’s 2020 Election Victory even now in 2023. Turning a blind eye to sexual abuse is wrong. Using your power as a congressman to bully victims, delegitimize elections, and cut programs for your most vulnerable constituents is wrong. But abuses of power come second nature to people like Jim Jordan and Donald Trump. I was born and raised here in Ohio and I know Jim Jordan’s values do not line up with what we as buckeyes stand for. Coming from humble beginnings to owning a small business I know the problems facing everyday Ohioans because I have lived them. So while Jim Jordan sells out the American people year after year to ram through his far-right agenda, I’m running to deliver real results for working Ohioans. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Jim Jordan isn’t working for us, I will. Sincerely, -Tamie Wilson | | | | Tamie Wilson Candidate for Congress (OH-4) | | | | | | | Mail checks to: 273 Saratoga St, Delaware, Ohio, 43015 | | |

One (1) “Prize Winner” will receive a trip for two to President Trump’s next rally of the 2024 campaign consisting of the following: (i) round-trip coach class airfare for the Prize Winner and one (1) guest to the rally destination from the major U.S. airport nearest Prize Winner’s residence within the 48 contiguous United States; (ii) two (2) day one (1) night first class hotel accommodations (1 room, double occupancy); (iii) one (1) photograph of the Prize Winner and guest with President Trump; Approximate retail value (“ARV”) of the Prize: $3,000. The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winners must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Save America, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219. Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: three quick updates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
We’ve got three quick updates for you today, Peter.
1. **Last month, a new poll showed Lucas Kunce in a _statistical tie_ with Josh Hawley** — with 12% of voters still undecided and 14 months until Election Day. This came after a slew of reports showed Hawley’s approval rating underwater with Missouri voters. _Morning Consult_ even found that Hawley has the worst approval rating of any GOP U.S. Senator running in 2024.
2. **National insiders are hyper-aware of Hawley’s vulnerability.** They’re set to invest millions of dollars into this race. And last week we learned that they transferred another $500,000 directly into Hawley’s campaign in Q3, continuing the trend of upping their support quarter after quarter.
3. **Our first end-of-month deadline of Q4 is next Tuesday and we’ve set a goal of raising 10,000 individual donations.** Between the weekend and the holiday, we likely won’t see the normal surge of support we can usually expect around this time of the month. So we’re asking for your help today:

**[Will you rush a donation of absolutely any amount to help us defeat Josh Hawley and elect Lucas Kunce before our deadline on Tuesday? Lucas isn’t taking a cent from corporate PACs, Big Pharma or fossil fuel execs, so your support really does make a big impact on our grassroots campaign.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38724?refcode=em20231026-4065&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4065%2E614464%2EJ1Z3Ro)**

Peter,

I write this having just been elected by my colleagues as the 56th Speaker of the United States House of Representatives.

The task of leading our House majority is a great one, and to say that I’m humbled by the faith my colleagues have bestowed on me is an understatement.

My message to you today is this: When Republicans come together, there is no measure of what we can achieve.

In the near term, my team and I will work to make sure that we’re passing responsible, fiscally conservative legislation to fund our government and support our military. **And with an election a little more than twelve months away, we’ll work around the clock to grow our House majority and help EVERY Republican incumbent in their reelection campaign.**

name: Coach
subject: Biden EMPOWERS Iran
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
It’s time to end Joe Biden’s weak-kneed appeasement of evil regimes like Iran. Read more >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/a053b4b14a1eb9523947229f28c3afba/5b387c4ceebabd9ac3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Peter, Under President Donald Trump, America’s enemies were on the back foot. Evil regimes feared us because they knew we wouldn’t take one step back in our defense of freedom and support for the State of Israel. **_But today, our nation’s geopolitical foes are on the rise. Emboldened by Biden’s botched withdrawal from Afghanistan, China and Russia are exerting their power globally. And Iran just funded the worst mass slaughter of Jews since the Holocaust. _** Sadly, the timing of this horrific terrorist attack in Israel was no accident. Joe Biden has bent over backward trying to cut a deal with Iran and even unfroze $6 billion of Iranian assets. Iran – and all our nation’s enemies – know Joe Biden doesn’t have a backbone. And they’re taking full advantage of what they believe is a weakened America. **If you agree, please add your name to my petition calling on Joe Biden to end his appeasement of evil regimes and stand with Israel. **
---
[**ADD YOUR NAME**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/a053b4b14a1eb9523947229f28c3afba/8f6c2e2f01ad1221c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
The only thing terrorists and tyrants understand is strength – and we MUST make it crystal clear that any foreign power that seeks to weaken America will be taught a lesson they will never forget. Thanks for adding your name to this petition. Together, we can defeat the Biden Democrats and get our great nation back on track! -Coach
---

name: Bill Posey Campaign
subject: I am ready to work with Speaker Johnson to drain the DC swamp
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bill Posey
body:
| | | [](https://app.ignitionmail.com/ga/click/2-163077-5-204-388-642-ed41692325-4h57eb0286)
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot, I don't know ANY Republicans who ran for Congress pledging NOT to change the way Washington works or promising to keep the status quo. **Yesterday, House Republicans unanimously agreed it’s time for change and elected Rep. Mike Johnson (R-Louisiana) as the next Speaker of the House.** The Washington Swamp is now in panic mode and knows the jig is up. Here’s what DC elite media are saying: **_Politico_** : “Johnson assumes speakership with few ties to K street. K street scrambles to figure out Mike Johnson.” **_CNN_** also lamented that Rep. Johnson does not have strong connections to “Washington’s K Street lobbyists” as if the revolving door between Congress and lobbying is something Washington needs more of. **_MSNBC_** took to criticizing Speaker Johnson’s conservative principles, like “expanded religious freedoms for Christians” and his Judeo-Christian views on life, marriage, and religious freedom. The truth is, Speaker Mike Johnson is a patriotic American and a principled conservative in the mold of Jim Jordan, and I believe he’s the best prescription possible for a tone-deaf Washington. Speaker Johnson is a constitutional law expert and has served as leader of the Republican Study Committee, a conservative caucus within the House, and as vice-chair of the Republican Conference. **If you didn’t catch his full remarks – about 10 minutes long –[please listen to them here](https://app.ignitionmail.com/ga/click/2-163077-5-204-388-643-87e3c7c039-4h57eb0286), unfiltered. In his closing statements, he outlines his seven guiding principles – the same principles which you and I hold dear.** Border security, addressing the debt, tackling inflation, holding Washington accountable – I’ve rolled up my sleeves and I’m already working with Speaker Johnson to make these great ideas the reality for the American people for generations to come. Buckle up, we’re taking on the DC swamp and it’s going to be a bumpy ride.
---
Sincerely,
---
---
Bill Posey
---
P.S. Remember, we can’t have a country without borders, we can’t have prosperity without good economic policies, and we can’t have freedom without liberty.
---
| |
---
| Paid for by Friends of Bill Posey
---
P.O. Box 411486, Melbourne, FL 32941-1486 You are receiving this email because you have interacted with the Bill Posey campaign.
Don't like these emails? [Unsubscribe](https://app.ignitionmail.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-163077-5-204-388-b6bb9428e2e6387-4h57eb0286)
---

Border security, addressing the debt, tackling inflation, holding Washington accountable – I’ve rolled up my sleeves and I’m already working with Speaker Johnson to make these great ideas the reality for the American people for generations to come. Buckle up, we’re taking on the DC swamp and it’s going to be a bumpy ride. Sincerely, Bill Posey P.S. Remember, we can’t have a country without borders, we can’t have prosperity without good economic policies, and we can’t have freedom without liberty. | | | Paid for by Friends of Bill Posey P.O. body:
Adam Schiff is passing the baton.

Mike Feuer for Congress [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72257449/434736419/1100932385?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2023.10.26_B1_FirstAsk_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDU4NmZlMWMtM2E3NC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=J0erGPP4yB5jZeYXB927INPoSUeeL3NJuWe-bVoWoL4=&emci=9106f248-866f-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=0586fe1c-3a74-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=13691217) | Friend, I wanted to give you a quick overview of what’s happening in the race for California’s 30th District. **But first, I have to ask:[_Can you chip in $10 – or any amount that is meaningful to you – to my campaign and strengthen our grassroots team?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72257450/434736420/580515288?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2023.10.26_B1_FirstAsk_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDU4NmZlMWMtM2E3NC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=J0erGPP4yB5jZeYXB927INPoSUeeL3NJuWe-bVoWoL4=)** Here’s what’s going on: Adam Schiff represented this district for many years and built an exceptional record of service. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72257451/434736421/580515288?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2023.10.26_B1_FirstAsk_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDU4NmZlMWMtM2E3NC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=J0erGPP4yB5jZeYXB927INPoSUeeL3NJuWe-bVoWoL4=) Now that he is running for the U.S. Senate, almost twenty candidates have entered the race to succeed him. We’re competing in the primary on March 5, 2024. The top two candidates, regardless of party, will go on to the general election. That means that even in this “blue district,” a handful of votes could be decisive in determining which names are on the ballot in November. **With the challenges we face, from the gun violence crisis to the climate crisis, it’s critical that we send an experienced progressive who is ready to pick up Adam Schiff’s baton on Day One. The people of Los Angeles deserve nothing less.** [_**Your contribution today won’t just fuel this campaign, it’ll send a message about the kind of tested, reliable, hardworking leadership you want in Washington. So please, if you’re able, chip in $10, $25, or any amount today →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72257452/434736422/580515288?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2023.10.26_B1_FirstAsk_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDU4NmZlMWMtM2E3NC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=J0erGPP4yB5jZeYXB927INPoSUeeL3NJuWe-bVoWoL4=) clean_body: Adam Schiff is passing the baton. Mike Feuer for Congress | Friend, I wanted to give you a quick overview of what’s happening in the race for California’s 30th District. But first, I have to ask:= Here’s what’s going on: Adam Schiff represented this district for many years and built an exceptional record of service. = Now that he is running for the U.S. Senate, almost twenty candidates have entered the race to succeed him. We’re competing in the primary on March 5, 2024. The top two candidates, regardless of party, will go on to the general election. That means that even in this “blue district,” a handful of votes could be decisive in determining which names are on the ballot in November. With the challenges we face, from the gun violence crisis to the climate crisis, it’s critical that we send an experienced progressive who is ready to pick up Adam Schiff’s baton on Day One. The people of Los Angeles deserve nothing less. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you so much, – Mike Feuer = | | PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MIKE FEUER FOR CONGRESS Mike Feuer for Congress 16633 Ventura Blvd Suite 1008 Encino, CA 91436 United States | | If you would like to receive only our most important messages, . body:
90% of all my contributions have come from within Missouri Peter — As one of the most vulnerable Republicans up for re-election in 2024, one might expect Josh Hawley to shore up his support here in Missouri.

Instead, Hawley is once again proving who he truly is by turning to his out-of-state corporate mega-donors to fill his campaign war chest.

Thanks to the release of the latest FEC fundraising report, we know that Hawley has more than **$4.7 million** in cash on hand and "**less than one-third** of the itemized donations to Hawley's campaign came from Missouri residents, and **fewer than one-quarter** of all itemized contributions originated in the state." Hawley's loyalties lie out of state, just like where he resides.

In stark contrast to this, my loyalties have always and will always lie with the hard-working families of Missouri. I'm proud to announce that **90%** of all my contributions are made by Missourians.

[**Before our end-of-month deadline on Tuesday, please chip in $5 — or more — to help us hit our $50,000 Mitch McConnell hand-picked this guy. We can’t let this hedge fund executive who lives in CONNECTICUT and who made his fortune selling out PA and American workers to China win. We need to step up for Bob. Like, *big* time.

Just like last year, an out-of-state millionaire is swooping in to try to buy Pennsylvania’s Senate seat. And just like last year, CNN is rating Pennsylvania one of the closest Senate races in the country.
Mitch McConnell and the GOP are going to do everything they can to defeat Bob and flip PA red, because saving our razor-thin Democratic majority could all come down to re-electing Bob Casey.

Not only that, but this guy has a massive personal fortune that he could use to self-fund the race – he put $14 MILLION 😧 into his failed run for Senate last year AND he’s got the national Republican establishment standing behind him.
**[If we’re going to keep the Senate blue, we need to come together to help Bob win this race. We built a people-powered team that made history in 2022 – let’s build something even bigger to win again in 2024.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72257646/434737400/-1222011784?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk897-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTY2N2YzZC0zYTc0LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RUXoOvdP8ukEjsnuN3ThSXnTtQHufdlBrUYbhP2JbvE=)**
Thanks to folks like you, Pennsylvania is represented by TWO Democrats in the Senate who are fighting for working families. We’re going to need your help to keep it that way.
Appreciate you all!!

❤️ John

John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania
| Chrissy Houlahan for Congress

Devon, PA 19333

Virginia's elections are just days away, and the majorities in both chambers of the state legislature are up for grabs. If Republicans take back the Senate, GOP Gov. Glenn Youngkin will have the power to enact his long-promised abortion ban. The ripple effects would impact abortion access for the entire region, as Virginia is the last state in the South without a ban on the books.

**We HAVE to stop Gov. Youngkin and his anti-choice GOP trifecta fantasy.** _We've endorsed 29 Democratic pro-choice fighters running for state House and Senate seats across the Commonwealth. But these women are running in ultra-competitive races, and they need our help to win._

****We've got less than two weeks until Election Day, Peter. Will you donate now to help Democratic pro-choice women in Virginia and across the country stop the GOP's anti-choice agenda in its tracks?****

name: Rick Larsen
subject: While they were doing that, I was working on this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
Clean water, infrastructure investments, and combating the flu.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72258452/434739915/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWE2MjdlZS0zYjc0LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GXdPQfGUgPo4l5ilbdZpDf5f8KMuqcQiNUR4RCXJFwo=&emci=3bfa084c-2f74-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=1ea627ee-3b74-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=9494239)
---

| | As we get ready to close the books on October, I have to admit I am frustrated. We have lost nearly an entire month to the chaos caucus and their political grandstanding. While they were arguing amongst themselves and frankly, wasting valuable time here is what I have been up to: **Ensuring clean water for families and communities balancing essential protections of the health of our environment and our local economies:** Through my work on the Transportation and Infrastructure committee, I introduced new legislation that will counter the damaging ruling in the Supreme Court's _Sackett_ decision. That decision left 50% of wetlands and 70% streams unprotected. But clean water is the difference between healthy communities and sick ones; thriving businesses and stunted ones; and preserved natural environments and polluted ones — each of which are critical to Northwest Washingtonians. This legislation will reinstate the bipartisan partnership between federal and state governments to protect our waterways. If passed, it will establish a level playing field for industry to thrive while still protecting critical natural resources. [**Will you help me continue advocating for clean water by making a contribution to my re-election campaign today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72258453/434739916/1596212816?refcode=2023-10-26-johnson&recurring=&amount=13&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=1ea627ee-3b74-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWE2MjdlZS0zYjc0LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GXdPQfGUgPo4l5ilbdZpDf5f8KMuqcQiNUR4RCXJFwo=) **The Bipartisan Infrastructure Law provides more historic investments in Washington highways, bridges, and electric vehicle charging stations:** This month, the Federal Highway Administration announced a $1.08 billion award for Washington state's Department of Transportation to construct and repair critical infrastructure, including highways ($934.4 million), bridges ($130.7 million), and electric vehicle charging stations ($15.1 million). These funds help create more jobs and build a cleaner, greener, safer and more accessible transportation system. I am excited that this historic investment will enable us to reduce congestion and pollution, improve safety, and keep people and the economy moving. **Combating the flu:** Seasonal influenza means missed time with loved ones, lost time at work and school, and potential long-term health and financial consequences. The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention estimates there were 640,000 flu hospitalizations and 57,000 flu deaths occurred during the 2022 flu season – that is higher than the number of Americans killed in motor vehicle accidents. We can prevent these deaths by being better prepared. I believe we must make a strong investment in seasonal and pandemic flu infrastructure to keep people healthy and safe. That is why I introduced legislation to ensure the country is prepared to tackle the next public health emergency. With a new Speaker of the House elected, we simply cannot waste any more time. If we are going to take expedient action to pass a budget, to lower costs for working families, to tackle climate change, and make our communities safer — **we**** _must_****take back the House majority if we are going to accomplish anything.** [**Will you make a contribution of $13 to my campaign before our October end-of-month deadline?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72258454/434739917/1596212816?refcode=2023-10-26-johnson&recurring=&amount=13&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=1ea627ee-3b74-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWE2MjdlZS0zYjc0LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GXdPQfGUgPo4l5ilbdZpDf5f8KMuqcQiNUR4RCXJFwo=) More soon, _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: Clean water, infrastructure investments, and combating the flu. | | | | As we get ready to close the books on October, I have to admit I am frustrated. We have lost nearly an entire month to the chaos caucus and their political grandstanding. While they were arguing amongst themselves and frankly, wasting valuable time here is what I have been up to: Ensuring clean water for families and communities balancing essential protections of the health of our environment and our local economies: Through my work on the Transportation and Infrastructure committee, I introduced new legislation that will counter the damaging ruling in the Supreme Court's Sackett decision. That decision left 50% of wetlands and 70% streams unprotected. But clean water is the difference between healthy communities and sick ones; thriving businesses and stunted ones; and preserved natural environments and polluted ones — each of which are critical to Northwest Washingtonians. This legislation will reinstate the bipartisan partnership between federal and state governments to protect our waterways. If passed, it will establish a level playing field for industry to thrive while still protecting critical natural resources. = The Bipartisan Infrastructure Law provides more historic investments in Washington highways, bridges, and electric vehicle charging stations: This month, the Federal Highway Administration announced a $1.08 billion award for Washington state's Department of Transportation to construct and repair critical infrastructure, including highways ($934.4 million), bridges ($130.7 million), and electric vehicle charging stations ($15.1 million). These funds help create more jobs and build a cleaner, greener, safer and more accessible transportation system. I am excited that this historic investment will enable us to reduce congestion and pollution, improve safety, and keep people and the economy moving. Combating the flu: Seasonal influenza means missed time with loved ones, lost time at work and school, and potential long-term health and financial consequences. The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention estimates there were 640,000 flu hospitalizations and 57,000 flu deaths occurred during the 2022 flu season – that is higher than the number of Americans killed in motor vehicle accidents. We can prevent these deaths by being better prepared. I believe we must make a strong investment in seasonal and pandemic flu infrastructure to keep people healthy and safe. That is why I introduced legislation to ensure the country is prepared to tackle the next public health emergency. With a new Speaker of the House elected, we simply cannot waste any more time. If we are going to take expedient action to pass a budget, to lower costs for working families, to tackle climate change, and make our communities safer — we musttake back the House majority if we are going to accomplish anything. = More soon, Rick | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by . name: Mike Johnson
subject: How I lead
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life.

|
[ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6f222de224aa45279820da0cee02a5c6&_e=Axvgu36YFNaJy6MLX7O2lNn8BnZ9LFxQ8ud54f-iLn47Q60LwynYuuaxOEEg7VIUUVXQAU2xA6iKQxDLmld7DJH7JO4gJGS6ZJj3-4p4Qlsla-bteBtk4mfv5L6Xw6TG0PEizQKHt1xrfA91LBTrmcMiUZILnxmhGjLgi83xXTbkmVaylG2rnS2YxQTi-9aA5_4C31cDk6ryBeQT7l7h1L2FPB1O5N7nOhaY9rb-YFWSQ0Rpu2GpLgBAswoHPZ2IfBn3GOOnK6bDL-xLfls-2Gl_alZPjS_oLl7nDGK3zGfE9fNg0M6LGZ_v4fOZac3FH3ur7CJs5Nauk-C6xbiNyh1O3YJSKokHlmyvqTnlWM4qa3_y7nYZ0ZRMa92rh9ck)
---
Fellow American,

The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them.

**Faith.** Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

**Family.** Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way.

**Freedom.** It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I've devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress.

[**This is a simple truth:**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6f222de224aa45279820da0cee02a5c6&_e=Axvgu36YFNaJy6MLX7O2lNn8BnZ9LFxQ8ud54f-iLn47Q60LwynYuuaxOEEg7VIUUVXQAU2xA6iKQxDLmld7DJH7JO4gJGS6ZJj3-4p4Qlsla-bteBtk4mfv5L6Xw6TG0PEizQKHt1xrfA91LBTrmcMiUZILnxmhGjLgi83xXTbkmVaylG2rnS2YxQTi-9aA5_4C31cDk6ryBeQT7l7h1L2FPB1O5N7nOhaY9rb-YFV0Y0WxCw3Y8Ug6Y2ykDvsQjCD3MfyDW8Mp-z6Bs7vg4UkSuECFA479114r0jCmajcQ9iLuL0d5dqrt3AEPDL-i5ox3GfoDIWZumXulcPhaMPLvQLPI0UaYwtXdHfXktR5JDqNcyzPijvvLkscIdebz) America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are!

[** SUPPORT MIKE JOHNSON > **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6f222de224aa45279820da0cee02a5c6&_e=Axvgu36YFNaJy6MLX7O2lNn8BnZ9LFxQ8ud54f-iLn47Q60LwynYuuaxOEEg7VIUUVXQAU2xA6iKQxDLmld7DJH7JO4gJGS6ZJj3-4p4Qlsla-bteBtk4mfv5L6Xw6TG0PEizQKHt1xrfA91LBTrmcMiUZILnxmhGjLgi83xXTbkmVaylG2rnS2YxQTi-9aA5_4C31cDk6ryBeQT7l7h1L2FPB1O5N7nOhaY9rb-YFXaIvYhdohA-Jbei85QB9PYHLJiiCE9ChQ9O1l-JxLrKwieiVuahiL8y344L65dIqyc2_8i1K3wl0KODB5X4CADWcMoTBnw6t3nxak42sf43xnOgFN-avJtpyUJmZehOMBJrTwxzjR116p4oKcnhfFC)

Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness.**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It's the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support - to restore our country and defend our values. Can you make a donation immediately?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6f222de224aa45279820da0cee02a5c6&_e=Axvgu36YFNaJy6MLX7O2lNn8BnZ9LFxQ8ud54f-iLn47Q60LwynYuuaxOEEg7VIUUVXQAU2xA6iKQxDLmld7DJH7JO4gJGS6ZJj3-4p4Qlsla-bteBtk4mfv5L6Xw6TG0PEizQKHt1xrfA91LBTrmcMiUZILnxmhGjLgi83xXTbkmVaylG2rnS2YxQTi-9aA5_4C31cDk6ryBeQT7l7h1L2FPB1O5N7nOhaY9rb-YFVKtW7xA5Hn2yPNxryVKyitQlWfxxaEVBhu3Fh6tK7o76xIdbBjiSxLqe0dk8E7-_OIeNKiNZFO4K6rEapTSftwhktvlYVQgZPPF2CKXp7zLu9G8-qM5ZK5TUjF8h2MGiy1Qd-FWnrRFq5KPE58iJxL)

clean_body: I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life. | Fellow American, The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them. Faith. Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people. Family. Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way. Freedom. It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I've devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress. America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are! Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives. This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness. We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It's the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here. Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we're running out of time. I'm not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It's why I have been a trusted ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It's also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference - one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House - and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee. We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, The path we're on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around-- IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW. We MUST act, and we must do so today. Thank you for all you do, and God bless. Mike Johnson Speaker of the House | MIKE JOHNSON * Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Katie Porter
subject: What we can do about Mike Johnson
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Johnson represents the most extreme, conservative side of the party.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=32099%2E3422442%2EdDiZu8)
Derek, yesterday, House Republicans elected Mike Johnson to be Speaker of the House. Kevin McCarthy was no moderate, but Johnson represents the most extreme, conservative side of the party. In addition to being a 2020 election denier, he’s:
* Anti-abortion
* Anti-LGBTQ+
* Anti-Social Security
* Anti-Medicare
* Anti-democracy

**Now, it’s our party’s job to show voters a different way forward, instead of the hard-right path the GOP continues to walk.** House Republicans have just a nine seat majority, and some of Democrats' best pick-up opportunities are right here in California.
California is key to flipping the House and making Johnson’s Speakership a short one. I turned a red Orange County seat blue in 2018, so I know firsthand the support candidates need, how to talk with voters of all persuasions, and how to turnout Democrats on Election Day. **My responsibility as a Senate candidate is to uplift down-ballot candidates so that Democrats win big across the country, across every level of government in 2024.**
That’s exactly what our campaign is doing—let’s show Republicans we’re not going to stand by. **[Can you chip in today to help us reach key voters up and down the state?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231026-1?refcode=EMAM26_1_CAL_20231026_V1_F&refcode2=32099_3422442_dDiZu8&akid=32099%2E3422442%2EdDiZu8)**

name: Emily Feltz, Team ODP
subject: Our final fundraising deadline before the election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
this is it.
|
Hi there, team.

Well, this is it! Today, we’re officially kicking off our last big fundraising goal before Election Day.

We’ve set an ambitious goal of raising $10,000 before midnight on Halloween (spooky, I know). Meeting this goal means we can embark on our final push to turn out voters to vote YES on Issue 1 and show the anti-choice extremists in Ohio that we refuse to be silenced.

**[Can you donate $5 today to kick start our fundraising for our final deadline before the election?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72259325/434742520/1884329654?refcode=odp_em_231026_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTdlOWQ3Mi0zZTc0LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zSWHfA2Y2uLB7eceKJqNTv90eV1C3awP7HHyWX7k21g=)**

I’m sure it’s clear by now that yes, this election is about protecting our reproductive freedoms, but it’s also about more than that. Supporting Issue 1 on Election Day would protect the right to reproductive care in our state constitution, but it would also send a message to the special interest cronies that have been taking over our state: we won’t go back.

They think that with enough dirty tricks and just the right amount of money, they can control Ohio. Voting YES on Issue 1 next month would tell them that **Ohioans are in charge**. It would tell them that no matter what they do, **they can’t take away our voices**. That a small powerful few can’t take away the power of the people.

So let’s prove that the people are in charge of Ohio. **[Donate anything you’re able right now to help us reach our $10,000 end-of-month goal so we can protect the right to reproductive health care and put the power back into the hands of Ohioans>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72259326/434742521/1884329654?refcode=odp_em_231026_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTdlOWQ3Mi0zZTc0LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zSWHfA2Y2uLB7eceKJqNTv90eV1C3awP7HHyWX7k21g=)**

Thank you,

Emily Feltz, Team ODP | **************A reproductive rights initiative is on the Ohio ballot this November. Can Ohio Democrats count on you to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to help fuel our fight to protect reproductive rights in our state constitution? →************** | ********[********](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72259327/434742522/1075263506?refcode=odp_em_231025_1&amount=5;email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTdlOWQ3Mi0zZTc0LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zSWHfA2Y2uLB7eceKJqNTv90eV1C3awP7HHyWX7k21g=)****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72259328/434742523/1884329654?refcode=odp_em_231026_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTdlOWQ3Mi0zZTc0LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zSWHfA2Y2uLB7eceKJqNTv90eV1C3awP7HHyWX7k21g=) ************

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michael=20Nixon?=
subject: Congratulations to Speaker Johnson!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Nixon for Congress 2024
body:
A conservative leader like Speaker Johnson will keep America strong! | | | | | |
---
[](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e112c23e10549839640d4155d&id=71465dd7e7&e=cc1921084c)
|
---
Friend,
It is a great pleasure to congratulate America’s new Speaker of the House, Mike Jordan!
Before joining Congress in 2016, Speaker Johnson was a prominent conservative leader and constitutional lawyer taking the lead in cases that helped secure the sanctity of our nation’s education system, freedom of speech, freedom of religion, and election integrity. Doing this on top of being a full-time parent and business owner is no small task, and I know America’s Speaker will bring that same kind of commitment to his new role.
What we need is more voices like Speaker Johnson, people who are self-made and who actually represent the people of their district. Leaders who won’t run away from tough fights and know how to build bridges, and I can’t wait to have that opportunity in our district!
| [SUPPORT CONSERVATIVE LEADERS](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e112c23e10549839640d4155d&id=e32fea78b6&e=cc1921084c)
