name: =?utf-8?Q?State=20Representative=20Ryan=20Chamberlin?=
subject: Weekly Newsletter
body:
Update from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/voteryanchamberlin/conservative-businessman-ryan-chamberlin-12657373?e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| |
---
| | | **UPDATE FROM REP. RYAN CHAMBERLIN**
---
| **Hello, everyone!

Thank you for reading my weekly update. It is an honor to share with you what I have been up to in the district and Tallahassee over the last several weeks. **I want to hear about the issues important to you, so please do not hesitate to reach out if you have any questions or concerns. **If we work together, we can make District 24 stronger than ever.** We have a lot to do, but I am looking forward to the strides we will make to better our community in the upcoming months.

**Before we get into this week’s update, I want to address the horrific attacks by Hamas in Israel and the resulting war. **What happened in the Middle East was an atrocity, and the pure brutality shown by Hamas is completely reprehensible.** I hope the district will join me in keeping the Israeli people and the Jewish community in our thoughts and prayers during this very difficult time.** In Florida, we will always stand with our ally, Israel.
---
| | **Back in Tallahassee**
---
|
---
| **It was great to be back in Tallahassee last week for interim committee meetings.** For the upcoming legislative session, I have the privilege of serving on many important committees, including the **Judiciary Committee** , **Civil Justice Subcommittee** , and the **Select Committee on Health Innovation**.

**Click[here](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=06ab56e668&e=d1c1b9864f) to see the complete list of my committee assignments for the 2024 Legislative Session.**

I had the opportunity to listen to some informative presentations during meetings with the **House Select Committee on Health Innovation** , **House Education Quality Subcommittee** ,**Regulatory Reform & Economic Development Subcommittee**, and **State Administration & Technology Appropriations Subcommittee**. I learned a great deal during these meetings, and I look forward to using this information in a way that will best serve District 24 and Florida during the upcoming legislative session.
---
| | **Leadership Ocala Marion**
---
|
---
|
---
---
| **I want to thank Leadership Ocala Marion for inviting me and the county’s legislative delegation to speak to some of our community’s wonderful business leaders.** Our constituents play a critical role in the legislative process, and it is always an honor to hear from residents on the issues important to them.**I promise to always fight for economic opportunity and free enterprise in Tallahassee!** Thank you for allowing me to serve you.
---
| | **Chi Animal Hospital Grand Opening**
---
|
---
---
| **Congratulations to Chi Animal Hospital on its grand opening in Reddick.** It was also great to celebrate the SPCA of Ocala and Molly’s Law Statewide Animal Abuser Database Movement statue unveiling.**I had a wonderful time at the event and was honored to be invited.**
---
|
---
| **Thank you so much to all of you who supported my campaign and stood by me!** I am grateful for the opportunity to serve my community and make a positive impact.

Truly yours,
**Representative Ryan Chamberlin**
---
|
---
| [LEARN MORE ABOUT ME AT MY WEBSITE](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=9a760ffc8d&e=d1c1b9864f "LEARN MORE ABOUT ME AT MY WEBSITE")
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative, All rights reserved._
Paid by Ryan Chamberlin, Republican, for State Representative

**Our mailing address is:**
Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative526 E Park AveTallahassee, FL 32301-2568
[Add us to your address book](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/vcard?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&e=d1c1b9864f&c=845cdec4c1) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&e=d1c1b9864f&c=845cdec4c1).

I learned a great deal during these meetings, and I look forward to using this information in a way that will best serve District 24 and Florida during the upcoming legislative session. | | Leadership Ocala Marion | | | I want to thank Leadership Ocala Marion for inviting me and the county’s legislative delegation to speak to some of our community’s wonderful business leaders. Our constituents play a critical role in the legislative process, and it is always an honor to hear from residents on the issues important to them.I promise to always fight for economic opportunity and free enterprise in Tallahassee! Thank you for allowing me to serve you. | | Chi Animal Hospital Grand Opening | | Congratulations to Chi Animal Hospital on its grand opening in Reddick. It was also great to celebrate the SPCA of Ocala and Molly’s Law Statewide Animal Abuser Database Movement statue unveiling.I had a wonderful time at the event and was honored to be invited. | | Thank you so much to all of you who supported my campaign and stood by me! I am grateful for the opportunity to serve my community and make a positive impact. Truly yours, Representative Ryan Chamberlin | | "LEARN MORE ABOUT ME AT MY WEBSITE" | | | Copyright © 2023 Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative, All rights reserved. Paid by Ryan Chamberlin, Republican, for State Representative Our mailing address is: Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative526 E Park AveTallahassee, FL 32301-2568 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: The New Pennsylvania Project
subject: NPP hits the ground in support of Judge Dan McCaffery
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter]
Hello friends!
We hope this edition of the New Pennsylvania Project eBlast finds you well.
Please take a few moments to check out all the important news you can use, volunteer and career opportunities, and other resources as we prepare for the November 7th local, municipal and judicial elections.
NPP knocks doors statewide ahead of Nov. 7th election
Montgomery County canvassers ready to go knock doors for GOTV [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/IMG_4786.jpg]
The New Pennsylvania Project kicked off our Get Out The Vote (GOTV) efforts on Wednesday with a statewide launch that saw our canvassers knocking doors across eight counties in Pennsylvania - with more to come! Our organization's GOTV efforts will be focused on asking Pennsylvania voters to support Judge Dan McCaffery for PA Supreme Court while also asking voters to make their voices heard in all down-ballot races. Our GOTV activities includes; door-knocking, phone banking, a mail campaign, and text banking. All of our efforts will continue through Election Day on November 7th. #CourtsMatter
News You Can Use
Is Allegheny County politics going tribal? Centrist traditions will be tested Nov. 7. [https://www.wesa.fm/politics-government/2023-10-17/allegheny-county-rockey-innamorato-moderates]
(WESA)
This year’s race for Allegheny County executive — in addition to swaying key policies around the jail, economic development, taxes and the environment — will provide the clearest picture yet of where the county and region are headed politically.
Pa. Republicans say Gov. Shapiro can’t just adopt automatic voter registration. Here’s what the law says. [https://www.votebeat.org/pennsylvania/2023/10/4/23902492/pennsylvania-automatic-voter-registration-josh-shapiro-motor-voter/]
(VoteBeat)
Republicans at the state and national level are still crying foul over Pennsylvania Governor Josh Shapiro’s announcement last month that the state had adopted automatic voter registration at motor vehicle offices.
PA House committee advances bills to repeal closed primary elections [https://www.cityandstatepa.com/politics/2023/10/pa-house-committee-advances-bills-repeal-closed-primary-elections/391291/]
(City & State)
Members of the House State Government Committee voted to approve two bills – House Bill 976 and House Bill 979 – that would repeal the state’s closed primary system and allow unaffiliated voters to vote in primaries, something that is not currently allowed under Pennsylvania’s election law.
Youth voter turnout in Philly is on the rise, but tens of thousands still don’t cast a ballot [https://billypenn.com/2023/10/22/youth-voter-turnout-philadelphia-campus-vote-project/]
(WHYY)
As the clock ticks closer to the November election, many college students and young eligible voters in Philadelphia aren’t registered to cast a ballot. And even when they are, many don’t come out to vote.
2023 Election: PA Voter Registration Numbers [https://www.politicspa.com/2023-election-pa-voter-registration-numbers/126962/]
(PoliticsPA)
According to the Pennsylvania Department of State figures from October 23, Democrats continue to hold an advantage in registration over Republicans in the Commonwealth. There are 3.897 million registered Dems (45.0%) to 3.451 million registered GOP voters (39.9%). There are 952,707 registered voters with no affiliation (11.0%) and 345,397 voters registered with a myriad of other parties.
Tweet of the Week
Twitter screenshot from a rally in Philadelphia [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/IMG_0195.jpg]
Election Resources 2023
A complete guide to the candidates for state Supreme Court [https://www.spotlightpa.org/news/2023/09/pennsylvania-election-2023-supreme-court-candidates/]
(Spotlight PA)
During Pennsylvania’s general election on Nov. 7, voters will select the newest state Supreme Court justice. The winner of the election will have considerable power over the interpretation of laws in the commonwealth, and will help determine the balance of the court in coming years.
A complete guide to the candidates for Commonwealth and Superior Courts [https://www.spotlightpa.org/news/2023/09/pennsylvania-election-2023-commonwealth-superior-court-candidates/]
(Spotlight PA)
On Nov. 7, Pennsylvanians will select a new judge for Commonwealth Court and two for Superior Court — and all of these new judges will immediately wield the power to referee legal disputes over state law and decide major criminal cases.
A complete guide to who is on the ballot, when to vote, how to vote, where to vote, casting mail ballots & more [https://www.spotlightpa.org/news/2023/10/pennsylvania-judicial-election-2023-polling-place-mail-ballot-complete-guide/]
(Spotlight PA)
Across the state, depending on where you live, there might also be municipal races on the ballot, for offices like mayor and school board, along with ballot questions.
In addition to the above resources, the affiliated organization New PA Project Education Fund has a sample ballot locator that can be accessed here [https://newpaprojecteducationfund.org/index.php/sample-ballots/] . Please note if you're county isn't currently listed, check back daily as we'll be adding links to those as counties make them available.
Instagram of the Week
Instagram screenshot celebrating Indigenous Peoples' Day [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/IMG_0197.jpg]
Voter Protection Hotlines
As we near election day, we wanted to make sure you had important contact info to all of the voter assistance hotlines should you have any questions or run into any issues while voting. Don't hesitate to reach out to the phone numbers below should a need arise!
*
Voter
Protection
Hotline:
1-866-OUR-VOTE
*
DOS
PA
Voter
Hotline:
1-877-VOTESPA
*
Spanish/English
Hotline:
1-888-VE-Y-VOTA
*
Asian
Languages
Hotline:
1-888-API-VOTE
*
Arabic/English
Hotline:
1-844-YALLA-US
Thank you for taking the time to stay informed. We'll be back in two weeks with the latest edition.
In solidarity,
#TeamNPP
PA ELECTION DATES:
Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023
Last day to request a mail-in or absentee ballot : October 31, 2023
We're on a mission to register new voters in the Commonwealth and expand the electorate.
Help us prepare for the upcoming municipal, judicial, and local elections in 2023!
Invest in our democracy [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?emci=94765bbc-8d5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=1068162]

West Chester, PA 19381
United States

| Peter With the election only two weeks away, the stakes have never been higher. Tomorrow is the last campaign finance deadline before election day and we need your help. We are presented with a unique opportunity to regain control of the Virginia Senate, and this endeavor requires the support of every concerned citizen like yourself. While we currently have a Republican governor, the Democrats have erected a formidable barrier in the Senate, obstructing the progress we need to bring positive change to our great commonwealth. As we approach the end of our fundraising deadline, I cannot emphasize enough how essential your contribution is. Every dollar you donate goes directly into our campaign efforts to reach voters, spread our message, and ensure that we emerge victorious in this election.
Your contribution, no matter the amount, makes a tangible difference in our fight. Whether it's $20, $50, $100, or $500, each dollar brings us closer to a better Virginia. I want to express my heartfelt gratitude to all of you for your unwavering support. We truly couldn't have come this far without your dedication and belief in our cause. Your humble servant,

name: Connor Lounsbury
subject: A quick explainer:
body:
Friend, it’s Connor from Team Moore! 👋

We’ve mentioned Maryland’s campaign fundraising freeze in our past emails, but let me explain what this entails and what it means for Wes.

➡️ The moment the General Assembly gavels in to start their legislative session in January, Maryland officials are prohibited from accepting any donations and holding fundraising events until the end of the session in April.

➡️ The political fundraising freeze applies to Maryland state officials — including the Governor.

➡️ That means we only have until January 10th to raise what we’ll need to be prepared for the upcoming freeze!

That’s right — in 76 days, we’ll have to pause ALL of our efforts to support Wes. So we’re building up our campaign’s reserves now to make sure we have the strongest quarter possible before the start of the legislative session.

So I’m going to ask you to make a contribution right now to support Wes. We have to make sure we’re ahead of where we need to be before the freeze. Can I count on your gift of $5 or more today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20231026-1?refcode=em20231026]

Donate » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20231026-1?refcode=em20231026]

I, and the whole team, are incredibly grateful for your support.

Connor Lounsbury
Team Moore

---
This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Update Your Information: https://support.wesmoore.com/a/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: unsubscribe: https://support.wesmoore.com/p/naFTamTwwEaXtoxkWZyUYA2?unsubscribedata=F25mCXjSvXwSEeY9KIyq5TaX4uO37D%2FpVdaCHYv8Q0PCpdxAQeA5kHva9KgAY04ARQ%2FhjyiDK%2Bh0JamAargesDUN1cLevAMAPFvwPi9MIL21X1xscVYbzc5I4GKlz7xMeLKK6wvUzRKopce2nxRasMhS3oGq5nylWZtXV8Y8MTE4NbjaGum9jiwx9LxcJf8PCxeG17oO1YQKuK01ZREoMb2mmDcESHLKbSce1iiZWph0%2F8MHWy50jX7MKGkMN%2BTo%2B9EcEceS87N%2Fy1H0vtSk26rOAG%2FeiejQZtnCqAJqVCsf41c5HsCGrMFqQaOKIbthh%2BIKiirwm0laNBOKMZXREkKoImgRlmso5LI4BLPRWJvRF8hzH214OQ8DtKREIi08cn8MsEVUJCzqb7mge%2BoepYI8KpWuvX3XAp3fsiCtbTwyt2WScUhrFfl1Gv58ieCj

Wes Moore for Maryland
PO Box 50123
Baltimore, MD 21211

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: BREAKING: Marjorie Taylor Greene is trying to censure Rashida
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Breaking news, Peter:

Far-right extremist and white nationalist Marjorie Taylor Greene just
filed a resolution to censure Rashida Tlaib for speaking out in support of
Palestine.

[1]NBC News headline: Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene files censure resolution
accusing Rep. Rashida Tlaib of inciting an insurrection

These attacks against Rashida — the only Palestinian American member of
Congress — are getting uglier by the day, all because she is bravely
calling for a ceasefire and an end to the Israeli military’s genocide and
ethnic cleansing of Palestine.

Justice Democrats has stood with Rashida since Day 1 and we continue to
support her as she stands on the right side of history in the fight for
human rights.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231026.8MKLJg&refcode=em20231026-31539&amount=3&t=1001&akid=31539%2E1203867%2EbxnKeU ]Help us ensure we have the resources to re-elect her and every member
of the Squad next year: rush $3 or whatever you can now →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231026.8MKLJg&refcode=em20231026-31539&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=31539%2E1203867%2EbxnKeU ]Contribute $3

— Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1021&akid=31539%2E1203867%2EbxnKeU ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1022&akid=31539%2E1203867%2EbxnKeU ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231026-31539-footer&t=1023&refcode2=31539_1203867_bxnKeU&akid=31539%2E1203867%2EbxnKeU

[ ]Help us ensure we have the resources to re-elect her and every member of the Squad next year: rush $3 or whatever you can now → [ ]Contribute $3 — Justice Democrats Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a ceasefire through [ ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them using [ ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this critical moment. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

| | Last night was a POWERFUL time of prayer and worship! We sang in English _,_ Arabic, _AND_ Hebrew, and gained valuable insight into the true nature of the war against Israel and what we as Believers can do to respond! We put together a short video to highlight just how God moved last night! Watch it below and share it with your friends and family! _**WATCH ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎**_

| | I hope you're doing well! Your support means a lot to me, and I wanted to share a bit about what I stand for. At the heart of my campaign for the U.S. Senate are several core values, including supporting the Second Amendment, advocating for limited government, and putting America first. My commitment to these principles guides my mission to create a better future for our nation. Your support empowers me to stand strong and work towards a more prosperous America. I believe in the power of collective effort and invite you to join me on this journey. Your support is crucial, and I am grateful for it.

name: Sepi Shyne
subject: What we heard from you:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SEPI SHYNE FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=wrpr_hdr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=wrpr_hdr]
Friend,

This campaign is about standing up for all of us, for our communities, for the people who have been marginalized and ignored for far too long. To do that, we need to know what's important to you. And when we asked, you answered.

In your responses, I heard from supporters worried about the nationwide attack on LGTBQ+ civil rights, and the complete dismantling of reproductive rights.

I heard resounding concerns about climate change and our environment, and the attacks on voting rights and our democracy.

I heard from people who are fighting for fair wages, better healthcare benefits and more affordable housing in their communities.

I'm so grateful to all of you who shared your thoughts with me. My team and I read every single response, and your priorities are my priorities.

I'll never stop listening to you and fighting for the things that matter to you, friend. Together, we will win important progressive victories for our communities.

That work is powered by your support. Will you chip in a few dollars to fuel our people-powered movement? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=231026_ss_heard_l1]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately:

Contribute $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=231026_ss_heard_el1&refcode2=42e75244-4274-ee11-b004-00224832eb73]

Contribute $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=231026_ss_heard_el2&refcode2=42e75244-4274-ee11-b004-00224832eb73]

Contribute $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=231026_ss_heard_el3&refcode2=42e75244-4274-ee11-b004-00224832eb73]

Contribute $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=231026_ss_heard_el4&refcode2=42e75244-4274-ee11-b004-00224832eb73]

With gratitude,

Mayor Sepi Shyne
#WomanLifeFreedom
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/103922/images/Copy%20of%20Sepi%20high%20res%20headshot-min.jpg]
Mayor Sepi Shyne has taken on WeHo's biggest issues and delivered results. From raising the minimum wage to the highest in the nation to significantly reducing homelessness – she's running for Congress to fight for all of us. As the first out Iranian LGBTQ+ woman elected anywhere in the world, Sepi is committed to making the American dream a reality for everyone: For immigrants, the LGBTQ+ community, women, and anyone trying to make ends meet. It's our time to Shyne, make a donation today.
Will you join Sepi's team and support her for Congress?
Contribute Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=42e75244-4274-ee11-b004-00224832eb73]
GIVE Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=42e75244-4274-ee11-b004-00224832eb73]

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: There is only one way forward
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
My first message as Speaker of the United States House of Representatives. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=6ed24c95973f4a03b7986b26b3259376&_t=VIO87PoJfoTrZ_tdUUP5WKTpLD_yggXTAvPmB2Z--tVubMYXE8VM0yEXwQOXjYk_qhZ8MxyJxpV9RgWKHxBNFFo3MNSu15DkK8TFlZks8eI%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=6ed24c95973f4a03b7986b26b3259376&_t=VIO87PoJfoTrZ_tdUUP5WKTpLD_yggXTAvPmB2Z--tVubMYXE8VM0yEXwQOXjYk_qhZ8MxyJxpV9RgWKHxBNFFo3MNSu15DkK8TFlZks8eI%3D)
[ ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=6ed24c95973f4a03b7986b26b3259376&_e=7rUuGDhAJvXfIKnUwxjlcAirHpYIFGaYrR8SsbNuuqfDS6Ue2LanOkN2iVruQQUMKnvM881w3TIYpBa3zDj3-QgzdbQJXZDD7iMT0gmpoW4jnoYCjVlt9qVX6zhbZ-9gzXrO5MUpbe8IRCgWQ_TATumGDhs5d8ukg1hzoLE5Kj0CEclhLLfeLioX2Tju_rkpd6TdqQVAwcSoEJFmjZUzNanPicW7wPh8PHlh7Ij2eqYmX2L4VPYwPuE8IUAWgHAy-eqNUGRwgOd-LZoKF-U6DkvVYDbaO_BOUwDHmlRJvKb5tET6yhR5vSjvPcs9FbBTDCvv6gLsR7XHjrNTGpCJs0xquUiOtfp8JfYyf78OR0HM2-aOejaItRQQjRa29T122-YjLd2AUiv5kwTxymZpY3tWkXIvIt7dcKbBj4mGjJjia4-QXJIGWtPy55WuKAl79Sdw-32ooUDyqBLFEVYhajfnmEbVxmweYXARR1gzEZhXz8ZgG6_tqGLQzAze5T7Ur63lUe4x9ir4SR_a-UAyyXfE-4VG5Fbup1lH1Cfcrn9UTa7vRmJIHyFNUaUtT149)
---
Fellow American,

I write this having just been elected by my colleagues as the 56th Speaker of the United States House of Representatives.

The task of leading our House majority is a great one, and to say that I’m humbled by the faith my colleagues have bestowed on me is an understatement.

My message to you today is this: When Republicans come together, there is no measure of what we can achieve.

In the near term, my team and I will work to make sure that we’re passing responsible, fiscally conservative legislation to fund our government and support our military. **And with an election a little more than twelve months away, we’ll work around the clock to grow our House majority and help EVERY Republican incumbent in their reelection campaign.**

clean_body: My first message as Speaker of the United States House of Representatives. | | Fellow American, I write this having just been elected by my colleagues as the 56th Speaker of the United States House of Representatives. The task of leading our House majority is a great one, and to say that I’m humbled by the faith my colleagues have bestowed on me is an understatement. My message to you today is this: When Republicans come together, there is no measure of what we can achieve. In the near term, my team and I will work to make sure that we’re passing responsible, fiscally conservative legislation to fund our government and support our military. And with an election a little more than twelve months away, we’ll work around the clock to grow our House majority and help EVERY Republican incumbent in their reelection campaign. But with help from MAGA patriots like YOU, they won't stand a chance against us. | The swamp despises every single pro-Trump conservative in Congress. But they hate me more than most because I've consistently stepped up to lead from the front in the battle against the corrupt Washington establishment. I'm one of the 20 patriots who held the line to secure concessions in January I CENSURED Adam Schiff for framing President Trump as a traitor I'm pushing to hold a vote on Biden's impeachment as soon as possible And while many America First warriors in Congress represent safe Republican districts, I represent Charlie Crist 's old congressional seat here in Florida - one of the handful of pickups that gave conservatives the House majority. That 's why the swamp and Biden's deep state cronies are unleashing their full wrath against me as they go all-in to replace me with this left-wing puppet. ** To compete with the millions they'll spend against our grassroots campaign over the next year, I need your help reaching our critical fundraising goals. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Save endangered orcas, people, and the planet from toxic cruise pollution
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2077398?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | Friend, imagine being a Southern Resident orca. You are one of the most recognizable killer whales -- with mostly black smooth skin, a white underside, and white patches near your eyes. You can _**grow up to about 30 feet long**_ and can _**weigh up to 6 tons!**_ To stay nourished, you must maintain your blubber layer to support _your ability to swim, regulate your body heat, and stay healthy in times of short food supply._ As you streamline through the ocean hungry and eager to eat, you are in search for your primary food source -- Chinook salmon. You go to your favorite spot where all the salmon usually gather, **but all the fish are gone.** Instead, the water is green and murky -- YUCK! **If you do not eat, you will become weak and soon _DIE_ of _starvation and malnutrition._ ** **Cruise ship pollution is contributing to the harm and destruction of our marine ecosystem.** The harmful toxic waste from Big Cruise is dumped into the ocean along with excessive noise pollution that disrupts nearby communities and marine life. Scrubbers were supposed to be one of the solutions to clean up the cruise industry’s dirty smokestacks. Instead, these scrubbers _merely_ convert the industry’s dirty air pollution into toxic water pollution. [**If we do not act soon, Big Cruise will continue harming our oceans, people, and the planet. Friend, will you help by using your voice to speak up against cruise pollution and corporate greed? **](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2077399?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2077400?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Cruise ship pollution has a significant impact on our oceans, Friend. The excessive waste can lead to oxygen depletion and the spread of pathogenic bacteria; this causes _toxic algae blooms, dead zones, and other damaging impacts to the marine ecosystem._ The toxic waste and noise pollution from cruise ships drives away fish that nearby communities and marine life rely on for survival. It is also putting the remaining **75 Southern resident orca whales** at risk of __**EXTINCTION.**__
One of the worst offenders -- Carnival Corporation -- carried _**11,000 tons of hazardous heavy fuel oil**_ in a single year through Arctic waters -- nearly three times as much as its largest competitor.
Big Cruise and Big Polluters don’t much care about the future of our planet when their pockets are full. **But we know that environmentalists like YOU will not allow corporate greed to destroy our oceans.** [**Friend, we need 2,956 more signatures to protect the remaining vulnerable orca whales from EXTINCTION, people, and the planet. Add your name by 11:59pm TONIGHT before it’s too late! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2077401?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2077402?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for helping protect our oceans,
Friends of the Earth**
|

Fellow American,

I’m Kevin Lincoln, the conservative Republican who is running to defeat leftist Josh Harder in California’s highly-targeted 9th Congressional District – _one of the most competitive House races in the country._

**I’m a Marine Corps veteran, mayor of my hometown of Stockton, a proud father & husband, and I’m running to rescue American families and workers from Washington D.C.’s broken politics.**

[ ** Send a Marine & Mayor to Congress ➞ **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=949b72c54a664f54b7550776eb4d4308&_e=AtjG1tk022DA0hxei5NWjZl3uVHLRm4_0uKj7HBOGgNtmhQOQqC4hU6mqZYNbG8BVzZhg2iKONZyAM5mYnOe5ajdJU_J--KsIepHa3z3pZxwDYOnx361FL8NjtdfsIukyyEreU_tTQnct2uyOsJ2FCMyUzzymNWyW-CXoyIhSdV6jsdh8izAdWjy6bYldRz-tcN8DeNuGlU3nZQuCk7J8wvMt5Cg1cDkza9bpBcyakVUEVvrfQMVsAKotiDt7Dk7AFqyFdSWPi1_4oIxawMbmDVxVXDfojIXayyMv153EBpfbpSDGTHVpcF5u2FU6V75YimpN6F7qAsRJsOIlni4D3m06Eu9PL37p-6kkycd4ZLvefzQEzOZsZv7_nu-F4YDqfQbf4LB1-qV56kndxF_gA%3D%3D)
Service has always defined my life. I joined the United States Marine Corps in 2001 and became a military police officer.

After 9/11, I was assigned to Marine One to serve and protect the President of the United States.

When I completed my military service, I graduated from college while working full time and raising a family. But my urge to serve hadn’t gone. I continued to serve my community as a pastor and as a non-profit leader.

**Now, one of the greatest honors of my life is being able to serve as the Mayor of my hometown of Stockton, California.**

As Mayor, my team and I have revitalized our local economy, attracted businesses that have created jobs, balanced our budget, tackled homelessness, and reduced violent crime.

America as a whole is suffering these same problems, but the politicians in the White House and Congress don’t have what it takes to fix them.

**I do, and that’s why I’m running for Congress. My country needs me again, and I’m ready to serve.**

[**Will you send in a Marine and mayor to fix Washington’s broken politics and get our country back on track by supporting my campaign with a $5, $10 or $15 contribution today?**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=949b72c54a664f54b7550776eb4d4308&_e=AtjG1tk022DA0hxei5NWjZl3uVHLRm4_0uKj7HBOGgNtmhQOQqC4hU6mqZYNbG8BVzZhg2iKONZyAM5mYnOe5ajdJU_J--KsIepHa3z3pZxwDYOnx361FL8NjtdfsIukyyEreU_tTQnct2uyOsJ2FCMyUzzymNWyW-CXoyIhSdV6jsdh8izAdWjy6bYldRz-tcN8DeNuGlU3nZQuCk7J8wvMt5Cg1cDkza9bpBcyakX0cZzXXBJo77eWY6imfJfNK-PbwO47WQQN7eFVcSbylxFSqnssj3hI2zH4iCy98wBYZFiieqkjo6I85RnphAFsSwxVMiEbBH7YZ725jlq1vEGDVxRvPZtyGl6ppshX8xfZ1yvKpja5mEdlZVhDhmJd1iQgOQgQROvxiXfwm301nA%3D%3D)

[ ** Send a Marine & Mayor to Congress ➞ **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=949b72c54a664f54b7550776eb4d4308&_e=AtjG1tk022DA0hxei5NWjZl3uVHLRm4_0uKj7HBOGgNtmhQOQqC4hU6mqZYNbG8BVzZhg2iKONZyAM5mYnOe5ajdJU_J--KsIepHa3z3pZxwDYOnx361FL8NjtdfsIukyyEreU_tTQnct2uyOsJ2FCMyUzzymNWyW-CXoyIhSdV6jsdh8izAdWjy6bYldRz-tcN8DeNuGlU3nZQuCk7J8wvMt5Cg1cDkza9bpBcyakWApePF2J9nXECv00x4VAhvLA72mZUeSXHXKeCWdveTXS0hxpug0v0_soot-wpKfXLexXDAb2kVai5APijjBwILrwq2p8keTaLOdZ2Kptj_Pl8YGaBpUVp1FBpyN893FOdXCVIpcjVuwcs2EJ5iEHK9OHBoBQc5-JkIIzbz_2GmhQ%3D%3D)
Career politicians like Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi and Josh Harder have created the mess we’re in, so why would we think they could get us out of it?

We need to get inflation under control, revive our economy, reprioritize public safety, support our veterans, and make the politicians in Washington D.C. work for and serve the American people once again.

**California’s 9th Congressional District is a toss-up, top-target House seat and one of our best chances to defeat a career Democrat politician and restore conservative representation.**

[**But I need your help to win the fight so I can make it to Congress and get to work. Will you send in a Marine and mayor? Please join me today with a contribution of just $5, $10, $15 or more.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=949b72c54a664f54b7550776eb4d4308&_e=AtjG1tk022DA0hxei5NWjZl3uVHLRm4_0uKj7HBOGgNtmhQOQqC4hU6mqZYNbG8BVzZhg2iKONZyAM5mYnOe5ajdJU_J--KsIepHa3z3pZxwDYOnx361FL8NjtdfsIukyyEreU_tTQnct2uyOsJ2FCMyUzzymNWyW-CXoyIhSdV6jsdh8izAdWjy6bYldRz-tcN8DeNuGlU3nZQuCk7J8wvMt5Cg1cDkza9bpBcyakWegcQpWLb5y3g_IEPz-UX9i1XBUYopjUz1Wbc3HzJzxgrHJSTHiVvci5BEvkIeiJR4pHDyM1w1Ar2Dp568-z2P15ru4KuR1EcjRMVh-942B97X-39eD0Atyu7wg1sPCneJAco2h6AT1XIUW-kCbFyDnhneh3JENZM3CMsDvlGnHQ%3D%3D)

For America,

Kevin Lincoln
Veteran, USMC
Republican for Congress

[ ** Send a Marine & Mayor to Congress ➞ **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=949b72c54a664f54b7550776eb4d4308&_e=AtjG1tk022DA0hxei5NWjZl3uVHLRm4_0uKj7HBOGgNtmhQOQqC4hU6mqZYNbG8BVzZhg2iKONZyAM5mYnOe5ajdJU_J--KsIepHa3z3pZxwDYOnx361FL8NjtdfsIukyyEreU_tTQnct2uyOsJ2FCMyUzzymNWyW-CXoyIhSdV6jsdh8izAdWjy6bYldRz-tcN8DeNuGlU3nZQuCk7J8wvMt5Cg1cDkza9bpBcyakVCPXv7rFcFDvVi_4l7rKeK5g_AB0BBNASKp64Dl6pNwvKGnzDmBnCd5Yab40kf_y_4Y-nKOWwCjGxchSDzblR0T0ZTVY5EqIgN2s3wI-j361LBIcnb_qMwrulcCj793dZhn0lwn-lNpuWhkZGDuGUL3xm5Ly5UOl70sKfea1MUOg%3D%3D)

| **Meet Kevin Lincoln
**
My name is Kevin Lincoln, and my story, is the Valley’s story. I am a 3rd generation Stocktonian, raising a 4th generation in the city I love. I’m the grandson of Mexican immigrants, and my stepfather is an Army veteran.

Like many Stocktonians, my family has overcome economic setbacks. My own father struggled to survive on these streets, and was at one time, homeless. But I never let adversity define me. I joined the Marines and served in the White House Military Office, assigned to Marine One. I graduated college while working full-time and raising a family. I’ve worked in corporate America and served our community as a pastor, and as a non-profit leader.

I’m blessed with a beautiful wife, Bonnie, and two amazing children. I’ve lived a life of service, but the greatest honor of my life has been giving back to my community, through serving as Mayor of my hometown, Stockton.
[ ** SEND KEVIN TO CONGRESS ➞ **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=949b72c54a664f54b7550776eb4d4308&_e=AtjG1tk022DA0hxei5NWjZl3uVHLRm4_0uKj7HBOGgNtmhQOQqC4hU6mqZYNbG8BVzZhg2iKONZyAM5mYnOe5ajdJU_J--KsIepHa3z3pZxwDYOnx361FL8NjtdfsIukyyEreU_tTQnct2uyOsJ2FCMyUzzymNWyW-CXoyIhSdV6jsdh8izAdWjy6bYldRz-tcN8DeNuGlU3nZQuCk7J8wvMt5Cg1cDkza9bpBcyakUe0M_XIlIqVrs-Yis-TwmX0v7w4RualsWjUbt6KiPjbZQoU3iDAu_HfdRkCB8Nzp8baeiP_npT198vJO7f75blGkE4srVqmVpDPFaiQbs0IonnIA_RhMGvNMqKnj3SVQHIOiJvmAulzyjM-Hmk-hFNAA_uc9eNupA9-OkkKZwPRA%3D%3D)

name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: The tragedy in Maine was the 565th mass shooting this year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | Peter —

Last night, at least sixteen people lost their lives, and many more were injured in Lewiston, Maine. Today, another community is traumatized and mourning the loss of their own. **When is enough _enough_?**

**The tragedy in Maine was the 565th mass shooting this year.** Our lawmakers should have prevented this – but Maine doesn’t require background checks on all gun sales; it doesn’t require a waiting period to purchase a weapon; it doesn’t ban assault weapons; and it doesn’t have red flag laws. Any one of these measures could have prevented this senseless massacre.

As a trauma surgeon with a long career treating victims and survivors of gun violence, I’ve lived through nights like last night–tried to save lives _destroyed_ by these weapons of war, and comforted family members devastated by the deaths of their loved ones.

We must reinstate the federal assault weapons ban. We must require universal background checks for all firearm purchases. We must continue to fight for change.

Passing common-sense gun safety legislation is a critical need to build the future we deserve. **It’s time for Congress to act, and I’m ready to go to Washington and make sure it gets done — do I have your support?** **[If you‘re ready to demand a federal assault weapons ban and strengthened gun safety legislation across the country, add your name to tell Congress to act now>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72261521/434749561/1824507753?ms=em23_231026_LRP_fnd_gq_act___DBW_ettx&refcode=em23_231026_LRP_fnd_gq_act___DBW_ettx&source=em23_231026_LRP_fnd_gq_act___DBW_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231026_LRP_fnd_gq_act___DBW_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=wzGLSUwLnO+a6DPFvFWvrsR9z+/ZDQmlb/+AZ6qyfb883md+iHaFvh71fPwc14tWmuEphLBPKNrWCeyd46+PkuBKzmX2r5Kma7BrcnwVPPNkPyywgUD0RS98JXZ10QsN4YQli9AACPzxJt9C9bcORQ==&refcode2=a684b869-4674-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTY4NGI4NjktNDY3NC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TLlQvScLAk6YQX6tPWmb7Iesr8O2na07z1Y0n_c1kUg=&emci=ff6c962f-3374-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=a684b869-4674-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=13153572)**

clean_body: | | Peter — Last night, at least sixteen people lost their lives, and many more were injured in Lewiston, Maine. Today, another community is traumatized and mourning the loss of their own. When is enough enough? The tragedy in Maine was the 565th mass shooting this year. Our lawmakers should have prevented this – but Maine doesn’t require background checks on all gun sales; it doesn’t require a waiting period to purchase a weapon; it doesn’t ban assault weapons; and it doesn’t have red flag laws. Any one of these measures could have prevented this senseless massacre. As a trauma surgeon with a long career treating victims and survivors of gun violence, I’ve lived through nights like last night–tried to save lives destroyed by these weapons of war, and comforted family members devastated by the deaths of their loved ones. We must reinstate the federal assault weapons ban. We must require universal background checks for all firearm purchases. We must continue to fight for change. Passing common-sense gun safety legislation is a critical need to build the future we deserve. It’s time for Congress to act, and I’m ready to go to Washington and make sure it gets done — do I have your support? Onward, Dr. Brian Williams | | Click to unsubscribe from our email list. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: What to know about the Texas border bills
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

At 4am this morning, the Texas Legislature passed a series of “border
security” bills that will not improve border security, but will deprive
both immigrants and U.S. citizens of their fundamental rights.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

What do these bills do?

The new legislation:

* Makes driving an undocumented family member to the doctor, to church,
or to school a “human smuggling” offense carrying a 10-year mandatory
prison sentence;

* Allows Texas authorities to separate children from their parents at
the border — just as Trump did in 2018;

* Encourages police to unconstitutionally imprison and deport migrants,
even those with valid asylum claims;

* Subjects Latino Texans to racial profiling by law enforcement; and

* Spends $1.5 billion to continue Trump’s ineffective border wall.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Will these bills “improve border security?"

There are real solutions to our challenges at the border, but these aren’t
them.

Even if one is tempted to accept the cruelty, the massive expense, and the
harm done to border residents and Latino families, the policies just
passed by the Republican-majority legislature just don’t work.

In fact, [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/59332?t=1001&akid=233949%2E444211%2ERgLETL ]border crossings have INCREASED in the areas where Abbott has
spent billions of taxpayer dollars on asylum seeker arrests, border walls,
razor wire, and a floating wall of buoys in the Rio Grande.

Don’t be fooled by the governor’s lies. Though the optics of walls, mass
immigrant arrests, and militarized border communities might give Abbott
and Texas Republicans the perfect backdrop for their next campaign ads,
the facts tell us this isn’t working. Maybe that’s why Abbott felt he had
to [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/59334?source=ema20231026-233949&t=1002&akid=233949%2E444211%2ERgLETL ]cook the books when asking the legislature for more money.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

What are real solutions?

When Texas Republicans are ready to get to work on real solutions, they
can come together with Democrats, Congress, and President Biden to:

* Hire more asylum judges and increase processing capacity to more
quickly resolve asylum cases and humanely remove people without valid
claims;

* Establish safe, orderly pathways to seek asylum at legal ports of
entry — so that migrants no longer have to pay smugglers to cross
dangerous stretches of river and desert in search of safety;

* Expand work authorizations so that asylum seekers can fully contribute
to the communities that welcome them and no longer have to rely on
local aid and shelter capacity;

* Modernize legal ports of entry and vehicle checkpoints, where 93% of
fentanyl comes into the country; and

* Improve coordination with partners in the Western Hemisphere so that
other countries fairly share responsibility in helping asylum seekers
find safety, housing, and jobs throughout the region.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Abbott and Co. are making a mess of the border. But it doesn't have to be
like this. We can push for something better, moving past political
posturing and towards the real solutions that Texans deserve.

— Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=233949%2E444211%2ERgLETL

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

Fellow American,

I write this having just been elected by my colleagues as the 56th Speaker of the United States House of Representatives.

The task of leading our House majority is a great one, and to say that I’m humbled by the faith my colleagues have bestowed on me is an understatement.

My message to you today is this: When Republicans come together, there is no measure of what we can achieve.

In the near term, my team and I will work to make sure that we’re passing responsible, fiscally conservative legislation to fund our government and support our military. **And with an election a little more than twelve months away, we’ll work around the clock to grow our House majority and help EVERY Republican incumbent in their reelection campaign.**

Peter,

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72261830/434750647/1037629634?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=231026_team_reply_kicker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzQ5ZDU1Zi00Nzc0LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mDilhCujnAO9tS-ajVZnBHrtRqDmhAKvKqU_BzdDkTQ=)

Hey there, A few weeks ago, we sent out an email asking our supporters to share the issues that matter most to them and their families. The response has been tremendous — we've heard from Ohioans concerned about wages and working conditions, the high cost of healthcare and prescription drugs, voting rights, climate change, reproductive rights, and so much more. **But we're still missing one very important voice:_yours!_** Marcy's in Congress to fight for us, friend. She's always been accountable to working people and Heartland communities — NOT to big money special interest groups. **So we want to hear from you. Will you take a minute to reply to this email with the three issues that matter most to you and your family? body:
| | | Peter — We’re less than two weeks out from Election Day. Do you know what’s on your ballot? **[Click here to find if there are any WFP-endorsed candidates and ballot measures in your area.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDMdk0Xc5F3XT7oWSkA6eoLltu-r1aK4hmboFs6qLXTqHknPIAWNnZUTCDH9Wq-wzX6VKMy2itufPqLgji0UXs6vLf9lzmIO8s3gxtgMLiDjM8Ndcrnsw_AjSUahMaFJ7FvGGigYUTOTcRwEIaYpsIqXLmJGdg00s_agQAggMnP7QIl2-fyPdn_2tajVGl_MUhxEypSmXgOFRTuzbWKx7aAqh2L0VLQiPdI6eGHOCwOS88ujwYrDYmJviyr-vF6jMY7ASyRgUqdZhBHrCWeaHDKg/40r/-kbfFxhuSLKn3H042sA2Eg/h0/MRnoOi1doQrSfeqFtpUtlhHLtKK1Hs6OzZ7DW0OIod0)** **[Then click here to find your polling place and make a plan to vote!](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDMZMbpeC-8VvA6We4ijycMJrT7US_CSvBWEWlP7rGw297PG-BR0BJSttjH1ewT3apU8GY-mCB3vDDqGbnMzR5XilCxTn7a6gh6ozPct3B8PfO9Rh6D5hD57P1vONkV3v4_GPdoQ9MrQuDR-7MS2ZyyaFnmFsJtyCGN2kgIwGbcgxQnk2oHX51uPIRmJb6HiXMvocjafJgJG5vtLnnCuIhZMBEh9mc8SqvO3R2JIRdMU1zglACT2DSuuvImp5_cskmQ/40r/-kbfFxhuSLKn3H042sA2Eg/h1/oZAi96bE7U1WQiQvLFFjZgf7cZFXgfb2QOzCj5-4vhQ)** On November 7th, voters in many states and cities across the country will have the chance to make their voices heard at the ballot box on everything from state legislatures to city councils, local ballot initiatives, and more Here at the Working Families Party, we’re proud to endorse hundreds of visionary candidates up and down the ballot who will fight for higher wages, a cleaner environment, and getting money out of politics. **Here’s just a few of of the places where we are getting out the vote for WFP champions over the next 12 days:**
* In **Virginia,** we’ve endorsed over a dozen progressive candidates for state legislature, and are working to prevent full Republican control of government, protect abortion rights, and stop Governor Glenn Youngkin’s right-wing agenda.
* In **Pennsylvania,** we’re organizing to turn out voters for Kendra Brooks and Nicolas O’Rourke who are running for Philadelphia City Council on the WFP ballot line, as well as champions like Sara Innamorato for Allegheny County for County Executive and Matt Dugan for Allegheny County District Attorney. We’re also working to turn out voters in 40 other state and local races — including the fight for a state Supreme Court seat that could have a huge impact on the future of elections in the Keystone State.
* In **Ohio** we’re throwing down to turn out voters to pass Issue 1, which would enshrine abortion rights into the state constitution.
* **Overall, we’re endorsing over 750 candidates on the ballot in 15 states this November 7th** — from California to Colorado to Connecticut, from New Mexico to New York and North Carolina, in every region of the country.

The vast majority of these are candidates running for local offices — the kinds of races where each donation, each volunteer, each _voter_ can really make a big difference. **[If you haven’t already, check out our list of WFP-endorsed candidates to see if they are running in your area.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDMdk0Xc5F3XT7oWSkA6eoLltu-r1aK4hmboFs6qLXTqHVMHZBW27X33q6yRa0Pb7gznFVevVar_nQSKG-Qp7uBond2HRZge49GbbxM-zWDIqPa4KUvAKNua0ThDxSeBNHjUfCtQHCsPUraElxgXTqhHn1H0464cfc9krdl8WwS66vdh214KzqBzZfuj98rk_P4jmJ1OEKEpu3B1qv7KUi_aE2CpkrvLFSzMDvhAZA1jy8aBfq48GaoChgadeqdm1-kevyRGgGhOTReD3DxJrE04/40r/-kbfFxhuSLKn3H042sA2Eg/h2/RdI1rlAy0SIQI_pyWtnmgYb0f0XHdT6LgRun4R-4wQA)** **[Then click here to find your polling location and make a plan to vote before Election Day!](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDMZMbpeC-8VvA6We4ijycMItBq38SF6xEvynPIrvLrVaR-QiXTu7mYLbFlms18aupxqg4a6SivUDvQVxaVqup4d1AxqlZM8aRK78Ear2FB0GhxzD4m9nsXVILIxzuTfv6zzhvj6IAmxaBF-Bcihr8jL8fYYOZ3epYqqWnNAXzKhTpkANx5Bh3cF3PYqooPKIOg21xAdO_fL6e2UAjcBfrRkx6kziX0sJoxv-IQDeG1co8gJbUslWyrbaJ_IBvuAfUQ/40r/-kbfFxhuSLKn3H042sA2Eg/h3/3LhBDDepFA54DQ4I9F0FtlD9F-GZ2cYJHa0x7Se6pqA)** Together, we can elect transformative leaders up-and-down the ballot who will be strong advocates for working people. clean_body: | | | Peter — We’re less than two weeks out from Election Day. Do you know what’s on your ballot? On November 7th, voters in many states and cities across the country will have the chance to make their voices heard at the ballot box on everything from state legislatures to city councils, local ballot initiatives, and more Here at the Working Families Party, we’re proud to endorse hundreds of visionary candidates up and down the ballot who will fight for higher wages, a cleaner environment, and getting money out of politics. Here’s just a few of of the places where we are getting out the vote for WFP champions over the next 12 days: In Virginia, we’ve endorsed over a dozen progressive candidates for state legislature, and are working to prevent full Republican control of government, protect abortion rights, and stop Governor Glenn Youngkin’s right-wing agenda. In Pennsylvania, we’re organizing to turn out voters for Kendra Brooks and Nicolas O’Rourke who are running for Philadelphia City Council on the WFP ballot line, as well as champions like Sara Innamorato for Allegheny County for County Executive and Matt Dugan for Allegheny County District Attorney. We’re also working to turn out voters in 40 other state and local races — including the fight for a state Supreme Court seat that could have a huge impact on the future of elections in the Keystone State. In Ohio we’re throwing down to turn out voters to pass Issue 1, which would enshrine abortion rights into the state constitution. Overall, we’re endorsing over 750 candidates on the ballot in 15 states this November 7th — from California to Colorado to Connecticut, from New Mexico to New York and North Carolina, in every region of the country. The vast majority of these are candidates running for local offices — the kinds of races where each donation, each volunteer, each voter can really make a big difference. Together, we can elect transformative leaders up-and-down the ballot who will be strong advocates for working people. In solidarity, Working Families Party P.S. Got time to make some calls? Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: Team AOC
subject: Not afraid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
From electing Trump lackey Mike Johnson as Speaker of the House to dozens of far-right candidates filing to run for Congress, MAGA extremists are growing increasingly louder as the 2024 election cycle heats up.
Lies about the 2020 election, abortion, and immigration are dominating the airwaves. **Without a concerted effort to combat these lies, the hatred and disinformation of right-wing extremists will continue to spread, endangering marginalized communities and our democracy itself.**
Our movement is fighting to directly combat this disinformation. Alexandria is not afraid to take on right-wing extremists — and she will never let their lies go unanswered.
[Will you contribute $5 today to power our progressive movement and combat MAGA talking points with the truth? name: Ohioans United for Reproductive Rights
subject: Ohio, we have a problem
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Hey Derek, it's Ohioans United for Reproductive Rights. We have a small problem.
**Here's the problem:** Anti-abortion extremists are covering Ohio with their yard signs just weeks before the election.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231026-1?refcode=em20231026-1-8637&refcode2=8637_434096_Hx0_PP&akid=8637%2E434096%2EHx0_PP)
**Here's our solution:** We need our top supporters (that's you!) to step up right now so we can continue to print our yard signs and decorate every inch of Ohio with our message.
**[Split a donation »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231026-1?amount=5&refcode=em20231026-8637&refcode2=8637_434096_Hx0_PP&akid=8637%2E434096%2EHx0_PP)**
Listen, a massive part of our efforts is educating Ohioans on our amendment.
Anti-abortion extremists are counting on us to not show up, not understand the amendment, or flat out not care about abortion rights.
_But we know that when abortion rights are on the ballot, they win -- plain and simple._
**[That hasn't stopped the anti-abortion extremists from trying to spread misinformation and ruin our best chance at expanding abortion rights in the Buckeye State. Please, will you chip in a split donation between our campaign and John Fetterman so we can continue our extremely important work? This election is less than 2 WEEKS away!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231026-1?refcode=em20231026-1-8637&refcode2=8637_434096_Hx0_PP&akid=8637%2E434096%2EHx0_PP)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231026-1?amount=5&refcode=em20231026-8637&refcode2=8637_434096_Hx0_PP&akid=8637%2E434096%2EHx0_PP)**
This is so important,
Ohioans United for Reproductive Rights

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20231026-8637-footer&t=1&refcode2=8637_434096_Hx0_PP&akid=8637%2E434096%2EHx0_PP)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8637%2E434096%2EHx0_PP)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8637%2E434096%2EHx0_PP)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

But that's not something we can count on right now. Protecting Louisiana and this country from the Far Left is EVERY single person's duty. Are you going to be 1 of the 30? Thank you, Team Kennedy Folks, our country was founded by geniuses but it's being run by idiots. And if you trust the government, well then you obviously failed history class. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: If we’re being honest
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
The only reason I am here...
#
Hey there —

I had an extra few minutes this morning so I wanted to share some thoughts with you.

**Here’s the truth:**

No matter why you are reading this, I am thankful for you.

People like me don’t often make it to Congress.

I’m the son of Latino immigrants, who, with my three sisters, was raised by my single mother. I was the first in my family to attend college, cleaning the toilets of my classmates to make it work, and I joined the Marine Corps after graduating and went to Iraq.

The only reason I am here is because of the support I’ve had along the way.

As a kid, the support from my family.

In combat, the support of my fellow Marines.

In these campaigns, support from people like you.

**But now I have a new mission: replacing Kyrsten Sinema and working to expand voting rights, protect abortion rights, take on drug companies and hedge fund managers and be a voice and a vote for working people in the Senate.**

I need your help. So please:

[_Can you split a $20 contribution between my re-election campaign and Zak Malamed's team? This month has been tough on fundraising, and I need your help to get things back on track before it’s too late._](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-lake?amount=20?source=em231026-rg-split&refcode2=538_8507_ERzpRg&akid=538%2E8507%2EERzpRg)

If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Split $20 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-lake?amount=20?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em20231026-rg-split-el&refcode2=538_8507_ERzpRg&akid=538%2E8507%2EERzpRg) [Split $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-lake?amount=20?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em20231026-rg-split-el&refcode2=538_8507_ERzpRg&akid=538%2E8507%2EERzpRg) [Split $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-lake?amount=20?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em20231026-rg-split-el&refcode2=538_8507_ERzpRg&akid=538%2E8507%2EERzpRg) [Other Amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-lake?amount=20&amount=30&refcode=em20231026-rg-split-el&refcode2=538_8507_ERzpRg&akid=538%2E8507%2EERzpRg)
---

Thank you in advance for chipping in. It means a lot.

Ruben

subject: Our weekend plans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www

Thousands of Hoosiers will use this opportunity to cast their vote early, and we want to make sure as many voters know of the Saturday voting options as possible. **[With several races that will come down to just a few votes, our efforts to get out the vote over these next two weekends will make a huge difference. | Friend, it's Debbie Mucarsel-Powell. In case you haven't heard, I'm the Democrat running to defeat Rick Scott in Florida. I'm also an immigrant from Ecuador, a gun safety advocate, a former Congresswoman, and a proud mom.

* Rick Scott is one of the most dangerous senators in Washington. He wrote the plan to **raise taxes** on working families and **end Medicare and Social Security**. And he’s supported a **nationwide ban on abortions**.

* Election experts are saying that if I win, **Democrats will be virtually guaranteed to maintain our Senate majority**. If not, we could easily lose control.

I know that we can win in Florida, but I'm counting on your help to compete with Scott's massive personal fortune. subject: I’ve seen this horror in Uvalde
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roland Gutierrez For Texas

secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em [secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]
Hi, Roland Gutierrez here. I’m the Democrat running against Ted Cruz for U.S. Senate.
I’m angry, heartbroken, devastated by what we witnessed last night in Lewiston, Maine.
I’ve seen this horror in Uvalde. It’s a horror that hits you deep in your bones.
I’m sick and tired of politicians like Ted Cruz and others who are offering NOTHING but thoughts and prayers.
My heart is with the people of Lewiston. But it’s time for action – because thoughts and prayers are simply not enough.
We must get rid of politicians like Ted Cruz and the loose gun laws he supports. They are killing us.
If you agree, I hope you’ll consider pitching in a few bucks to my campaign to unseat Cruz and bring a message of gun violence prevention to the U.S. Senate. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]
Words are not enough. Prayers are not enough. We need to act.
I have worked tirelessly to advance legislation to reduce gun violence in Texas, and I’m ready to escalate this fight. This has got to come to an end. But I need your help.
Thanks for standing with me,
Roland Gutierrez

subject: We need to talk about the chaos in DC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Derek, I usually try to stay out of the chaos in Washington, but we need to talk about what just happened: **House Republicans just elected Mike Johnson the new Speaker of the House. In doing so, they elevated an extreme ideologue who wants to ban abortion, said gay people would destroy America, and tried to overturn Pennsylvania’s 2020 election results.** Derek, the new Speaker of the House rejects your real freedom to choose, to love and to vote. **But make no mistake: Here in Pennsylvania, we will always fight for real freedom for every Pennsylvanian, no matter where you’re from, who you love or who you do or do not pray to.** We need to work harder than ever to continue building a Pennsylvania where real freedom and real opportunity exist for everyone. name: Kirsten Engel
subject: this shouldn’t be frightening
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
I’m spooked, Peter.
Right now, most of us are getting ready for Halloween — what’s supposed to be the scariest night of the year. But seeing what’s been happening in Congress over the last month has been plenty scary for me.
First, extremist Republicans drove our government to the point of shutting down.
Then, the House stalled out as it took four nominees and five votes to confirm a new Speaker.
Now, they’ve settled on Mike Johnson, a far-right Republican whose record is terrifying .
Johnson is anti-abortion and anti-LGBTQ. He’s tried to slash Social Security and Medicare, and was a driving force in the effort to overturn the results of the 2020 election by Republicans. His agenda is the wrong fit for Arizona — and the wrong fit for the country. Nevertheless, my opponent voted for him.
Republicans in the House, including my opponent, are all about chaos and extremism. It’s all tricks and no treats.
In Congress, I will fight to invest in the local economy, support our seniors, and protect our fundamental rights.
In five days, my campaign has our October fundraising deadline. By chipping in now, you can help me defeat my Republican opponent and take back control of the House for Democrats. I don’t accept donations from corporate PACs, so I have to ask: will you chip in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_102623_EOM_B_Johnson_act]

body:

| | I don’t mean to spook you—but Angela’s End-of-Month fundraising deadline is just _five days_ away and we’re falling short of our projections, Peter. **I promise this isn’t a trick, but our campaign could sure use a treat.[So please, will you chip in $10 or even $25 before Tuesday’s deadline to support Angela for U.S. Senate?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7441?t=10&amount=25&akid=603%2E52803%2E_9Q2gu)** | | | [Donate Now!](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7441?t=11&amount=25&akid=603%2E52803%2E_9Q2gu)
---
I’m terrified what will happen on Oct. 31 if we don’t turn these fundraising numbers around, Peter.
**That’s why I’m personally coming to you to ask for help—and why I hope you won’t decide to ghost our grassroots campaign at the scariest time of year.**

name: Bob Casey
subject: 76ers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=982%2E552475%2EOD10yl)
Hi Peter -- it's Bob Casey.
As a former basketball coach and long-time shooter, I'm looking forward to watching the 76ers take on the Bucks in their opening game tonight.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231026-2?refcode=em20231026-2&refcode2=982_552475_OD10yl&akid=982%2E552475%2EOD10yl) _You can't sink a shot like this without practice._
Not many people recall, but before taking office, I used to spend a bit of time on a basketball court. I played in high school, and after college, I coached eighth grade basketball in Philly.
And if there's one thing I have learned from my time on the court, it's this: You have to keep your head in the game from tip-off to the final buzzer.
I still carry that lesson with me today.
In 2024, I'm up for re-election, and this might be the toughest matchup in the country. Mitch McConnell and national Republicans are targeting Pennsylvania, and it's critical that we build a campaign that can take them on.
I know that with you on our team, we can run the court. With every donation you make, you help us put points on the board that will help us defend our Senate majority.
**[Please, Peter, can you chip in $5 or more today to help us build an early lead as we fight to defend this Senate seat?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231026-2?refcode=em20231026-2&refcode2=982_552475_OD10yl&akid=982%2E552475%2EOD10yl)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231026-2?refcode=em20231026-2&refcode2=982_552475_OD10yl&akid=982%2E552475%2EOD10yl)**
Together, we'll build an all-star team.
Thank you,
Bob Casey

* * *
To receive texts from Team Casey text TEAM to 51041. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=982%2E552475%2EOD10yl)

* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=982%2E552475%2EOD10yl)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)

So, as we prepare to close the books on October, this is our moment to show the Biden Regime that all of these ruthless attacks against President Trump have yet again completely and totally BACKFIRED. | | Thank you, Team Trump | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

subject: I’m opposed to this corporate mega-merger.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terán for Congress
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/aJcFZpYilEmhKVAG5jZ_ww2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/aJcFZpYilEmhKVAG5jZ_ww2]
Hi Peter, Raquel here.
Earlier this week, I attended a town hall regarding the Fry’s-Albertsons merger to show solidarity with our labor family and represent our community in AZ-03. If this merger goes through, it could threaten the good jobs and benefits of our essential workers, and endanger food access for the most vulnerable in our community. Will you join me and tell government regulators to protect our workers and our community by rejecting this merger? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/aJcFZpYilEmhKVAG5jZ_ww2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/aJcFZpYilEmhKVAG5jZ_ww2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/aJcFZpYilEmhKVAG5jZ_ww2] https://secure.ngpvan.com/aJcFZpYilEmhKVAG5jZ_ww2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/aJcFZpYilEmhKVAG5jZ_ww2]
Many of us left with more questions than answers but let me be clear: I’m proud to be in solidarity with our labor siblings and community in opposition to this merger.
More than 1,000 people turned out to make it clear: our community doesn’t support this merger. And we’ve historically seen when corporate mergers like this happen, companies become too big to care for their employees, consumers and the communities they serve.
Zip codes can determine access to groceries and pharmacies. Regulators should take seriously the threats to our communities' health and well-being. I’m committed to ensuring AZ-03 receives the full protections and resources that the federal government has to offer.
Winning elections is important, but our movement is about more than that. Our movement is about fighting for our community and protecting the rights and benefits we’ve fought for. Will you join me in solidarity and say ‘no’ to this merger? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/aJcFZpYilEmhKVAG5jZ_ww2]
Thank you,
Raquel
SIGN ON [https://secure.ngpvan.com/aJcFZpYilEmhKVAG5jZ_ww2]

For nearly 20 years, she's been fighting for higher wages for workers, healthcare for all, and better schools for our children.
She's helped build broad and diverse coalitions that have beaten Republicans like Donald Trump, Joe Arpaio, and Kari Lake.
Now she's ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_102623_withourworkers]
Terán for Congress

Glendale, AZ 85311
United States

**Emerge women had a 71% WIN rate in the last election, and we MUST keep our momentum growing! We need to know where our supporters stand to build on our success. – Team Emerge
Emerge is a national organization working to recruit, train, and get Democratic women elected across the country, and we are so grateful to have you on our team. body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis —

Have you seen the news about drug giant Pfizer’s latest money grab? We cannot — and will not — sit by while corporations hike up prices by 3x and 4x without consequence, passing the money straight from the pockets of hard working Americans to their millionaire CEOs and stockholders.

Help us stand up to corporate greed and put an end to prescription drug corruption with a grassroots donation today. (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12051?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231026_fr_corpgreed_0_6MO_pacofabian_na_na_pfizerpricehike&t=1011&akid=4841%2E5885482%2E7oEexm)

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.
DONATE $10 (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12052?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231026_fr_corpgreed_0_6MO_pacofabian_na_na_pfizerpricehike&t=1012&akid=4841%2E5885482%2E7oEexm)
DONATE $25 (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12052?amount=25&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231026_fr_corpgreed_0_6MO_pacofabian_na_na_pfizerpricehike&t=1013&akid=4841%2E5885482%2E7oEexm)
DONATE $50 (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12052?amount=50&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231026_fr_corpgreed_0_6MO_pacofabian_na_na_pfizerpricehike&t=1014&akid=4841%2E5885482%2E7oEexm)
Not only did Pfizer quietly hike up the price of COVID drug Paxlovid from the $13 it takes to produce to almost $1,400 for you or me to buy at the drugstore, but they quadrupled the price of the COVID vaccine to $115.

ALSO, they made a whopping $31 BILLION in profits last year, and their CEO took home over $33 MILLION in compensation. (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12051?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231026_fr_corpgreed_0_6MO_pacofabian_na_na_pfizerpricehike&t=1015&akid=4841%2E5885482%2E7oEexm)

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12051?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231026_fr_corpgreed_0_6MO_pacofabian_na_na_pfizerpricehike&t=1016&akid=4841%2E5885482%2E7oEexm

This is, in a word, sickening. And we intend to do something about it. Our Revolution has been organizing against rising medical costs and in support of Medicare For All since we were founded by Bernie Sanders, and we haven’t given up.

We’ve been hard at work through our organizing efforts to STOP corruption in medical care, but we can’t do it alone. Join us in our crucial and lifesaving work to end price gouging in medicine, and to pass Medicare for All.

Rush a donation today of $13 or whatever you can afford so we can stand up against corporate greed. (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12051?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231026_fr_corpgreed_0_6MO_pacofabian_na_na_pfizerpricehike&t=1017&akid=4841%2E5885482%2E7oEexm)

**America -- It's time to fight back.**

This is why I stepped out of the newsroom and into the line of fire against the radical left. I will never stop fighting, and I will NEVER surrender. [**We 're bringing this movement to Washington, D.C., and I want you on my team.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=b0025233bc9a41818751d5859ca69f88&_e=VT7i04BFEuTnn2dTvNa8KYUlRtSMH7Kw4nW5tq5OP_3xMluJH4FuA0zyExHm4Fd87tU10hfQlEX8Z5-bBMsduMFdSk3mIx9Dkj9BCc4UxP7stwoKBgRaT7NXhqXJFjpqufUhy3GI3gtEJioiLCBM4MYlgNBBuvWRi_D2U-aP_Uoh_W_s76Gvx7YC5oWrDZRus_spQtEEAZHdX3SfJ9ub7ov254csitcWQK16kfiNg1Hl1ZZLV9FHxHWqN7Xn58JrDeVA3WgGjwYC4ErT0oRzTgQVREUskNuKDTRqk4aaaOVPARgBXX3xqYJEHqfMKpxjrtjNBLwQl03oHQaGjyZyhw%3D%3D)

There's a legion of patriots behind us, ready to ensure we WIN in Arizona next year.

**That 's why I'm happy to tell you that a HUGE opportunity just came up.**

**For TWO HOURS, we 're activating 15X IMPACT on all donations.**

The window of opportunity closes in just two hours -- [**I need you to act soon!**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=b0025233bc9a41818751d5859ca69f88&_e=VT7i04BFEuTnn2dTvNa8KYUlRtSMH7Kw4nW5tq5OP_3xMluJH4FuA0zyExHm4Fd87tU10hfQlEX8Z5-bBMsduMFdSk3mIx9Dkj9BCc4UxP7stwoKBgRaT7NXhqXJFjpqufUhy3GI3gtEJioiLCBM4MYlgNBBuvWRi_D2U-aP_Uoh_W_s76Gvx7YC5oWrDZRuxqLxoN3oigVIjfjLgIwMDzukwTHVCDT5ri41PgrhjAvTAmOtDvghMQRkqWkLNVCmiMP3WmOcu3DtXPdhMGX4pK5359DGr-6TtB2m6KZY-Zqg9vpJjjL6D6aY6havzPZVlCE3xA-XZo5uwXpgnzGrLw%3D%3D)

name: Team Gallego
subject: Kyrsten Sinema thinks she saved the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
If you needed any more evidence that Kyrsten Sinema has to go, take a look at this:
#

Peter,
If you needed any more evidence that Kyrsten Sinema has to go, take a look at this:
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-oct23.kRA6ky&refcode=em231026-2&t=1&akid=1378%2E734936%2ENT7YF9)
While Kyrsten Sinema was busy “saving the Senate” she killed a pay raise for working families — remember her infamous “thumbs down” on a minimum wage vote?
When Kyrsten Sinema “saved the filibuster” she crushed electoral reforms that would have made it safer and easier for millions of Americans to vote. After the SCOTUS decision in Dobbs, Kyrsten Sinema’s defense of the filibuster ended our best chance at making _Roe v. Wade_ the law of the land.
And the worst part of all of this is that she is proud of it. She thinks that’s her meal ticket for the rest of her life. The sad thing is, she might be right.
But that isn’t important right now. What’s important is that we do everything that we can to make sure Kyrsten Sinema’s time in the Senate is over.
[**The best way to do that is by making a contribution to Ruben Gallego’s campaign. Right away. Chip in any amount here, $3 or whatever you can afford.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-oct23.kRA6ky&refcode=em231026-2&t=2&akid=1378%2E734936%2ENT7YF9)

We cannot afford to show any signs of weakness. Hello – we’ll get right to it: We’re going to ask you to chip in $5 to Adam Frisch’s campaign to defeat Lauren Boebert, but first, let us tell you why your gift today is so important. We’re just days away from our most important end-of-month fundraising deadline yet. After this deadline, all of our fundraising numbers will be become public. We cannot afford to show any signs of weakness. But with time running out, we are not currently on track to hit our $350,000 goal and what we need to make sure Adam sends Boebert packing. But there’s good news: If even just half of the people who read this email chip in $5 or more now, we’ll get back on track to defeating Lauren Boebert! = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = In 2022, this was the closest race in the entire country. Adam can win and send Lauren Boebert packing – but only if grassroots donors like you chip in now so we have the resources to counter the Super PAC lies. We cannot let this opportunity to defeat Boebert slip way. Dear Peter,

I hate to bother you, but it is that time of month when my fundraising team is on me to meet our fundraising goals. **[I know you have a million other things to do, but if you felt compelled to give, this would be the time that would have the MOST IMPACT. Peter, yesterday, the MAGA Chaos Caucus elected a Speaker.

**Let me introduce you to MAGA Republican Mike Johnson...** **Mike Johnson hates gay people:** ABC NEWS: House Speaker Mike Johnson spent years fighting against gay rights
**Mike Johnson is a dangerous Christian nationalist:** MSNBC: Rep. Mike Johnson, the newly elected speaker of the House, is the most unabashedly Christian nationalist speaker in history.
**Mike Johnson is one of the most far-right Republicans in the House:** The Guardian: Mike Johnson - Election denier, climate skeptic, anti-abortion And I wanted to personally let you know that aside from being a bigoted, homophobic, Christian nationalist **Mike Johnson voted TWICE against my bipartisan pro-veteran PACT Act.**

_This new Speaker doesn't give a sh*t about veterans!_

name: Gloria Johnson
subject: Our hearts are breaking for Lewiston, Maine
