body:
But thoughts and prayers are not enough.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72263955/434758100/-849459103?refcode=ea.c77c0d36-4f74-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.c77c0d36-4f74-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzdjMGQzNi00Zjc0LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vl5yotr7jBmcyMzfGSfWeFRAWXQDc7bzgusX4tNnQBA=&emci=3d525f7f-4b74-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=c77c0d36-4f74-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=46764483)
---
I can’t begin to express my sorrow at the horrific mass shooting in Lewiston, Maine. Tennesseans know all too well the trauma and pain that Mainers are feeling today. My heart breaks every time another community is ripped apart by gun violence — but I know that sharing their pain and offering thoughts and prayers isn’t enough. What we need now is action. For years, survivors and activists have called on our elected officials to pass evidence-based solutions that we know can help to stop this epidemic of violence. Red flag laws. Waiting periods. Background checks. How many more communities have to go through this before the people in power hear our demands? Politicians have a duty to their constituents over everything else — including the gun manufacturers and the NRA. Too many far-right extremists have abandoned our safety in favor of their own self-interest. We don’t have to keep reliving this nightmare. It’s time for politicians to get their acts together and pass common-sense gun safety legislation — and we must hold them accountable if they refuse. Yours in solidarity, Gloria Johnson

Hey team -- It’s Diana, the Research Director here at the DSCC.

I’ve been in politics a LONG time, and I’ll be honest, **I don’t think I’ve ever seen an election with more at stake than this one.** If we win, we’ll continue to enact President Biden's agenda and work for ALL Americans. If we lose, **Mitch McConnell and his flat-out wacko candidates will grind all progress to a halt -- and that will only be the beginning.**

All across the country, Republicans are taking away a woman’s right to choose, trying to cut health care, restricting the right to vote, and burying their heads in the sand on climate change. **And if Democrats don’t get fired the hell up, those same crazy Republicans will take control of the Senate next year.**

That's why I want to talk to you. I need to hear from _real voters like you_ \-- not more political types -- so I can help our best and brightest defend the Senate.

name: John Kasich
subject: A better way to move forward
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
The best news that came out of this process was that the House immediately moved to pass a resolution affirming America's support for Israel.| | | [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=e2bde87290d24de7aa1627796cab2c62&_e=EwT46Cprf6eveRM705t_oTzkGj1ye_XTpii-AbCUEwgut8y-TeZS7TkvBiSwWsbWTAhNDLX2G30c8tsSc8F6-f7iZX1ZSiUpF2h5VFU467g2iZJC7K4J7qJTpbrq3VzX_jXzkwCdzG8bKKbZwcv0dz1nbqGawBu47MhFTid7l4YrIXfQd6JLbjJDkIiphbYWGcbYwLw62OiNvnFezjkOBA%3D%3D)
---
Peter, While I breathed a sigh of relief when the U.S. House of Representatives finally accomplished its most basic responsibility - organizing itself to pass legislation - I'm disappointed because I feel that there was a better way to move our country forward. The best news that came out of this process was that the House immediately moved to pass a resolution affirming America's support for Israel.
You've heard me say it before, but the only path forward that will result in bringing people together and getting big policy wins is if we marginalize the extreme wings of both parties and find common ground.

The American people are sick of the partisan politics. We've been stuck in this cycle where one party gets power, they pass highly partisan legislation without any buy-in or support from moderate members of the other party, and then things whip back suddenly when the other party takes control since they campaigned promising to undo everything the other folks did.

This is not a sustainable model and it's the reason why Congress can't even get basic things done like passing a budget or funding our vital government programs. We're not even having conversations about how to reduce spending or find more efficient ways to run the government because both parties are only listening to the people on the extremes that equate compromise with losing.

We need more of our elected officials to have courage and stand up, instead of putting their political future first. When I was in Congress, I witnessed many members willing to risk their careers to do the right thing. We need more of that today.

While in Congress, I worked with Democrat Congressman Tim Penny to create the Kasich-Penny plan that would reduce one penny of every dollar of government spending. We were trying to show that there was a way to find reasonable compromise for the American people. While our bill didn't pass, it received bipartisan support and started the conversation that led to the first balanced federal budget in nearly forty years!

We have to get over this sickness where our leaders act as if compromising on something to help Americans is a bad thing or considered losing. Where in life don't we have to compromise on things?

I'm hopeful that what we'll see next is a broad bipartisan effort to support our allies in Israel and Ukraine with the money and supplies that they need to defend their democracies. While those who don't know history or understand international relations may not understand, they should trust the experts who know that both of these are vital to America's national and economic security.

The world is watching - our allies are very concerned and our opponents are emboldened. Nobody is more happy about America's divisions than Russia's Putin. A weakened and divided America creates opportunities for evil people to fill the vacuum and expand their power.

I am worried for the future of America, but I remain hopeful that the fever will break and we will once again discover the potential of what America can become if we start working together again.
---
I'm out there every week giving speeches, doing media interviews, communicating on social media and using every other tool at my disposal to give hope and encouragement to as many Americans as I can.

[Peter - I'm counting on your continued support to ensure that we can keep this important work moving forward](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=e2bde87290d24de7aa1627796cab2c62&_e=EwT46Cprf6eveRM705t_od2hJ0K5xCC_bFIwYZld74KP9xHxkzRRDLELuL5jLZq2s16YiVeHh2S-ewwneOUsM74eQPz5gxR26AZ74LIasVLxykxzvz3yx7A7TbM-QmrfK5BuqH_qmwT6Pe8VkD0KEW0-wNimpAP2ceB6iaiy39nmlkxqjrXJj_7VOLAjVRIjlPkb9rNfU-_uodCE8gvkbXwV5F_NrhTXkn6gddetS9k%3D).

Will you please consider chipping in right now to help with this important cause and ensure that we can keep up the fight for a better America?
---
[Donate Now](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=e2bde87290d24de7aa1627796cab2c62&_e=EwT46Cprf6eveRM705t_od2hJ0K5xCC_bFIwYZld74KP9xHxkzRRDLELuL5jLZq2VeU4PqdQYU5EkaFRhKc0J0aEePRNohPKMZcnbXJ1Oo8QvEQdVBB1qDH5WPxt7QGKz3GopjeJDuqzlysJHCxBO16pWG-p1WyiMct3glUwqr3qaEuPF0N-IqzP4sAnSqi-MpeONbbSTcH0rxENMlch8_tnbJj-9eJF7EOZz8s5NuE%3D)
---
I'm so appreciative for your ongoing support. Thank you! -John

**URGENTGRAM: NATIONAL EMERGENCY** _**BIDEN LEADING U.S. TO WORLD WAR III**_
**Bribed By Iran?!**
Dear Fellow Patriot: In the last days since Israel was brutally attacked by the Hamas terrorist barbarians, who even chopped off the heads of 40 innocent babies, killing thousands of other people as well, our braindead criminal president Joe Biden has been cowering and getting down on his knees to the ultimate villain and “Great Satan”, the Islamic Republic of Iran. **Sure enough, this week over 21 American servicemen have been attacked in the Middle East by Iranian agents and many of them have been seriously injured, some with serious traumatic brain injuries.**
****[**CLICK HERE TO DONATE**](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=c63f58bb2f&e=8edd2b8f7d)
What has been the response of Joe Biden? Predictably no response at all. Biden and his scared sparrow of a leftist Secretary of State, Anthony Blinkin, rather than retaliating with American might, have been busy literally begging the Iranian mullahs not to attack again. **This weakness, coupled with Biden and Blinkin handcuffing the hands of Israel to hold off cleaning out the rats nest in Gaza, from which Hams hails, is treasonous!** Coupled with Biden’s proven bribery from Communist China, Ukraine and Russia, and the conviction and sentence of 20 years in prison we obtained, this fraudulent alleged president is about to totally destroy our great nation, jeopardizing the lives of you, your children, grandchildren and future generations. **Make no mistake about it; because of Biden we are on the verge of World War III!****Biden has likely been bribed by Iran!** Now that a new House speaker has been elected, Freedom Watch and I will be petitioning him to have the Capitol Police go to the White House to have Biden arrested and jailed. Clearly, this is legal under District of Columbia law, as even citizens arrests can occur there when there is probable cause that felony crimes have been committed. With Biden, we have much more; he has been convicted of felonies and sentenced to 20 years in prison. This stupid, weak, braindead criminal must be removed legally from office before it is too late for any of us to survive his reign of terror over the people. [**Please donate handsomely with tax-deductible contributions, before this criminal, weak bribed fool drags us all in World War III.**](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=65bb25dde8&e=8edd2b8f7d) We are your real Justice Department. The Biden Justice Department is more like a Hitleresque “Gestapo,” which only seeks to perpetuate Biden’s and the Left’s hold on power as the nation is otherwise destroyed, and you and your loved ones lives put at risk!

[**CLICK HERE TO DONATE**](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=000cb7899b&e=8edd2b8f7d) Yours in Freedom and Liberty, Larry Klayman, Esq.Chairman and General Counsel Freedom Watch, Inc.[www.freedomwatchusa.org](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=700f239caf&e=8edd2b8f7d)[leklayman@gmail.com](mailto:leklayman@gmail.com)

name: Hilary Franz
subject: the importance of hard work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz (D)
body:
It's hard-working Washingtonians who define our greatness.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72264203/434759067/-165497492?refcode=BLU-HFFG-20231026-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjJiY2JmNGUtNTE3NC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tr0AB3rgU2vwyTEtqIa8liCBMCHTFcc1HBgK-FgTTeI=)
---
| Peter,

My dad was a dedicated public servant and proud union member. He instilled in me, above all else,**the importance of hard work and the responsibility we share to care for one another.** The lessons he taught me and his lifetime of hard work and standing up for other people have shaped my entire career.

It's hard-working Washingtonians who define our greatness. As commissioner of public lands, I've seen firsthand the dedication and resilience of the incredible union members who put out wildfires, protect our clean air and water, restore our forests, build our schools and hospitals, and so many other things that make our state a clean and healthy place to live and raise a family.

I also know that our public lands – and the communities that depend on them for good-paying jobs – are integral to our success as a state. From expanding workforce development through education and training programs to leasing out public land to construct our largest wind and solar farms ever, I’m investing in the success of hard-working Washingtonians. [_**Together, we can continue the legacy of hard work and compassion that makes Washington extraordinary. So, Peter, will you join me in my run for Washington Governor to continue my fight for hard-working people just like you by contributing $25 today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72264205/434759069/-165497492?refcode=BLU-HFFG-20231026-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjJiY2JmNGUtNTE3NC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tr0AB3rgU2vwyTEtqIa8liCBMCHTFcc1HBgK-FgTTeI=)

clean_body: It's hard-working Washingtonians who define our greatness. | = | Peter, My dad was a dedicated public servant and proud union member. He instilled in me, above all else,the importance of hard work and the responsibility we share to care for one another. The lessons he taught me and his lifetime of hard work and standing up for other people have shaped my entire career. It's hard-working Washingtonians who define our greatness. As commissioner of public lands, I've seen firsthand the dedication and resilience of the incredible union members who put out wildfires, protect our clean air and water, restore our forests, build our schools and hospitals, and so many other things that make our state a clean and healthy place to live and raise a family. I also know that our public lands – and the communities that depend on them for good-paying jobs – are integral to our success as a state. From expanding workforce development through education and training programs to leasing out public land to construct our largest wind and solar farms ever, I’m investing in the success of hard-working Washingtonians. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Together, Hilary Franz * | | = Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz (D) Friends of Hilary Franz (D) PO Box 9100 Seattle, WA 98109 United States | = Email is a critical way for our campaign to stay in touch with you. body:
Between deciding on Halloween costumes, attending kids’ sporting events, and raking the mounds of leaves in your yard, I know how fast this month can go. (Though I spent most of it immersed in the chaos on Capitol Hill.)

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72264510/434759957/1394218223?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20231026-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmE3Mzc1ZDgtNTI3NC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=e-9sm0WNIFqEzLLgom6YZ3TtAZZhC6ng9U-UsiIhjz4=)

| Peter,

I'm mindful of how hectic things can get this time of year. Between deciding on Halloween costumes, attending kids’ sporting events, and raking the mounds of leaves in your yard, I know how fast this month can go. (Though I spent most of it immersed in the chaos on Capitol Hill.)

I'll keep this message succinct: The Virginia General Assembly elections are fast approaching, and the nation is watching. This moment is an opportunity to showcase our collective strength.

| | This is the moment we’ve been waiting for: Today’s the first day of our federal trial against True the Vote — and we’re ready to hold them accountable and prove our claim that their tactics in the January 2021 Runoff election constituted unlawful voter intimidation. We’ll share some more details about the case in a moment. But first, we want to thank you — and ask if you can take another step to help fuel our programmatic work going forward. **Because of supporters like you across the country, we’re able to take on the critical and tireless work of pushing back against voter suppression. Thank you for everything you do to defend our democracy.** **[To show the undeniable strength of this pro-voter movement, we’re aiming to raise $7,500 in the next 24 hours. Will you pitch in $20 or any amount? Every donation brings us closer to hitting this goal and helps protect the freedom to vote.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72264579/434760145/-1518581904?amount=20&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20231026_f_ttv_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTU4ZWMzNi01Mzc0LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sjGCKKWmOP1dq3W59CrNluPZyuUTRGixndVe8jOyCLk=)** | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72264580/434760146/-1226380367?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20231026_f_ttv_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTU4ZWMzNi01Mzc0LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sjGCKKWmOP1dq3W59CrNluPZyuUTRGixndVe8jOyCLk=)

Here’s a quick recap of why we’re suing True the Vote, and what could come next:
Our case focuses on the actions of True the Vote, a Texas-based organization that we contend brought anti-voter intimidation tactics to Georgia for our critical January 2021 runoff elections, which decided control of the U.S. Senate. After Black, brown, and young Georgians turned out in 2020 to vote in record numbers, we began hearing about True the Vote’s plans for the runoff elections and immediately became concerned about how those plans were likely to intimidate Georgia voters and stifle their political power. Fair Fight sprang into action to protect voters in the face to threats including:
* Challenges to hundreds of thousands of voters’ registration within days of an election based on unreliable methods;
* Efforts to recruit Navy SEALs and “citizen watchdogs” to patrol polling stations and surveil ballot drop boxes; and
* A $1 million reward we predicted would incentivize True the Vote’s supporters to report false allegations of voter fraud.

Voters are protected from intimidation and coercion under the Voting Rights Act, which is why we are taking legal action against True the Vote for its activity in the 2021 runoff elections. To protect voters around the state, we’re asking the court to order True the Vote to withdraw any pending voter eligibility registration challenges, to prohibit True the Vote from mounting any new challengers, and to require True the Vote to cease all operations in Georgia — including any poll-watching, poll-monitoring, or election-observing activities.
With trial beginning today, we’re one step closer to holding True the Vote accountable and securing relief to protect Georgia voters in future elections.
But no matter what comes next, we need to be prepared to address ongoing attempts of voter suppression, including additional mass challenges that can strip eligible voters from the rolls.
**We will continue working to stop anti-voter extremists in their tracks, elect champions of democracy, and make sure voters have the resources to make their voices heard.**
**And we rely on grassroots supporters like YOU to sustain this work.**
[**Please make a donation today to help hit our $7,500 goal in the next 24 hours, demonstrate the power of this pro-voter movement for the long haul, and defend the freedom to vote in 2023, 2024, and beyond.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72264581/434760147/-1518581904?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20231026_f_ttv_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTU4ZWMzNi01Mzc0LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sjGCKKWmOP1dq3W59CrNluPZyuUTRGixndVe8jOyCLk=)
Thank you for everything you do,
The Fair Fight Team

clean_body: | | | This is the moment we’ve been waiting for: Today’s the first day of our federal trial against True the Vote — and we’re ready to hold them accountable and prove our claim that their tactics in the January 2021 Runoff election constituted unlawful voter intimidation. We’ll share some more details about the case in a moment. But first, we want to thank you — and ask if you can take another step to help fuel our programmatic work going forward. Because of supporters like you across the country, we’re able to take on the critical and tireless work of pushing back against voter suppression. Thank you for everything you do to defend our democracy. = | = Here’s a quick recap of why we’re suing True the Vote, and what could come next: Our case focuses on the actions of True the Vote, a Texas-based organization that we contend brought anti-voter intimidation tactics to Georgia for our critical January 2021 runoff elections, which decided control of the U.S. Senate. After Black, brown, and young Georgians turned out in 2020 to vote in record numbers, we began hearing about True the Vote’s plans for the runoff elections and immediately became concerned about how those plans were likely to intimidate Georgia voters and stifle their political power. Fair Fight sprang into action to protect voters in the face to threats including: Challenges to hundreds of thousands of voters’ registration within days of an election based on unreliable methods; Efforts to recruit Navy SEALs and “citizen watchdogs” to patrol polling stations and surveil ballot drop boxes; and A $1 million reward we predicted would incentivize True the Vote’s supporters to report false allegations of voter fraud. Voters are protected from intimidation and coercion under the Voting Rights Act, which is why we are taking legal action against True the Vote for its activity in the 2021 runoff elections. To protect voters around the state, we’re asking the court to order True the Vote to withdraw any pending voter eligibility registration challenges, to prohibit True the Vote from mounting any new challengers, and to require True the Vote to cease all operations in Georgia — including any poll-watching, poll-monitoring, or election-observing activities. With trial beginning today, we’re one step closer to holding True the Vote accountable and securing relief to protect Georgia voters in future elections. But no matter what comes next, we need to be prepared to address ongoing attempts of voter suppression, including additional mass challenges that can strip eligible voters from the rolls. We will continue working to stop anti-voter extremists in their tracks, elect champions of democracy, and make sure voters have the resources to make their voices heard. And we rely on grassroots supporters like YOU to sustain this work. = Thank you for everything you do, The Fair Fight Team | 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2023 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. Emails like this one are the best way to communicate updates with voting rights activists like you. Thank you for being in the fight to ensure access to democracy for all. Since my first day in Congress, I’ve worked to fight inflation, lower costs for working families, cap the cost of insulin, defend our fundamental individual rights, and deliver good-paying jobs throughout mid-Michigan.
We’ve made progress, but there’s more work to do. Whether it’s lowering prescription drug costs, expanding access to affordable health care or making historic investments in our infrastructure, there’s no doubt about it: **Democrats _get stuff done_ for hard-working families across the country.**
But our work is not done yet. There’s more we need to do to protect Social Security and Medicare, create higher-wage jobs and make sure every Michigander has access to clean air and clean water.
Look, the national Republicans would love nothing more than to kick me out of Congress and reverse _all_ the progress we made. But I refuse to give up.
[_**Please, chip in $10 (or whatever sounds right to you) to help me win in 2024. Loyal Patriot,

Sometimes, it feels like we're tearing each other apart like wolves in Washington, D.C. It's frustrating -- but I know we're going through all of this for good reason.

[**We 've got a country to save.**](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=aeb34e22f35440618a422034b610ee04&_e=7jkfyC9ntKqzGgNYwd0Dg2JSEn3vRjUv9ZNuJe1e1LEjgEYPNXtTgug6pvI41CvRqSvTCRlWIBmO7UVWLw6aeCPLy5Y71rVXEYTY_vDkLFzuiP5XMxBAV2vnyfADhEp4C-ypL2uQllSr_paUqmA3xH3BgoxmVzBgYWFBja9nc3FtTo3r-nGnPfHLHPjvIHc_wMqxeGWAzgPIP6inQV5WdSuxhS50ib3B-9xDDZYGbmm2HPcLpeM1qxrF1vK59uxD9o91i7cNu7FM21OhUPZfk0y7fM_rC_kyGFbax3pi1Gc%3D)

We know you must be feeling frustrated with the radical agenda of the Biden administration -- especially after President Biden continues to ignore the pleas and desperate cries from American families. This country needs change -- and the only way we can do this is by winning in 2024.

That's why I need your help, friend. This election is too big to ignore. We've got to get it right, no question about it.

I want to hear what's on your mind. Can you please message me and let me know what you think about what's happening in this country?

Your feedback is important to me. clean_body: | Loyal Patriot, Sometimes, it feels like we're tearing each other apart like wolves in Washington, D.C. It's frustrating -- but I know we're going through all of this for good reason. We know you must be feeling frustrated with the radical agenda of the Biden administration -- especially after President Biden continues to ignore the pleas and desperate cries from American families. This country needs change -- and the only way we can do this is by winning in 2024. That's why I need your help, friend. This election is too big to ignore. We've got to get it right, no question about it. I want to hear what's on your mind. Can you please message me and let me know what you think about what's happening in this country? Your feedback is important to me. Please click the button below! | Best, Senator Chuck Grassley Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc. name: All On The Line
subject: The Shape of Things: Alabama
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Our Shape of Things series raises awareness about the barriers to fair representation in local communities of interest.
|
---

**The Shape Of Things: AL -- 02**
[**The New Districts: Advancing Fair Representation**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72264795/434760885/-1720301268?recurring=1&refcode=20231026_AOTL_F_SOTAL2_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU2ZTZmOTY3LTUzNzQtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4Lxi39cTyOlGe6m9ewKI1zeYtlkhulGM_59Q7XSA1Ek=)
A landmark achievement has been reached for fair representation, not only for Black Alabamians but for equitable maps across the nation. A federal panel has replaced the previous gerrymandered map, which failed to provide an equal political opportunity for Black Alabamians. This new map opens the door to the possibility of two Black Members of Congress representing the state simultaneously for the first time in history. The revised map creates two congressional districts that will allow Black voters the opportunity to elect their candidates of choice while avoiding additional county splits, ensuring all 18 Black Belt counties are included in one of the two opportunity districts.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72264796/434760886/-1720301268?recurring=1&refcode=20231026_AOTL_F_SOTAL2_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU2ZTZmOTY3LTUzNzQtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4Lxi39cTyOlGe6m9ewKI1zeYtlkhulGM_59Q7XSA1Ek=)
---
Our Shape of Things series raises awareness about the barriers to fair representation for communities throughout the country. It provides an opportunity to support our fight for their representation. [**Will you support All On The Line with a recurring donation of any amount to support our work to advocate for fair maps in places like Alabama and other target states?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72264797/434760887/-1720301268?recurring=1&refcode=20231026_AOTL_F_SOTAL2_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU2ZTZmOTY3LTUzNzQtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4Lxi39cTyOlGe6m9ewKI1zeYtlkhulGM_59Q7XSA1Ek=)
[**What’s Next? Upholding Fair Representation**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72264798/434760888/-1720301268?recurring=1&refcode=20231026_AOTL_F_SOTAL2_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU2ZTZmOTY3LTUzNzQtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4Lxi39cTyOlGe6m9ewKI1zeYtlkhulGM_59Q7XSA1Ek=)
The recent adoption of this new map signifies the culmination of Alabama's remedial process following the U.S. Supreme Court’s landmark decision in Allen v. Milligan, upholding Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act. It underscored the necessity for two districts where Black voters could elect their candidates of choice, a principle reaffirmed by both the district and Supreme Court. Throughout the years of litigation, the National Redistricting Foundation (NRF), an affiliate of All On The Line, played a pivotal role in ensuring the rights of Black Alabamians were upheld.
"_One year from now, those same Black voters in Alabama, who comprise more than a quarter of the state’s population, will finally have the opportunity to elect the candidate of their choice across two congressional districts. That is progress."_
**Marina Jenkins, Executive Director**
---
[**Empowering Voters: The Importance of The New Map**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72264799/434760889/-1720301268?recurring=1&refcode=20231026_AOTL_F_SOTAL2_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU2ZTZmOTY3LTUzNzQtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4Lxi39cTyOlGe6m9ewKI1zeYtlkhulGM_59Q7XSA1Ek=)
Alabama now boasts a fairer congressional map. This court-adopted map could see two Black Members of Congress from Alabama serve simultaneously, marking an unprecedented stride towards fair representation. The ripple effect extends beyond Alabama; it's a testament to justice and a stark warning against any attempt to deny fair representation.
[**To continue to protect fairness for Black Alabamians and voters of color across the country, we must take action now to help All On The Line advocate for fair maps. Our organization is working tirelessly to ensure voters in states like Alabama and nationwide are supported by a grassroots-driven movement to restore our democracy. Can you help our efforts across the nation by rushing a monthly donation today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72264800/434760971/-1720301268?recurring=1&refcode=20231026_AOTL_F_SOTAL2_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU2ZTZmOTY3LTUzNzQtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4Lxi39cTyOlGe6m9ewKI1zeYtlkhulGM_59Q7XSA1Ek=)
[DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72264802/434760972/-1720301268?recurring=1&refcode=20231026_AOTL_F_SOTAL2_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU2ZTZmOTY3LTUzNzQtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4Lxi39cTyOlGe6m9ewKI1zeYtlkhulGM_59Q7XSA1Ek=)
---

clean_body: Our Shape of Things series raises awareness about the barriers to fair representation in local communities of interest. | The Shape Of Things: AL -- 02 = A landmark achievement has been reached for fair representation, not only for Black Alabamians but for equitable maps across the nation. A federal panel has replaced the previous gerrymandered map, which failed to provide an equal political opportunity for Black Alabamians. This new map opens the door to the possibility of two Black Members of Congress representing the state simultaneously for the first time in history. The revised map creates two congressional districts that will allow Black voters the opportunity to elect their candidates of choice while avoiding additional county splits, ensuring all 18 Black Belt counties are included in one of the two opportunity districts. = Our Shape of Things series raises awareness about the barriers to fair representation for communities throughout the country. It provides an opportunity to support our fight for their representation. = = The recent adoption of this new map signifies the culmination of Alabama's remedial process following the U.S. Supreme Court’s landmark decision in Allen v. Milligan, upholding Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act. It underscored the necessity for two districts where Black voters could elect their candidates of choice, a principle reaffirmed by both the district and Supreme Court. Throughout the years of litigation, the National Redistricting Foundation (NRF), an affiliate of All On The Line, played a pivotal role in ensuring the rights of Black Alabamians were upheld. "One year from now, those same Black voters in Alabama, who comprise more than a quarter of the state’s population, will finally have the opportunity to elect the candidate of their choice across two congressional districts. That is progress." Marina Jenkins, Executive Director = Alabama now boasts a fairer congressional map. This court-adopted map could see two Black Members of Congress from Alabama serve simultaneously, marking an unprecedented stride towards fair representation. The ripple effect extends beyond Alabama; it's a testament to justice and a stark warning against any attempt to deny fair representation. = = All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. TextFAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. and | = | PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND. Contributions or gifts to The National Redistricting Action Fund are not tax deductible. 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600, Washington, D.C. 20005 This email was sent to:dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Diane Sare
subject: Symposium: Report Back From China and the Implications for the Strategic Crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sare for Senate
body:
| | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231027_symposium&n=1)
---
Friend Just when it seemed the world could not become more dangerous, Southwest Asia has become a caldron of terror and humanitarian disaster. Over 1.5 million Palestinian people have been displaced, and due to the Israeli blockade, thousands could die in the coming days from lack of water, let alone bombings ordered by the desperate western-controlled Netanyahu who was facing criminal indictment in Israel before the October 7 Hamas terror attack. Security for Arabs and Israelis, and Russians and Ukrainians, as well as for the American people can only come about if there is a major change from the United States. That's why I'm running for U.S. Senate, and that's also why my husband and I visited China for eight days. We wanted to visit the nation which the Five Eyes intelligence agencies consider to be the "number one threat" first hand and see what our criminal mis-named "intelligence agencies" are so afraid of. What became very clear is that the United States must abandon the treasonous world view of our historic enemy, namely the British Empire, and return to our revolutionary identity if we are to avert a catastrophe from which mankind might not recover.
### [NY Symposium, Friday, October 27, 8:00 pm: Report Back From China and the Implications for the Strategic Crisis](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k9OP9TC5FhhhZK82krmHq-s&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231027_symposium&n=2)

But now, the future of this vital program rests in the hands of far-right radicals on the Supreme Court. name: Giffords.org
subject: Strong gun laws save lives (Maine)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
One of the constant refrains from the gun lobby and their enablers after mass shootings like last night's in Maine is that there's no need for strong gun laws because criminals don't follow laws.
#

Friends -
One of the constant refrains from the gun lobby and their enablers after mass shootings like last night's in Maine is that there's no need for strong gun laws because criminals don't follow laws.
But the truth is, we know that strong gun laws save lives.
The data is clear. States with strong gun laws have lower per-capita rates of gun deaths.
In the past, the state of Maine has failed to act on several important initiatives that could save lives. We have battled with the gun lobby and far-right Republicans for a decade on issues like universal background checks, extreme risk protection orders, domestic violence gun laws, waiting periods, and open carry regulations.
We can’t say that a single gun law could have prevented a particular shooting.
But we know for a fact that gun laws save lives. The proof is in the numbers.
That is why we fight.
But we can't do it alone.
The truth is, most of the donations we receive at GIFFORDS PAC come from people giving small amounts of money. We're passionate about that fundraising model because, at its core, changing our gun laws takes a **movement.**
So, as you read this today, if you believe that $20 (or whatever you can afford) is worth it to continue the fight for strong gun laws that make our communities safer from gun violence, please take a minute to help Gabby, and the GIFFORDS organization, continue its work.
[**Please use this link to contribute $20, or whatever you can afford today, to GIFFORDS PAC. We will put your contribution right to work continuing our fight to make our communities safer from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/45847?c0=giffords-em-oct23.ZbexPd&refcode=em231026-2&t=1&akid=6789%2E3935704%2E7R9l4D)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $20](https://go.giffords.org/go/45845?c0=giffords-em-oct23.foxCL5&refcode=em231026-2&t=2&akid=6789%2E3935704%2E7R9l4D)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-oct23.j_Pk1L&refcode=em231026-2&t=3&akid=6789%2E3935704%2E7R9l4D)**
---
****
Thank you,
The entire team at GIFFORDS

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

Peter,

I’m Kevin Lincoln, the conservative Republican who is running to defeat leftist Josh Harder in California’s highly-targeted 9th Congressional District – _one of the most competitive House races in the country._

**I’m a Marine Corps veteran, mayor of my hometown of Stockton, a proud father & husband, and I’m running to rescue American families and workers from Washington D.C.’s broken politics.**

[ ** Send a Marine & Mayor to Congress ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=20625482ff5d4219ad57c61a967fe204&_e=w3W6Jv4am1lceg3GL-s-ILVXbCFCF3UePjHOI-6S0YEMmf2j2zOzA3VitKZI4ZMAwVD8nlvZsJlbTmTsopj_1RYwoRLZ5ctl3z9Y7oqkosaucNJLdlDb8HDzeqG6ZqGX7rzCrtiJlY3akFiqfTMuTTStL-V7MRlZ-6QP350qtZaL2LhwClcejDBevuY4gdyhZPRn61Sj0xIgcN107QjUoG_k3DPHwqtA6pnrexyNuUy6fPP4fvZROQjdfzdxvrqNUk2GH4vxwezIezXJ-GX7vvB3IQdk5D365o2IgJi74QwcHLFWRdQiCYySR7OXnUZzSSdUV3mxlBbw-TLNkLOWVryTSjwprUYNz8SR_88xHHDLJR04Nhh3tgfJx0mXCHhCbTiXLhhqozDJmUJmQQWO5g%3D%3D)
Service has always defined my life. I joined the United States Marine Corps in 2001 and became a military police officer.

After 9/11, I was assigned to Marine One to serve and protect the President of the United States.

When I completed my military service, I graduated from college while working full time and raising a family. But my urge to serve hadn’t gone. I continued to serve my community as a pastor and as a non-profit leader.

**Now, one of the greatest honors of my life is being able to serve as the Mayor of my hometown of Stockton, California.**

As Mayor, my team and I have revitalized our local economy, attracted businesses that have created jobs, balanced our budget, tackled homelessness, and reduced violent crime.

America as a whole is suffering these same problems, but the politicians in the White House and Congress don’t have what it takes to fix them.

**I do, and that’s why I’m running for Congress. My country needs me again, and I’m ready to serve.**

[**Will you send in a Marine and mayor to fix Washington’s broken politics and get our country back on track by supporting my campaign with a $5, $10 or $15 contribution today?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=20625482ff5d4219ad57c61a967fe204&_e=w3W6Jv4am1lceg3GL-s-ILVXbCFCF3UePjHOI-6S0YEMmf2j2zOzA3VitKZI4ZMAwVD8nlvZsJlbTmTsopj_1RYwoRLZ5ctl3z9Y7oqkosaucNJLdlDb8HDzeqG6ZqGX7rzCrtiJlY3akFiqfTMuTTStL-V7MRlZ-6QP350qtZaL2LhwClcejDBevuY4gdyhZPRn61Sj0xIgcN107QjUoG_k3DPHwqtA6pnrexyNuUzCG-MeZHNZ7ELWhIi0mum27V2-9xcjqwPuzZmmfG3OORz98bBIPWnVh1hIJJB9G_evnc3DRr3UnYhWtVn92QKjQOIX_1X0iq22zLA_Z1RQBDSDYjB6auXdTzax_NIYcjGhoY-PTq_udzZiSabY6T9PTMHnuk4Qsth8l8HuX7ogJw%3D%3D)

[ ** Send a Marine & Mayor to Congress ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=20625482ff5d4219ad57c61a967fe204&_e=w3W6Jv4am1lceg3GL-s-ILVXbCFCF3UePjHOI-6S0YEMmf2j2zOzA3VitKZI4ZMAwVD8nlvZsJlbTmTsopj_1RYwoRLZ5ctl3z9Y7oqkosaucNJLdlDb8HDzeqG6ZqGX7rzCrtiJlY3akFiqfTMuTTStL-V7MRlZ-6QP350qtZaL2LhwClcejDBevuY4gdyhZPRn61Sj0xIgcN107QjUoG_k3DPHwqtA6pnrexyNuUz8YiyZfWOy_JUQJVnLX9-4dTrDrvw64m9SV_YiOwUM3nii5QIcO2WH5yb0uKDFfSt_gZ4Z97AFIslbubpFjvK2Z1BxauPrSBKgDyAnxp_rUKaz66JKWGfBBXemJQ94zTZJDB7tM3ZSydtq9sxOCEDOa7c9lCMwF9PYLXjqghLydw%3D%3D)
Career politicians like Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi and Josh Harder have created the mess we’re in, so why would we think they could get us out of it?

We need to get inflation under control, revive our economy, reprioritize public safety, support our veterans, and make the politicians in Washington D.C. work for and serve the American people once again.

**California’s 9th Congressional District is a toss-up, top-target House seat and one of our best chances to defeat a career Democrat politician and restore conservative representation.**

[**But I need your help to win the fight so I can make it to Congress and get to work. Will you send in a Marine and mayor? | **Meet Kevin Lincoln
**
My name is Kevin Lincoln, and my story, is the Valley’s story. I am a 3rd generation Stocktonian, raising a 4th generation in the city I love. I’m the grandson of Mexican immigrants, and my stepfather is an Army veteran.

Like many Stocktonians, my family has overcome economic setbacks. My own father struggled to survive on these streets, and was at one time, homeless. But I never let adversity define me. I joined the Marines and served in the White House Military Office, assigned to Marine One. I graduated college while working full-time and raising a family. I’ve worked in corporate America and served our community as a pastor, and as a non-profit leader.

I’m blessed with a beautiful wife, Bonnie, and two amazing children. I’ve lived a life of service, but the greatest honor of my life has been giving back to my community, through serving as Mayor of my hometown, Stockton.

clean_body: I’m a Marine Corps veteran, mayor of my hometown of Stockton, a proud father & husband, and I’m running to rescue American families and workers from Washington D.C.’s broken politics. | | Peter, I’m Kevin Lincoln, the conservative Republican who is running to defeat leftist Josh Harder in California’s highly-targeted 9th Congressional District – one of the most competitive House races in the country. I’m a Marine Corps veteran, mayor of my hometown of Stockton, a proud father & husband, and I’m running to rescue American families and workers from Washington D.C.’s broken politics. Service has always defined my life. I joined the United States Marine Corps in 2001 and became a military police officer. After 9/11, I was assigned to Marine One to serve and protect the President of the United States. When I completed my military service, I graduated from college while working full time and raising a family. But my urge to serve hadn’t gone. I continued to serve my community as a pastor and as a non-profit leader. Now, one of the greatest honors of my life is being able to serve as the Mayor of my hometown of Stockton, California. As Mayor, my team and I have revitalized our local economy, attracted businesses that have created jobs, balanced our budget, tackled homelessness, and reduced violent crime. America as a whole is suffering these same problems, but the politicians in the White House and Congress don’t have what it takes to fix them. I do, and that’s why I’m running for Congress. My country needs me again, and I’m ready to serve. Career politicians like Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi and Josh Harder have created the mess we’re in, so why would we think they could get us out of it? We need to get inflation under control, revive our economy, reprioritize public safety, support our veterans, and make the politicians in Washington D.C. work for and serve the American people once again. California’s 9th Congressional District is a toss-up, top-target House seat and one of our best chances to defeat a career Democrat politician and restore conservative representation. Like many Stocktonians, my family has overcome economic setbacks. My own father struggled to survive on these streets, and was at one time, homeless. But I never let adversity define me. I joined the Marines and served in the White House Military Office, assigned to Marine One. I graduated college while working full-time and raising a family. I’ve worked in corporate America and served our community as a pastor, and as a non-profit leader. I’m blessed with a beautiful wife, Bonnie, and two amazing children. I’ve lived a life of service, but the greatest honor of my life has been giving back to my community, through serving as Mayor of my hometown, Stockton. Like , Follow , and Subscribe! name: Joe Biden
subject: My statement on the Lewiston, Maine tragedy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Far too many Americans have now been touched by gun violence. That is not normal, and we cannot accept it. | | |
---
Once again, our nation is in mourning after yet another senseless and tragic mass shooting yesterday. Today, Jill and I are praying for the Americans in Lewiston, Maine who’ve lost their lives, for those still in critical care, and for the families, survivors, and community members enduring shock and grief. For countless Americans who have survived gun violence and been traumatized by it, a shooting such as this reopens deep and painful wounds. Far too many Americans have now had a family member killed or injured as a result of gun violence. **That is not normal, and we cannot accept it.** While we have made progress on gun safety through the _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_ , the two dozen executive actions I’ve taken, and the establishment of the first-ever White House Office of Gun Violence Prevention, **it’s simply not enough.** Today, in the wake of yet another tragedy, I urge Republican lawmakers in Congress to fulfill their duty to protect the American people. Work with us to pass a bill banning assault weapons and high-capacity magazines, to enact universal background checks, to require safe storage of guns, and end immunity from liability for gun manufacturers. This is the very least we owe every American who will now bear the scars -- physical and mental -- of this latest attack. **We have to do more.** Thank you, Joe Joe Biden

name: Greg Landsman
subject: Peace is possible
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress P
body:
and that is what I am working and praying for.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72265546/434763602/-1268629450?refcode=em_msg_2023.10.26_b1_gl_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDY2NDU5Yy01Njc0LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rnR7O1MgZ2_GuW2HHv-9HMkl0ZxqRvU760La5CYBqt8=&emci=1011e3da-4974-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=5d66459c-5674-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=10283101)
---
Dear friend,

1,400 people have been murdered. Hundreds are being held hostage in Gaza. And Israel is fighting for its very survival. As are innocent Palestinians in Gaza.

This war is not for revenge. This war is not against Palestinians. This war is against Hamas and those who fund Hamas’ terrorism – particularly Iranian leadership.

Israelis and Palestinians have been targeted and victimized by a regime that seeks to destroy Israel and deprive the Palestinian people of a legitimate government.

War is horrific, and we mourn the awfulness of it all. But Hamas poses an existential threat to the future of Israel and to the Palestinian people.

Global partners, including Qatar, Turkey, and Egypt, must stand up and do their part.

The United States and our global allies must stand side by side as we work to end this campaign of terror. The world should be all in to defend Israel and provide refuge and relief to Palestinians in Gaza. And the world should support a ceasefire when the hostages have been released and Hamas is no longer in charge or a threat to anyone’s safety or security.

Peace will come when the world stands up to Hamas and Iranian leaders that support them. Peace will come when terror is gone and the Gaza and the West Bank are allowed legitimate governing authorities.

Peace is possible, and that is what I am working and praying for.

Thank you,

_Greg_

name: Laura Friedman
subject: Big wins for California

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72265558/434763700/-1415976427?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTc4OTU3ZTAtNTY3NC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M9nsnFnWeq4TDp6jwub7mxwcb7JUnXlQm1QjyAesOF8=) Friend, Despite the legislative dysfunction of MAGA Republicans, we are making progress here in California. I'm proud of two of my environmental bills that were just signed into law: **AB 496, enhancing the Toxic-Free Cosmetics Act** , will ensure 26 harmful chemicals found in many cosmetic products can no longer be used, improving the safety of personal care products we rely on. Many of the 26 chemicals listed in the new law have been linked to various health problems, including a higher risk of cancer and damage to organs or eyes. Personal care products and cosmetics should be non-toxic for everyone, and this bill brings California in line with the most stringent consumer-safety laws in the world. **AB1322, the California Ecosystems Protections Act of 2023** , will help stop unintentional poisonings of wildlife from the chemical diphacinone in rat poisons. Our beloved and iconic mountain lion P-22 was euthanized after amassing a series of health issues, and rodenticides were a major contributor, leaving him vulnerable to parasitic diseases. This is a major win in reducing deaths and illness for our pets and wildlife, and even our children who may unintentionally ingest these toxins. I am proud that these critical bills are now California law, and I'm running for Congress so that I can work to pass this type of legislation on a national level. **[CA-30 deserves proven, effective environmental and health leadership in Washington. If you’re able, please donate $3 today to help support my effort to succeed Adam Schiff.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72265560/434763701/-1415976427?refcode=em-10.26.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTc4OTU3ZTAtNTY3NC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M9nsnFnWeq4TDp6jwub7mxwcb7JUnXlQm1QjyAesOF8=)** __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:__ | ****[$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72265562/434763703/-1415976427?refcode=em-10.26.23-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTc4OTU3ZTAtNTY3NC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M9nsnFnWeq4TDp6jwub7mxwcb7JUnXlQm1QjyAesOF8=)**** | ****[$35](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72265564/434763704/-1415976427?refcode=em-10.26.23-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTc4OTU3ZTAtNTY3NC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M9nsnFnWeq4TDp6jwub7mxwcb7JUnXlQm1QjyAesOF8=)****

| | Patriot,

---
First, let me fill you in on some fantastic news:
---
_**_Our movement is officially VICTORIOUS over the RINOs!_**
_
---
At the end of August, behind closed doors, the special interest “Republicans” imposed a critical deadline upon themselves...

---
They said that 60 DAYS was the specific timetable they had to **_“beat Trump,_** ” otherwise, their efforts to stop us were doomed to fail.

---
And now, with their sinister plot having come and gone, all they have to show for it is UTTER FAILURE.

---
**We’re winning the primary by a historic 50-POINT margin, and we’re beating Crooked Joe in all the critical battleground states that will no doubt decide the 2024 election!**

---
_But I’ll be frank, there is a flip side to this victory..._
---
_Now that Crooked Joe knows 100% of our focus is shifting to our _REAL_ mission of FIRING him for good, the witch hunts will no doubt – and it’s hard to think this possible – _ get_ _even worse from here on out.__

---
Patriot, that means this month’s fundraising deadline just became that much more important...

---
_As the_ __FIRST__ _deadline since the RINOs’ plot to stop us was officially deemed their greatest failure, Crooked Joe and the Radical Democrats will be laser focused on our October numbers._

---
Which is why, if you’re able, I’m counting on every one of our grassroots supporters to contribute whatever you can – $10, $5, even just $1 – to **OUTRAISE** the incompetent Crook currently occupying the White House.

They said that 60 DAYS was the specific timetable they had to “beat Trump, ” otherwise, their efforts to stop us were doomed to fail. And now, with their sinister plot having come and gone, all they have to show for it is UTTER FAILURE. We’re winning the primary by a historic 50-POINT margin, and we’re beating Crooked Joe in all the critical battleground states that will no doubt decide the 2024 election! But I’ll be frank, there is a flip side to this victory... Now that Crooked Joe knows 100% of our focus is shifting to our REAL mission of FIRING him for good, the witch hunts will no doubt – and it’s hard to think this possible – get even worse from here on out. As the FIRST deadline since the RINOs’ plot to stop us was officially deemed their greatest failure, Crooked Joe and the Radical Democrats will be laser focused on our October numbers. name: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
subject: The New Speaker of the House
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
After four nominees in three weeks—including two in just one day—House Republicans elected a new Speaker of the House this week: Mike Johnson from Louisiana. His name may be a new one to you, as it is for many people. In the days and weeks ahead, you will hear more about him. You may have already heard:
*
He
was
a
chief
architect
of
former
President
Trump’s
plot
to
overturn
the
2020
election,
led
efforts
in
the
House
to
oppose
certifying
the
2020
election,
and
was
deeply
involved
with
developing
the
specious
legal
theory
that
Republicans
used
on
January
6.
*
*
He
led
efforts
to
discriminate
against
LGBTQ+
people,
including
a
bill
that
would
ban
discussion
of
sexual
orientation
or
gender
identity
at
any
institution
receiving
federal
funding.
*
*
Just
last
year,
he
voted
against
the
bipartisan
Respect
for
Marriage
Act
,
which
protects
marriage
equality
for
same-sex
and
interracial
couples.
*
*
He
supports
extreme
abortion
restrictions—including
criminalizing
abortion
nationwide
with
no
exceptions.
He
celebrated
the
end
of
Roe
v.
Wade
as
a
“great,
joyous
occasion.”
Perhaps the most telling thing we heard this week came from Rep. Matt Gaetz, who said on Steve Bannon’s podcast: “If you don’t think that moving from Kevin McCarthy to MAGA Mike Johnson shows the ascendance of this movement and where the power in the Republican Party truly lies, then you’re not paying attention.”
We must pay attention.
We will continue to learn more about Speaker Johnson in the days, weeks, and months ahead. And I so hope we will be able to find some common ground, as House Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries has offered time and again.
But we know enough already to be certain that Democrats must retake control of the House by winning the 2024 elections. The stakes are too high to do anything else. House Republicans have shown us who they are. Believe them. And act. Vote. Volunteer. Donate.
If you are able to contribute to our efforts to hold this seat and elect Democrats, it will help us run a strong campaign from now to next November. You can do so here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231026?refcode=lpfe231026]
Together, we can do anything,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231026?refcode=lpfe231026]

subject: OLCV's 2023 Environmental Scorecard is here!
body:
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72265967/434765044/-966269750?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlZGI0NjBiLTVhNzQtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1j1cDy3nbwJspu_ta5VPb_YwpurDRcfDjFsYnx9lAY0=&emci=56df2340-4774-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=aedb460b-5a74-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) It’s arrived: The **[2023 Environmental Scorecard for the Oregon Legislature is now available](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72265968/434765045/-758766012?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlZGI0NjBiLTVhNzQtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1j1cDy3nbwJspu_ta5VPb_YwpurDRcfDjFsYnx9lAY0=&emci=56df2340-4774-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=aedb460b-5a74-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)! ** Dear Peter, The 2023 Oregon State Legislative Session was rough, to say the least. Oregonians had to witness not just another Republican walkout, but the LONGEST Republican walkout in state history. The six-week stunt nearly shut down the state, and went against the will of Oregon voters (both Republican and Democrat) who overwhelmingly voted to stop walkouts. One thing was clear: Oregonians expect their elected officials to show up for work just like we do. And yet, they walked out again. Thankfully the leadership in the Senate and the House held strong. Speaker Dan Rayfield kept the House working hard and passing as many bills as possible so they were ready to go when and if the Republican senators returned. While Senate President Rob Wagner held strong in not giving in to Republican demands. In the end, enough Republican senators returned to pass the budget and the some 300+ bills that had piled up in their absence. Those bills included HB 3409 and HB 3630, a huge climate and energy package that created a $90 million budget and will allow Oregon to compete for billions of dollars of federal funding for climate change reduction and resilience. The package included all of our **Resilient, Efficient Buildings Priority** bills and the **Natural Climate Solutions Priority** bill. We passed a majority of our priorities including the **Toxic Free Kids Act Modernization** bill (HB 3043), **Toxic Free Cosmetics** (SB 546), **Legalizing Reusables** (SB 545), and a **Polystyrene Ban** (SB 543). **[Check out more of the major environmental bills that were voted on this year in the Scorecard!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72265969/434765046/-758766012?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlZGI0NjBiLTVhNzQtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1j1cDy3nbwJspu_ta5VPb_YwpurDRcfDjFsYnx9lAY0=&emci=56df2340-4774-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=aedb460b-5a74-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** Unfortunately, as is the case every session, we also spent a huge amount of our energy and time fighting bad bills. We designated six bills as Major Threats and we were able to kill or improve all of them. Most notable was HB 3414––a housing bill that included unnecessary expansion of Urban Growth Boundaries (UGBs), threatening our land use system. That bill died on the floor of the Senate by _**one single vote**_. The Oregon we know and love is in large part due to our iconic land use laws which have prevented urban sprawl––both protecting our natural environment and agricultural land, and helping protect people from wildfires by having less development in potentially high fire risk areas. The housing crisis was not brought on by our strong land use laws, and we are not going to build more affordable housing by expanding UGBs. We’re grateful to the lawmakers who took a stand by voting no on this bill. In addition to killing a lot of bad bills, a lot of good bills unfortunately also died this session. One such bill was **100% Clean For Data Centers** (HB 2816) which aimed to close the loophole in the 100% Clean Energy for All bill passed in 2021. Data centers are a huge and quickly growing source of electricity in Oregon, and we will have to address their energy use if we are going to meet our clean energy goals and avert the worst effects of climate change. It was also a big disappointment to see **Right to Repair** (SB 542) and **Toxic Free Schools** (SB 426) die––both were OCN priorities that fell victim to the Republican walk out. For more on both good and bad bills that died, you can check out the **[Bill Graveyard section of the Scorecard](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72265970/434765047/38419628?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlZGI0NjBiLTVhNzQtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1j1cDy3nbwJspu_ta5VPb_YwpurDRcfDjFsYnx9lAY0=&emci=56df2340-4774-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=aedb460b-5a74-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)**.

The Scorecard is one of our best tools for holding our elected leaders accountable. In it you can see how your state senator and state representative voted on the climate and environment, so you can hold them accountable as we head toward the next election. **[Please send an email to your lawmakers either thanking them for voting for the bills you care about or asking them to do better next year.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72265971/434765048/-211177748?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlZGI0NjBiLTVhNzQtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1j1cDy3nbwJspu_ta5VPb_YwpurDRcfDjFsYnx9lAY0=&emci=56df2340-4774-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=aedb460b-5a74-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** This grueling and tough session took its toll–only three senators and four representatives received a perfect 100% score. Six legislators were honored with awards. **[Click here to find out which lawmakers won awards for the 2023 Legislative session and who received a perfect score.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72265972/434765049/-1534251114?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlZGI0NjBiLTVhNzQtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1j1cDy3nbwJspu_ta5VPb_YwpurDRcfDjFsYnx9lAY0=&emci=56df2340-4774-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=aedb460b-5a74-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** As we look back at the 2023 legislative session, we want to say a big thank you to YOU and your activism! You sent emails to your lawmakers, signed petitions, posted on social media, attended hearings, and showed up for our virtual Lobby Day. Now, take a look at the Scorecard and see how your hard work has paid off. Then, join us in holding our lawmakers accountable as we head into the 2024 short session and the next election! **[Email your legislators and either thank them for standing up for the environment in 2023, or ask them to do better in 2024.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72265973/434765050/-211177748?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlZGI0NjBiLTVhNzQtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1j1cDy3nbwJspu_ta5VPb_YwpurDRcfDjFsYnx9lAY0=&emci=56df2340-4774-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=aedb460b-5a74-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** Thank you, Julia DeGraw
Coalition Director P.S. This year’s Scorecard cover photo (and the winner of our 2023 Environmental Photo Contest) is volunteers of the Pacific Crest Trail Association All Women Volunteer Crew, taken by Teri Smith. **[Click here to see it, and other photos from photo contest finalists included in the Scorecard](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72265974/434765051/-758766012?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlZGI0NjBiLTVhNzQtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1j1cDy3nbwJspu_ta5VPb_YwpurDRcfDjFsYnx9lAY0=&emci=56df2340-4774-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=aedb460b-5a74-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)**. |
